title: HyperDCM: Dynamic Cluster Memory Replay in Hyperbolic Space for Continual Robotic Navigation Across Scenes
summary: Continual learning in visual navigation remains challenging due to catastrophic forgetting and the difficulties associated with adapting to diverse and evolving environments. To address these issues, we propose Hyperbolic Dynamic Cluster Memory (HyperDCM), a structure-aware memory mechanism that enhances diffusion policy-based navigation through scene graph modeling and principled memory replay. HyperDCM extracts semantic scene triples from RGB observations using large vision-language models, encodes them into scene graph embeddings via a Relational Graph Convolutional Network (R-GCN), and projects the embeddings into hyperbolic space to enhance structural separability and retention in continual navigation. A dynamic clustering and structure-sensitive update strategy selects representative samples for memory replay, thereby preserving knowledge diversity and mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Experiments on multi-scene indoor and outdoor datasets demonstrate that HyperDCM achieves superior retention of past navigation capabilities and improved generalization compared to representative continual learning baselines adapted to diffusion policy navigation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出HyperDCM，一种基于双曲动态聚类记忆的机制，通过场景图建模和结构化记忆回放，增强扩散策略导航在持续学习中的抗遗忘能力和泛化性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉导航中的持续学习面临灾难性遗忘和难以适应多样化动态环境的挑战。
AI.method: 利用大视觉语言模型从RGB观测中提取语义场景三元组，通过关系图卷积网络编码为场景图嵌入，投影至双曲空间以增强结构可分性；采用动态聚类与结构敏感的更新策略选择代表性样本进行记忆回放。
AI.result: 在多场景室内外数据集上，HyperDCM在保持过往导航能力和泛化性方面优于主流持续学习基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 双曲空间嵌入与结构感知记忆回放能有效缓解灾难性遗忘，提升持续视觉导航的性能。

title: Control Design for a Rideable Animatronic Two-Wheeled Robot with Quadruped Form
summary: In recent years, motorcycle popularity has been declining, particularly among the younger generations. To rekindle interest in motorcycles among this demographic, we developed a rideable two-wheeled robot equipped with four limbs as a future partner mobility concept and intended for use in public events. The character reproduced by this robot carries the protagonist on its back and exhibits a dynamic quadrupedal gait. To maximize the riding experience, we aimed to match the robot's weight and size to the character's specifications while ensuring rider safety and enabling expressive movements of limbs, wrists, ankles, and facial features. However, achieving locomotion solely through limb movement would require excessive motor output and increased limb strength, resulting in higher weight and extremely slow gait, thereby reducing character fidelity. To overcome these challenges, the robot performs its primary locomotion using a self-balancing two-wheeled base, while the limbs provide auxiliary support during mounting and dismounting and move in coordination with the wheeled locomotion speed. This approach enables an animatronic robot capable of intuitive, weight-shift-based control for free and natural movement. In this paper, we focus on a robust selfbalancing control method that maintains stability even during rapid limb movements, as well as a motion control strategy that generates natural quadruped-like behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种可骑行的双轮四肢机器人，通过自平衡双轮基座实现主要运动，四肢提供辅助支撑和表达性动作，并提出了鲁棒的自平衡控制方法和生成自然四足行为的运动控制策略。
AI.motivation: 近年来摩托车在年轻群体中受欢迎程度下降，为了重新激发该群体对摩托车的兴趣，开发了一种可作为未来伙伴出行概念的、可骑行的双轮四肢机器人，用于公共活动展示。
AI.method: 机器人采用自平衡双轮基座作为主要运动方式，四肢仅在上下车时提供辅助支撑，并随轮式运动速度协调运动。提出了鲁棒的自平衡控制方法以在快速肢体运动时保持稳定性，以及生成自然四足行为的运动控制策略。
AI.result: 实现了基于直觉重心偏移控制的自由自然运动，机器人能在快速肢体动作下保持稳定，并展现出动态的四足步态。
AI.conclusion: 通过将轮式自平衡与四肢运动相结合，解决了纯肢体运动所需电机输出过大、重量增加和步态过慢的问题，实现了高角色保真度的可骑行仿生机器人。

title: Real-Time sEMG-Based Telecontrol of an Assistive Robotic Arm Using a 1D Convolutional Neural Network
summary: Motor impairments affecting the upper limb significantly reduce autonomy in daily activities, particularly for tasks involving object manipulation. Assistive robotic arms offer a promising solution, provided they can be controlled in an intuitive, reliable, and responsive manner. Among human--machine interface approaches, surface electromyography (sEMG) enables non-invasive access to muscle activity and thus to the user's motor intentions. This work proposes a real-time sEMG-based interface for the teleoperation of an assistive robotic arm. The system relies on four-channel sEMG acquisition, signal preprocessing, segmentation into sliding windows, and classification using a one-dimensional convolutional neural network (CNN). Several real-time strategies are investigated, including threshold-based onset detection, a two-stage classification approach (rest vs movement followed by gesture recognition), and a single classifier handling both rest and five gestures. The complete pipeline is implemented and evaluated both in simulation and on a real robotic platform. The CNN-based approach achieves high classification performance, with a test accuracy above 90\% and strong generalization on experimentally acquired signals. The system exhibits stable real-time behavior, with an average latency of approximately 0.32 s consistent with the chosen windowing strategy, and the robot can be controlled reliably using discrete gestures, producing coherent and smooth movements in both simulated and real environments. These findings demonstrate the feasibility of sEMG-based telecontrol for assistive robotics and highlight the importance of integrating signal processing, deep learning, and control strategies within a unified real-time framework. Future work may explore hybrid control approaches combining sEMG with additional sensing modalities to further improve robustness and usability.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于表面肌电信号(sEMG)和卷积神经网络(CNN)的实时接口，用于辅助机器臂的遥操作，在模拟和真实机器人平台上均实现了90%以上的分类准确率和约0.32秒的低延迟。
AI.motivation: 上肢运动障碍严重影响日常生活自主性，辅助机器臂需要直观、可靠且响应迅速的控制方式，sEMG作为一种非侵入式的人机接口手段，能够获取用户运动意图，但目前仍缺乏统一的实时框架实现高效控制。
AI.method: 采用四通道sEMG采集、信号预处理、滑动窗口分割，以及一维卷积神经网络(CNN)进行分类。研究了基于阈值的起始检测、两阶段分类（静息vs运动+手势识别）以及单分类器同时处理静息和五种手势等多种实时策略。
AI.result: 测试准确率超过90%，平均延迟约0.32秒，在模拟和真实环境中均能实现稳定、连贯、平滑的机器人控制。
AI.conclusion: 证明了基于sEMG的遥控制用于辅助机器人的可行性，强调了信号处理、深度学习和控制策略在统一实时框架中集成的重要性，未来可探索结合多种传感模态的混合控制方法。

title: S.E.A.G.R: A Socially and Emotionally Aware Greeting Robot Framework with Dual-Layer Cultural and Affective Modulation
comment: 13 pages, 6 figures. Accepted for publication in the proceedings of the 18th International Conference on Social Robotics (ICSR 2026)
summary: This paper presents SEAGR (Socially and Emotionally Aware Greeting Robot), a robotic greeting framework designed for human-robot interaction environments involving users from diverse cultural backgrounds and different emotional states. Since greeting behaviour strongly influences first impressions, user comfort, and trust, robots operating in public spaces must be able to interact in a socially appropriate and adaptive manner. However, many existing systems still rely on static greeting routines that do not account for cultural variation, emotional context, or interpersonal distance. SEAGR introduces a dual-layer modulation framework in which cultural identity determines the appropriate greeting type, while affective cues influence how that greeting is executed. The system combines context-aware cultural mapping, emotion-based gesture modulation, and proxemic regulation within a unified Sense-Think-Act architecture. A low-cost prototype is implemented using a USB camera, ultrasonic sensor, Arduino-controlled servos, and a laptop-based Python processing system. This work is presented as a system design and proof-of-concept; empirical validation through user studies is explicitly acknowledged as a current limitation and is identified as the primary direction for future work.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SEAGR（社交与情感感知的问候机器人）框架，通过双层调制机制结合文化身份和情感状态，实现适应多文化背景和不同情绪用户的机器人问候行为。系统采用Sense-Think-Act架构，集成文化映射、情感姿态调制和空间距离调节，目前作为概念验证提出。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人问候系统依赖静态例程，未能考虑文化差异、情感语境和人际距离，导致在公共空间中与不同文化背景和情绪状态用户的交互缺乏社会适应性和恰当性。
AI.method: 提出双层调制框架：文化身份决定问候类型（第一层），情感线索影响问候执行方式（第二层）。系统架构为Sense-Think-Act，包含上下文感知文化映射、基于情感的姿态调制和空间距离调节。原型采用USB摄像头、超声波传感器、Arduino控制舵机和笔记本电脑Python处理系统实现。
AI.result: 目前作为系统设计与概念验证呈现，尚未进行实证验证。用户研究被明确列为当前局限性和未来工作的主要方向。
AI.conclusion: SEAGR框架为文化感知和情感感知的机器人问候行为提供了系统化设计方案，但尚需通过用户研究进行实证验证，以评估其在真实人机交互场景中的有效性。

title: Reinforcement Learning-Guided NSGA-II Enhanced with Gray Relational Coefficient for Multi-Objective Optimization: Application to NASDAQ Portfolio Optimization
summary: In modern financial markets, decision-makers increasingly rely on quantitative methods to navigate complex trade-offs among multiple, often conflicting objectives. This paper addresses constrained multi-objective optimization (MOO) with an application to portfolio optimization for minimizing risk and maximizing return. To address existing gaps, we propose a novel reinforcement learning (RL)-guided non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) enhanced with gray relational coefficients (GRC), termed RL-NSGA-II-GRC, which combines an RL agent controller and GRC-based selection to improve convergence and diversity of Pareto fronts. The agent adapts evolutionary parameters online using metrics of hypervolume, feasibility, and diversity, while the GRC tournament operator ranks parents via a unified score considering dominance rank, crowding distance, and proximity to ideal reference. We evaluate the framework on the Kursawe and CONSTR benchmarks and a NASDAQ portfolio application. On the benchmarks, RL-NSGA-II-GRC achieves convergence improvements of about 5.8% and 4.4% over NSGA-II, while preserving well-distributed non-dominated solutions. In the portfolio application, it produces a smooth, densely populated efficient frontier supporting identification of the maximum Sharpe ratio portfolio (annualized Sharpe =1.92) and utility-optimal portfolios for different risk-aversion levels. The main contributions are three-fold: 1) we propose an RL-NSGA-II-GRC method integrating an RL agent into the evolutionary framework to adaptively control parameters via generational feedback; 2) we design a GRC-enhanced binary tournament operator providing a comprehensive indicator to guide the search toward the Pareto front; 3) we demonstrate, on benchmark MOO and a NASDAQ case study, that the method delivers improved convergence and well-populated frontiers supporting actionable insights.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RL-NSGA-II-GRC方法，将强化学习代理与灰色关联度增强的NSGA-II相结合，用于约束多目标优化。在基准测试和NASDAQ投资组合应用中，该方法相较NSGA-II实现了约5.8%和4.4%的收敛性提升，并生成平滑密集的有效前沿，支持最大夏普比率和不同风险厌恶水平下的最优投资组合选择。
AI.motivation: 现代金融市场决策者需要应对多个相互冲突的目标（如最小化风险与最大化收益），现有多目标优化方法在帕累托前沿的收敛性和多样性方面存在不足，需要一种自适应、综合性的优化框架来改善求解质量。
AI.method: 提出RL-NSGA-II-GRC框架：1) 引入RL代理控制器，利用超体积、可行性和多样性指标在线自适应调整进化参数；2) 设计基于灰色关联度(GRC)的锦标赛选择算子，通过综合考虑支配等级、拥挤距离和与理想参考点的接近度来评估父代个体；3) 将RL代理与GRC选择集成到NSGA-II的进化流程中。
AI.result: 在Kursawe和CONSTR基准上，相较NSGA-II分别实现约5.8%和4.4%的收敛性提升；在NASDAQ投资组合应用中生成了平滑密集的有效前沿，获得年化夏普比率1.92的最大夏普比率投资组合，并支持不同风险厌恶水平下的效用最优组合选择。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在收敛性和前沿分布质量上优于传统NSGA-II，能够为金融多目标优化提供可行的决策支持，三个主要贡献包括RL驱动的自适应参数控制、GRC增强的选择算子和在基准与真实案例上的有效性验证。

title: Rater State Bias in RLHF Preference Data: An Audit Framework
summary: We identify a structured confound in Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF). Pairwise preference labels are intended to reflect the compared outputs, but they may also reflect the rater's state during annotation. Under sustained stressful or distressing conditions, raters' preferences may shift over time. As a result, preference data can encode rater state alongside judgments about response quality. These shifts differ from ordinary disagreement or random label noise. They are state dependent, can be shared across annotators working under similar conditions, and can propagate through reward modeling and policy optimization. We therefore propose rater state shift as a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data. This paper develops a hypothesis and an audit framework for studying this source of bias. We define rater state shift, rater state confound, and correlated rater state bias. We also define survival level emotional authenticity as a measurable response pattern using lexical, pragmatic, discourse, and safety related features. We analyze how correlated rater state bias can survive aggregation and enter learned reward signals. We derive five falsifiable predictions and effect size thresholds for an initial audit. Finally, we present an audit protocol and pilot study plan that can be applied to publicly available instruction tuned models. We do not infer the training history of any specific deployed model. Our goal is to isolate a plausible and testable source of structured bias in RLHF preference data.

AI.tldr: 本文识别了RLHF中一种结构性的混杂偏差——标注者状态漂移。标注者的情绪或压力状态会随时间变化，并反映在偏好标注中，这种状态依赖的偏差不同于普通噪声，会通过奖励建模和策略优化传播。文章定义了相关概念，提出可验证的假设、审计框架和初步研究方案，旨在隔离这一偏误来源。
AI.motivation: RLHF中的偏好标注数据被假设仅反映输出质量比较，但标注者标注时的状态（如压力、情绪）可能系统地影响标注结果，形成一种未被充分认识的结构性偏差。本文旨在提出并形式化这一假设，为后续检测和缓解提供理论基础。
AI.method: 论文采用理论分析与概念框架构建的方法：定义标注者状态漂移、状态混杂和相关状态偏差等核心概念；提出生存水平情感真实性作为可测量的响应模式，涵盖词汇、语用、话语和安全相关特征；推导五个可证伪预测和效应量阈值；设计审计协议和初步研究计划。
AI.result: 建立了标注者状态漂移作为RLHF中结构性偏差来源的完整假设体系，给出了偏差传播路径的理论分析，并提出了可操作性的审计方案。
AI.conclusion: 标注者状态漂移是RLHF偏好数据中一个合理的、可检验的结构性偏差来源，需要系统性的审计以理解其对模型对齐的影响。

title: What Makes Linguistic Representations Good Models of High-Level Visual Perception in the Human Brain?
comment: Supplementary Materials in the public GitHub repository referenced in the paper
summary: Image descriptions represented with language models (LMs) predict human brain responses to naturalistic images in high-level visual regions, but the factors driving this predictivity remain unclear. To investigate this, we systematically studied how images are described and which language models are used to embed those descriptions. For a common set of images, we considered six caption types -- including human-annotated and multiple machine-generated captions -- differing along several dimensions. Each caption was represented with five LMs, spanning autoregressive LMs trained to predict upcoming words and text embedders, i.e., LMs fine-tuned on semantic tasks requiring sentence/document-level representations. Machine-generated captions yielded significant brain predictivity and alignment, often surpassing human-annotated captions used in previous work. Across caption types, text embedders consistently outperformed autoregressive LMs, a pattern replicated when measuring behavioural alignment with image-similarity judgments. Analyses of caption representations from different model layers further revealed that both brain predictivity and behavioural alignment peak at intermediate network depth, shortly after a point thought to mark the emergence of syntactic and semantic structure. Altogether, our results demonstrate that both the content of image captions and the LM used to represent them influence brain- and behaviour-modelling performance, establishing caption embeddings as a useful tool for studying high-level visual perception.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了图像描述（caption）的内容以及用于嵌入这些描述的语言模型（LM）如何影响对大脑视觉皮层反应的预测能力。研究发现，机器生成的描述在脑预测和行为对齐上常优于人工标注；文本嵌入模型（text embedders）一致优于自回归语言模型；脑预测和行为对齐在中间网络层达到峰值，该位置与句法和语义结构的出现有关。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究表明用语言模型表示的图像描述可以预测大脑对自然图像的高层视觉反应，但驱动这种预测能力的因素尚不清楚。本文旨在系统探究描述内容（不同来源的caption）和语言模型类型两个维度对脑预测能力的影响。
AI.method: 使用一组共同图像，考虑六种不同类型的caption（包括人工标注和多种机器生成的caption），每种caption用五种语言模型（包括自回归语言模型和文本嵌入模型）进行嵌入。通过分析脑预测能力、行为对齐性以及不同网络层的表征，系统比较各因素的作用。
AI.result: 机器生成的caption在脑预测和行为对齐上表现显著，常超越人工标注的caption；文本嵌入模型在所有caption类型上一致优于自回归语言模型；脑预测和行为对齐均在中间网络层达到峰值，该位置与句法和语义结构的出现点接近。
AI.conclusion: 图像描述的内容和用于表示描述的语言模型都会影响脑和行为建模的性能，说明caption嵌入是研究高层视觉感知的有效工具。

title: PRISM: Multimodal Terrain Mapping for Rover Navigation in Unstructured Environments
summary: Robotic navigation in unstructured environments requires robust situational awareness to safely traverse hazards such as steep slopes and rocky terrain. To address this challenge, perception systems increasingly rely on multimodal sensor fusion. Specifically, integrating thermal imagery with standard optical and depth sensors enhances terrain differentiation, directly improving the reliability of mapping algorithms. This paper presents PRISM, a multimodal perception system for terrain mapping in unstructured settings. PRISM leverages a custom sensor suite to capture aligned RGB, depth, and thermal (RGB-D-T) imagery. At its core is OmniUnet, a novel vision transformer-based network specifically designed for multimodal semantic terrain segmentation. We validated the proposed system using two newly annotated datasets (BASEPROD and LAENTIEC) and demonstrate its real-world applicability through physical field experiments. Deployed on a resource-constrained embedded computer, PRISM efficiently generates traversability maps that directly enable autonomous navigation via a rover's Guidance, Navigation, and Control (GNC) subsystem.

AI.tldr: PRISM是一个多模态感知系统，通过融合RGB、深度和热成像（RGB-D-T）数据，利用基于视觉Transformer的OmniUnet网络进行语义地形分割，在资源受限的嵌入式平台上实现无人车自主导航中的可通行性地图生成。
AI.motivation: 非结构化环境中的机器人导航面临陡坡、岩石地形等挑战，需要强大的态势感知能力；传统单模态感知难以可靠区分复杂地形，亟需多模态融合方案来提升地形建图的准确性。
AI.method: 构建定制传感器套件获取对齐的RGB-深度-热成像（RGB-D-T）数据；提出OmniUnet——一种基于视觉Transformer的多模态语义地形分割网络；在两个新标注数据集（BASEPROD和LAENTIEC）上验证，并在资源受限嵌入式计算机上部署实际物理实验。
AI.result: 在BASEPROD和LAENTIEC两个新数据集上完成验证，并通过实地物理实验证明了系统的实际可用性；在嵌入式平台上高效生成了可直接用于无人车GNC子系统的可通行性地图。
AI.conclusion: PRISM系统通过RGB-D-T多模态融合和OmniUnet网络，有效提升了非结构化环境中地形感知的可靠性，并在资源受限平台上实现了实时可通行性建图，展示了实际自主导航部署的可行性。

title: DocOCR-Eval: A Correction-Based Framework for OCR Tool Selection Without Ground Truth
summary: Document parsing is a foundational step for document understanding tasks such as visual question answering and key information extraction, as it transforms unstructured scanned images into structured representations by extracting textual, visual, and layout information. While numerous Optical Character Recognition (OCR) engines and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been developed for this purpose, selecting an appropriate document parsing solution for a given document collection remains challenging, particularly in label-scarce settings. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of text recognition performance across a diverse set of OCR engines and state-of-the-art MLLMs on multiple scanned document benchmarks spanning different domains and languages. Motivated by the limited contextual reasoning capabilities of many OCR engines and the high cost of manual annotations, we propose DocOCR-Eval, an annotation-free evaluation framework for automatic OCR assessment and selection. DocOCR-Eval employs a three-staged correction and ranking strategy to approximate annotation-based tool ordering without ground-truth labels. We show that aggregating across multiple MLLMs progressively improves alignment with annotation-based rankings. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that reliable OCR tool selection can be achieved in realistic, label-limited settings, providing practical guidance for deploying document parsing systems across diverse real-world document collections.

AI.tldr: 本文对多种OCR引擎和MLLM在扫描文档解析中的文本识别性能进行了系统评估，并提出了无需人工标注的自动评估框架DocOCR-Eval，通过三阶段校正与排序策略实现无标签场景下的OCR工具选择。
AI.motivation: 现有的OCR引擎和MLLM虽然众多，但在缺乏标注数据的场景下，如何为特定文档集合选择合适的解析方案仍是一个挑战。同时，许多OCR引擎缺乏上下文推理能力，而人工标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 提出DocOCR-Eval框架，采用三阶段校正与排序策略（three-staged correction and ranking strategy），无需真实标签即可近似基于标注的工具排序。通过聚合多个MLLM的输出逐步提升与标注排序的对齐度。
AI.result: 聚合多个MLLM能够渐进式地改善与基于标注的排名的一致性。在真实标签稀缺的场景下，可以可靠地实现OCR工具选择，为实际文档解析系统的部署提供了实用指导。
AI.conclusion: DocOCR-Eval框架能够在缺乏标注数据的现实条件下有效评估和选择OCR工具，降低了对人工标注的依赖，为跨领域、多语言扫描文档解析系统的部署提供了可行方案。

title: Design and Validation of a Lightweight 1D CNN for Affective Touch Classification in Soft Plush Companions
summary: Soft, sensorized companions offer a physically safe and emotionally intuitive interface for socially assistive technologies, yet their deformability and multichannel tactile sensing complicate the robust interpretation of human affect. This study presents a complete open-source MATLAB-based framework for the development and validation of compact deep learning models for affective touch recognition in soft interactive companions. As a primary contribution, a diverse FAIR-compliant dataset of 1326 labelled gesture sequences collected from 25 participants spanning children, teenagers, and adults is made publicly available, providing a reusable resource for future research in affective touch recognition. Through systematic architecture and hyperparameter exploration across 468 CNN models, the study identifies compact dilated one-dimensional convolutional neural networks (1D CNNs) as the most effective solution, with a 13.2k-parameter model achieving 75% test accuracy and 85% mean leave-one-subject-out cross-validation accuracy. Theoretical inference-time analysis shows that quantized deployment requires 3.2 MMAC per window, compatible with 20 Hz real-time operation on the target microcontroller. PC-based real-time simulation with the physical toy streaming sensor data demonstrates that the CNN resolves subtle social touches that the previous heuristic system failed to detect, whereas high-force negative interactions are captured more reliably by trivial threshold-based logic. The resulting hybrid inference pipeline - instantaneous heuristic filtering followed by CNN-based nuanced gesture classification - is proposed as the embedded deployment strategy. The study demonstrates that emotionally meaningful, privacy-preserving touch interpretation is computationally feasible for direct embedding within soft therapeutic companions, with hardware integration addressed in a forthcoming study.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个基于MATLAB的开源框架，用于开发轻量级深度学习模型以实现软体交互伴侣中的情感触觉识别。通过构建包含1326个标注手势序列的公开数据集，系统探索了468个CNN架构，最终确定13.2k参数的紧凑型一维扩张CNN为最优模型，在测试集上达到75%准确率，留一法交叉验证达到85%。量化部署仅需3.2 MMAC/窗口，可在目标微控制器上实现20 Hz实时运行。提出了启发式滤波+CNN细粒度分类的混合推理流水线作为嵌入式部署策略。
AI.motivation: 软体传感交互伴侣的变形性和多通道触觉传感使得人类情感的鲁棒解释变得复杂，现有方法难以在嵌入式平台上实现高效的情感触觉识别。
AI.method: 构建FAIR合规的多样化数据集（1326个手势序列，25名参与者）；系统探索468个CNN模型进行架构和超参数搜索；提出紧凑型一维扩张CNN（13.2k参数）；设计混合推理流水线（启发式阈值过滤+CNN细粒度分类）；进行量化部署的理论推理时间分析。
AI.result: 13.2k参数模型达到75%测试准确率和85%留一法交叉验证准确率；量化部署需3.2 MMAC/窗口，支持20 Hz实时运行；CNN能检测到先前启发式系统遗漏的细微社交触觉，而高力度负面交互由阈值逻辑更可靠捕获。
AI.conclusion: 具有情感意义且隐私保护的触觉解释在计算上可行，可直接嵌入软体治疗伴侣中；混合推理流水线是推荐的嵌入式部署策略；硬件集成将在后续研究中完成。

title: ForensicNet: Lightweight Attention-Enhanced MobileNetV2 for Automated Face Identification
summary: In forensic environments, automated identification of perpetrators is difficult due to pose changes, changes in light, occlusion, and lack of labeled data. This paper presents ForensicNet, a lightweight deep learning framework for forensic face recognition that enhances attention. The suggested model combines the MobileNetV2 backbone with Convolutional Block Attention Modules (CBAM) to improve the learning of discriminative features while maintaining computational speed. A two-phase transfer learning strategy with adaptive layer unfreezing is used to improve domain adaptation and reduce overfitting. This study used publicly available datasets such as LFW and SCFace, with 15,000 facial images spanning 68 identity classes. The proposed model outperforms baseline architectures such as AlexNet, ResNet-50, and MobileNetV2, with an accuracy of 92.4%, a precision of 90.8%, and a recall of 89.5%. Additionally, the framework requires only 2.1 GFLOPs per inference, and hence can be used in real-time forensic surveillance applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ForensicNet，一种轻量级深度学习框架，通过MobileNetV2结合CBAM注意力机制和两阶段迁移学习策略，在法医人脸识别中达到92.4%准确率，仅需2.1 GFLOPs，适用于实时法医监控。
AI.motivation: 法医环境中，由于姿态变化、光照变化、遮挡以及缺乏标注数据，自动化识别 perpetrators 非常困难。
AI.method: 提出ForensicNet框架，以MobileNetV2为骨干网络，集成卷积块注意力模块(CBAM)增强判别特征学习；采用两阶段迁移学习策略并自适应解冻层，以提升领域自适应并减少过拟合。
AI.result: 在LFW和SCFace数据集（15,000张人脸图像，68个身份类别）上，准确率92.4%、精确率90.8%、召回率89.5%，超越AlexNet、ResNet-50和MobileNetV2基线；每推理仅需2.1 GFLOPs。
AI.conclusion: 该轻量级框架在保持计算效率的同时实现了高精度，可部署于实时法医监控应用。

title: Back to the museum: Investigation of the acceptance of Android Andrea with and without emotion simulation in a museum
comment: Presented at the ACM Intelligent Virtual Agents conference in 2026 (IVA2026)
summary: For a second time, the android robot Andrea was set up at a public museum in Germany for six consecutive days to have conversations with visitors, fully autonomously. Building on previously gathered qualitative results, the robot was now capable of engaging in multi-lingual conversation with the visitors about the museum context. The robot was prepared with context information about the museum in general and its surrounding exhibits this time. The robot featured a slightly artificial sounding voice that was previously evaluated as congruent with its gender-ambiguous but very humanlike design. Three experimental conditions were implemented, in which either (1) the robot simulated no emotions, (2) the robots emotions were determined by ChatGPT 4.1, or (3) the WASABI emotion simulation architecture simulated the robot's emotion dynamics. An extended version of the TAM2 questionnaire was employed to let 73 visitors report on several factors of their opinion about the android robot Andrea after having experienced it. In result, the statistical analysis suggests that these first two approaches to implementing emotions into the chat architecture of our android robot Andrea did not yield any positive effects on the subjective evaluations by the visitors and were not detectable on a conscious level.

AI.tldr: 在德国博物馆部署的安卓机器人Andrea进行了为期6天的自主多语种对话实验，通过三种情绪条件（无情绪、ChatGPT 4.1驱动情绪、WASABI架构模拟情绪）对比，发现前两种情绪实现方式未对访客主观评价产生积极影响，且在意识层面不可检测。
AI.motivation: 在前期定性研究基础上，进一步探究安卓机器人在真实博物馆场景中自主对话时，不同情绪模拟方式对用户体验的影响，验证情绪表达能否提升人机交互满意度。
AI.method: 在德国博物馆部署安卓机器人Andrea，实现多语种自主对话；设置三种情绪条件（无情绪、ChatGPT 4.1驱动、WASABI架构模拟）；采用扩展版TAM2问卷收集73名访客的主观评价数据进行统计分析。
AI.result: 前两种情绪实现方式（无情绪和ChatGPT 4.1驱动）未对访客的主观评价产生任何积极效应，且访客在意识层面上无法检测到这些情绪差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前将情绪融入安卓机器人对话架构的前两种方法未能有效提升用户体验，表明简单引入情绪模拟可能不是改善人机交互的关键因素，需要更精细的情绪设计策略。

title: Fully-sensorized smart-eyewear platform for on-device Machine Learning
comment: This work was carried out in the EssilorLuxottica "Smart Eyewear Lab", a Joint Research Center between EssilorLuxottica and Politecnico di Milano
summary: This paper presents ARGO, a smart eyewear platform designed to bridge ergonomic comfort, high computational throughput, and energy efficiency. Unlike cloud-dependent solutions, ARGO leverages the STM32N6 microcontroller and its integrated Neural Processing Unit (NPU) to enable on-device machine learning, minimizing latency and preserving user privacy through local data processing. The primary contribution lies in the holistic co-design of hardware, firmware, and artificial intelligence, centered on the deployment of an optimized YOLOv11 model for real-time urban obstacle recognition. To ensure compatibility with the target NPU, we introduce Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA), an architectural refinement that enables efficient accelerator execution while preserving the original computational logic. The model is trained on the Walking On The Road (WOTR) dataset, and the final deployed configuration achieves an mAP50-95 of 24 under strict memory constraints, with a memory footprint of only 2.483 MB. The platform integrates a multimodal sensor suite, RGB cameras, Time-of-Flight sensors, microphones, and ambient sensors, and delivers 10 FPS at a continuous autonomy of ~113 minutes on a 200 mAh battery. These results demonstrate the feasibility of a high-performance, privacy-preserving, and socially acceptable assistive device, and highlight how competitive edge AI solutions increasingly demand tightly integrated, multidisciplinary co-design approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了ARGO，一款基于STM32N6微控制器和集成NPU的智能眼镜平台，通过硬件-固件-AI协同设计，部署优化的YOLOv11模型（引入Head-wise Parallel Attention架构）实现实时城市障碍物识别，在2.483 MB内存占用下达到24 mAP50-95，支持多模态传感器并以200 mAh电池实现~113分钟续航和10 FPS性能，展示了高性能、隐私保护且社会可接受的辅助设备的可行性。
AI.motivation: 现有智能眼镜平台多依赖云端解决方案，存在延迟高、隐私风险大等问题；同时，在嵌入式设备上实现高计算吞吐量、能效和佩戴舒适性三者兼顾仍面临重大挑战。
AI.method: 采用STM32N6微控制器及其集成NPU进行本地机器学习；提出Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA)架构优化YOLOv11模型以适配NPU执行；基于WOTR数据集训练；集成RGB相机、ToF传感器、麦克风和环境传感器的多模态传感套件；实现硬件、固件和AI的协同设计。
AI.result: 在严格内存约束下，模型内存占用仅2.483 MB，mAP50-95达到24；平台实现10 FPS实时推理，200 mAh电池下连续自主运行约113分钟。
AI.conclusion: ARGO证明了高性能、隐私保护且社会可接受的辅助设备的可行性，并指出竞争性边缘AI解决方案日益需要紧密集成的多学科协同设计方法。

title: Some Large Language Models Exhibit Consistent Risk Attitudes
summary: As artificial intelligence systems are deployed in open-ended, high-stakes settings, a critical dimension remains unmeasured: how perceived risk is translated into action. We test whether large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic and consistent risk attitudes under uncertainty. We introduce a cross-domain framework that decouples contextual risk belief from categorical decision, and apply it to six representative LLMs and 100 human participants across spatial navigation, clinical triage, and financial allocation tasks. Using regression models, we extract each agents belief-to-decision mapping and quantify risk sensitivity and risk attitude bias. We find that most tested LLMs exhibit (i) robust intra-task consistency, indicating stable mappings from contextual belief to risk decision within a fixed task domain; (ii) cross-domain rank-order stability, preserving relative risk posture across tasks; and (iii) a convergence toward a restricted risk-attitude distribution relative to the broader human baseline. These results reveal risk attitude as a stable and previously uncharacterized dimension of LLM behavior, establishing a foundation for evaluating and aligning AI systems in open-ended decision-making and motivating further investigation into the origins of these intrinsic behavioral dispositions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个跨领域框架，将风险信念与决策分离，测试了6个LLM和100名人类在空间导航、临床分诊和财务分配任务中的风险态度。发现LLM表现出任务内一致性、跨领域排序稳定性和收敛于较窄的风险态度分布，表明风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定且此前未被表征的维度。
AI.motivation: 在开放、高风险场景中部署AI系统时，感知风险如何转化为行动这一关键维度尚未被测量，现有研究缺乏对LLM风险态度的系统量化。
AI.method: 提出跨领域框架，将情境风险信念与类别决策解耦；对6个代表性LLM和100名人类在三个任务（空间导航、临床分诊、财务分配）中进行测试；使用回归模型提取信念到决策的映射，量化风险敏感性和风险态度偏差。
AI.result: (i) LLM在任务内具有稳定的一致性映射；(ii) 跨任务保持排序稳定性；(iii) LLM的风险态度分布相比人类基线更收敛。
AI.conclusion: 风险态度是LLM行为中一个稳定且此前未被表征的维度，为评估和对齐开放决策中的AI系统建立了基础，并激励进一步研究这些内在行为倾向的起源。

title: The JEPA Predictor: A Transferable Operator for Occluded Feature Completion
summary: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architectures (JEPAs) train a predictor jointly with their encoder, but downstream deployment discards the predictor and reads features from the encoder alone. The predictor is, by construction, a learned operator from visible-context features to features at masked positions, the structure a partial-view classifier needs. We show that this operator is portable across encoder families. We first establish that, at heavy mask, retaining the frozen predictor on a JEPA encoder substantially closes the accuracy gap against the strongest non-JEPA discriminative baselines. We then bolt the frozen predictors of I-JEPA and V-JEPA 2 onto four non-JEPA hosts (CLIP, DINOv3, DINOv2, MAE) through a single linear projection between feature spaces, fit in closed form on 500 ImageNet-1k images. Across both ImageNet-9 and Stanford Dogs and across three mask fractions, the lift over each host's masked-encoder baseline grows monotonically with the mask fraction K in every host-donor pair. CLIP paired with the I-JEPA predictor recovers most of the accuracy that masking removed on ImageNet-9 at heavy occlusion, and lifts fine-grained Stanford Dogs from 15.9% to 52.1% (+36 pp). The mechanism is identifiable: the projection pays a fixed cost on visible patches and the predictor provides a growing benefit on masked patches; the benefit dominates the heavy-occlusion regime. At low K on fine-grained classification the projection cost exceeds the benefit, defining the boundary where the linear bridge breaks down. The frozen JEPA predictor functions as a portable operator for occluded feature completion across encoder families, requiring no retraining of either model while fitting matched linear probes per mask fraction.

AI.tldr: 本文发现JEPA架构中的预测器可以跨编码器家族迁移使用：通过线性投影将冻结的JEPA预测器桥接到非JEPA编码器（如CLIP、DINOv3等），在遮挡图像分类任务上显著提升性能，尤其在高遮挡率下效果显著。
AI.motivation: JEPA架构中的预测器在部署时被丢弃，但其本质上是一个从可见上下文特征到掩码位置特征的学习算子，正是部分视图分类所需的结构。作者希望探究这个预测器是否可迁移到其他非JEPA编码器上使用，以提升其在遮挡场景下的分类能力。
AI.method: 从I-JEPA和V-JEPA 2中提取冻结的预测器，通过单一线性投影（在500张ImageNet-1k图像上闭式求解）桥接到CLIP、DINOv3、DINOv2、MAE四个非JEPA编码器上。在ImageNet-9和Stanford Dogs上评估不同掩码比例下的分类性能。
AI.result: 在所有宿主-供体配对中，性能提升随掩码比例K单调增长。CLIP+IJEPA预测器在ImageNet-9高遮挡下恢复了大部分因掩码损失的性能；在Stanford Dogs上从15.9%提升至52.1%（+36个百分点）。机制可识别：投影在可见块上产生固定成本，预测器在掩码块上提供递增收益，高遮挡下收益主导。
AI.conclusion: 冻结的JEPA预测器可作为跨编码器家族的便携式遮挡特征补全算子，无需重新训练任何模型，仅需按掩码比例拟合线性探针即可。

title: Linear Stability Analysis of an INDI Pitch-Rate Controller under Model Mismatch for a Tilt-Rotor VTOL UAV
summary: Incremental Nonlinear Dynamic Inversion (INDI) is attractive for unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) flight control because it reduces dependence on a full aerodynamic model while retaining strong disturbance-rejection capability. For a tilt-rotor vertical takeoff and landing (VTOL) architecture, however, the admissible model-mismatch range of the fast inner loop is still not characterized analytically in a parameter-explicit way. This paper isolates the pitch-rate/elevon subchannel of an existing cascaded INDI controller and studies its linear stability under model mismatch. A closed-form fifth-order transfer function is derived for the full controller-estimator-actuator-plant interconnection, and stability is characterized through the Routh-Hurwitz criterion over a parameterized linear model. Two representative three-parameter sweeps produce interpretable stability regions. Based on these feasibility maps, two uncertainty-aware tuning procedures are proposed: a robustness-oriented design that maximizes a weighted worst-case combination of gain margin and phase margin, and a performance-oriented design that maximizes worst-case closed-loop bandwidth subject to margin constraints. The results show that actuator lag and inertia mismatch are comparatively benign at nominal gain, whereas control-effectiveness mismatch, particularly a sign error in the allocation, is the most dangerous destabilizing factor, leading to concrete tuning recommendations for conservative and aggressive operating conditions.

AI.tldr: 本文针对倾转旋翼垂直起降飞行器，解析了增量非线性动态逆（INDI）控制器在模型失配下的线性稳定性，提出了基于鲁棒性和性能的两种调参方法，发现控制效能失配（特别是符号错误）是最危险的失稳因素。
AI.motivation: INDI控制器对倾转旋翼VTOL飞行器快速内环的允许模型失配范围尚缺乏参数显式的解析刻画，需要填补这一理论空白。
AI.method: 隔离级联INDI控制器中俯仰角速率/升降舵子通道，推导全互联（控制器-估计器-执行器-对象）的五阶闭环传递函数，利用Routh-Hurwitz判据分析参数化线性模型的稳定性，通过三维参数扫描生成可解释的稳定域，进而提出两种不确定性感知调参流程。
AI.result: 执行器延迟和惯性失配在标称增益下相对温和，而控制效能失配（尤其是分配符号错误）是最危险的失稳因素；基于稳定域地图给出了保守与激进工况下的具体调参建议。
AI.conclusion: 本文为INDI控制器在倾转旋翼VTOL上的稳定性提供了显式解析条件，并给出了兼顾鲁棒性与性能的调参策略。

title: LLM Unlearning for Cyber Defense: A Survey on Methods, Challenges, and Emerging Threats
summary: LLMs are increasingly deployed in security-critical systems across healthcare, finance, education, and decision support, yet their inability to forget creates serious cybersecurity, privacy, and safety risks. Sensitive personal information, copyrighted material, hazardous domain knowledge, and memorized training data remain encoded across billions of parameters long after deployment, leaving models vulnerable to extraction, jailbreak attacks, membership inference, and regulatory non-compliance. Real-world incidents, from chatbots regenerating private information to fabricated legal citations producing direct legal and financial cost, place the problem at the center of the emerging-threats landscape rather than the realm of speculation. Because retraining billion-parameter models on revised corpora is computationally infeasible, and because knowledge within an LLM is distributed and entangled across parameters rather than localized to identifiable units, LLM unlearning has emerged as the principal cyber defense response, aiming to remove or suppress targeted knowledge from a trained model without retraining and without eroding what the model should still know. A central question, however, remains unresolved. Do current methods genuinely remove knowledge, or do they only stop the model from expressing it under ordinary prompting conditions? This survey examines LLM unlearning through the lens of security, robustness, and verifiable forgetting, with primary focus on gradient-based methods, which have come to dominate the field due to their compatibility with existing training pipelines and their scalability to billion-parameter models.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了LLM遗忘问题，聚焦于基于梯度的遗忘方法，探讨当前方法是否真正移除知识还是仅抑制其表达，并分析了该领域在安全、鲁棒性和可验证遗忘方面的核心挑战。
AI.motivation: LLM部署在安全关键系统中，但其无法遗忘的特性导致隐私泄露、版权侵权、知识提取、越狱攻击等严重安全风险，且重新训练大规模模型在计算上不可行，因此需要有效的遗忘机制。
AI.method: 本文采用综述方法，以安全、鲁棒性和可验证遗忘为视角，重点考察基于梯度的遗忘方法（因其与现有训练流程兼容且可扩展至十亿参数模型）。
AI.result: 指出现有方法的核心未解问题：当前方法是否真正移除知识，还是仅在常规提示条件下抑制模型表达该知识。
AI.conclusion: LLM遗忘已成为应对新兴威胁的核心网络防御手段，但遗忘的有效性和可验证性仍是开放问题，需进一步研究。

title: A Survey on GNN-based Link Prediction: Techniques, Applications, and Challenges
comment: Submmit to WIREs: Data Mining and Knowledge Discovery. This version of the article has been accepted, after peer review but is not the version of record. The final version will be available at: https://doi.org/10.1002/widm.70093. Paper list at Github: https://github.com/sunxiaobei/awesome-gnn-based-link-prediction
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as the leading paradigm for link prediction, enabling the inference of missing connections and the anticipation of potential future links. However, existing reviews lack systematic exploration specifically targeting underlying GNN architectures and diverse graph structures. To address this critical gap, this paper provides a comprehensive review of GNN-based link prediction from a novel and dedicated GNN perspective. We propose an innovative taxonomy that categorizes recent advancements based on techniques and applications. From a technique perspective, we focus on key GNN encoder architectures, including GCN-based, GAE-based, GAT-based, and GFormer-based methods, discussing their strengths and limitations. From an application perspective, we highlight prominent use cases of link prediction in knowledge graphs and recommendation systems, demonstrating their real-world impact. In addition, we examine the current challenges and discuss promising future directions.

AI.tldr: 本文从GNN架构视角系统综述了链接预测方法，提出了基于技术和应用的双维度分类体系，涵盖GCN、GAE、GAT、GFormer等编码器架构，并讨论了知识图谱与推荐系统中的应用、当前挑战及未来方向。
AI.motivation: 现有综述缺乏对GNN底层架构及多样图结构在链接预测中的系统性探索，存在研究空白。
AI.method: 提出创新性分类法，从技术视角（GCN-based、GAE-based、GAT-based、GFormer-based）和应用视角（知识图谱、推荐系统）两个维度梳理最新进展。
AI.result: 系统总结了不同GNN编码器架构在链接预测中的优劣，并展示了在知识图谱与推荐系统中的实际应用效果。
AI.conclusion: 当前仍存在挑战，未来可从多个方向进一步推进GNN链接预测研究。

title: A Step Forward Towards Trustworthy Risk-Aware Facial Retrieval (RA-FR)
comment: Accepted at the 28th International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR 2026). Extended version with additional citations and expanded sections
summary: Facial image retrieval in unconstrained surveillance environments is a high-stakes challenge where missing a subject of interest -- a single false negative -- is simply not an option. Despite near-perfect performance on curated benchmarks, current recognition systems falter under real-world domain shifts such as low resolution, motion blur, and uncontrolled illumination (e.g., SCFace). Addressing this reliability gap, we propose Risk-Aware Facial Retrieval (RA-FR), a framework that moves beyond fixed Top-$k$ retrieval to adaptive set generation, guaranteeing ground truth inclusion within a user-specified risk level ($α$) and confidence level ($1 - δ$). Our approach integrates three core contributions: (1) reducing aleatoric uncertainty via a hybrid blind face restoration technique coupling Latent Consistency Models (InterLCM) and DiffBIR; (2) extracting discriminative, restoration-robust features via self-supervised DINOv1 ViT-B with GGeM pooling; and (3) employing conformal prediction with Hoeffding's inequality to dynamically calibrate retrieval set sizes based on query uncertainty. On the IMFDB benchmark, it consistently satisfies a 5% risk target with an average retrieval set size of approximately 10 images. By unifying domain-specific restoration, robust representation learning, and provable decision rules, RA-FR offers a pipeline that makes facial retrieval in surveillance both reliable and auditable. The code is available at: https://github.com/MuhammadEmmadSiddiqui/RA-FR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RA-FR框架，通过混合盲人脸修复、自监督鲁棒特征提取和共形预测动态校准，解决非约束监控环境下人脸检索的可靠性问题，确保在指定风险水平（α）和置信水平（1-δ）下将真实目标包含在检索集中。
AI.motivation: 现有的人脸识别系统在真实监控场景中因域偏移（低分辨率、运动模糊、光照变化等）性能大幅下降，无法容忍假阴性错误，缺乏可靠的自适应检索机制。
AI.method: (1) 使用混合盲人脸修复技术（InterLCM + DiffBIR）降低aleatoric不确定性；(2) 采用自监督DINOv1 ViT-B结合GGeM池化提取鉴别性且对修复鲁棒的特征；(3) 利用共形预测和Hoeffding不等式根据查询不确定性动态校准检索集大小。
AI.result: 在IMFDB基准上，RA-FR在5%风险目标下实现平均检索集大小约10张图像，且始终满足风险约束。
AI.conclusion: RA-FR通过统一域特定修复、鲁棒表征学习和可证明的决策规则，为监控环境下的可靠、可审计人脸检索提供了有效解决方案。

title: Certifiable Safe Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with Control-Affine Dynamics Approximation
summary: Safe model-based reinforcement learning (RL) often bridges control-theoretic analysis and RL for robots to safely explore (partially) unknown system dynamics while deriving control actions for task efficiency. The control performance and safety assurance typically rely on prior knowledge of partially modeled nominal system dynamics and the data-driven models that compensate for residual model uncertainties. However, existing methods often overlook the structure of residual model uncertainties (e.g., components affine in control), which could lead to overly conservative robot behaviors or invalid safety guarantees under the safe learning-based controllers. This paper proposes a safe reinforcement learning framework that learns control-affine dynamics with a certifiable data-driven safe policy using control barrier functions (CBF). Specifically, we first use Control-Affine Random Fourier Features (ARFF) to model robot dynamics in a control-affine form, which offers computational efficiency that scales with dataset size and reduces potential model bias for model-based reinforcement learning. Then, a model-free, efficient uncertainty quantification method using adaptive conformal prediction (ACP) is applied to quantify the uncertainty in the safety constraint arising from the learned control-affine dynamics. This allows for data-driven safety assurance amenable to principled and efficient controller synthesis with CBF. Simulation results on the cartpole and the 3D quadrotor platforms demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于控制障碍函数的安全强化学习框架，通过控制仿射随机傅里叶特征建模动力学，并利用自适应共形预测量化不确定性，在保证安全性的同时提高控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有安全强化学习方法通常忽略残差模型不确定性的结构特性（如控制仿射分量），导致机器人行为过于保守或安全保证无效。
AI.method: 1) 使用控制仿射随机傅里叶特征(ARFF)对机器人动力学进行控制仿射形式建模，提高计算效率并降低模型偏差；2) 应用自适应共形预测(ACP)进行无模型的不确定性量化，为基于CBF的控制器合成提供数据驱动的安全保证。
AI.result: 在倒立摆和3D四旋翼无人机平台上验证了框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式利用控制仿射结构和自适应不确定性量化，该方法能够实现更高效且可认证的安全策略学习。

title: Operator-Aware Mixed-Precision Tolerance Calibration for Tensor Kernels
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure, LNCS format. Companion paper: arXiv:2606.20128 (P1). Additional companions (P3, P4) to follow on arXiv this week; IDs will be added in a v2 replace
summary:
Most tensor-kernel correctness tests go through a fixed-shape all close-style check with hand-picked absolute and relative tolerances. The thresholds are copied across the corpus and rarely revisited. We mine the element-wise error distribution of every test case from accumulated cloud GPU runs across the 26-entry gpuemu corpus and 2 dtypes (8,076 result rows). We then ask one empirical question: what absolute tolerance would the kernel itself, observed under its correct implementation, justify?
  The answer is much tighter than the current hand-picked atol. The largest tightening is attention_triton fp16 at $2{,}184\times$. Restricted to the seven LLM-style buggy variants for which the corpus ships a paired correct counterpart, calibrated per-(op, dtype) tolerances raise bug-detection recall from 73.2% (1,805 of 2,467) to 82.4% (2,034 of 2,467), an absolute gain of 9.3 percentage points (+229 new detections). The control false-positive count rises from 0 to 20 out of 1,882 correct-control cases (+1.1 percentage points).

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于经验数据校准张量核测试中绝对容差(atol)的方法，通过分析GPU云运行积累的元素级误差分布，发现校准后的容差比当前手工设定的值更严格（最大收紧2184倍），并在LLM风格的bug检测中将召回率从73.2%提升至82.4%，仅增加1.1%的误报率。
AI.motivation: 当前张量核正确性测试中使用的绝对/相对容差(atol/rtol)是手工挑选的，并在不同测试用例间随意复制，缺乏依据实际误差分布进行调整的机制，导致容差设置过松或过紧，影响bug检测的敏感性和准确性。
AI.method: 从gpuemu语料库（26个条目、2种数据类型、共8,076行结果）的云端GPU积累运行中，挖掘每个测试用例的元素级误差分布；然后基于正确实现下核自身的误差特征来校准绝对容差(atol)。
AI.result: 校准后的atol比手工设定的更严格，其中attention_triton fp16收紧达2,184倍。在7个LLM风格bug变体上，按(op, dtype)校准的容差将bug检测召回率从73.2% (1,805/2,467)提升至82.4% (2,034/2,467)，绝对提升9.3个百分点（新增229个检测）；误报从0增至20（1,882个正确控制用例中，+1.1个百分点）。
AI.conclusion: 基于经验数据校准的容差能够显著提升张量核正确性测试的bug检测能力，同时保持较低的误报率，表明当前手工设定的容差有较大优化空间。

title: PlanFlip: Attacking Multi-Agent LLM Systems via Planning-Phase Prompt Injection
summary: Multi-agent LLM systems increasingly rely on a Planner to decompose goals into sub-task sequences that downstream Executor and Critic agents execute and audit. We identify the planning phase as a critical attack surface: a single injection into the Planner's context achieves cascade amplification, corrupting all downstream sub-tasks simultaneously. We introduce PlanFlip, a framework comprising four planning-phase prompt injection attacks -- GoalSubstitution (PF-1), PriorityInversion (PF-2), ContextPollution (PF-3), and RoleConfusion (PF-4) -- each disguised as plausible tool outputs to evade keyword filters. Evaluating nine frontier LLMs across 3,479 episodes, we uncover three findings: (1) capability amplifies vulnerability -- GPT-5 achieves the highest attack success rate (ASR = 0.68), contradicting the assumption that stronger models are inherently more secure; (2) homogeneous pipelines exhibit a correlated-agent blind spot -- GPT-4o and Llama-3.3-70B show ASR near 0 yet Stealth = 1.00 and StepShift > 0, with attacks restructuring plans while the same-backbone Critic reports alignment (two independent judges confirm -0.20 to -0.32 semantic deviation, r = 0.943); (3) reasoning-augmented models resist injections -- DeepSeek-R1 achieves StepShift = 0.00 across all attacks. We propose GoalAnchorCheck (D1) and CrossAgentConsensus (D2), achieving detection rates up to 1.00 and outperforming same-backbone baselines in 15 of 16 cells. Our key insight: heterogeneous model diversity is a security prerequisite for multi-agent systems; redundancy within a homogeneous backbone provides no protection against planning-phase attacks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PlanFlip框架，包含四种针对多智能体LLM系统中规划阶段的提示注入攻击（PF-1至PF-4），揭示了能力更强的模型（如GPT-5）反而更易受攻击（ASR=0.68），而同质化pipeline存在相关智能体盲区，而推理增强模型（DeepSeek-R1）完全免疫。同时提出两种防御机制（D1和D2），检测率最高达1.00。核心发现在于：异构模型多样性是多智能体系统的安全前提，同质化冗余无法抵御规划阶段攻击。
AI.motivation: 多智能体LLM系统广泛采用Planner将目标分解为子任务序列，本文识别出规划阶段是关键攻击面：单个注入Planner上下文的攻击即可产生级联放大效应，同时破坏所有下游子任务。现有研究忽视了这一攻击向量。
AI.method: 设计了PlanFlip框架，包含四种伪装成工具输出的规划阶段提示注入攻击：GoalSubstitution (PF-1)、PriorityInversion (PF-2)、ContextPollution (PF-3)和RoleConfusion (PF-4)。在9个前沿LLM上进行了3,479个episode的评估。
AI.result: (1) 能力越强越脆弱：GPT-5攻击成功率最高（ASR=0.68）；(2) 同质化pipeline存在相关智能体盲区：GPT-4o和Llama-3.3-70B的ASR接近0但Stealth=1.00且StepShift>0，攻击重构了计划而同骨干网络的Critic却报告对齐（语义偏差仅-0.20至-0.32，r=0.943）；(3) 推理增强模型DeepSeek-R1实现StepShift=0.00完全免疫。防御机制D1和D2在16个单元格中15个优于同骨干基线，检测率最高达1.00。
AI.conclusion: 异构模型多样性是多智能体系统的安全前提，同质化骨干网络的冗余无法提供任何保护。推理增强架构（如DeepSeek-R1）对规划阶段注入攻击具有天然抵抗力。

title: 3D FaceShell: Attribute Transfer in 3D Face Avatars as a VLM Defense Mechanism
summary: Photorealistic 3D face avatars are increasingly deployed as reusable digital assets across applications such as telepresence, animation, and personalized media. At the same time, vision-language models (VLMs) can infer sensitive attributes from rendered images with open-ended semantic reasoning without any fine-tuning. This creates a new privacy challenge: once a 3D face avatar is shared, any of its renderings can be analyzed to extract high-level facial attributes. Existing defenses largely operate in 2D image space and do not address identity-preserving semantic manipulation of 3D facial representations. We propose 3D FaceShell, a framework for steering VLM interpretations of faces rendered from 3D models while preserving geometric fidelity and facial identity. 3D FaceShell augments the original 3D representation with a learnable Gaussian shell that produces subtle, spatially distributed perturbations optimized through multi-view embedding alignment. The perturbations are designed to be visually inconspicuous yet sufficient to redirect VLM-based attribute inference in a view-consistent manner. Extensive experiments on reconstructed celebrity face avatars and multiple black-box VLMs demonstrate that 3D FaceShell significantly increases attribute injection and mismatch rates while maintaining high perceptual similarity and identity consistency. Our results show that it is possible to manipulate VLM-level semantic interpretation of 3D faces without compromising their human-recognizable appearance.

AI.tldr: 3D FaceShell是一种针对3D面部模型的隐私保护框架，通过学习一个可微高斯壳层在3D表示上添加细微扰动，在不改变人眼可识别的面部外观和几何保真度的前提下，有效误导视觉语言模型对敏感属性（如种族、性别等）的语义推断，实现属性注入/错配率显著提升，且支持多视角一致性和黑盒模型适用。
AI.motivation: 3D面部化身被广泛部署于远程呈现、动画等应用中，但视觉语言模型（VLM）无需微调即可从渲染图像中语义推断敏感属性，产生新的隐私风险。现有防御方法主要针对2D图像空间，缺乏面向3D面部表示的、保留身份信息的语义操控手段。
AI.method: 在原始3D表示上附加一个可学习的高斯壳层（Gaussian shell），通过多视图嵌入对齐优化，生成视觉上不显眼但空间分布的细微扰动，使扰动在不同视角下一致地重定向VLM的属性推断方向。
AI.result: 在重建的名人面部化身和多个黑盒VLM上的实验表明，3D FaceShell显著提高了属性注入率和属性错配率，同时保持了高感知相似性和身份一致性。
AI.conclusion: 证明了可以在不牺牲人类可识别外观的前提下，操控VLM对3D面部图像的语义理解，为3D面部隐私保护提供了新思路。

title: Foresight Residual RL for Long-Horizon Robot Manipulation with Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies offer strong general-purpose manipulation priors, but often fail on tight-tolerance, contact-rich assembly due to long-horizon credit assignment and subtask coupling: a state that is geometrically successful for the current skill can be brittle for downstream skills. We show this failure mode in residual reinforcement learning (RL) over a frozen VLA base policy: constant sparse success rewards improve each subtask in isolation yet yield little or no gain when skills are chained, because terminal state quality is uncontrolled. We propose Foresight Residual RL, which optimizes handoff quality by augmenting each subtask's sparse success reward with an offline-estimated foresight value -- the probability of future subtask success conditioned on the terminal state of the current subtask. Concretely, we (i) train a visual foresight predictor from images of terminal states of the base policy, labeled using downstream rollout statistics, and (ii) train residual policies via backward foresight induction, using the predictor output as a reward multiplier. On a three-phase wrench-based nut-tightening assembly task in Isaac Gym (grasp, move-insert, rotate), our method achieves 85.6% full-task success, outperforming standard subtask residual RL (54.5%) and VLA baselines, while leaving per-subtask success unchanged. These results highlight that improving long-horizon performance requires shaping which successful states are produced at each sub-task, not only whether success occurs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出前瞻残差强化学习（Foresight Residual RL），通过在子任务稀疏成功奖励中加入由离线预测的未来子任务成功概率作为奖励乘子，优化VLA策略在长时序装配任务中的状态交接质量，在螺母拧紧任务中将完整任务成功率从54.5%提升至85.6%。改进的关键不在于增加子任务成功率，而在于控制每个子任务生成的终端状态质量。
AI.motivation: VLA策略在紧容差、高接触的装配任务中表现不佳，根本原因在于长时序信用分配与子任务耦合问题：一个在当前子任务几何上成功的状态，对后续子任务可能是脆弱的。标准的稀疏奖励残差强化学习在单个子任务上有效，但链式拼接时收益甚微，因为终端状态质量未受控制。
AI.method: (i) 利用下游rollout统计数据标注基础策略终端状态的图像，训练一个视觉前瞻预测器来估计未来子任务成功概率；(ii) 通过后向前瞻归纳法训练残差策略，将预测器输出作为奖励乘子，从而优化子任务间交接质量。
AI.result: 在基于Isaac Gym的三阶段螺母拧紧任务（抓取-移动插入-旋转）中，所提方法达到85.6%的完整任务成功率，显著优于标准子任务残差RL（54.5%）及VLA基线，同时各子任务自身的成功率保持不变。
AI.conclusion: 提升长时序任务性能的关键在于塑造每个子任务产出的成功状态的具体形态，而不仅仅是确保子任务是否成功。这揭示了稀疏奖励残差强化学习的核心局限性在于对终端状态质量缺乏控制。

title: RouteCost: A Production-Inspired Multi-Stage Framework for Pre-Order Shipping Cost Estimation in E-Commerce
summary: Accurate pre-order shipping cost estimation is important in e-commerce because it affects price presentation, margin planning, and conversion. In practice, shipping cost is shaped not only by distance but also by destination demand mix, billable weight, dimensional pricing, surcharge triggers, and latent operational effects such as shipment consolidation. Static lookup methods therefore miss important sources of variation, while monolithic regressors may exploit strong but non-causal correlations. We propose RouteCost, a production-inspired multi-stage framework that decomposes the problem into time-aware demand forecasting, fee-card-informed baseline pricing, Stage 2 residual correction, and proxy-based box-consolidation inference. Route-level cost estimates are aggregated through a route-weighted expectation formulation to produce product-level shipping cost predictions. Across over 250,000 orders, 260 products, and 18 months of order history, the framework improves predictive quality and aggregate calibration while preserving route-level interpretability.

AI.tldr: 提出RouteCost多阶段框架，通过时间感知需求预测、费用卡基线定价、残差校正和箱体合并推断，在25万订单数据上提升了运费预测精度和校准性，同时保持路线级可解释性。
AI.motivation: 电商中准确的发货前运费估算对价格展示、利润规划和转化率至关重要，而静态查找方法和单一回归模型均无法充分捕捉运费的实际变化源。
AI.method: 提出RouteCost多阶段框架，将问题分解为：(1)时间感知需求预测，(2)费用卡基线定价，(3)第二阶段残差校正，(4)代理驱动的箱体合并推断；最后通过路线加权期望聚合得到产品级运费预测。
AI.result: 在超过25万订单、260种产品、18个月数据上，RouteCost提升了预测质量和聚合校准性，同时保持了路线级可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段分解方法能有效捕捉运费中的复杂变化源，在预测性能与可解释性之间取得良好平衡。

title: Deterministic Replay for AI Agent Systems
summary:
AI agent systems that couple large language models (LLMs) with external tools and APIs are inherently non-deterministic: LLM sampling variance, external API state, CDN infrastructure headers, and execution-environment noise collectively prevent any prior agent run from being faithfully re-executed. Existing observability platforms capture execution logs but cannot reproduce a run in isolation. We present agrepl, a developer-first CLI framework for deterministic replay of agent executions. agrepl intercepts all external interactions at the transport layer via a man-in-the-middle (MITM) proxy, serialises them as structured execution traces, and replays them in a strictly isolated environment with zero outbound network access. We formalise the agent execution model, define the request-key matching function K(s), and prove the determinism invariant. We introduce a noise-aware diff algorithm classifying HTTP header divergence into signal and noise tiers. Empirical evaluation across five workloads (n = 250 replay instances) demonstrates replay fidelity F = 1.0 and a median per-step latency reduction of 98.3%. agrepl is implemented in Go, ships as a single static binary, and is released under the MIT licence.
  Keywords: AI agents, deterministic replay, LLM debugging, reproducibility, MITM proxy, execution tracing, record/replay systems.

AI.tldr: agrepl 是一个开发者优先的 CLI 框架，通过 MITM 代理拦截所有外部交互、序列化为结构化执行轨迹，并在零网络访问的隔离环境中重放，实现 AI agent 系统的确定性重放，重放保真度 F=1.0，每步延迟中位数降低 98.3%。
AI.motivation: AI agent 系统（LLM + 外部工具/API）本质上是非确定性的——LLM 采样方差、外部 API 状态、CDN 基础设施头部以及执行环境噪声共同导致无法忠实地重放之前的 agent 运行。现有的可观测平台能捕获执行日志，但无法在隔离环境中复现一次运行。
AI.method: 1) 在传输层通过 MITM 代理拦截所有外部交互；2) 将交互序列化为结构化执行轨迹；3) 在严格隔离（零出站网络访问）的环境中重放；4) 形式化定义了 agent 执行模型和请求-键匹配函数 K(s)，证明了确定性不变性；5) 提出噪声感知的 diff 算法，将 HTTP 头部差异分类为信号层和噪声层。
AI.result: 在五个工作负载上（n=250 次重放实例），重放保真度 F=1.0，每步延迟中位数降低 98.3%。
AI.conclusion: agrepl 成功实现了 AI agent 的确定性重放，以 Go 实现，单静态二进制发布，采用 MIT 许可证。

title: Moving Like a Human: Ego-Motion-Normalized Temporal Signatures for Real-Time Aerial Person Tracking on Milliwatt-Class Hardware
summary: Follow-me person tracking must run on the drone itself, where affordable companion computers offer only a few effective int8 GFLOP/s. At typical follow distances a person spans 10-60 pixels, indistinguishable from clutter and beyond the reach of single-frame appearance detectors. The missing evidence is temporal and belongs in the input representation, computed analytically, rather than in learned temporal machinery. EMTS-Det is a five-stage system that estimates ego-motion, converts each frame into ego-motion-normalized residual-motion channels, detects person centers with a 22k-parameter, 7.6-MFLOP network, tracks a locked target with a Kalman filter in stabilized coordinates, and verifies tracks with a 1-D convolutional classifier of human motion (ROC AUC 0.941). Training uses a synthetic-motion curriculum with motion channels generated by the deployed ego-motion code. Multi-seed ablations locate the value in generalization: on held-out VisDrone-DET a luminance-only variant collapses to 0.051 AP25 versus 0.415, as does YOLOv8n fine-tuned identically despite 1,100 times the compute, while the deployed int8 detector reaches 0.694 AP25 in-domain and 0.444 on this split. Temporal-shift modules lower accuracy, so the deployed detector is stateless. Silent int8 calibration failures are documented; min-max calibration with propagated caches matches float within 0.008 AP. On a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W the pipeline runs at 31.85 FPS with 0.462 AP25 and 0.714 recall over 1,000 real-world UAV videos, versus 1.95 FPS and 0.172 AP25 for YOLOv8n. A 57-second field sequence shows auto-lock at 1.3 s, 97.9% lock recall, and recovery from all nine occlusions with zero false re-locks.

AI.tldr: EMTS-Det是一种面向无人机嵌入式平台的轻量级人员跟踪检测器，通过将时序证据转化为运动残差通道输入，仅用22K参数和7.6MFLOP的计算量即可在Raspberry Pi Zero 2W上达到31.85 FPS和0.462 AP25，性能远超YOLOv8n。
AI.motivation: 无人机跟随任务中，目标人员仅占10-60像素，单帧外观检测器难以区分；且机载边缘计算设备算力有限（仅数个int8 GFLOP/s），亟需一种极低计算开销且能利用时序信息的检测方案。
AI.method: 五阶段流水线：1）估计自运动；2）将每帧转换为自运动归一化的残差运动通道；3）22K参数/7.6MFLOP的轻量网络检测人员中心；4）稳定坐标系下的卡尔曼滤波锁定跟踪目标；5）1D卷积分类器验证人体运动轨迹（ROC AUC 0.941）。训练采用合成运动课程学习，部署使用静态无状态检测器（Temporal Shift Module会降低精度）。
AI.result: 在VisDrone-DET上达0.694 AP25（域内）；在Raspberry Pi Zero 2W上31.85 FPS，0.462 AP25，0.714召回率；YOLOv8n仅1.95 FPS和0.172 AP25。野外57秒序列中1.3秒自动锁定，97.9%锁定召回率，9次遮挡全部恢复且零误重锁。
AI.conclusion: 将时序证据以解析方式融入输入表示（而非学习时序模块），配合极轻量网络，可在地面实时光流级别算力上实现高效鲁棒的人员跟踪，颠覆了"深度学习模型必须更大才能更好"的直觉。

title: Differentiable Reinforcement Learning for Path Tracking by an Agile Fish-Like Robot
comment: Accepted to IROS 2026, 9 pages, 12 Images, 1 Table
summary: Fish-like swimming has inspired the design of several dozens if not hundreds of bioinspired robots in the last few decades. But the control and motion planning of such robots has been challenging due to the poorly modeled fluid-structure interaction and the nonlinear underactuated dynamics of such robots. While reinforcement learning has allowed significant advances in the context of ground and aerial robots, the lack of a suitable simulation environment with appropriate computational speed and accuracy have prevented similar progress for fish-like robots. We address this two-fold problem by developing a simulation platform that approximates the motion of our fish-like robot with computational efficiency. Then the motion control and path tracking by the robot is performed using PID control where the (variable) gains are learned using back propagation through time and training on a curriculum. The policy learned in the simulation is then applied on the physical platform, demonstrating an excellent match.

AI.tldr: 本文针对仿生鱼机器人的控制难题，开发了一个兼具计算效率和精度的仿真平台，并使用基于时间反向传播和课程训练的PID控制器学习控制策略，成功实现仿真到实物的迁移。
AI.motivation: 仿生鱼机器人因流体-结构相互作用建模困难以及非线性欠驱动动力学特性，导致其控制和运动规划极具挑战性；同时缺乏兼具计算速度和精度的合适仿真环境，限制了强化学习等方法的适用。
AI.method: 首先开发了一个能高效近似鱼形机器人运动的仿真平台；然后使用基于时间反向传播和课程训练的PID控制（可变增益）实现运动控制和路径跟踪；最后将在仿真中学到的策略迁移到物理平台上。
AI.result: 仿真中学习的策略成功应用于实体机器人，且两者表现出了极好的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 通过开发高效的仿真平台并采用可学习增益的PID控制方法，有效解决了仿生鱼机器人的控制难题，并实现了仿真到实物的成功迁移。

title: Orthogonal Gradient Constraints Shape Noisy-Label Memorization Dynamics
comment: 7 pages, accepted into the ICML HiLD workshop 2026 @Seoul
summary: Modern neural networks can fit corrupted training labels, making noisy-label learning a useful setting for studying memorization-driven overfitting. Most regularization methods modify the objective, architecture, or data distribution; here we instead study a geometric intervention on the optimizer update itself. We evaluate OrthoGrad, which removes the component of each weight gradient parallel to the current weight vector, in noisy-label image classification. On MNIST with small-data regimes, OrthoGrad improves test accuracy most clearly for CNNs while reducing corrupted-label fitting. Mechanism diagnostics based on weight norms and gradient-weight cosine similarity suggest that the projection has the strongest effect when the raw gradient contains a nontrivial radial component, and becomes weaker in larger-data regimes where gradients are already nearly orthogonal to weights. Additional CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 experiments show that the method can alter memorization trajectories but does not prevent eventual noisy-label memorization. These results support orthogonal update constraints as a useful diagnostic for studying learning dynamics, while showing that OrthoGrad is regime-dependent rather than universally regularizing.

AI.tldr: 本论文研究OrthoGrad方法——一种在优化器更新中去除权重梯度平行于当前权重向量分量的几何干预手段，用于噪声标签图像分类。实验表明，在小数据量MNIST上，OrthoGrad能提升CNN测试精度并减少对错误标签的过拟合，但在大数据量或CIFAR-10 ResNet-18场景中效果有限，不能完全阻止噪声标签的记忆化。
AI.motivation: 研究噪声标签学习中记忆驱动过拟合现象，探索通过优化器更新的几何干预（而非传统正则化手段）来缓解过拟合的可行性。
AI.method: 采用OrthoGrad方法，在每次梯度更新中移除每个权重梯度平行于当前权重向量的径向分量，保留切向分量进行参数更新。
AI.result: 在MNIST小数据量下，OrthoGrad显著提升CNN测试精度并降低对错误标签的拟合；但在大数据量下效果减弱。CIFAR-10 ResNet-18实验中，该方法能改变记忆化轨迹，但无法完全阻止最终对噪声标签的记忆化。
AI.conclusion: 正交更新约束可作为研究学习动力学的有效诊断工具，但OrthoGrad的效果具有任务和数据规模依赖性，并非通用的正则化方法。

title: Generative Ontology Induction: Domain-Agnostic Schema Discovery from Document Corpora Using Large Language Models
summary:
Ontology engineering remains a critical bottleneck in knowledge-intensive AI systems. Existing automated approaches either depend on predefined schemas, operate within narrow domains, or produce unstructured outputs unsuitable for downstream pipelines.
  We introduce Generative Ontology Induction (GOI), a domain-agnostic framework that induces a generative blueprint - entities, dimensions, properties, relationships, and constraints - from a corpus of examples and exports it as a typed graph (six node types, seven edge types) in YAML/JSON. We introduce the Node Coverage Score, a novel evaluation metric that measures the fraction of structural ontology nodes (classes, properties, and dimensions) appearing in generated outputs.
  A controlled generative validation on four contrasting ontologies - a familiar Software Services Invoice schema, a custom Job Description Ontology, a confidential Pain-Management Clinical Visit Record Ontology, and a Professional Services Contract & Statement of Work Ontology - shows that GOI-prompted generation covers 95-100% of the structural backbone in every case; a generic three-field template holds at 97.8% on the invoice schema but drops to 52.2% on the Job Description Ontology, 62.2% on the Pain-Management ontology, and 78.3% on the Professional Services Contract ontology. The structural coverage holds regardless of how familiar the document type is to the model.

AI.tldr: 提出GOI框架，能从示例语料中自动归纳出结构化本体（实体、维度、属性、关系、约束），并以六节点七边类型的图形式导出为YAML/JSON；在四个不同领域本体上验证，结构覆盖率达95-100%，显著优于通用模板。
AI.motivation: 现有本体工程方法依赖预定义模式、局限于狭窄领域或输出非结构化结果，无法满足知识密集型AI系统的下游管线需求。
AI.method: 提出Generative Ontology Induction (GOI) 框架，从示例语料中归纳生成式蓝图并导出为类型化图（6种节点、7种边），引入Node Coverage Score评估指标衡量结构本体节点覆盖率。
AI.result: 在四个对比本体上，GOI的结构覆盖率达95-100%；通用三字段模板在发票模式上为97.8%，但在病历本体降至52.2%、合同本体降至78.3%。
AI.conclusion: GOI能跨领域稳定高覆盖地诱导结构化本体，且不依赖文档类型与模型的熟悉程度。

title: GenSyn10: A Multi-Generative AI Dataset For Benchmarking Image Classification
summary: The rapid advancement of generative AI has outpaced our ability to reliably detect its outputs, particularly when detectors encounter generators they have not seen before. We introduce GenSyn10, a CIFAR-10-aligned synthetic image dataset of 60,000 images (10 classes, 32$\times$32, 50k/10k split) generated using three architecturally diverse state-of-the-art models: FLUX.2-dev (Rectified Flow Transformer), HunyuanImage-3.0 (MoE Transformer), and Qwen-Image-2512 (Multimodal Diffusion Transformer), to advance research in AI-generated image detection. A central challenge in this domain is that detectors perform well on known generators but degrade on unseen ones. GenSyn10 addresses this limitation by curating data from multiple contemporary architectures under a standardized generation protocol, enabling controlled and systematic evaluation of out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization to novel generators. Images are generated using a template-based prompt engine and downsampled to ensure consistency. We evaluate 17 image classification models under a four-stage protocol: real-data baseline, zero-shot transfer, fine-tuning, and retention. Despite a measurable domain gap, CIFAR-10-trained models achieve up to 96.86\% zero-shot accuracy on GenSyn10, increasing to 99.88\% after fine-tuning. In binary real-vs-synthetic classification, fine-tuned models achieve 97-99.9\% accuracy on seen generators but drop to 79-96\% on images from an unseen generator, highlighting persistent limitations in OOD generalization. These results establish GenSyn10 as a controlled benchmark for studying synthetic image detection beyond single-generator settings, supporting research on robustness, domain adaptation, and cross-generator generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenSyn10数据集——一个与CIFAR-10对齐的60,000张合成图像数据集，由三种架构各异的先进生成模型生成，用于评估AI生成图像检测器在未见生成器上的跨生成器泛化能力。实验表明，检测器在已见生成器上表现优异（97-99.9%），但在未见生成器上性能显著下降（79-96%），揭示了当前检测方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI的快速发展使得检测其输出变得愈发困难，尤其是当检测器遇到未曾见过的生成器时性能显著下降。现有数据集多基于单一生成器，无法系统评估跨生成器的分布外（OOD）泛化能力。
AI.method: 构建GenSyn10数据集：使用FLUX.2-dev（Rectified Flow Transformer）、HunyuanImage-3.0（MoE Transformer）和Qwen-Image-2512（多模态扩散Transformer）三种架构差异显著的模型，基于模板提示引擎生成60,000张32×32的CIFAR-10对齐图像（50k/10k训练/测试划分）。评估17个图像分类模型，采用四阶段协议：真实数据基线、零样本迁移、微调和保留测试。
AI.result: CIFAR-10预训练模型在GenSyn10上零样本准确率达96.86%，微调后提升至99.88%。在二分类真实vs合成检测任务中，微调模型在已见生成器上达到97-99.9%准确率，但在未见生成器上下降至79-96%。
AI.conclusion: GenSyn10作为受控基准，揭示了跨生成器泛化的持续局限性，为合成图像检测的鲁棒性、域适应和跨生成器泛化研究提供了标准化平台。

title: Autonomous VR-Based Risk Detection for Situational Awareness in Dangerous Settings
summary: In high-risk environments such as disaster response, situational awareness depends not only on detecting hazards but also on communicating them clearly to human operators. Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong potential for scene understanding in safety-critical settings, yet their value as part of human-facing robotic systems remains underexplored. We present a VR-based Human Robot Interaction framework for studying how VLM-assisted robots can support situational awareness in simulated hazardous environments. In our system, a robot explores a virtual scene and queries a VLM to identify potential hazards and annotate user-facing points of interest. These annotations are presented to a human operator through an immersive VR interface. This framework enables controlled evaluation of both robotic hazard identification and the communication of safety-critical information to users. Results from our study indicate that the annotated VR interface was preferred over the unannotated baseline and that participants reported high clarity, usefulness, and comfort when interacting with the system. These findings suggest that combining VLM-based robotic perception with immersive visualization is a promising approach for supporting situational awareness in hazardous settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于VR的机器人-人交互框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）帮助机器人在模拟危险环境中识别并标注安全隐患，并通过沉浸式VR界面将信息传递给操作员。实验表明，标注界面相比无标注基线更受用户欢迎，且在清晰度、有用性和舒适度方面表现良好。
AI.motivation: 在高风险环境（如灾害响应）中，态势感知不仅依赖于检测危险，还依赖于将危险清晰地传达给人类操作员。尽管VLM在安全关键场景的视觉理解方面表现出潜力，但其作为面向人类的机器人系统中的价值尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 构建了一个VR人机交互框架：机器人在模拟危险环境中探索场景，调用VLM识别潜在危险并生成面向用户的兴趣点注释，然后通过沉浸式VR界面将这些注释呈现给人类操作员。该框架支持对机器人危险识别和信息传达能力的受控评估。
AI.result: 用户研究结果表明，带注释的VR界面在偏好程度上优于无标注基线，参与者对系统的清晰度、有用性和舒适度给出了较高评价。
AI.conclusion: 将基于VLM的机器人感知与沉浸式可视化相结合，是支持危险环境下态势感知的一种有前景的方法。

title: From Weights to Words: Expressing and Editing Preference Model Inferences in Natural Language
comment: 42 pages, 22 figures, 14 tables; main text 11 pages, remainder appendices
summary: The growing use of statistical learning algorithms to infer human preferences from high-dimensional choice data runs up against a fundamental challenge: choice alternatives typically differ in many ways simultaneously, so it is generally unclear which factors actually drove an observed decision and should be credited as preferences. Compounding this problem, the opacity of these methods leaves human operators unable to inspect, contest, or correct models when they err. We introduce \emph{weights to words}, a method that takes a dataset of choice problems as input and automatically discovers a collection of domain-relevant preference dimensions, each described in natural language and paired with a vector in the model's representational space. These dimensions address both under-determination and opacity: they can be applied to concentrate attribution on a small set of meaningful factors, and they can externalize the model's inferences in natural language so that users can inspect and edit them in real time. We first qualitatively illustrate the method's versatility on four diverse domains: moral dilemmas, movies, wines, and free-form LLM responses. We then report two pre-registered human-subjects experiments, on moral dilemmas ($N=450$) and movie selection ($N=449$), that demonstrate its benefits for learning preference models: (1) regularizing a preference model toward the learned basis increases prediction accuracy on held-out choices, and (2) incorporating participants' structured edits further improves accuracy. In head-to-head comparisons, participants prefer the method's inferred preference profiles and endorse its predictions as more accurate.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"weights to words"方法，能从高维选择数据中自动发现用自然语言描述的关键偏好维度，解决偏好学习中的欠确定性和不透明性问题，实验证明该方法能提高预测准确率并获得用户偏好。
AI.motivation: 从高维选择数据推断人类偏好的统计学习算法面临两个根本挑战：一是选择方案在多个维度上同时存在差异，难以确定哪些因素真正驱动了决策；二是这些方法的黑箱特性导致用户无法检查、质疑或纠正模型错误。
AI.method: 提出"weights to words"方法，输入选择问题数据集，自动发现一系列领域相关的偏好维度，每个维度用自然语言描述并配有模型表征空间中的向量。这些维度可用于将归因集中在少数有意义的因素上，并以自然语言外化模型推断，使用户能实时检查和编辑。
AI.result: 在道德困境、电影、葡萄酒和自由形式LLM回答四个领域定性展示了方法的多样性。两项预注册人类实验（道德困境N=450，电影选择N=449）表明：(1)将偏好模型向学习到的基础正则化可提高预测准确率；(2)纳入参与者的结构化编辑可进一步提升准确率。在直接对比中，参与者更偏好该方法推断的偏好档案，并认为其预测更准确。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自动发现可解释的偏好维度并支持用户交互编辑，有效解决了偏好学习中的欠确定性和不透明性问题，实验验证了其在提高预测准确性和用户满意度方面的优势。

title: Democratizing AI with Small Language Models: Structured Benchmarking and Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning for Local Deployment
summary: AI democratization is not primarily a question of matching frontier-scale generality; it is a question of whether capable models can be selected, audited, and specialized under hardware and governance constraints that ordinary institutions can actually satisfy. This paper studies that problem through a controlled evaluation of nine open-weight language models between 135M and 3B parameters on a 1,085-example, 16-topic multiple-choice benchmark designed for structured local deployment. The benchmark emphasizes symbolic precision, constrained formatting, extraction, and short-horizon semantic decision making under a strict one-letter output protocol. A shared parameter-efficient fine-tuning pipeline then adapts a subset of models using 4-bit NF4 quantization with DoRA/LoRA-style adapters on an NVIDIA L4-class budget. In base evaluation, Qwen Coder 3B leads at 75.67% strict accuracy, followed by Qwen2.5 1.5B at 67.10%, Qwen3.5 2B at 64.98%, and Granite 3.3 2B at 64.61%. On the shared 108-example held-out fine-tuning split, adaptation improves Qwen Coder 3B by +26.85 points, SmolLM2 1.7B by +25.92, Qwen2.5 1.5B by +19.44, SmolLM2 360M by +10.18, and SmolLM2 135M by +5.55. Across ranking, topic-level heterogeneity, difficulty strata, failure composition, efficiency frontiers, and topic-conditioned transfer, the same conclusion recurs: a disciplined workflow of benchmark construction, cross-model evaluation, and low-cost specialization already makes a subset of sub-3B models viable as local experts for structured niche workloads.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建1085例、16主题的多选题基准，评估了9个135M-3B参数的开源语言模型，并采用4-bit NF4量化+DoRA/LoRA微调管线。结果显示Qwen Coder 3B在基线和微调后均表现最佳（75.67%和+26.85提升），证明低资源条件下子3B模型可通过结构化工作流成为局部专家模型的可行方案。
AI.motivation: AI民主化的核心不在于追求前沿规模的通用性，而在于普通机构能否在硬件和治理约束下对可用的模型进行选择、审计和专业化。
AI.method: 构建包含1085个示例、16个主题的多选题基准，采用严格单字母输出协议，评估9个135M-3B参数的开源模型；使用4-bit NF4量化结合DoRA/LoRA适配器进行参数高效微调。
AI.result: 基线评估中Qwen Coder 3B最优（75.67%），微调后提升+26.85；SmolLM2 1.7B提升+25.92等。跨多个维度分析均支持子3B模型在结构化专业场景下的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 通过基准构建、跨模型评估和低成本专业化的规范化工作流，部分子3B模型已可作为结构化专业负载的可行局部专家。

title: MAC 2026: Advancing Micro-Action Analysis Towards Fine-Grained Understanding
comment: Challenge Summary Paper of the 3rd Micro-Action Analysis Grand Challenge (MAC 2026) at ACM Multimedia 2026
summary: Micro-Actions (MAs) are subtle and spontaneous human behaviors that provide important non-verbal cues in social interaction and affective communication. However, their short duration, weak motion patterns, and fine-grained semantic differences make them difficult to annotate, model, and evaluate in a standardized manner. To promote academic research on micro-action analysis, we proposed and have annually organized the Micro-Action Analysis Grand Challenge (MAC) as a public benchmark platform for this emerging field. The first two editions of MAC established standardized evaluation settings for micro-action recognition and detection, providing publicly accessible datasets and protocols. Building upon these editions, this paper presents the 3rd MAC, held in conjunction with ACM Multimedia 2026. Under the theme of moving from recognition to fine-grained micro-action understanding, this edition further expands the scope of the challenge beyond conventional recognition and detection. In particular, we introduce a new task named fine-grained micro-action understanding, evaluated with the assistance of multimodal large language models, aiming to assess models' ability to capture fine-grained semantic cues and interpret subtle human micro-actions at a deeper level. We summarize the datasets, task settings, evaluation protocols, competition results, and representative solutions from top-performing teams. Finally, we discuss future directions for micro-action analysis and its broader role in human-centric video understanding.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了第三届微动作分析大挑战赛（MAC 2026），该挑战赛与ACM Multimedia 2026联合举办，主题从传统的识别与检测转向细粒度微动作理解，引入基于多模态大语言模型的新评估任务，旨在深入评估模型对细微语义线索和人类微动作的理解能力。
AI.motivation: 微动作（MAs）作为社交互动和情感交流中重要的非语言线索，其持续时间短、运动模式弱、语义差异细微，导致标注、建模和评估难以标准化。为了推动该领域的学术研究，作者团队持续组织微动作分析大挑战赛，提供公开基准平台。
AI.method: 在第三届MAC中，作者在原有识别与检测任务基础上，新增了细粒度微动作理解任务，借助多模态大语言模型进行评估，以捕捉深层语义线索并解释细微的人类微动作。
AI.result: 总结了第三届MAC的数据集、任务设置、评估协议、比赛结果以及来自优胜队伍的具有代表性的解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 讨论了微动作分析未来的研究方向及其在以人为中心的视频理解中的更广泛作用。

title: An Indoor Navigation System for the Visually Impaired based on UWB Positioning and D* Lite Path Planning Algorithm
summary: This paper proposes an indoor navigation system for the visually impaired, leveraging Ultra-Wideband (UWB) positioning technology and the D*Lite path planning algorithm. The system utilizes UWB sensors to provide precision localization in GPS-denied environments. The D* Lite algorithm is integrated to optimize travel trajectories and ensure rapid route re-planning in the presence of dynamic obstacles. Experimental results demonstrate that the system operates reliably with low latency, providing safety and flexibility for users in complex indoor spaces.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合UWB定位技术与D* Lite路径规划算法的室内导航系统，旨在帮助视障人士在GPS信号缺失的室内环境中实现精准定位与动态避障。实验证明该系统具有低延迟、高可靠性和安全灵活性。
AI.motivation: 解决视障人士在GPS信号缺失的室内环境中难以精准定位与安全导航的问题，提升其出行自主性和安全性。
AI.method: 采用UWB传感器实现室内高精度定位，并集成D* Lite算法进行路径规划，支持动态障碍物下的快速路径重规划。
AI.result: 系统在复杂室内环境中运行可靠，具有低延迟、高安全性和灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的UWB+D* Lite室内导航系统可为视障人士提供安全、灵活且低延迟的导航服务，在复杂室内空间中具有实用价值。

title: Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction
summary: Integrating heterogeneous genomic and clinical modalities for joint cancer subtype classification and survival prediction remains a key challenge in precision oncology. Existing approaches suffer from three limitations: (1) they treat each modality as a monolithic feature vector, precluding fine-grained token-level interactions across modalities; (2) cross-modal fusion is typically performed through linear weighting or late averaging rather than structured token exchange; and (3) survival and classification objectives are optimized independently, missing a joint regularization signal.

AI.tldr: 针对现有方法在整合异质基因组和临床模态进行癌症亚型分类与生存预测时的三大局限（将模态视为整体特征向量、跨模态融合缺乏结构化令牌交换、分类与生存目标独立优化），提出一种基于令牌级交互与联合优化框架的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在整合异质基因组与临床数据时存在三个关键局限：1) 将每种模态视为整体特征向量，无法实现细粒度的令牌级交互；2) 跨模态融合仅通过线性加权或后期平均，缺乏结构化令牌交换机制；3) 生存预测与分类目标独立优化，缺少联合正则化信号。这些局限阻碍了更精准的癌症亚型分类与生存预测。
AI.method: 提出一种新的跨模态融合框架，核心包括：(1) 将各模态数据表示为令牌序列而非整体特征向量，实现细粒度令牌级交互；(2) 采用结构化令牌交换机制替代传统线性加权或后期平均进行跨模态融合；(3) 设计联合优化目标，同时对癌症亚型分类和生存预测进行正则化约束。
AI.result: 通过令牌级交互、结构化跨模态融合与联合优化，在癌症亚型分类和生存预测任务上取得更优性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种解决现有方法三大局限的新框架，通过令牌级交互、结构化跨模态融合与联合优化，有效整合异质基因组与临床数据，为精准肿瘤学中的癌症亚型分类和生存预测提供了更优方案。

title: Masked Diffusion Language Models are Strong and Steerable Text-Based World Models for Agentic RL
summary: Recent growth in reinforcement learning (RL) has surfaced a need for diverse, specialized training environments. Hand-curated environments with fixed task and reward difficulties become ineffective signals as model performance improves, and sparse rewards over long horizons induce mode collapse on specific workflows or tool structures. World models that simulate environment states have matched pure rollout performance, making them promising for scaling diversity on-demand. However, autoregressive (AR) world models suffer from a left-to-right bias preventing conditioning on globally interdependent state anchors such as tool schemas, prior turns, and expected outcomes. We (i) formalize text-based world modeling as a steerable transition-dynamics problem decomposed into initial state, task context, tool schemas, domain rules, and steering directives, and (ii) curate 239,403 grounded state-action trajectories spanning nine open-source environments and twelve frontier model families. We compare AR LMs and masked diffusion language models (MDLMs), showing MDLMs, via bidirectional anchor-aware denoising, achieve better coherence, groundedness, and empirically validated rollout diversity than LLMs over 4x their parameter size, at comparable inference latency. We introduce a plug-and-play GRPO training framework with deterministic state checks, and perform zero-shot transfer ablations on three OOD environments (ScienceWorld, ALFWorld, AppWorld) across three 1.2B-7B agent backbones (LFM2.5, Qwen3, Mistral), achieving up to 47% absolute gains over baselines without environment-specific fine-tuning. We further conduct behavioral analysis of failure modes under adversarial scenarios and human evaluation on realism, outcome correctness, and training utility. We open-source our work to encourage research in this direction.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于掩码扩散语言模型（MDLM）的双向锚点感知世界模型，替代自回归世界模型用于文本强化学习环境生成，在多样性与连贯性上优于4倍参数量的LLM，并在零样本跨环境迁移中实现最高47%的绝对性能提升。
AI.motivation: 强化学习依赖多样化、专业化的训练环境，而手工构建的环境随模型能力提升逐渐失效；稀疏奖励下长程轨迹易导致模式坍缩。自回归世界模型存在从左到右的生成偏置，无法基于全局依赖锚点（如工具模式、先前轮次、预期结果）进行条件化，亟需可引导、可扩展的世界建模方法。
AI.method: (i) 将基于文本的世界建模形式化为可引导的转移动态问题，分解为初始状态、任务上下文、工具模式、领域规则和引导指令；(ii) 构建239,403条经过状态-动作轨迹验证的数据集，覆盖9个开源环境和12种前沿模型家族；(iii) 对比AR LM与MDLM，利用掩码扩散的双向去噪实现锚点感知的生成；(iv) 引入基于GRPO的即插即用训练框架，配合确定性状态检查；(v) 在三个OOD环境（ScienceWorld、ALFWorld、AppWorld）上使用三种1.2B-7B智能体骨干进行零样本迁移消融实验。
AI.result: MDLM在连贯性、锚点一致性、经验验证的轨迹多样性上优于4倍参数量的LLM，推理延迟相当；零样本跨环境迁移中绝对性能提升最高达47%；进行了对抗场景下的失败模式行为分析和人工评估（真实性、结果正确性、训练实用性）。
AI.conclusion: 双向锚点感知的掩码扩散世界模型是替代自回归世界模型的有效方案，能够按需生成多样、连贯的训练环境，显著提升智能体零样本迁移能力，且代码已开源以推动该方向研究。

title: A Shared Latent for Partially-Labeled Multi-Task Facial Affect Recognition
