While recent works attempt to incorporate human-level intelligence into robot planning using large Vision-Language Models (VLMs), end-to-end frameworks often create an unpredictable black-box, and existing instruction-following methods are not designed for full autonomy. To bridge this gap, we present G2-Nav, a novel framework that grounds abstract social reasoning and guards safe real-world deployment. Instead of asking the VLM for direct planning decisions, G2-Nav translates its semantic reasoning into a vision-language costmap with reliability and interpretability. The VLM evaluates traversable regions and social agents from open-set perception, mapping social context into the costmap. To improve real-world robustness, the VLM performs semantic verification on upstream tracking, and we introduce a high-frequency safety check to guard against system latency prior to trajectory generation. We demonstrate through real-world experiments that G2-Nav delivers safe, efficient, and socially compliant autonomous navigation in unstructured environments. Code will be made publicly available.

AI.tldr: G2-Nav是一个新颖的社交导航框架，通过将VLM的语义推理转化为可解释的视觉-语言成本地图（costmap），并在轨迹生成前引入高频安全检查，实现了安全、高效且符合社交规范的自主导航。
AI.motivation: 现有端到端VLM导航框架是难以预测的黑盒，而指令跟随方法无法实现完全自主性。需要弥合抽象社会推理与现实安全部署之间的差距。
AI.method: G2-Nav包含三个关键组件：1) 将VLM语义推理转化为可解释的视觉-语言成本地图；2) VLM对上游跟踪进行语义验证以提高鲁棒性；3) 在轨迹生成前引入高频安全检查以对抗系统延迟。
AI.result: 在真实世界实验中，G2-Nav在非结构化环境中实现了安全、高效且符合社交规范的自主导航。
AI.conclusion: 通过将VLM从直接决策者转变为成本地图生成器并增加安全校验，G2-Nav有效融合了高层语义推理与底层安全控制，为社交导航的实际部署提供了可靠方案。

title: RobustMAD: Evaluating Real-World Robustness of Multimodal Small Language Models for Deployable Anomaly Detection Assistants
comment: Accepted for publication in Transactions on Machine Learning Research (TMLR), 2026 at https://openreview.net/forum?id=skrA9UYNIZ
summary: Multimodal industrial anomaly inspection assistants are a critical component of next-generation smart factories, enabling interactive vision-language-based querying. However, multimodal large language models remain impractical for on-site deployment due to prohibitive computational demands and privacy risks from cloud-based inference. Compact multimodal small language models (MSLMs) offer a deployable alternative, yet progress is constrained by the lack of comprehensive robustness analyses and meaningfully challenging benchmarks that reflect real-world industrial conditions. To address this gap, we develop RobustMAD, the first deployment-motivated benchmark, designed to comprehensively evaluate model robustness through diverse open-ended queries spanning object understanding, anomaly detection, unanswerable problems, and visual quality degradations. Contrary to conventional assumptions, top-performing MSLMs exhibit promising capabilities, surprisingly outperforming even the larger GPT-5 Nano. However, they still fall short of safety-critical requirements, and RobustMAD reveals critical robustness gaps that pose operational risks. In particular, three recurring failure modes emerge: (i) fragile multimodal grounding under fine-grained distinctions or degraded visual conditions, (ii) insufficiently comprehensive responses, and (iii) weak logical grounding on unanswerable or ill-posed queries, leading to hallucinated outputs. Grounded in these insights, we provide actionable guidance for the design of next-generation multimodal industrial inspection assistants that leverage their promising competence. Code is available at https://github.com/en-research/RobustMAD.

AI.tldr: RobustMAD是首个面向工业部署的多模态小语言模型鲁棒性基准，通过多样化开放查询（物体理解、异常检测、不可回答问题、视觉质量退化）评估模型表现。研究发现：顶级MSLM虽展现出令人惊喜的能力，甚至超越GPT-5 Nano，但在安全关键场景中仍存在缺陷，主要表现为多模态基础脆弱、响应不全面、对无意义查询的幻觉输出三大失败模式。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型因计算开销大和云端推理的隐私风险，难以在工业现场部署。紧凑型多模态小语言模型（MSLM）是可替代方案，但缺乏全面的鲁棒性分析和反映真实工业场景的具有挑战性的基准测试。
AI.method: 构建RobustMAD基准，包含物体理解、异常检测、不可回答问题和视觉质量退化四类开放查询，用于全面评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 顶级MSLM表现令人惊讶，甚至超越GPT-5 Nano，但仍未达到安全关键要求。RobustMAD揭示了三大关键失败模式：多模态基础脆弱、响应不全面、对无意义查询产生幻觉。
AI.conclusion: 基于研究发现，为下一代多模态工业检测辅助系统的设计提供了可操作的指导建议。

title: RAIL Guard: Closing the Evaluation-to-Remediation Gap in Responsible AI for LLM Agents
summary: Existing guardrail systems for large language model agents operate as binary classifiers that block unsafe content, leaving organizations to discard failing outputs and retry from scratch. We introduce RAIL Guard, a closed-loop responsible AI pipeline that evaluates LLM outputs across eight measurable dimensions and iteratively remediates failing outputs through an evaluate-rewrite-reevaluate loop. We evaluate the pipeline across three experiments on four frontier LLMs and 4,276 content outputs plus 6,400 agent tool-call scenarios. Closed-loop remediation achieves 96.9% convergence versus 49.1% for block-and-retry, though the highest-convergence method reduces utility by 22.3%; feedback-driven self-repair achieves 86.6% convergence on fixable dimensions with no significant utility loss (p = 0.177). Pre-tool-call evaluation reduces unsafe agent executions by 33% (p = 0.007) with zero impact on task completion. We identify a key distinction between fixable dimensions that respond to remediation and structural dimensions (Transparency at 93.0%, Accountability at 92.8%, and Inclusivity at 82.5% failure) that require architectural rather than algorithmic solutions. The system is available as open-source SDKs.

AI.tldr: RAIL Guard是一个闭环责任AI管线，通过评估-重写-再评估循环对LLM输出在8个维度上进行迭代修复，相比传统拦截重试方法（49.1%）实现了96.9%的收敛率，但发现了可修复维度与结构性维度（透明度93.0%、问责制92.8%、包容性82.5%失败率）之间的关键区别。
AI.motivation: 现有LLM护栏系统仅作为二元分类器拦截不安全内容，导致组织丢弃失败输出并从头重试，缺乏有效的修复机制，无法系统性地提升输出质量。
AI.method: 构建闭环责任AI管线，在8个可测量维度上对LLM输出进行评估，对失败输出执行评估-重写-再评估的迭代修复流程，并在4个前沿LLM、4,276个内容输出和6,400个智能体工具调用场景上进行三组实验评估。
AI.result: 闭环修复收敛率达96.9%（对比拦截重试的49.1%）；反馈驱动的自我修复在可修复维度上达到86.6%收敛率且无显著效用损失（p=0.177）；工具调用前评估将不安全智能体执行减少33%（p=0.007）且不影响任务完成。同时发现透明度（93.0%）、问责制（92.8%）和包容性（82.5%）属于结构性维度，需要架构而非算法解决方案。
AI.conclusion: RAIL Guard通过闭环修复显著优于传统拦截重试方法，但需区分可修复维度与结构性维度，后者需要架构层面的根本性改变；系统已作为开源SDK发布。

title: Rethinking Feature Reliance Evaluation with Semantically Matched Suppression
summary: Understanding whether visual recognition models rely on shape, texture, or color is central to interpreting their behavior. Prior cue-conflict studies have strongly influenced the view that CNNs are texture-biased, yet such tests measure cue preference under artificial conflicts rather than feature reliance during natural recognition. We revisit this question through controlled feature suppression and show that performance drops are difficult to interpret unless different suppression operations impose comparable category-level damage. We introduce a semantically matched evaluation framework that compares shape and texture suppression at matched levels of category separability loss. Under this framework, ImageNet-trained CNNs show stronger degradation under texture suppression than under shape suppression, revealing greater texture reliance than suggested by unmatched suppression analyses. Extending the comparison across architectures, we find that Vision Transformers retain higher accuracy than CNNs under both shape and texture suppression. Brain encoding further shows that ViT representations exhibit smaller suppression-induced decreases in neural prediction performance under the tested suppression settings. These findings indicate that semantic comparability is essential for interpreting feature reliance from suppression experiments, and suggest that the robustness advantage of ViTs may be related to representations more compatible with human visual cortex.

AI.tldr: 本文通过语义匹配的特征抑制框架重新评估视觉识别模型对形状、纹理和颜色的依赖，发现ImageNet训练的CNN在纹理抑制下性能下降更显著，而Vision Transformer在两种抑制下均保持更高精度，且其表征与人类视觉皮层更兼容。
AI.motivation: 现有cue-conflict研究强烈认为CNN偏向纹理，但这种测试测量的是人为冲突下的偏好而非自然识别中的特征依赖。为此需要引入语义可比性的评估框架，以正确解释特征抑制实验中的依赖关系。
AI.method: 提出语义匹配评估框架，在相同类别可分性损失水平下比较形状和纹理抑制的效果；在ImageNet预训练的CNN和Vision Transformer上进行特征抑制实验，并结合大脑编码分析评估表征与视觉皮层的兼容性。
AI.result: 在语义匹配框架下，CNN在纹理抑制下性能下降比形状抑制更严重，表明纹理依赖比以往认为的更强；ViT在两种抑制下均比CNN保持更高准确率；ViT表征在抑制条件下神经预测性能下降更小。
AI.conclusion: 语义可比性对解释特征抑制实验中的特征依赖至关重要；ViT的鲁棒性优势可能源于其表征与人类视觉皮层更兼容。

title: User-Driven Learning from Demonstration: A Trajectory and Impedance Learning Method
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE) 2026, 7 pages
summary: This paper presents a method for user-driven robot Learning from Demonstration (LfD) that reduces user effort while ensuring compliant and precise reproduction. The method eliminates repeated teaching for the same task and enables real-time learning from a single demonstration. Demonstrated motions are reproduced with high precision, while impedance variations are learned in real time to provide both compliance and robustness against perturbations. This mitigates potential safety issues in Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) that arise from conventional time-indexed trajectories lacking compliance. The proposed approach integrates a three-dimensional (3D) Fast Diffeomorphic Matching (FDM) algorithm with a Dynamical System (DS)-based motion generator to achieve real-time single-shot demonstration learning and reproduction. An Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) framework compensates for reproduction errors and recovers from external interactions. Furthermore, an impedance parameterization function is incorporated to learn impedance variations from demonstrations and maintain surface contact for specific applications. The proposed approach is validated through comprehensive experiments on a 7 Degree-of-Freedom (DOF) KUKA LWR IV+ robot.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于单次示教、结合3D快速微分同胚匹配与动态系统运动生成、阻抗参数化学习的用户驱动机器人示教学习方法，在KUKA LWR IV+机器人上验证了其减少用户重复示教、实现高精度柔顺再现与扰动鲁棒性的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统时间索引轨迹缺乏柔顺性，在人与机器人交互中可能存在安全隐患；同时，重复示教同一任务对用户而言负担较大。因此，需要一种既能减少用户示教工作量，又能实现柔顺、精确再现的学习方法。
AI.method: 将3D快速微分同胚匹配算法与基于动态系统的运动生成器集成，实现单次示教的实时学习与再现；采用扩展卡尔曼滤波框架补偿再现误差并恢复外界交互；引入阻抗参数化函数以从示教中学习阻抗变化，维持特定应用中的表面接触。
AI.result: 在7自由度KUKA LWR IV+机器人上通过综合实验验证，所提方法能够从单次示教中高精度再现运动，实时学习阻抗变化以提供柔顺性与抗扰动能力，并有效补偿再现误差。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效减少了用户示教负担，同时实现了高精度、柔顺且抗干扰的机器人运动再现，提升了人机交互的安全性。

title: CIGPO: Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Evidence-Reading LLM Agents
summary: Training multi-turn evidence-reading agents with outcome-only reinforcement learning is unstable because intermediate turns receive little direct credit. In HotpotQA experiments with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, GRPO initially improves (standard F1 0.430) but subsequently collapses to 100% format-violating outputs. Training-log diagnosis reveals a zero-advantage lock-in mechanism: all sampled trajectories receive the minimum format penalty (-2.0), group-relative advantages vanish, and the policy-gradient loss becomes zero--an optimization deadlock. We propose a variance-injection strategy: by assigning per-turn rewards to intermediate evidence-reading turns, we prevent the group reward distribution from collapsing to a single value--preserving the variation that GRPO's group-relative advantage requires. Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization (CIGPO) implements this strategy using the marginal increase in the frozen reference model's log-likelihood of the ground-truth answer as the per-turn signal. With separate normalization of IG and F1 rewards and an IG-weight curriculum, CIGPO reaches a standard F1 of 0.518 on HotpotQA at the 3B scale (from 0.252 base; +105%), compared with 0.430 for the best GRPO checkpoint and 0.000 for the final GRPO checkpoint. CIGPO maintains meaningful reward variance and avoids zero-advantage lock-in throughout training. These results identify reward-variance collapse as a concrete failure mode of outcome-only GRPO and show that turn-level IG rewards can prevent it in this HotpotQA setting.

AI.tldr: 针对多轮证据阅读智能体使用纯结果强化学习训练时，GRPO因中间轮次缺乏直接信用分配导致零优势锁死（所有轨迹获得相同格式惩罚，优势归零，策略梯度消失）。本文提出方差注入策略，通过上下文信息增益策略优化（CIGPO），以冻结参考模型对正确答案的对数似然边际增量作为每轮奖励，配合独立归一化和IG权重课程，在HotpotQA上实现标准F1达0.518（较基线+105%），避免了奖励方差坍塌。
AI.motivation: 纯结果强化学习（GRPO）在多轮证据阅读任务中训练不稳定，中间轮次几乎得不到直接信用，导致训练后期策略坍塌为100%格式违规输出。需要解决零优势锁死这一优化死锁问题。
AI.method: 提出上下文信息增益策略优化（CIGPO）：1）以冻结参考模型对正确答案的对数似然边际增量作为每轮信号；2）对信息增益奖励和F1奖励分别独立归一化；3）引入IG权重课程学习策略。核心思想是通过注入每轮奖励方差，防止组奖励分布坍缩为单一值，维持GRPO所需的组相对优势。
AI.result: 在HotpotQA上，3B规模CIGPO达到标准F1 0.518（基线0.252，+105%），优于GRPO最佳检查点0.430和最终检查点0.000。CIGPO在整个训练过程中保持有意义的奖励方差，避免零优势锁死。
AI.conclusion: 奖励方差坍塌是纯结果GRPO的一个具体失败模式，每轮信息增益奖励可以有效防止这一现象。CIGPO证明了在HotpotQA场景下通过细粒度奖励分配克服多轮强化学习不稳定性的有效性。

title: Generalist AI Control: Towards Multi-purpose Adaptive Algorithms
summary: Traditional controllers are designed for specific systems and do not transfer across different system orders and dynamics. We present a Generalist Controller, a learning-based controller capable of controlling systems of varying orders and dynamics. The approach introduces a novel dynamic state-space representation using attention mechanisms with masking, enabling a single neural network, trained in one shot, to handle systems with different dimensions without architectural modifications by assigning a system tag to each system. We generated 314,630 demonstrations from 25 diverse systems, including stable, unstable, minimum-phase, and non-minimum-phase dynamics, spanning linear and nonlinear systems from autonomous underwater and aerospace vehicles to mechanical systems and chemical processes. The model learns cross-system control strategies through multi-scale temporal processing and a mixture-of-experts architecture. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed generalist controller achieves comparable performance to system-specific LQI controllers across all tested systems, including challenging cases such as non-minimum-phase and unstable dynamics, whilst generalising to unseen operating conditions including actuator saturation, noise, disturbance, and reference trajectories not encountered during training. This work represents a significant step towards generalist control policies within a defined family of dynamical systems, demonstrating effective control across a range of single-input single-output (SISO) systems of varying order and dynamics using a single learned policy without system-specific tuning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用控制器（Generalist Controller），通过注意力机制与掩码的动态状态空间表示，结合多尺度时间处理与混合专家架构，使得单一神经网络能一次性处理25种不同阶次与动态特性的SISO系统（包括不稳定、非最小相位等复杂系统），在无需系统特定调参的情况下，达到与传统LQI控制器相当的性能，并能够泛化至未训练过的工况条件。
AI.motivation: 传统控制器针对特定系统设计，无法在不同阶次和动态特性的系统间迁移。本文旨在开发一种能跨系统泛化的通用控制策略，消除针对每个系统单独设计控制器的需求。
AI.method: 提出一种基于注意力机制与掩码的动态状态空间表示方法，为每个系统分配系统标签（system tag），使单一神经网络在不修改架构的情况下处理不同维度的系统。通过多尺度时间处理（multi-scale temporal processing）和混合专家架构（mixture-of-experts）学习跨系统控制策略，在314,630条来自25种不同系统的演示数据上进行一次性训练。
AI.result: 在包含稳定、不稳定、最小相位、非最小相位、线性和非线性系统（涵盖水下航行器、航空航天器、机械系统、化学过程等）的全部测试系统中，通用控制器达到了与系统特定LQI控制器相当的性能，并能泛化至未训练过的执行器饱和、噪声、扰动和参考轨迹等工况。
AI.conclusion: 该工作是在定义的系统族内实现通用控制策略的重要一步，证明了单一学习策略无需系统特定调参即可有效控制不同阶次和动态特性的SISO系统。

title: FedDP-PALD: A Privacy-Preserving Federated Latent Diffusion Framework with Prototype Aggregation for Medical Data Synthesis
summary: Medical images and physiological signals provide valuable information for accurate diagnosis. Developing diagnostic models often requires patient data from multiple institutions, although strict privacy regulations limit the sharing of sensitive clinical records. Federated learning enables multiple hospitals to train a shared model without exchanging raw data. However, existing methods face two problems: the information exchanged during training can reveal whether a patient's data were used, and synthetic data meant to replace real records often fail to preserve their predictive structure, which limits clinical use. To address this issue, we propose FedDP-PALD, a privacy-preserving federated latent diffusion framework for multimodal medical data synthesis under formal privacy guarantees. It jointly processes chest X-ray images and electrocardiogram (ECG) signals through gated multi-head attention with modality-availability masks, remaining effective even when a modality is missing. We also introduce Differentially Private Prototype Mixture Aggregation (DP-PMA), which clips class-level latent prototypes and adds calibrated Gaussian noise before combining them on the server to maintain $(ε, δ)$ differential privacy. We evaluate FedDP-PALD on PneumoniaMNIST, ChestMNIST, and MIT-BIH datasets, where differential privacy reduced summary-level attack AUROC from 0.6229 $\pm$ 0.0026 to between 0.5016 and 0.5093 for privacy budgets from $ε= 1$ to $ε= 8$. On the test data, synthetic-latent training achieved an F1 score of 0.8993 $\pm$ 0.0006 and an AUROC of 0.9057 $\pm$ 0.0503, close to the 0.9747 $\pm$ 0.0132 real-latent training. These results show that FedDP-PALD generates private synthetic representations that preserve useful decision performance while strongly resisting membership inference.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedDP-PALD，一种在正式差分隐私保证下进行多模态医学数据合成的联邦潜扩散框架。它利用门控多头注意力机制联合处理X光图像和心电图信号，并引入DP-PMA方法对类别级潜原型进行裁剪并添加高斯噪声，有效防御成员推理攻击，同时保留良好的决策性能。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法存在两个问题：训练过程中交换的信息可能泄露患者数据是否被使用，以及用于替代真实记录的合成数据往往无法保留其预测结构，限制了临床可用性。
AI.method: 提出FedDP-PALD框架，包含两个关键组件：1) 门控多头注意力与模态可用性掩码，联合处理胸部X光图像和心电图信号，支持模态缺失场景；2) 差分隐私原型混合聚合(DP-PMA)，在服务器端对类别级潜原型进行裁剪并添加校准后的高斯噪声，实现(ε, δ)-差分隐私保护。
AI.result: 在PneumoniaMNIST、ChestMNIST和MIT-BIH数据集上，差分隐私将成员推理攻击AUROC从0.6229±0.0026降至0.5016~0.5093（ε=1~8）；合成潜训练在测试集上达到F1分数0.8993±0.0006和AUROC 0.9057±0.0503，接近真实潜训练的0.9747±0.0132。
AI.conclusion: FedDP-PALD能够生成私有合成表示，在强抵抗成员推理攻击的同时保留良好的决策性能。

title: ADMM-Based Safety-Critical Distributed NMPC for Cooperative Transportation by Quadrupedal Robots
summary: This paper presents a safety-critical distributed nonlinear model predictive control (DNMPC) framework for cooperative payload transportation by teams of quadrupedal robots. The proposed approach models the robotic team and the shared payload as a dynamically coupled networked system with rigid holonomic coupling constraints arising from cooperative transportation. To enable distributed real-time optimization, the centralized finite-horizon optimal control problem is decomposed into parallel local NMPC subproblems coordinated through the alternating direction method of multipliers (ADMM). The resulting distributed framework enforces consensus over both payload-state and interaction-wrench trajectories while explicitly incorporating acceleration-level holonomic coupling constraints within the distributed predictive control formulation. Safety-critical obstacle avoidance constraints for both the robotic agents and payload are enforced using higher-order control barrier functions (HOCBFs). The framework is validated through numerical simulations with teams of two, three, and four quadrupedal robots transporting shared payloads in cluttered environments. Real-time experiments on two- and three-robot teams demonstrate safe and robust transportation under payload uncertainty and external disturbances. Compared with centralized NMPC, the proposed framework achieves up to 23% reduction in average NLP solve time while maintaining comparable closed-loop performance. Ablation studies further demonstrate robustness to communication delays and show that explicit payload-state consensus and holonomic constraints substantially improve payload tracking and distributed coordination over existing wrench-only consensus formulations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向四足机器人团队协作搬运的安全关键型分布式非线性模型预测控制框架，利用ADMM分解集中式最优控制问题为并行子问题，并引入高阶控制障碍函数实现避障，实验证明该方法在保持性能的同时将求解时间降低23%。
AI.motivation: 四足机器人团队协作搬运共享负载时，面临动态耦合、实时优化和安全避障等多重挑战，现有集中式方法计算负担大、扩展性差，而分布式方法在协调共识和安全约束处理上尚有不足。
AI.method: 将集中式有限时域最优控制问题通过ADMM分解为并行的局部NMPC子问题，强制负载状态和交互力/力矩轨迹的共识，在分布式预测控制中显式引入加速度级完整耦合约束，并使用高阶控制障碍函数（HOCBF）实现机器人和负载的安全避障。
AI.result: 在2、3、4个四足机器人的数值仿真和2、3个机器人的实物实验中验证了有效性；相比集中式NMPC，平均NLP求解时间降低23%且闭环性能相当；消融实验表明负载状态共识和完整约束显著优于仅力/力矩共识的方案，且对通信延迟具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的分布式框架在保证安全性的前提下，有效提升了多四足机器人协作搬运的计算效率和可扩展性，为实际部署提供了可行方案。

title: Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks
summary: Gate-level netlists exhibit intrinsic structural properties that influence signal propagation independently of functional simulation. We define a topology-driven structural manipulability score that characterizes node-level structural flexibility using path participation, k-core embedding, symmetry, and centrality. Modeling netlists as directed graphs, we formulate node-level regression to learn this topology-derived score using graph neural networks (GNNs). Experiments on ISCAS85 and EPFL benchmarks evaluate how effectively different GNN architectures approximate this metric across held-out circuits, with hierarchical models yielding the most consistent rankings. Component-level and ablation analyses examine the contribution of individual factors. As an illustrative case study, analysis of Trojan-injected circuits using TrustHub templates reveals statistically distinguishable structural patterns, indicating that topology-based scoring provides complementary structural insight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于拓扑驱动的结构可操控性评分，利用路径参与度、k-核嵌入、对称性和中心性来刻画门级网表中的节点级结构灵活性，并通过图神经网络学习该评分。实验表明层次化GNN模型在跨电路评分排名上表现最佳，且在木马注入电路分析中发现了可区分的结构模式。
AI.motivation: 门级网表存在独立于功能仿真的内在结构特性，但目前缺乏一种无需功能仿真即可表征节点级结构灵活性的拓扑度量方法。
AI.method: 定义了一种拓扑驱动的结构可操控性评分，综合路径参与度、k-核嵌入、对称性和中心性四个因素；将网表建模为有向图，使用图神经网络进行节点级回归以学习该评分。
AI.result: 在ISCAS85和EPFL基准测试中，层次化GNN模型在跨电路的评分排名一致性上表现最优；组件级和消融分析验证了各因素的贡献；在TrustHub木马注入电路上发现了统计上可区分的结构模式。
AI.conclusion: 基于拓扑的结构评分能够提供互补的结构洞察，无需功能仿真即可揭示网表的结构特性，具有潜在的应用价值。

title: LaCache: Exact Caching and Precision-Adaptive Inference for Diffusion Large Language Models
summary: Diffusion-based Large Language Models(DLLMs) enable parallel generation via Semi-Autoregressive (SAR) decoding in text generation. However, current methods suffer from severe operator-level redundancy: they recompute the entire sequence during denoising steps, ignoring that the prefix and masked suffix remain invariant within a block. We propose LaCache, a training-free acceleration framework that alleviates this redundancy through lossless caching and mixed precision. Specifically, LaCache employs Lossless State Memoization (LSM) by caching three types of intermediate results: (i) EmbedCache for embedding outputs, (ii) RoPECache for token-wise pre-attention states, and (iii) FACache for the online softmax statistics within FlashAttention. These caches allow the model to skip redundant computation on unchanged tokens without altering the output. To further alleviate memory-bandwidth bottlenecks, LaCache inegrates a per-group FP8 quantization strategy for FFN layers, tailored to step-dependent activation distributions across the diffusion process. Experiments demonstrate that LaCache alone achieves approximately 1.3X end-to-end speedup over vanilla DLLM. When combined with existing acceleration methods, LaCache reaches up to 40.2X end-to-end speedup while maintaining comparable task accuracy.

AI.tldr: LaCache是一种无需训练的加速框架，通过无损缓存（嵌入缓存、RoPE缓存、FlashAttention在线softmax统计缓存）和面向FFN层的分组FP8量化，消除扩散大语言模型中的算子级冗余，实现约1.3倍加速，结合现有方法可达40.2倍端到端加速。
AI.motivation: 当前基于扩散的大语言模型（DLLMs）在文本生成中虽通过半自回归解码实现并行生成，但存在严重的算子级冗余——去噪步骤中重复计算整个序列，忽略了块内前缀和掩码后缀保持不变这一事实。
AI.method: 提出LaCache框架，包含两个核心组件：(1) 无损状态记忆化（LSM），缓存三种中间结果（EmbedCache、RoPECache、FACache）以跳过不变token的冗余计算；(2) 面向FFN层的分组FP8量化策略，依据扩散过程中逐步骤的激活分布定制量化精度，缓解内存带宽瓶颈。
AI.result: LaCache单独实现约1.3倍端到端加速；结合现有加速方法可达40.2倍端到端加速，同时保持可比的任务精度。
AI.conclusion: LaCache通过缓存不变token的中间状态和混合精度量化，有效消除了DLLM中的冗余计算，是一种无需训练且无损的加速方案，能够与现有方法良好兼容。

title: Med-OPD: Improving Medical Vision-Language Models via Evidence-Aware On-Policy Distillation
summary: Medical Vision-Language Models (Med-VLMs) require reliable reasoning from fine-grained visual evidence, yet existing models can produce plausible clinical answers by relying on language priors or medical templates rather than truly attending to diagnosis-critical regions. On-Policy Distillation (OPD) offers dense token-level supervision on student-generated trajectories and provides a privacy-compatible means of capability transfer without requiring the redistribution of raw patient data. However, standard OPD uniformly distills all tokens, causing sparse evidence-dependent tokens to be diluted by abundant clinical narrative tokens. Inspired by the success of OPD in the large language model community, we propose \textbf{Med-OPD}, to our knowledge the first unified post-training framework that integrates on-policy distillation with medical evidence-aware supervision for Med-VLMs. We introduce \textbf{Medical Evidence Advantage} (MEA), a teacher-grounded counterfactual signal that uses an answer-aware hint to focus teacher scoring on evidence supporting the target diagnosis, and measures each token's dependence on medical visual evidence by comparing teacher likelihoods under the original and evidence-degraded imaging modalities. Based on MEA, Med-OPD redistributes the distillation signal at both the token and trajectory levels, emphasizing diagnosis-critical tokens and evidence-reliant rollouts. Experiments on OmniMedVQA subsets show that Med-OPD consistently outperforms SFT and standard OPD across CT, MRI, Disease Diagnosis, and Lesion Grading. These results demonstrate that evidence-aware distillation can better strengthen medical VLMs' reliance on key visual evidence and improve reliable multimodal medical reasoning. The source code and data is publicly available at: https://github.com/yunhang8658/MedOPD.git

AI.tldr: Med-OPD是一个面向医学视觉语言模型（Med-VLMs）的统一后训练框架，通过引入医学证据优势（MEA）信号，在标记和轨迹层面重新分配蒸馏信号，强化模型对诊断关键视觉证据的依赖，提升多模态医学推理的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有Med-VLMs可能依赖语言先验或医学模板而非真正关注诊断关键区域来生成答案；标准OPD均匀蒸馏所有token，导致稀疏的、依赖证据的关键token被丰富的临床叙述token稀释。
AI.method: 提出Med-OPD框架，包含：(1) 医学证据优势（MEA），利用答案感知提示和证据降级成像模态，计算每个token对视觉证据的依赖程度；(2) 在标记和轨迹层面重新分配蒸馏信号，强调诊断关键token和依赖证据的轨迹。
AI.result: 在OmniMedVQA子集上的实验表明，Med-OPD在CT、MRI、疾病诊断和病变分级任务上持续优于SFT和标准OPD。
AI.conclusion: 证据感知蒸馏能有效增强医学VLM对关键视觉证据的依赖，提升可靠的多模态医学推理能力。

authors: Udaya S. K. Perera Miriya Thanthrige
title: Articulated Humanoid Head for a Robot Receptionist Capable of Natural Human Interaction
comment: This work is accepted at IEEE/ASME International Conference on Advanced Intelligent Mechatronics (AIM2026)
summary: Humanoid robots have become increasingly popular in applications such as social interaction, education, and service roles, which drives the need for more natural and efficient human-robot interactions. However, currently available humanoid heads often face limitations, including high costs, mechanical complexity, and limited adaptability across diverse environments. To address these challenges, we present an articulated humanoid robot head designed for a receptionist role, integrating a mechanical structure with 21 degrees of freedom (DoF), including mechanisms for the mouth, eyes, eyebrows, and neck, and covered with realistic silicone skin to achieve a human-like appearance and expression. The system integrates a model-based architecture that combines SCRFD, ArcFace, and ByTetrack for face recognition and Llama and Whisper for natural language processing, with hardware support enabling real-time operations and human re-identification. The conversational ability and re-identification capabilities of the humanoid robot head were quantitatively measured, while its emotional expressiveness and human likeness were evaluated through a user study, achieving an average human likeness score of 4.13 out of 5.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一款用于接待员角色的拟人化机器人头部，具有21个自由度、硅胶皮肤及多模态交互架构，在人类相似度评分中达到4.13/5。
AI.motivation: 当前人形机器人头部存在成本高、机械复杂度高、环境适应性有限等问题，难以满足自然高效的人机交互需求。
AI.method: 设计了21自由度的机械结构（嘴、眼、眉、颈），覆盖硅胶皮肤；集成SCRFD+ArcFace+ByTetrack的人脸识别架构与Llama+Whisper的自然语言处理系统，实现实时交互与人重识别。
AI.result: 定量评估了对话与人重识别能力；用户研究显示情感表现力和人类相似度平均得分为4.13/5。
AI.conclusion: 该拟人化机器人头部在成本可控的前提下实现了高人类相似度与实时多模态交互能力，适用于接待等社交场景。

title: Let the Data Decide: Supervision Analysis, Capability Trade-offs, and Adaptive Objective Routing in Continued Pre-Training via Off-Policy Distillation
summary: Off-policy distillation is now central to large language model pre-training, yet how training data, objective parameterization, and model capabilities interact remains poorly characterized. We studies top-$k$-truncated, temperature-scaled off-policy distillation by decomposing this problem into two questions: an \emph{objective-to-capability} analysis of how the training objective shapes token-level supervision and downstream performance, and a \emph{data-to-objective} analysis of how data heterogeneity should inform objective routing. We first show that the language-modeling objective ($L_{\mathrm{LM}}$) and the knowledge-distillation objective ($L_{\mathrm{KD}}$) induce systematically different capability profiles, and trace this divergence to a gradient-level tension between \emph{direct observed-token reinforcement} and \emph{teacher-supported alternative supervision}. To quantify this tension, we introduce diagnostic metrics -- support coverage, observed-token probability mass, and teacher-distribution concentration -- and show via controlled sweeps that the support size $k$ governs a coverage-sharpness trade-off, while distillation temperature controls within-support probability allocation. We then examine adaptive objective routing: a domain-level policy that applies $L_{\mathrm{LM}}$ to math and code and $L_{\mathrm{KD}}$ to general-domain data yields consistent gains over both single-objective baselines, whereas token-level routing based on observed-token probability mass or teacher entropy fails to consistently match the single-objective baseline. These results suggest that effective objective routing depends less on routing granularity than on the quality of the routing signal, reframing continued pre-training via off-policy distillation as a structured, data-conditional supervision-design problem rather than a global hyperparameter choice.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了大型语言模型离线策略蒸馏中训练数据、目标参数化与模型能力之间的交互关系，通过将问题分解为"目标到能力"和"数据到目标"两个层面，揭示了LM目标与KD目标在梯度层面的张力，提出了支持覆盖度、观测标记概率质量和教师分布集中度等诊断指标，并发现有效的目标路由策略更依赖于路由信号质量而非粒度粗细，从而将离线策略蒸馏的持续预训练重新定义为结构化的数据条件监督设计问题。
AI.motivation: 虽然离线策略蒸馏已成为大语言模型预训练的核心技术，但训练数据、目标参数化与模型能力之间的交互机制尚未被充分阐明，现有研究缺乏对这一问题的系统分解和量化分析。
AI.method: 将问题分解为"目标到能力"分析和"数据到目标"分析两个层面；引入支持覆盖度、观测标记概率质量、教师分布集中度等诊断指标；通过受控扫描实验研究支持大小k和蒸馏温度的影响；比较领域级和令牌级的路由策略效果。
AI.result: LM目标和KD目标会诱导出系统不同的能力轮廓，其根源在于梯度层面的直接观测标记强化与教师支持的替代监督之间的张力；支持大小k控制覆盖-锐度权衡，蒸馏温度控制支持内的概率分配；领域级自适应路由策略（对数学和代码使用LM目标，通用领域使用KD目标）优于单目标基线，而令牌级路由无法稳定匹敌单目标基线。
AI.conclusion: 有效的目标路由更依赖于路由信号质量而非路由粒度，应将离线策略蒸馏的持续预训练视为结构化的数据条件监督设计问题，而非全局超参数选择问题。

title: Interactive Task Alignment as a POMDP
summary: Current benchmarks for language models primarily evaluate execution on fully specified tasks. However, real user tasks are often ambiguous. Users arrive with incomplete, exploratory, or even inconsistent goals, requiring the assistant to first determine the intended task before carrying it out. We study this problem as task alignment: the ability to align with a user on their intended task. We introduce a general framework for converting specified tasks into underspecified interactions, formalized as a POMDP in which the model must infer a latent task from partial and evolving user intent. We validate our user simulator post hoc with a human user study. Across shopping, coding, and professional work settings, we find that while models often perform well once the task is specified, models still struggle with task alignment: current models act prematurely, interact ineffectively, and fail to resolve ambiguous requests. Models on average recover the user's intended task only 22-32% of the time under ambiguity. In a human study in the same setting, humans reach 48%, outperforming all evaluated models. We show that post-training with supervised fine-tuning and reinforcement learning improves task alignment, but models still lag behind humans in resolving uncertainty through interaction. Together, our results suggest that current models still lack key interaction abilities required for reliable agency.

AI.tldr: 论文研究了语言模型在模糊用户意图下的任务对齐能力，发现当前模型在任务明确时表现良好，但在处理模糊请求时（准确率仅22-32%）远落后于人类（48%），模型存在过早行动、交互效率低等问题，后训练（SFT+RL）虽有提升但仍不及人类。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要评估模型在完全指定任务上的执行能力，但实际用户任务往往是模糊、不完整或矛盾的，模型需要先推断用户意图再执行任务。作者旨在研究语言模型在这种模糊场景下的任务对齐能力。
AI.method: 将指定任务转换为未充分指定的交互问题，形式化为部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP），其中模型需从部分且演化中的用户意图推断潜在任务。通过用户模拟器（经人工后验验证）在购物、编程、专业工作三类场景中进行评估。
AI.result: 当前模型在模糊场景下平均只有22-32%的概率恢复用户意图，远低于人类48%的表现。模型存在过早行动、交互效率低下、无法解决模糊请求等问题。后训练（SFT+RL）能提升任务对齐能力，但模型在通过交互解决不确定性方面仍落后于人类。
AI.conclusion: 当前语言模型仍缺乏实现可靠代理所需的关键交互能力，特别是在处理模糊用户意图时的任务对齐能力存在显著不足。

title: Dual-Domain Self-Supervised Artifact Removal Framework for Photoacoustic Computed Tomography
summary: Photoacoustic Computed Tomography (PACT) often faces severe challenges from reconstruction artifacts due to sparse detection conditions. In this work, based on the distinct differences in artifact patterns between back-projection-based and Fourier-based reconstruction algorithms, we propose a self-supervised artifact removal framework that employs a lightweight Siamese Neural Network and a composite loss function integrating cross-domain fidelity and uncertainty-weighted consistency, effectively decoupling dual-domain features and filtering artifacts. Comprehensive validations using simulations, phantoms, in vivo rat and human experimental data demonstrate that the proposed method can significantly suppress image artifacts. Furthermore, enabled by the acceleration of the spatial-domain and frequency-domain inverse operator, this end-to-end approach also achieves exceptional computational efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于孪生神经网络的自监督伪影去除框架，利用反投影和傅里叶重建算法伪影模式的差异，通过跨域保真度和不确定性加权一致性损失函数，实现稀疏检测条件下光声 computed tomography 的高效伪影抑制。
AI.motivation: 光声 computed tomography 在稀疏检测条件下常受到重建伪影的严重影响，现有方法难以有效去除这些干扰。
AI.method: 利用反投影和傅里叶重建算法之间伪影模式的显著差异，采用轻量级孪生神经网络，结合跨域保真度和不确定性加权一致性的复合损失函数，实现双域特征解耦与伪影过滤。
AI.result: 在仿真、体模、活体大鼠和人体实验数据上的综合验证表明，该方法能显著抑制图像伪影，并且由于空间域和频域逆算子的加速，计算效率优异。
AI.conclusion: 该自监督框架能有效去除稀疏检测条件下的PACT重建伪影，同时具备良好的计算效率。

title: SHAPE: Simultaneous Water Hydraulic Actuation and Position Estimation of a Sensorless Remote Actuator through a Thin and Long Flexible Tube
comment: 11 pages, 11 figures, and 7 tables. Yuki Nakamura and Shuto Yoshimura contributed equally to this work
summary: Robot sensors and electronic equipment are prone to failure in harsh environments. With water hydraulic drive, thin and long tubes enable remote operation without actuator-side sensors. Furthermore, the elasticity of the tubes reduces the impedance of the joints (actuators), benefiting robot tasks involving unexpected contact with the environment or vibrations. However, owing to the low impedance and limited camera visibility, accurately positioning the joint (or end effector) to the target location under varying load conditions is challenging. This study proposes a novel method that employs water-filled flexible tubes to enable the transmission of driving power and actuator-side information to and from the actuator, respectively, without actuator-side sensors. By modeling volumetric loss during transmission based on pressure fluctuations and incorporating minor air entrapment, simultaneous power transmission and position estimation is achieved through a tube up to 50 m. Thus, it becomes possible to use a feedback control framework that was previously difficult to implement in sensorless systems. Experimental validation confirms stable position control of a sensorless water hydraulic cylinder under varying loads. Furthermore, a field parameter-identification method accounts for tube and air entrainment variability without requiring actuator-side sensors. These contributions promote reliable remote control of robots in harsh environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用充水柔性软管同时实现驱动力传输和位置估计的方法，无需执行器端传感器，通过在50米距离内建模压力波动和空气混入导致的容积损失，实现了传感器less水压缸在不同负载下的稳定位置控制，适用于恶劣环境下的远程机器人操作。
AI.motivation: 恶劣环境下机器人传感器和电子设备易失效；水压驱动虽能通过细长软管实现远程操作并降低关节阻抗，但低阻抗和有限视觉条件下，变负载时精确位置控制困难。
AI.method: 利用充水柔性软管同时传输驱动力和执行器端信息；通过建模传输过程中的容积损失（基于压力波动和微小空气混入），实现长达50米的同步动力传输和位置估计；并采用现场参数辨识方法应对软管和空气混入的变异性。
AI.result: 实验验证了传感器less水压缸在不同负载下能够实现稳定的位置控制，且通过50米长管路的同步动力传输与位置估计可行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法使之前难以在无传感器系统中实现的反馈控制框架成为可能，促进了机器人在恶劣环境下的可靠远程控制。

title: Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory for Proactive Embodied Safety
summary: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have empowered embodied agents to execute complex household tasks, they struggle to proactively handle dynamically emerging hazards during closed-loop interactions. Existing safety approaches often rely on runtime guardrails to block unsafe actions or induce excessive caution, which severely stalls task progress instead of actively resolving the underlying risks. To break this safety-progress trade-off, we introduce the Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory framework, which reframes embodied safety from progress-stalling guardrails to proactive hazard mitigation. The framework consists of a Risk-Sufficient Topological Belief Graph (RSG) for persistent safety-relevant state tracking under partial observability, an Agency-Grounded Factual Memory for precise hazard anticipation, and an Experience Memory that injects procedural Meta-Skills to guide executable, progress-preserving mitigation. Furthermore, we propose an automated Test-Verify-Write loop, allowing agents to continually refine their mitigation Meta-Skills from execution traces at test time. Experiments on IS-Bench demonstrate that our framework substantially boosts the Safe-Success rate across multiple VLM backbones (e.g., +30.3% on Qwen3-VL-8B), enabling agents to proactively mitigate hazards without stalling task progress. Code is available at https://github.com/DyMessi/JIT-Memory.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架，通过风险充分的拓扑信念图、基于智能体的事实记忆和经验记忆，以及自动化的测试-验证-编写循环，使具身智能体在闭环交互中主动缓解动态危害，而不阻塞任务进度。在IS-Bench上，该方法将安全成功率提升了高达30.3%。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM具身智能体在执行复杂家务任务时难以主动处理闭环交互中动态出现的危害。现有的安全方法要么依赖运行时防护栏阻止不安全行为，要么引发过度谨慎，严重阻碍任务进度，无法在安全与进度之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 提出Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架，包含三个核心组件：1) Risk-Sufficient Topological Belief Graph (RSG)用于在部分可观测性下持续跟踪安全相关状态；2) Agency-Grounded Factual Memory用于精确的危害预测；3) Experience Memory注入程序性元技能以指导可执行的、不阻碍进度的缓解措施。此外，提出自动化的Test-Verify-Write循环，使智能体在测试时从执行轨迹中持续优化缓解元技能。
AI.result: 在IS-Bench基准上的实验表明，该框架在多个VLM骨干上显著提升了安全成功率（例如在Qwen3-VL-8B上提升了30.3%），使智能体能够主动缓解危害而不阻塞任务进度。
AI.conclusion: Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架成功打破了安全与进度之间的权衡，将具身安全从阻塞进度的防护栏转变为主动的危害缓解机制，并通过自进化能力在测试时持续提升性能。

title: When to Plan: Learning to Select Between Reactive Control and Deliberative Planning
summary: It has long been recognized that humans have the ability to switch between fast, reactive decision-making and slower, deliberative planning. In this paper, we study the question of how to learn this ability, known as meta-reasoning, in artificial agents. We model reactive decision-making as a policy that directly maps state observations to actions. Such policies can be trained with reinforcement learning (RL) or imitation learning, but may generalize poorly outside of their training distribution. Alternatively, model-based decision-time planning is more likely to produce good actions across a broader set of states but requires additional computation time, which delays acting. In this work, we introduce an RL method for training a meta-reasoning policy that allocates computation by conditioning on a reactive-policy uncertainty score. This score enables it to predict when the reactive policy is likely to perform poorly and when planning is needed. We conduct an empirical study on motion planning and navigation environments, showing that this design enables the meta-reasoning policy to learn when the reactive policy provides a good-enough action versus when decision-time planning is needed. Additionally, we show that our design enables the meta-agent to shift toward fully reactive control as the reactive policy improves.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种元推理强化学习方法，通过反应式策略的不确定性评分动态分配计算资源，在运动规划和导航任务中实现了反应式决策与规划式决策之间的智能切换，并能随反应式策略提升而趋向全反应控制。
AI.motivation: 人类具备在快速反应决策与缓慢深思规划之间切换的能力，而现有AI方法要么使用反应式策略（泛化性差），要么使用规划策略（计算开销大），缺乏学习何时使用何种策略的元推理能力。
AI.method: 提出一种强化学习方法训练元推理策略，该策略基于反应式策略的不确定性评分来动态分配计算资源：当不确定性低时直接使用反应式策略输出动作，不确定性高时则调用决策时规划。
AI.result: 在运动规划和导航环境的实证研究表明，该方法能够有效学习何时反应式策略足够好、何时需要规划，并且随着反应式策略的提升，元智能体能够自然地向全反应控制迁移。
AI.conclusion: 基于不确定性评分的元推理策略是学习计算资源分配的有效方法，能够在计算效率与决策质量之间取得良好平衡，并支持反应式策略的渐进式优化。

title: LookME: Lookup-Based Multimodal Embeddings for Layer Injection in Vision-Language Models
summary: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved strong progress in multimodal understanding. However, scaling dense or sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models to improve performance limits deployment in resource-constrained environments due to the trade-off between high memory usage from full loading and increased latency from on-demand loading. Recently, the Per-Layer Embedding (PLE) architecture addresses this by scaling models with large external embedding tables stored in ROM and performing lightweight lookup to retrieve relevant embeddings to enhance token representations. Nevertheless, existing PLE-style methods are primarily designed for text embeddings due to the convenience of ID-based retrieval, limiting their effectiveness in VLMs where multimodal embeddings contain richer information for visual tasks. In this paper, we propose LookME, the first framework that enables lookup-based enhancement for multimodal embeddings in VLMs while supporting partitioned storage and on-demand loading. To efficiently lookup arbitrary continuous multimodal embeddings from large-scale embedding tables, we propose a hierarchical two-level lookup method employing a coarse-to-fine strategy that performs lookups from the scene-level to the intra-scene primitive-level. Furthermore, we integrate the lookup method with a sparse injection strategy, which adaptively prioritizes critical embeddings over voluminous multimodal embeddings within layers, and facilitates embedding table reuse across neighboring layers, improving the trade-off among efficiency, model size, and performance. Experiments on multiple visual benchmarks show that LookME outperforms text-only PLE-style methods, validating the effectiveness of lookup-based multimodal embedding enhancement.

AI.tldr: 提出LookME框架，首次在VLM中实现基于查找的多模态嵌入增强，支持分层存储和按需加载，通过层级化两阶段查找方法和稀疏注入策略，在资源受限环境下提升效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有VLM通过缩放稠密或稀疏MoE模型提升性能，但存在高内存使用与高延迟的权衡；而PLE架构虽能缓解该问题，但其方法主要针对基于ID检索的文本嵌入，不适合包含更丰富视觉信息的多模态嵌入。
AI.method: 提出LookME框架：(1) 层级化两阶段查找方法——从场景级到场景内原始级的粗到细查找；(2) 稀疏注入策略——自适应优先处理关键嵌入，并促进相邻层间嵌入表复用。
AI.result: 在多个视觉基准上，LookME优于文本-only的PLE方法，验证了基于查找的多模态嵌入增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: LookME首次将查找式增强扩展到多模态嵌入，在效率、模型规模和性能之间实现了更好的权衡。

title: DROID-ANCHOR: Odometry-Anchored Recurrent Metric Depth Estimation
summary: Precise metric depth estimation is fundamental for autonomous robot navigation, yet monocular systems inherently suffer from scale ambiguity and scale drift. While recent recurrent flow-based SLAM systems have demonstrated state-of-the-art robustness, they remain scale-ambiguous. In this paper, we propose Metric-DROID, an end-to-end recurrent architecture that anchors visual SLAM to physical reality by integrating proprioceptive odometry. Our framework introduces the following innovations: (1) A LSTM Update Operator that encodes high-frequency odometry sequences into spatial feature maps, providing a persistent metric bias for iterative refinement. (2) An Uncertainty-Aware Metric Backend ($BA_{odom}$) that treats odometry as a geometric anchor with learned heteroscedastic covariance. By regressing a time-varying metric uncertainty $Σ_{o}$, our system intelligently balances visual re-projection and metric translation residuals, effectively mitigating the impact of wheel-slip and sensor noise. (3) We further propose a selective residual fine-tuning strategy to preserve pre-trained geometric priors while enabling zero-shot metric alignment.

AI.tldr: Metric-DROID是一种端到端递归架构，通过集成本体感测里程计来解决单目视觉SLAM的尺度模糊问题，提出LSTM更新算子、不确定性感知度量后端（BA_odom）和选择性残差微调策略，实现鲁棒的度量深度估计。
AI.motivation: 单目视觉SLAM系统固有的尺度模糊和尺度漂移问题限制了自主机器人导航的精度，现有基于递归流的方法虽鲁棒但仍是尺度模糊的。
AI.method: (1) LSTM更新算子：将高频里程计序列编码为空间特征图，为迭代优化提供持久度量偏置；(2) 不确定性感知度量后端BA_odom：将里程计作为几何锚点，通过回归时变度量不确定性Σ_o来智能平衡视觉重投影与度量平移残差；(3) 选择性残差微调策略：保留预训练几何先验的同时实现零样本度量对齐。
AI.result: 该方法通过不确定性建模有效缓解了轮滑和传感器噪声的影响，实现了零样本度量对齐，提升了单目SLAM的度量精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过将本体感测里程计集成到递归视觉SLAM框架中，并引入不确定性感知的优化机制，能够将视觉SLAM锚定到物理现实，解决单目系统的尺度模糊问题。

title: High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration
summary:
Long-context large language model inference relies on the KV cache to avoid redundant attention computation, but incurs high memory and bandwidth overheads. Low-bit KV-cache quantization reduces this cost, yet it severely degrade quality; particularly, one-bit quantization reduces accuracy from 84.2% to 47.8% on Llama-3.1-8B under RULER.
  Rather than common beliefs that absolute error of logits, we find that the root cause is structured local misranking, where the distribution of logits in top-K region is drifted. We thereby propose local distribution restoration, a new technique that detects steps with high local distribution risk from quantized-logit features and restores only the selected top-K candidate distribution before token selection. We implement DGAP to achieve local distribution restoration, with efficient risk detcetors and correctors. Expeirments show that on Llama-3.1-8B, DGAP recovers K1V1 RULER accuracy from 47.8% to 83.2% and reduces distribution drift from 0.38 to 0.14; across Llama, Mistral, and Qwen models, it preserves the persistent low-bit KV-cache footprint with modest decode overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文发现低比特KV缓存量化导致大模型长上下文推理精度下降的根本原因不是logits的绝对误差，而是结构化局部排序错乱——top-K区域的logits分布发生漂移。为此提出局部分布恢复方法DGAP，通过检测高风险的量化logits特征并仅恢复选中的top-K候选分布，在Llama-3.1-8B上将RULER精度从47.8%恢复至83.2%，分布漂移从0.38降至0.14。
AI.motivation: 低比特KV缓存量化虽能降低长上下文LLM推理的高内存和带宽开销，但严重损害质量（如一比特量化使RULER精度从84.2%降至47.8%）。现有工作误认为原因是logits的绝对误差，实际根因是结构化局部排序错乱（top-K区域logits分布漂移）。
AI.method: 提出局部分布恢复（local distribution restoration）方法DGAP：1）从量化logits特征中高效检测存在高局部分布风险的步骤；2）仅在token选择前对选中的top-K候选分布进行恢复。包含高效的风险检测器（risk detectors）和校正器（correctors）。
AI.result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上，DGAP将K1V1 RULER精度从47.8%恢复至83.2%，分布漂移从0.38降至0.14；在Llama、Mistral、Qwen等模型上，保持低比特KV缓存的持久低占用，且解码开销适度。
AI.conclusion: 低比特KV缓存量化的精度损失源于结构化局部排序错乱而非绝对logits误差，通过局部分布恢复可有效缓解，DGAP方法在大幅恢复精度的同时保持了低比特量化的效率优势。

title: Berkeley and Heiserman as an Unexhausted Architecture for Embodied Machine Intelligence
summary: Edmund C. Berkeley is usually remembered as a writer who helped connect symbolic logic to computing machinery. That description is correct, but incomplete. Read across Berkeley's machine-oriented writings and projects, the central concern is broader: to show that symbolic logic can serve as a practical design language for machines that acquire information, retain it, respond appropriately to changing conditions, and organize their behavior over time. This paper takes Symbolic Logic and Intelligent Machines as the principal text in that effort, while treating it as representative of a larger Berkeley program that links logical form, circuitry, control, and intelligent behavior. On this reading, Berkeley does not merely treat intelligence as abstract symbol manipulation. He repeatedly defines intelligent machines in operational terms, ties logic to hardware realization, and describes machine behavior through the coordinated interaction of inputs, outputs, memory, calculation, control, states, and events. His treatment of robots and machine activities accordingly moves beyond static logical form toward temporally extended, environment-coupled behavior. David L. Heiserman's machine-intelligence work extends this program toward adaptive creature architectures built around memory, confidence, and generalization. Taken together, Berkeley and Heiserman can be read not as exhausted historical episodes but as contributors to a still under-tested architectural approach to embodied robotic cognition.

AI.tldr: 本文重新解读了Edmund C. Berkeley的工作，认为其核心贡献不仅是连接符号逻辑与计算器械，更在于将符号逻辑作为智能机器的实用设计语言，涉及信息获取、存储、环境响应和时间组织行为。通过分析Berkeley的《符号逻辑与智能机器》及相关项目，结合David L. Heiserman的适应性智能体架构，本文提出两人可被视为一种尚未充分验证的具身机器人认知架构方法的早期贡献者。
AI.motivation: 纠正对Berkeley的片面认知（仅视为符号逻辑与计算器械的连接者），揭示其更宏大的研究纲领：以符号逻辑作为智能机器的实用设计语言，涵盖信息获取、存储、环境响应及行为的时间组织。
AI.method: 以《符号逻辑与智能机器》为主要文本，将其视为Berkeley更大研究纲领的代表，分析Berkeley如何从操作层面定义智能机器、将逻辑与硬件实现绑定、通过输入输出/存储/计算/控制/状态/事件的协调交互描述机器行为。同时引入Heiserman的适应性智能体架构进行延伸讨论。
AI.result: Berkeley的智能机器概念超越了静态逻辑形式，走向时间延展、环境耦合的行为。Heiserman的工作将这一纲领扩展到基于记忆、置信度和泛化的适应性智能体架构。两人共同代表了一种尚未充分验证的具身机器人认知架构方法。
AI.conclusion: Berkeley和Heiserman不应被视为已过时的历史人物，而是对具身机器人认知领域仍具启发价值的架构方法贡献者。

title: CoBind: Stage-Aware Compositional Binding for Training-Free Text-to-Image Generation
summary:
Diffusion-based text-to-image models often fail on complex prompts involving multiple entities, attributes, and relations, producing object omissions, incorrect attribute assignments, or reversed spatial layouts. Existing training-free methods mainly strengthen token-level attention, but do not explicitly model which attributes belong to which entities or when different constraints should be enforced during denoising.
  We introduce \textbf{CoBind}, a training-free framework for stage-aware compositional binding. CoBind parses a prompt into a composition graph of entities, attributes, and relations. It first establishes the global layout using entity-completeness and relation constraints, then binds attributes to their target entities through contrastive cross-entity optimization. Structural guidance is gradually relaxed in later denoising steps to preserve textures and visual details. CoBind also adapts the guidance strength according to the current satisfaction of each constraint, reducing unnecessary latent updates.
  CoBind requires no retraining or additional annotations. Experiments on T2I-CompBench++, GenEval, and multiple diffusion backbones show consistent improvements in attribute binding, spatial relations, and complex compositional generation while maintaining competitive visual quality.

AI.tldr: CoBind是一种无需训练的阶段性组合绑定框架，通过解析提示为实体-属性-关系组合图，分阶段进行布局建立、属性绑定和结构引导松弛，并自适应调整引导强度，在多个基准上提升了属性绑定、空间关系和复杂组合生成的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于扩散的文本到图像模型在处理涉及多个实体、属性和关系的复杂提示时经常失败，出现对象遗漏、属性分配错误或空间布局颠倒等问题。现有的免训练方法主要强化token级注意力，但没有明确建模哪些属性属于哪些实体，以及去噪过程中何时应施加不同约束。
AI.method: CoBind将提示解析为实体、属性和关系的组合图；首先使用实体完整性和关系约束建立全局布局，然后通过跨实体对比优化将属性绑定到目标实体；在后续去噪步骤中逐步放松结构引导以保留纹理和细节；同时根据每个约束的当前满足程度自适应调整引导强度。
AI.result: 在T2I-CompBench++、GenEval和多个扩散主干上的实验表明，CoBind在属性绑定、空间关系和复杂组合生成方面持续改进，同时保持具有竞争力的视觉质量。
AI.conclusion: CoBind是一种无需重新训练或额外标注的有效框架，通过阶段性组合绑定显著提升了文本到图像模型处理复杂提示的能力。

title: Move First, Commit Later: Selective LiDAR-to-BIM Global Initialization via Sequential Consensus with Symmetry-Aware Abstention
summary: Global LiDAR-to-BIM initialization must place a robot within an as-designed building model without a prior pose. In repetitive interiors, the principal failure mode is not low-confidence registration but confident aliasing: a submap can match several BIM regions with comparable scores, producing a high-scoring pose displaced by symmetry. We present Move First, Commit Later, a selective layer that treats a registration front-end as an evidence source and decides whether to commit. Candidates from multiple submaps are mapped to a common $\mathrm{SE}(2)$ anchor; a top-1 consensus $B_m$, invariant to non-champion multiplicity, aggregates cross-submap evidence; and topology serves only as a binary feasibility gate. The decision is typed--COMMIT, DEFER, or AMBIGUOUS($τ$), reporting the detected symmetry period--and reversible: symmetry-breaking motion upgrades AMBIGUOUS to COMMIT. On a real multi-room building and a controlled symmetric simulation, the layer commits correctly in every tested trajectory-scale configuration and otherwise abstains with a typed state, whereas forced-choice policies on the same front-end select wrong rooms in most cases. Committed anchors are within 0.02--0.36 m of an independent laser-tracker position reference and within $1.9^\circ$ of a BIM-registration orientation proxy. The evaluation covers one building and one front-end; the layer is designed to be front-end modular.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"先移动，后确认"（Move First, Commit Later）策略层，解决LiDAR-to-BIM初始化中因建筑对称性导致的置信别名问题。该层将注册前端视为证据源，通过跨子图共识和拓扑可行性门控决定是否提交定位结果，并在检测到对称歧义时输出AMBIGUOUS状态，通过后续运动打破对称性后升级为COMMIT。在真实建筑和仿真环境中均能正确提交或正确弃权，而强制选择策略大多选错房间。
AI.motivation: 在无先验位姿的LiDAR-to-BIM初始化中，重复对称性室内环境的主要失败模式并非低置信度注册，而是置信别名（confident aliasing）——子图与BIM中多个区域匹配得分相近，产生被对称性偏移的高分位姿。现有方法缺乏对这种对称歧义的识别与处理机制。
AI.method: 提出Move First, Commit Later选择性层：1) 将注册前端视为证据源，从多个子图获取候选位姿；2) 将候选映射到公共SE(2)锚点；3) 通过冠军不变共识B_m聚合跨子图证据；4) 拓扑仅作为二元可行性门控；5) 决策类型化为COMMIT、DEFER或AMBIGUOUS(τ)，其中τ报告检测到的对称周期；6) 支持可逆决策，对称破坏运动可将AMBIGUOUS升级为COMMIT。
AI.result: 在真实多房间建筑和受控对称仿真环境中，该层在所有测试轨迹尺度配置下均正确提交或正确弃权（带类型化状态）。而相同前端的强制选择策略在大多数情况下选错房间。提交的锚点位姿误差为0.02-0.36 m（相对于独立激光跟踪仪位置参考），方向误差在1.9°以内（相对于BIM注册方向代理）。
AI.conclusion: 该选择性层能有效处理对称环境下的定位歧义问题，在无法确定唯一正确位姿时主动弃权或报告对称周期，并通过后续运动信息打破歧义。层设计具有前端模块化特性，可适配不同注册前端。

title: Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Multi-Omics-Based Breast Cancer Prediction
summary: Estrogen Receptor (ER) status is a critical biomarker in breast cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection. Recent advances in high-throughput sequencing technologies have enabled the generation of multi-omics datasets that provide complementary molecular information for computational prediction tasks. This study presents a systematic benchmarking analysis of classical machine learning models for ER status prediction using transcriptomic (RNA expression), genomic (copy number variation; CNV), and proteomic (RPPA) data from the TCGA-BRCA cohort. A rigorous experimental framework incorporating stratified train-test splitting, stratified five-fold cross-validation, class imbalance handling, and fold-specific feature selection was employed to ensure reliable evaluation and prevent data leakage. Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Logistic Regression were evaluated across single-omic and multi-omic settings. Results demonstrated that RNA expression provided the strongest predictive signal, while multi-omic integration yielded modest but consistent improvements over individual modalities. Among all evaluated approaches, Random Forest achieved the best overall performance in the integrated multi-omic setting, obtaining a balanced accuracy of 90.3\% and an ROC-AUC of 97.1\%. Furthermore, recurrent selection of biologically relevant genes, including \textit{ESR1}, \textit{PGR}, \textit{FOXA1}, and \textit{GATA3}, supported the biological validity of the learned models. These findings indicate that carefully regularized classical machine learning methods remain highly effective for small, high-dimensional genomic datasets and that multi-omic integration provides complementary information for breast cancer ER status prediction.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统比较了六种经典机器学习模型（随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、SVM、逻辑回归）在单组学和多组学（转录组、基因组、蛋白质组）数据上预测乳腺癌ER状态的表现。随机森林在多组学集成设置下表现最佳，平衡准确率达90.3%，ROC-AUC为97.1%，且反复筛选出ESR1、PGR等生物学相关基因，验证了模型的有效性。
AI.motivation: ER状态是乳腺癌诊断、预后和治疗选择的关键生物标志物。随着高通量测序技术的发展，多组学数据为计算预测提供了互补信息，但需要系统评估不同机器学习模型在ER状态预测任务中的表现，尤其是经典方法在多组学集成场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 使用TCGA-BRCA队列的转录组（RNA表达）、基因组（CNV）和蛋白质组（RPPA）数据，采用分层训练-测试划分、分层五折交叉验证、类别不平衡处理和折特异性特征选择等严格框架，评估随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、SVM和逻辑回归在单组学和多组学设置下的表现。
AI.result: RNA表达提供了最强的预测信号，多组学集成相比单模态有适度但一致的改进。随机森林在多组学集成设置下表现最佳，平衡准确率90.3%，ROC-AUC 97.1%。反复筛选出ESR1、PGR、FOXA1、GATA3等生物学相关基因。
AI.conclusion: 经过适当正则化的经典机器学习方法在处理小型高维基因组数据集时仍然高效，多组学集成为乳腺癌ER状态预测提供了互补信息。

title: SEER: Supervised Learning to Control Energetic Reasoning
summary: One of the main strengths of Constraint Programming is the ability to reduce the search space via propagation. However, propagation is a double-edged sword, with more pruning power coming at the price of larger computation time. For each problem constraint, the best propagator depends on the specific instance and may change at search time. In the literature, Machine Learning (ML) techniques and activity-based heuristics have been applied respectively for choosing (statically) the propagators for a batch of problems and to adapt (dynamically) the propagation strength. We propose to merge those efforts by using an oracle function, obtained via ML, to decide whether to run complex propagators for a target constraint. A combination of design choices makes the approach flexible and easy to embed in state-of-the-art solvers. In this paper, we focus on investigating the feasibility of building an oracle for the Energetic Reasoning propagator. Our experiments show that high prediction accuracy can be obtained, provide suggestions for classification features, and highlight important issues to address when building such an oracle.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过机器学习构建预言函数，动态决定是否对特定约束运行复杂传播器（以Energetic Reasoning为例），在保持传播效果的同时降低计算开销，实验表明该方法可获得高预测精度。
AI.motivation: 约束规划中传播器的剪枝能力与计算时间存在权衡，不同传播器在不同实例和搜索阶段表现各异，现有静态选择和动态调整方法各有局限，亟需一种灵活高效的自适应传播策略。
AI.method: 通过机器学习构建预言函数（oracle），用于预测是否对目标约束运行复杂传播器；结合多种设计选择使其易于嵌入现有求解器；以Energetic Reasoning传播器为具体案例验证可行性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可获得高预测精度，提供了分类特征的建议，并指出了构建此类预言函数时需要解决的重要问题。
AI.conclusion: 将机器学习与活动启发式方法融合，通过预言函数动态控制传播强度是可行的，为构建更智能的自适应约束求解器奠定了基础。

title: DAUPNet: Domain-Aware Uncertainty Modeling for Reliable Prototype Discrimination in Cross-Domain Few-Shot Semantic Segmentation
summary: Cross-domain few-shot semantic segmentation (CD-FSS) has predominantly been formulated as learning domain-invariant representations or improving support-query correspondence. Nevertheless, large domain shifts still make prototype matching unreliable: inconsistent hierarchical responses corrupt the support representation, deterministic prototypes cannot express boundary and appearance ambiguity, and treating prototypes with different reliability equally during optimization weakens foreground-background separation. We therefore propose DAUPNet, a unified framework that reformulates cross-domain prototype matching as uncertainty-aware prototype discrimination. DAUPNet first harmonizes hierarchical support-query features to provide stable evidence, then represents foreground and background prototypes probabilistically, and finally uses their estimated uncertainty to regulate contrastive optimization. On four standard target domains, DAUPNet achieves 72.6% and 76.7% average mIoU in the 1-shot and 5-shot settings, respectively, including substantial gains on the two medical domains. These results demonstrate that modeling prototype uncertainty and incorporating it into optimization provides a robust and interpretable approach to CD-FSS under severe domain shift. The code is available at https://github.com/madness-Lei/DAUPNet

AI.tldr: DAUPNet通过将跨域原型匹配重新定义为不确定性感知的原型判别，统一了跨域小样本语义分割框架。该方法首先对齐层次化支持-查询特征，然后概率化表示前景和背景原型，最后利用估计的不确定性调节对比优化。在四个标准目标域上，1-shot和5-shot设置分别达到72.6%和76.7%平均mIoU，尤其在两个医学域上表现突出。
AI.motivation: 现有跨域小样本语义分割方法主要致力于学习域不变表示或改进支持-查询对应关系，但严重域偏移仍导致原型匹配不可靠：层次响应不一致破坏了支持表示，确定性原型无法表达边界和外观模糊性，优化过程中对不同可靠性的原型等同对待削弱了前景-背景分离。
AI.method: 提出DAUPNet统一框架，将跨域原型匹配重新表述为不确定性感知的原型判别。具体包括：1) 协调层次化支持-查询特征以提供稳定证据；2) 概率化表示前景和背景原型；3) 利用估计的不确定性来调节对比优化过程。
AI.result: 在四个标准目标域上，DAUPNet在1-shot和5-shot设置下分别达到72.6%和76.7%的平均mIoU，尤其在两个医学域上取得显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 建模原型不确定性并将其纳入优化过程，为严重域偏移下的跨域小样本语义分割提供了一种鲁棒且可解释的方法。

title: BoxTwin: Learning Elastoplastic Articulated Object Dynamics from Videos
summary: Digital twins enable robots to anticipate and adapt to physical interactions, but existing models struggle with elastoplastic articulated objects (EAOs) that exhibit nonlinear elasticity, plastic yielding, and damage accumulation. We present BoxTwin, an interactive digital twin framework that learns the full dynamics of EAOs from videos. Our pipeline reconstructs the scene, identifies a physics aware constitutive model for each EAO. Experiments on manual folding and dual arm manipulation of EAOs show that BoxTwin accurately tracks joint trajectories and reproduces post contact plastic behavior over long horizons. By integrating video driven reconstruction with elastoplastic damage modeling, BoxTwin advances digital twins toward predictive, adaptive control of deformable articulated objects in unstructured environments.

AI.tldr: BoxTwin是一个交互式数字孪生框架，能够从视频中学习弹塑性铰接物体（EAO）的完整动力学，包括非线性弹性、塑性屈服和损伤累积，实验证明其在手动折叠和双臂操作中能准确跟踪关节轨迹并再现长期塑性行为。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生模型难以处理弹塑性铰接物体（EAOs）表现出的非线性弹性、塑性屈服和损伤累积等复杂动力学行为，亟需一种能从视频中学习EAO完整动力学的框架。
AI.method: BoxTwin通过视频驱动重建场景，为每个EAO识别物理感知的本构模型，并集成弹塑性损伤建模，实现从视频到动力学的端到端学习。
AI.result: 在手动折叠和双臂操作EAO的实验中，BoxTwin能够准确跟踪关节轨迹，并在长时间范围内再现接触后的塑性行为。
AI.conclusion: BoxTwin通过将视频驱动重建与弹塑性损伤建模相结合，推动了数字孪生向非结构化环境中可变形铰接物体的预测性和自适应控制发展。

title: Learning Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models from Pure Synthetic Data
summary: Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models (STFMs) aim to learn generalizable representations of complex dynamical systems across space and time. However, existing approaches suffer from distributional bias in real-world pre-training data, structural bottlenecks of autoregressive or diffusion-based paradigms, and objectives that overemphasize point-wise reconstruction in noisy observation space.We propose \textbf{NeoST}, the first spatio-temporal foundation model pre-trained solely on procedurally generated synthetic systems. NeoST introduces a scalable synthetic pre-training corpus to mitigate real-world bias, a latent-space reasoning architecture that generates and iteratively refines multiple future trajectories without sequential error accumulation, and latent-space objectives that emphasize structural dynamics and enable inference-time correction under distribution shifts.Extensive experiments across diverse real-world benchmarks show that NeoST consistently outperforms existing STFMs in diverse real-world spatio-temporal systems, achieves superior long-horizon stability and inference efficiency.

AI.tldr: NeoST是首个完全基于程序化合成数据预训练的时空基础模型，通过潜在空间推理架构和结构动态目标函数，在多个真实世界基准上超越现有模型。
AI.motivation: 现有STFM存在三点局限：真实世界预训练数据存在分布偏差；自回归或扩散基范式存在结构瓶颈；目标函数过度强调含噪观测空间中的逐点重建。
AI.method: 提出NeoST：1) 构建可扩展的合成预训练语料库，缓解真实世界偏差；2) 设计潜在空间推理架构，生成并迭代优化多条未来轨迹，避免序贯误差累积；3) 引入潜在空间目标函数，强调结构动态并支持分布偏移下的推理时校正。
AI.result: 在多个真实世界基准上，NeoST一致优于现有STFM，并在长期预测稳定性和推理效率方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于合成数据预训练的潜在空间推理范式能有效克服真实世界数据偏差和结构瓶颈，为时空基础模型提供新方向。

title: Nonuniformity Principle in Human-AI Coworking
summary: As generative AI is increasingly applied to automate multi-step and high-stake workflows, human judgment and involvement remain essential for ensuring the quality of AI-generated outputs. In practice, while it is desirable for human experts to provide oversight on AI regularly, often by reviewing intermediate outputs, giving feedback, making corrections, and steering subsequent steps, such oversight is constrained by the time and resources that humans can afford. This creates a tension between the need for human oversight and AI's efficiency in delivering more output with less intervention. An important but underexplored question, then, is how to optimally engage humans in human-AI coworking. This work was originally motivated by our empirical observation that in long AI workflows, human oversight often improves user satisfaction while reducing unnecessary rework and token consumption. From there, we formulate the problem of where to place oversight stages in human-AI coworking. Under reasonable assumptions, we then develop the nonuniformity principle, which states that the optimal schedule places oversight stages with non-decreasing gaps along the workflow. We empirically validate this principle in two common AI agent workflows: writing literature reviews and constructing websites.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了人机协作中如何最优地安排人工监督节点。基于经验观察发现，在长AI工作流程中，人工监督虽能提升满意度并减少返工，但受限于人类资源。作者提出非均匀性原则：最优监督安排应随工作流程进展保持非递减的间隔，并在文献综述撰写和网站构建两个AI智能体工作流中验证了该原则。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI越来越多地应用于多步骤、高风险的工作流程，人类监督对于确保AI输出质量至关重要，但人类的监督时间和资源有限。如何在人类监督需求与AI效率之间取得平衡，即最优地安排人类监督节点，是一个重要但未被充分探索的问题。
AI.method: 首先通过经验观察发现长AI工作流中人工监督能提升满意度并减少返工与token消耗。然后形式化定义监督节点放置问题，在合理假设下推导出非均匀性原则（最优安排应使监督间隔非递减）。最后在文献综述撰写和网站构建两个AI智能体工作流中进行实证验证。
AI.result: 提出并验证了非均匀性原则，即在人机协作工作流中，最优的监督节点安排应使间隔随流程进展呈非递减趋势。该原则在两个实际的AI智能体工作流中得到了实证支持。
AI.conclusion: 非均匀性原则为在资源受限条件下最优安排人类监督节点提供了理论指导，有助于在保持AI效率的同时有效利用人类监督资源，提升人机协作的整体质量。

title: SaaF: Scene-Specific Ambiguity-Aware 3D Language Fields towards Interactive Real-World Object Retrieval
comment: 8 pages, accepted as a conference paper for IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS2026)
summary: We propose Scene-specific Ambiguity-aware 3D Language Fields (SaaF), a novel Gaussian Splatting-based 3D language field designed for interactive object retrieval in a given real-world scene. Interactive object retrieval using natural language is a crucial capability for service robots operating in complex real-world environments. While recent 3D language field methods for object retrieval establish associations between rendered pixels and autoencoder-compressed CLIP features, they suffer from two limitations: (1) reduced discriminability among similar objects due to feature compression, and (2) poor handling of ambiguous queries, often resulting in unstable or incorrect retrieval. To address these limitations, SaaF introduces a metric learning strategy to construct a unified feature space that is both instance-discriminative and ambiguity-aware. (i) To enhance instance-level visual discrimination, SaaF employs metric learning that pulls image features from multiple viewpoints of the same object closer together in the feature space. (ii) To establish ambiguity awareness, the model jointly trains on multiple text labels generated by the proposed method from each tracked object image sequence, including ambiguous descriptions, to learn the semantic relationships between ambiguous and specific features in a target scene. This feature space enables fine-grained visual understanding while allowing the system to estimate query ambiguity and interactively request clarification when needed. Experimental results demonstrate that SaaF not only improves retrieval accuracy over previous methods but also robustly detects and handles ambiguity in the user text queries under open-vocabulary settings.

AI.tldr: SaaF是一种基于3D高斯泼溅的语义场方法，通过度量学习构建实例判别且模糊感知的统一特征空间，用于交互式开放词汇对象检索，在提升准确率的同时能够检测并处理用户自然语言查询中的歧义。
AI.motivation: 现有3D语言场方法在对象检索中存在两个局限：(1) 特征压缩导致相似对象判别性下降；(2) 对歧义查询处理不佳，检索结果不稳定或错误。SaaF旨在解决这两个问题。
AI.method: (1) 基于3D高斯泼溅构建3D语言场；(2) 引入度量学习策略，将同一对象多视角图像特征拉近，增强实例级视觉判别性；(3) 联合训练多个文本标签（包含歧义描述），学习歧义与特定特征之间的语义关联；(4) 实现查询歧义估计并支持交互式澄清请求。
AI.result: SaaF在开放词汇设置下不仅提高了检索准确性，还能稳健地检测并处理用户文本查询中的歧义。
AI.conclusion: SaaF通过度量学习和多标签训练构建了兼具判别性和歧义感知能力的统一特征空间，为服务机器人在复杂场景中的交互式对象检索提供了更可靠的解决方案。

title: VIDAR: Visual-Inertial Dense Alignment and Reconstruction via a Geometric Foundation Model
summary: Monocular foundation models provide dense geometry but usually lack a stable metric scale. This paper presents VIDAR, a visual-inertial dense reconstruction framework that couples SVO+IMU odometry with Depth Anything 3. VIDAR uses the visual-inertial front end as a metric anchor: it provides camera poses, scale, and a consistent world frame for aligning dense foundation-model predictions across time. The foundation model then contributes detailed local geometry that is fused into a global reconstruction. We study both pose-conditioned DA3 and a decoupled alignment strategy. On EuRoC, pose injection reduces scale error to about 1\% and reaches 0.463 mean F@0.10; the decoupled hybrid improves this to 0.676 without ground-truth poses. Results on EuRoC and TUM RGB-D show that VIDAR is a practical route to metric dense monocular reconstruction.

AI.tldr: VIDAR是一个耦合SVO+IMU里程计与Depth Anything 3的视觉-惯性密集重建框架，利用视觉惯性前端提供度量锚点（相机位姿、尺度、一致世界坐标系），将基础模型预测的局部几何融合到全局重建中。在EuRoC上，位姿注入将尺度误差降至约1%，F@0.10达到0.463；解耦混合策略无需真值位姿即可将F@0.10提升至0.676。
AI.motivation: 单目基础模型能提供密集几何，但通常缺乏稳定的度量尺度，需要一种方法将基础模型的密集预测与度量级信息结合以实现可靠的密集重建。
AI.method: 提出VIDAR框架，将SVO+IMU视觉惯性里程计作为前端提供度量锚点（相机位姿、尺度、一致世界坐标系），与Depth Anything 3（DA3）基础模型耦合。研究了两种对齐策略：（1）位姿条件化DA3（pose-conditioned）；（2）解耦混合对齐（decoupled hybrid alignment）。
AI.result: 在EuRoC数据集上，位姿注入将尺度误差降至约1%，F@0.10达到0.463；解耦混合策略无需真值位姿即可将F@0.10提升至0.676。在EuRoC和TUM RGB-D上验证了VIDAR的有效性。
AI.conclusion: VIDAR提供了一条可行的通往度量级单目密集重建的实用路径。

title: SOS-LoRA: Static Orthogonal-Subspace Low-Rank Adaptation with Fixed Multi-Scale Scaling
summary: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) is a widely used parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) method for large language models. Under a fixed rank budget, LoRA parameterizes each adapted weight through a single low-dimensional input-side pathway, which may couple heterogeneous behaviors through shared input directions and induce interference during optimization. We propose Static Orthogonal Subspace LoRA (SOS-LoRA), a drop-in extension that reparameterizes a rank-rtot update as a sum of K static (always-on, non-routed) low-rank experts. SOS-LoRA (i) decomposes the total rank across experts, (ii) applies a fixed multi-scale scaling scheme to encourage scale-separated optimization dynamics, and (iii) promotes diverse input-side directions via cross-expert orthogonal initialization and a lightweight regularizer. SOS-LoRA remains fully mergeable, adding no inference-time parameters or latency after merging. Experiments on reasoning and knowledge-intensive benchmarks (Llama 2/3), encoder-based NLU (GLUE), and math reasoning (GSM8K/MATH) show consistent gains over matched-budget LoRA baselines and recent variants. Code is available at https://github.com/llm172/sos-lora.

AI.tldr: SOS-LoRA是一种改进的LoRA方法，将单个低秩更新分解为多个静态低秩专家的和，通过正交初始化和多尺度缩放策略减少优化干扰，在多个基准上超越原始LoRA。
AI.motivation: 标准LoRA在固定秩预算下使用单一低维输入通路，导致共享输入方向可能耦合异构行为并引发优化干扰，限制了模型微调的性能。
AI.method: SOS-LoRA将总秩rtot的更新分解为K个静态（非路由）低秩专家的和，采用固定多尺度缩放方案促进尺度分离的优化动态，并通过跨专家正交初始化及轻量正则化促进多样化的输入方向。该方法完全可合并，不引入额外推理参数或延迟。
AI.result: 在Llama 2/3的推理和知识密集型基准、编码器NLU基准（GLUE）以及数学推理基准（GSM8K/MATH）上，SOS-LoRA一致优于匹配预算的LoRA基线和近期变体。
AI.conclusion: 通过静态正交子空间分解，SOS-LoRA在保持LoRA可合并性和零推理开销的同时，有效缓解了优化干扰问题，是一种简单有效的即插即用改进方案。

title: From Modalities to Propositions: A Language-Centric Framework for Multimodal Intelligence
summary: We propose a language representation for multimodal data in which any observation, whether image, video, or text, is expressed as a bag of atomic propositions, simple statements about the entities, actions, and relations in a scene. A global semantic codebook unifies these into a shared vocabulary of canonical atomic propositions, placing every modality and observation into one interpretable space that spans fine grained facts to high level concepts and composes into richer ones. This brings interpretability with reasoning, cross-modal understanding and retrieval, and compositionality that enables complex multimodal understanding, rich data curation and complex structured retrieval. We demonstrate the framework on autonomous driving and open-world data.

AI.tldr: 提出一种多模态语言表示方法，将图像、视频、文本等观测数据表示为原子命题袋，通过全局语义码本统一到共享的可解释语义空间，支持推理、跨模态理解与组合式多模态理解，在自动驾驶和开放世界数据上验证。
AI.motivation: 现有多模态表示缺乏统一的、可解释的语义空间，难以实现跨模态理解、组合式推理与复杂结构化检索。
AI.method: 将多模态数据表示为原子命题袋（bag of atomic propositions），通过全局语义码本（global semantic codebook）将不同模态映射到共享的规范原子命题词汇空间，支持从细粒度事实到高层概念的组合。
AI.result: 在自动驾驶和开放世界数据上验证了该框架的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该语言表示方法具备可解释性、推理能力、跨模态理解与检索能力以及组合性，能够支持复杂多模态理解、数据整理与结构化检索任务。

title: Seeing What Is Actually There: PriVE-Bench and PriVE-Tools for Counterfactual Evaluation of Agentic Visual Evidence in VLMs
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) often answer visual questions using learned language and category priors rather than grounding their predictions in the image itself. Counterfactual images provide a natural diagnostic setting for this failure mode: when visible evidence contradicts what is usually true, a grounded model should answer from the pixels, while a prior-following model will produce a canonical but visually incorrect response. However, existing counterfactual benchmarks mainly ask whether such prior-following behavior exists. In this paper, we ask a further question motivated by the rise of tool-augmented and agentic vision systems: can additional visual evidence views help VLMs reason against their priors? We introduce PriVE-Bench, a Prior-vs-Visual Evidence Benchmark that uses paired original and counterfactual images to distinguish visually grounded answers from prior-consistent errors. We further introduce PriVE-Tools, a controlled agentic-vision-inspired extension that evaluates whether tool-derived visual evidence -- including bounding boxes, crops, zoom panels, and contours -- improves grounding under the same counterfactual conflicts. Across open- and closed-source VLMs, we compare raw, paired-image, and tool-conditioned inputs using accuracy, prior-following error rate, and other-response rate. Our results show that visual evidence tools can help in some settings, especially when models can use localized evidence effectively, but they are not a universal remedy: several models continue to follow language and category priors even when relevant visual evidence is explicitly provided.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PriVE-Bench基准和PriVE-Tools工具集，用于评估视觉语言模型在反事实图像冲突下是否依赖先验知识而非图像证据，并检验工具增强的视觉证据（如边界框、裁剪图、缩放面板、轮廓图）能否帮助模型进行基于视觉的推理。实验表明，视觉证据工具在某些场景下有帮助，但并非万能，许多模型在明确提供相关视觉证据时仍会遵循语言和类别先验。
AI.motivation: 现有反事实基准主要检测视觉语言模型是否存在依赖先验知识而非图像证据的问题，但未进一步探究在工具增强和智能体视觉系统兴起的背景下，额外视觉证据（如通过工具获取的视图）能否帮助模型克服先验偏见进行正确推理。
AI.method: 构建PriVE-Bench基准（配对原图和反事实图像）区分视觉接地回答与先验一致错误；提出PriVE-Tools扩展，引入工具衍生的视觉证据（边界框、裁剪图、缩放面板、轮廓图）；在多种开源和闭源VLM上比较原始输入、配对图像输入和工具条件输入的效果，使用准确率、先验跟随错误率和其他响应率等指标评估。
AI.result: 视觉证据工具在某些场景下有助于模型提升接地能力，尤其是当模型能有效利用局部化证据时；但工具并非通用解决方案，多个模型即使在明确提供相关视觉证据时仍会遵循语言和类别先验。
AI.conclusion: 现有VLM在反事实冲突下仍存在严重的先验依赖问题，工具增强的视觉证据只能部分缓解，模型从根本上仍缺乏可靠的视觉接地能力。

title: Retriever: Composing Closed-Loop Asynchronous Robot Programs
comment: Project website: http://retriever.systems; Package open-source website: http://openretriever.org
summary: Building long-horizon robot agents requires composing closed-loop pipelines -- perception, belief update, planning, and control -- whose components run at different clocks and with variable latency. Today, these systems are often assembled with ad-hoc concurrency and pub/sub conventions that make timing and input-consumption semantics implicit, yielding schedule-dependent behavior that is hard to reproduce, debug, and reuse. Current solutions typically solve parts of this problem at either the algorithmic or the systems layer, but not both. In this work, we propose Retriever, which spans the entire stack: an asynchronous decision model, a programming model, a runtime, and an example closed-loop agent pipeline. Retriever represents an agent as a graph of stateful causal stream functions executed on explicit run clocks. We formalize this view via an asynchronous environment-agent loop over continuous-time streams and show that finite-memory causal policies can be represented by compositions of these operators. Retriever compiles these graphs into a runtime that supports multiple backends, enabling systematic debugging across running environments and deterministic replay from logged asynchronous data. We evaluate Retriever through a real-robot case study together with controlled studies of runtime overhead and deterministic replay behavior.

AI.tldr: Retriever提出了一种覆盖全栈的异步机器人决策系统框架，通过因果流函数图、显式运行时钟和确定性重放机制，解决了长时域机器人任务中闭环管线的时序不确定性和调度依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 当前长时域机器人系统采用临时的并发和发布/订阅约定，导致时间语义和输入消费语义隐式，产生难以复现、调试和复用的调度依赖行为，且现有方法无法同时覆盖算法层和系统层的问题。
AI.method: 将机器人智能体表示为在显式运行时钟上执行的有状态因果流函数图，形式化为连续时间流上的异步环境-智能体循环，证明了有限记忆因果策略可由这些算子组合表示，并编译为支持多后端运行时的系统。
AI.result: 通过真实机器人案例研究、运行时开销可控实验和确定性重放行为实验进行验证。
AI.conclusion: Retriever通过统一全栈的异步决策模型和运行时系统，能够系统性解决机器人闭环管线中的时序不确定性问题，并在真实场景中有效运行。

title: Comprehensive Evaluation of Machine Learning for Type 2 Diabetes Risk Prediction: Large-Scale External Validation and Fairness Analysis
comment: Accepted and published at the IEEE EDS Technically Sponsored International Conference on Intelligent Processing, Hardware, Electronics, and Radio Systems (CIPHER-2026), 13-15 Feb 2026, NIT Jalandhar, India (IEEE Conference Record #70417, Paper ID: 155). 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables
summary: Machine learning-based Type 2 diabetes risk prediction models obtain good internal validation results but lose effectiveness in real-world applications due to deficient external testing and fairness assessment. We developed a multi-dimensional framework evaluating discrimination, calibration, interpretability, and algorithmic fairness on nationally representative populations. An XGBoost model was trained on NHANES 2015-2020 (n=15,685) using eight non-laboratory predictors: age, sex, race/ethnicity, BMI, smoking status, physical activity, history of heart attack, and history of stroke. External validation was performed on BRFSS 2020-2022 (n=1,285,783) under realistic distribution shift. Internal validation showed good discrimination (AUC=0.794, 95% CI 0.788-0.800), with performance loss on external validation (AUC=0.717, relative decrease: -9.7%, p<0.001). Fairness analysis revealed severe bias: elderly adults (>=60) showed AUC=0.607 vs 0.742 for young adults (difference=0.135, p<0.001); obese individuals showed AUC=0.698 vs 0.735 for normal weight (difference=0.037, p<0.001). Gender showed comparable performance (male=0.723 vs female=0.712, p=0.142). Calibration revealed risk overestimation (Brier score=0.123). SHAP analysis identified age, BMI, and physical activity as primary risk drivers. Populations with highest diabetes risk receive the worst algorithmic performance, underscoring the need for fairness-aware, age-stratified deployment strategies before clinical use.

AI.tldr: 基于NHANES数据训练的XGBoost糖尿病风险预测模型在内部验证中表现良好（AUC=0.794），但在外部验证中性能显著下降（AUC=0.717，相对下降9.7%），且存在严重的年龄和肥胖相关的算法公平性偏差，高危人群反而获得最差的预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于机器学习的2型糖尿病风险预测模型在内部验证中表现良好，但在实际应用中由于缺乏外部测试和公平性评估而失效，因此需要建立一个包含区分度、校准度、可解释性和算法公平性的多维评估框架。
AI.method: 使用NHANES 2015-2020数据（n=15,685）训练XGBoost模型，采用8个非实验室预测变量（年龄、性别、种族/民族、BMI、吸烟状况、体力活动、心脏病史、中风史）；在BRFSS 2020-2022数据（n=1,285,783）上进行外部验证；通过区分度、校准度、SHAP可解释性和算法公平性进行多维评估。
AI.result: 内部验证AUC=0.794（95% CI 0.788-0.800），外部验证AUC=0.717（相对下降9.7%，p<0.001）。公平性分析显示：老年人（≥60岁）AUC=0.607 vs 年轻人0.742（差异0.135，p<0.001）；肥胖者AUC=0.698 vs 正常体重0.735（差异0.037，p<0.001）；性别间表现相当。校准显示风险高估（Brier分数=0.123）。SHAP分析显示年龄、BMI和体力活动是主要风险驱动因素。
AI.conclusion: 糖尿病风险最高的群体获得最差的算法性能，强调在临床使用前需要采用公平性感知、年龄分层的部署策略。

title: Exact Network Surgery: Functional Invariance and Gradient Plasticity in Reactive Computational Graphs
comment: Companion paper: "Cost Accounting for Reactive Computational Graphs" (submitted concurrently)
summary: Function-preserving network growth techniques such as Net2Net and progressive stacking expand a model's capacity without destroying its learned function, but existing formulations either tolerate numerical perturbations or require a full rebuild of the training program. We formalize Exact Network Surgery: the in-place insertion of a residual block into a live computational graph such that (i) the network function is preserved -- bit-exactly under explicit floating-point hypotheses -- and (ii) inserted parameters remain trainable immediately after insertion. We prove an identity-morphism theorem for gated residual blocks, a structural-locality theorem showing that a reactive invalidation engine recomputes exactly the downstream cone of the insertion point, leaving every other node's value and optimizer state untouched, and an escape-from-initialization proposition showing that the Gradient Shadowing gate alpha, initialized at zero over a randomly initialized branch, receives a generically non-zero gradient at insertion time. We identify a degenerate configuration -- zero-initialized output projections combined with a zero gate -- that is an exact saddle point gradient descent cannot escape. Every claim is validated on the reference implementation in NeuroDSL, a reactive graph engine in Julia: grafting is bit-exact on every logit tested (0 mismatches out of 1600); the gate escapes zero at the first optimizer step and unlocks branch gradients at the second, exactly as predicted; the degenerate configuration exhibits gradients identically zero for the entire 600-step run; surgery cost tracks downstream cone size with r = 0.9992 while graft-plus-invalidation bookkeeping is constant (about 0.75 ms) across insertion depths; and training resumes bit-identically across a real process restart. A flagged preliminary appendix reports first single-seed observations on post-insertion gate dynamics.
