AI.tldr: RegionFM提出了一种将解剖分割与基础模型嵌入相结合的框架，使得脑MRI分析中的每个解剖区域都能贡献一个显式的标量项到最终预测，从而在保持竞争性能的同时提供符合解剖学临床推理的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型在脑MRI分析中表现优异，但其预测难以在解剖学意义上解释。传统解释方法通常生成体素或补丁级的重要性图，无法显式量化单个脑区的贡献，这与临床评估中以解剖结构和区域异常为核心的组织方式不匹配。
AI.method: 先将每个MRI扫描分割为解剖区域，为每个区域构建独立的MRI体块；再用冻结的基础模型将每个区域编码为嵌入向量；最后通过区域加性逻辑回归模型组合这些嵌入，使每个解剖区域对最终预测贡献一个显式的标量项。
AI.result: 在认知障碍分类任务上，RegionFM使用多个预训练脑MRI基础模型的嵌入，性能与可解释性较差的微调方法相当，同时提供了基于解剖的解释。随机化嵌入消融实验产生接近随机的性能，表明预测依赖于基础模型嵌入捕捉的有意义结构。
AI.conclusion: RegionFM在保持竞争性预测性能的同时，使模型解释更好地与基于解剖的临床推理对齐。

title: Predictive Training with Latent Imagination for Visual Quadruped Navigation
summary: Reinforcement-learning navigation policies for legged robots select actions reactively from current observations and short-term memory, with limited capacity to anticipate how moving obstacles will evolve in the near future. In dynamic environments, this reactivity causes the robot to respond too late because collision risk depends on short-horizon scene structure rather than on current obstacle positions alone. Lightweight predictive supervision applied to the policy's recurrent state during training can encode anticipatory obstacle dynamics without modifying the inference-time controller. We augment a reactive LSTM-SRU navigation backbone with an auxiliary JEPA-style predictor and SIGReg regularization: during training, the predictor supervises the deterministic hidden state to anticipate its own next state; at inference, it is fully discarded, incurring zero additional computational cost. On simulated and real-world navigation benchmarks with dynamic obstacles, our method substantially improves navigation success while reducing collision rates through the predictive training signal alone, without additional inference-time parameters. Real-robot deployment on a Unitree Go2 demonstrates zero-shot sim-to-real transfer: the controller navigates cluttered indoor and dynamic outdoor environments without fine-tuning, with evasive behavior consistent with the collision reduction observed in simulation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级预测性监督方法，通过在训练时用JEPA风格的预测器和SIGReg正则化来增强LSTM-SRU导航策略的循环状态，使其能在推理时零额外成本地预测移动障碍物的短期演化，显著提升动态环境中四足机器人的导航成功率和避障能力，并在Unitree Go2上实现了零样本的仿真到现实迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于强化学习的四足机器人导航策略过于依赖当前观测和短时记忆，对移动障碍物的未来演化缺乏预测能力，导致在动态环境中反应滞后，碰撞风险高。
AI.method: 在LSTM-SRU导航骨干网络基础上引入辅助的JEPA风格预测器和SIGReg正则化：训练时，预测器监督确定性隐状态去预测自身的下一时刻状态，从而编码障碍物的动态信息；推理时完全丢弃预测器，不增加任何额外计算开销。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实世界的动态障碍物导航基准测试中，仅通过预测性训练信号就显著提高了导航成功率并降低了碰撞率。在Unitree Go2上的真实机器人部署实现了零样本的仿真到现实迁移，无需微调即可在室内外动态环境中导航。
AI.conclusion: 通过训练阶段的轻量级预测性监督，可以有效地使循环神经网络隐状态隐式编码短期障碍物动态，在不增加推理成本的前提下显著提升四足机器人在动态环境中的避障能力，并且具有良好的仿真到现实迁移性。

title: Preference-based Antibody Expression Ranking: Scaling with Large-scale Weak Supervision
summary: Antibody expression ranking is a critical task in antibody design, yet its modelling is severely hindered by the scarcity of labeled experimental data. To address this, we propose a unified preference-based learning framework that integrates scarce quantitative expression data with large-scale weak positive supervision from immunization data. We adapt Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) to protein language models by introducing a union-masked log-likelihood approximation and IMGT-based alignment, enabling efficient training on variable-length sequences. Evaluating on a diverse internal dataset of 1254 labeled sequences and 4 million unlabeled camelid-derived antibodies, we show that our method consistently outperforms baselines on most metrics. Our results demonstrate that preference learning can effectively learn from weak supervision, providing a scalable solution for antibody expressibility optimization in data-constrained settings. Project page: https://kisoji-biotechnology-inc.github.io/Preference-Expression-Ranking/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于偏好学习的统一框架，通过整合稀缺的定量表达数据和大规模弱阳性监督数据（免疫组数据），将DPO算法适配到蛋白质语言模型上，解决了抗体表达排名任务中实验数据稀缺的问题。在1254条标记序列和400万条未标记骆驼抗体数据集上，该方法在多数指标上优于基线。
AI.motivation: 抗体表达排名建模严重受限于标记实验数据的稀缺性，现有方法难以有效利用大规模未标记数据，亟需一种能够从弱监督中学习偏好信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出统一偏好学习框架，将DPO适配到蛋白质语言模型：引入联合掩码对数似然近似（union-masked log-likelihood approximation）和基于IMGT的序列对齐，使得模型能够高效训练于可变长度序列上，同时整合少量定量表达数据与大规模免疫组弱阳性数据。
AI.result: 在1254条标记序列和400万条未标记骆驼抗体的内部数据集上，该方法在多数评估指标上持续优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 偏好学习能够有效从弱监督中学习，为数据受限场景下的抗体可表达性优化提供了一种可扩展的解决方案。

title: Supporting Autonomous Process Execution within a Multi-Perspective Constraint Frame via Numeric Planning
summary: AI-Augmented Business Process Management Systems (ABPMS) enhance traditional BPMS by leveraging advanced AI techniques to define, execute, and monitor complex process structures. Within this landscape, Framed Autonomy denotes the capability of a system to autonomously advance the execution of a Business Process (BP) instance while strictly adhering to a predefined frame, i.e., a set of constraints that may span multiple perspectives. Existing research on framed autonomy has predominantly focused on control-flow constraints, either declarative or procedural, and typically relies on their transformation into automata-based representations. In this study, we extend this line of work by introducing a novel tool for what-if analysis that augments the process frame with multi-perspective constraints, including data-aware and temporal conditions. Given a partial process execution, the proposed approach exploits this enriched frame to recommend optimal continuations in compliance with the underlying process specifications. We additionally report an empirical evaluation demonstrating the scalability and effectiveness of the technique, thereby highlighting its potential for supporting autonomous and constraint-aware decision making in ABPMS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种增强型框架自治工具，支持多视角约束（含数据与时态条件）的业务流程最优延续推荐，并通过实证验证其可扩展性与有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有框架自治研究主要聚焦于控制流约束（声明式或过程式）且依赖自动机表示，缺乏对数据感知和时间条件等多视角约束的支持，限制了ABPMS中自主决策的全面性。
AI.method: 在部分流程执行的基础上，利用包含数据感知和时态条件的多视角约束丰富流程框架，通过假设分析（what-if analysis）方法推荐符合底层流程规范的最优延续方案。
AI.result: 实证评估表明该技术具有良好的可扩展性和有效性，能够支撑ABPMS中自主且约束感知的决策。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法扩展了框架自治在业务流程管理中的应用边界，为复杂多约束场景下的智能决策提供了可行方案。

title: CRISP: Pre-LLM Yet Text-Driven Visual Token Pruning for Efficient LVLM Inference
comment: Accepted by the 2026 IEEE International Conference on Multimedia and Expo (ICME 2026) as Oral
summary: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) typically require processing hundreds to thousands of visual tokens, leading to substantial inference overhead. Existing visual token pruning methods either operate before the LLM using text-agnostic heuristics or prune inside the LLM at the cost of efficiency and noisy cross-modal attention. To address these limitations, we propose CRISP, a pre-LLM yet text-driven visual token pruning framework that preserves both instruction-relevant evidence and essential scene context. CRISP works in a two-stage pipeline: Stage 1 first identifies text-aligned visual tokens, and Stage 2 enhances contextual completeness through semantic diversity. Extensive experiments on LLaVA-1.5 and LLaVA-NeXT demonstrate that CRISP achieves superior performance retention under aggressive pruning ratios, maintaining up to 99.5% accuracy while reducing inference cost and latency by more than 2 times. CRISP serves as a practical solution for efficient LVLM inference, especially in resource-constrained scenarios.

AI.tldr: CRISP是一种在LLM之前、文本驱动的视觉token剪枝框架，通过两阶段流水线（文本对齐识别+语义多样性增强）实现高效LVLM推理，在保持99.5%准确率的同时将推理成本和延迟降低2倍以上。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉token剪枝方法要么在LLM之前使用文本无关启发式方法，效果有限；要么在LLM内部剪枝，但代价是效率低下和跨模态注意力噪声大。CRISP旨在解决这些限制，实现既保留指令相关证据又保持必要场景上下文的预LLM文本驱动剪枝。
AI.method: CRISP采用两阶段流水线：Stage 1识别文本对齐的视觉token，Stage 2通过语义多样性增强上下文完整性。整个框架在进入LLM之前完成剪枝操作。
AI.result: 在LLaVA-1.5和LLaVA-NeXT上的大量实验表明，CRISP在高剪枝比例下仍能保持优异的性能保留，维持高达99.5%的准确率，同时将推理成本和延迟降低2倍以上。
AI.conclusion: CRISP是一种实用的高效LVLM推理解决方案，特别适用于资源受限场景。

title: Stability and Comfort in Mobile Robot-Pedestrian Interactions
comment: 21 pages, 9 figures, 12 tables, submitted for publication
summary: Mobile robots in public spaces must ensure pedestrians' comfort, and yet empirical studies of walkers' subjective safety are rare. Many classical navigation algorithms do not distinguish the walkers from dynamic obstacles and do not explicitly model subjective human factors. Moreover, most studies focus on holonomic mobile robots, whereas applications demand Nonholonomic Mobile Robots (NMR). This paper develops socially aware algorithms for NMRs, proves the stability, verifies the performance experimentally, and statistically analyzes the reported comfort. We design a framework for NMRs using Social Force Model (SFM) and the projected Time-to-collision Social Force Model (TSFM). We formalize the NMR-pedestrians' and NMR-obstacles' interactions and prove the system's stability, assuming boundedly nonpassive pedestrians. Simulations calibrate the models by maximizing a hybrid cost function of comfort and speed. Pedestrian-robot interaction experiments compare SFM and TSFM to two remote-controlled baselines and collect walkers' reported comfort. Statistical tools analyze survey results collected during the experiments. Benchmarking the algorithms against previous studies highlights the proposed methods' advantage with respect to the studied metrics. Overall, the models are stable and improve pedestrian comfort when an NMR navigates through a pedestrian crowd.

AI.tldr: 本文针对非完整移动机器人在人群中导航时行人主观舒适度问题，提出了基于社会力模型和投影碰撞时间社会力模型的社会感知算法，证明了系统稳定性，并通过实验和统计分析验证了该方法能有效提升行人舒适度。
AI.motivation: 现有导航算法多将行人视为动态障碍物，未显式建模行人主观安全感和舒适度；且多数研究针对完整移动机器人，而实际应用需要非完整移动机器人。因此，需要开发兼顾行人舒适度的非完整移动机器人社会感知导航算法。
AI.method: 设计基于社会力模型(SFM)和投影碰撞时间社会力模型(TSFM)的框架，形式化描述NMR-行人及NMR-障碍物的交互，在假设行人被动性有界的条件下证明系统稳定性。通过最大化舒适度与速度的混合代价函数进行仿真标定，并通过行人-机器人交互实验收集行人报告舒适度，使用统计工具分析结果。
AI.result: 仿真和实验表明，所提出的SFM和TSFM模型是稳定的，相较于遥控基线方法，能显著提升非完整移动机器人在人群中导航时行人的主观舒适度，且在相关指标上优于已有研究。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的社会感知导航算法能够保证系统稳定性，有效改善非完整移动机器人穿越人群时行人的舒适体验，为移动机器人在公共空间的安全、舒适部署提供了理论支撑和实验依据。

title: PsiLogic: Chaos-Aware Active Cancellation for Adam with a Fair Cross-Domain Benchmark
summary:
Adaptive optimizers such as Adam and AdamW apply the same update rule regardless of whether training is in a chaotic early phase or near convergence. We introduce PsiLogic, an optimizer that augments Adam with a dynamic Active Cancellation Term gated by a dual exponential moving average (EMA) of scale-normalized gradient norms. The resulting chaos detector strengthens damping when gradient statistics are unstable and fades to zero as training stabilizes, providing an implicit warmup without a hand-tuned schedule.
  We evaluate PsiLogic against Adam, AdamW, and Lion using FairBench -- a reproducible benchmark protocol with per-optimizer learning-rate sweeps, identical initialization per seed, and Welch t-tests. On an NVIDIA H100 80GB reference run (4 arenas, 3 seeds, 2000 steps, bf16 AMP), PsiLogic achieves the best validation metric in three of four arenas: NLP perplexity 7.79 +/- 0.18 vs. 8.17 +/- 0.08 (AdamW, p = 0.049), ViT top-1 accuracy 0.244 +/- 0.006 vs. 0.223 +/- 0.002 (AdamW, p = 0.015), and ResNet top-1 accuracy 0.222 +/- 0.001 vs. 0.172 +/- 0.004 (Adam, p = 0.001). On diffusion, validation MSE is statistically tied with Adam/AdamW (p = 0.49). ResNet accuracy vs. AdamW is a numerical tie without significance at three seeds (p = 0.44). Peak GPU memory is comparable across optimizers; PsiLogic incurs 1.2--1.8x wall-clock overhead on transformer-heavy arenas (implementation-bound).
  We release an open-source PyTorch implementation, the full FairBench harness, and all raw CSV outputs to support independent verification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出 PsiLogic 优化器，在 Adam 基础上增加基于双指数移动平均（EMA）的主动抵消门控机制，动态检测混沌状态并在训练早期加强阻尼、稳定后归零，无需手动预热调度。在 FairBench 基准测试中，PsiLogic 在 NLP 困惑度、ViT 和 ResNet 准确率上显著优于 Adam/AdamW，扩散任务持平，显存开销相当，计算开销略有增加。
AI.motivation: 现有自适应优化器（如 Adam、AdamW）在训练的混沌早期和收敛阶段使用相同的更新规则，缺乏对训练阶段差异的自适应调整能力，导致需要手动设计预热调度等超参数。
AI.method: 提出 PsiLogic 优化器，在 Adam 中引入一个由尺度归一化梯度范数的双指数移动平均（EMA）门控的动态主动抵消项（Active Cancellation Term）。该"混沌检测器"在梯度统计不稳定时增强阻尼，在训练稳定后逐渐衰减为零，从而实现隐式预热。
AI.result: 在 FairBench 基准（4 个场景、3 个种子、2000 步、bf16 AMP）上：NLP 困惑度 7.79 vs 8.17（AdamW, p=0.049）；ViT 准确率 0.244 vs 0.223（AdamW, p=0.015）；ResNet 准确率 0.222 vs 0.172（Adam, p=0.001）；扩散任务 MSE 无显著差异；峰值显存相当，计算开销 1.2-1.8 倍。
AI.conclusion: PsiLogic 通过动态感知训练阶段的优化策略，在多个任务上显著优于现有优化器，且无需手动预热调度。代码、基准测试框架和原始结果均已开源以供复现验证。

title: RELIC: Revealed Principles for Learning Interpretable Composable Skills in Multi-Agent Planning
summary: Multi-agent planning becomes substantially harder when agents must improve specialized decision-making skills while keeping their internal implementations private. This regime arises when agents are developed independently, expose different interfaces and capabilities, and must nevertheless coordinate without sharing executable policies. Prior research has largely assumed centralized optimization, shared policy access, or common skill representations, making it poorly suited to privacy-constrained cooperation. We introduce RELIC, a framework for learning interpretable and composable skills via revealed principles. Each agent refines its own programmatic skill through private LLM-guided search, while a trusted orchestrator evaluates proposed updates solely through team-level performance. Successful behaviors are not broadcast as code; instead, they are abstracted into portable principles that other agents can instantiate within their own interfaces and recombine with local strategies. This separates coordination from implementation sharing, enabling cross-agent transfer under heterogeneous skill signatures. RELIC thus introduces a new paradigm for privacy-preserving skill learning and coordination in multi-agent planning.

AI.tldr: RELIC是一个隐私保护的多智能体规划框架，通过"揭示原则"机制使异构智能体在不共享内部实现的情况下学习可解释、可组合的技能，由可信协调者仅基于团队绩效评估更新，实现跨智能体技能迁移。
AI.motivation: 现有研究依赖集中优化、共享策略或统一技能表示，无法应对智能体由不同开发者独立开发、接口和能力各异且需保持实现私密的隐私约束合作场景。
AI.method: 每个智能体通过私有LLM引导搜索自主优化程序化技能；可信协调者仅通过团队级绩效评估提议更新；成功行为被抽象为可移植原则，其他智能体可在自身接口内实例化并重组。
AI.result: 实现协调与实现共享的解耦，支持异构技能签名下的跨智能体迁移，为隐私保护的多智能体技能学习与协调建立了新范式。
AI.conclusion: RELIC通过原则抽象而非代码共享实现隐私约束下的多智能体协调，为异构、独立开发的智能体系统提供了可行的技能学习与协同方案。

title: Localization-Infused Vision-Language Semantic Fusion for Text-Guided Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation is essential for modern computer-aided medicine. Recently, text-guided segmentation has shown promise by incorporating clinician-formulated textual reports as semantic guidance for image segmentation. These reports describe target appearance, location, and neighboring anatomy, providing explicit guidance for localization and delineation. Existing text-guided segmentation methods typically extract textual semantics implicitly through a pretrained text encoder and then integrate vision-language semantics via straightforward image-text feature fusion. However, these methods do not explicitly capture target-oriented information embedded in textual reports, particularly target location, and do not explore multi-level information fusion strategies beyond basic feature-level fusion, limiting the extraction and integration of critical textual semantics. In this study, we propose LoG, a localization-infused vision-language fusion framework for text-guided medical image segmentation. By jointly performing multi-scale target localization tasks, LoG explicitly captures target-oriented vision-language semantics and enables three-level localization-infused semantic fusion: (i) localization-guided feature fusion that directly infuses location-relevant semantics into visual features, (ii) localization-gated attention fusion that redirects multi-scale localization predictions to reinforce critical regions, and (iii) localization-constrained loss fusion that supervises segmentation based on spatial consistency with target localization. Extensive experiments on three benchmark datasets, involving three medical imaging modalities with paired textual reports, demonstrate that LoG achieves Dice scores of 91.59%, 80.71%, and 94.59% on QaTa-COV19, MosMedData+, and Kvasir-SEG, respectively, consistently outperforming state-of-the-art medical image segmentation methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LoG，一种融合定位信息的视觉-语言框架，通过多尺度目标定位任务显式捕获目标导向语义，并实现三级定位引导的语义融合（特征融合、注意力融合、损失融合），在三个医疗图像分割基准数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本引导的医疗图像分割方法仅通过隐式文本编码和简单特征融合提取语义，未能显式捕获文本报告中目标导向信息（特别是目标位置），也未探索超越基础特征融合的多级信息融合策略，限制了关键文本语义的提取与整合。
AI.method: 提出LoG框架：联合执行多尺度目标定位任务以显式捕获目标导向的视觉-语言语义，并实现三级定位引导的语义融合——(i) 定位引导的特征融合（将位置相关语义注入视觉特征）、(ii) 定位门控注意力融合（用多尺度定位预测重新引导关键区域）、(iii) 定位约束的损失融合（基于与目标定位的空间一致性监督分割）。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集（QaTa-COV19、MosMedData+、Kvasir-SEG）上Dice得分分别达91.59%、80.71%、94.59%，一致优于现有SOTA方法。
AI.conclusion: 显式引入目标定位信息并设计多级语义融合策略，能有效提升文本引导医疗图像分割的性能。

title: Configuration-Induced Passive Self-Rotation for Perception-Enhanced Autonomous Flight
summary: Autonomous flight in confined and cluttered environments is fundamentally limited by the restricted field of view (FoV) of onboard sensors. Passive self-rotation expands sensing coverage without additional sensors but introduces a tradeoff between swept-FoV refresh rate and flight performance. This letter presents a configuration-induced passively self-rotating tricopter for perception-enhanced autonomous flight. Firstly, the rear-arm configuration parameter is exploited to regulate the passive self-rotation operating point, providing an airframe-level mechanism for balancing swept-FoV refresh rate and flight performance. Secondly, a hierarchical autonomy framework integrating planning and control is developed to enable agile and robust autonomous flight under continuous passive self-rotation. For waypoint-based inspection, guide-point replanning is further used to improve task-level coverage. Extensive real-world experiments, including high-speed trajectory tracking, disturbance-rejection tests, and autonomous navigation in representative cluttered environments, demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach for perception-enhanced autonomous flight.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种配置诱导的被动自旋三旋翼无人机，通过后臂配置参数调节被动自旋工作点，在扫视FoV刷新率与飞行性能之间取得平衡，并开发了分层自主框架实现连续被动自旋下的敏捷鲁棒自主飞行。
AI.motivation: 受限的机载传感器视场是密闭杂乱环境中自主飞行的根本限制因素，被动自旋虽可扩展感知覆盖但引入了扫视FoV刷新率与飞行性能之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 利用后臂配置参数调节被动自旋工作点；设计整合规划与控制的分层自主框架；采用引导点重规划提升任务级覆盖率。
AI.result: 在高速轨迹跟踪、抗干扰测试及代表性杂乱环境自主导航等真实世界实验中验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 所提配置诱导的被动自旋三旋翼方案能有效增强感知能力，实现密闭杂乱环境下的自主飞行。

title: A Predict-then-Correct Loop Based on Few-Shot Continuous Contextual Bandit for Demand Forecasting
summary: Retail demand forecasting remains difficult when demand shifts faster than static forecasting models can be retrained, especially in early demand cycles where newly observed labels are sparse. To address this, this study aims to improve adaptive retail forecasting by proposing a predict-then-correct (PtC) framework that retains a first-stage machine learning (ML) forecast and applies a few-shot continuous contextual bandit correction policy with similar-SKUs augmentation and top-p masked updating. Across Walmart retail data and an exclusive beverage dataset, PtC delivers statistically significant reductions in MAPE, MAE, and RMSE across stable & high volume, stable & low volume, and erratic & intermittent demand patterns, improves average RMSE by 9.52% over the ML-only baseline in the ablation study, and yields lower inventory costs than base-stock, proximal policy optimization, and soft actor-critic policies under the tested lead-time settings. These findings show that online forecast correction can bridge offline demand learning and real-time retail decision-making by adapting to sparse feedback without fully retraining the base forecasting model.

AI.tldr: 本文提出预测-纠正（PtC）框架，结合第一阶段的机器学习预测与少样本连续上下文赌博机纠正策略（含相似SKU增强和top-p掩码更新），在沃尔玛及饮料数据集上显著降低MAPE、MAE、RMSE，平均RMSE较ML基线提升9.52%，并优于基准库存策略，实现离线学习到实时零售决策的在线纠正。
AI.motivation: 零售需求预测在需求快速变化时（尤其早期需求周期标签稀疏）无法及时重训练静态模型，现有方法难以适应稀疏反馈的在线场景。
AI.method: 提出Predict-then-Correct (PtC)框架：第一阶段ML模型生成基准预测，第二阶段采用few-shot连续上下文赌博机（contextual bandit）纠正策略，结合相似SKU数据增强（similar-SKUs augmentation）和top-p掩码更新（top-p masked updating）进行在线纠偏。
AI.result: 在沃尔玛零售数据和独家饮料数据集上，PtC在稳定高/低销量、间歇性等需求模式下均显著降低MAPE、MAE、RMSE；消融研究中平均RMSE较ML基线提升9.52%；在测试提前期设置下，库存成本低于base-stock、PPO和SAC策略。
AI.conclusion: 在线预测纠正能够弥合离线需求学习与实时零售决策之间的鸿沟，在无需完全重训练基模型的前提下，通过稀疏反馈实现自适应，提升了零售需求预测的实时性和准确性。

title: FUSAR-R1: A Large-Scale Reasoning Model for Intelligent Interpretation of SAR Images
summary: In recent years, large-scale vision-language models have been driving a paradigm shift in intelligent remote sensing image interpretation. By incorporating textual semantic information, the cognitive expression, semantic understanding, and human-computer interaction capabilities of interpretation models have been significantly improved, achieving initial progress in the field of Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) image interpretation. However, SAR images are affected by factors such as coherent imaging mechanisms, complex scattering characteristics, speckle noise interference, and target-background coupling, resulting in complex and variable image features with significant uncertainties and specializations. Existing SAR vision-language models do not yet possess the step-by-step analysis, logical judgment, and self-correction capabilities of human experts, making it difficult to support reliable intelligent interpretation in complex scenarios. To address this issue, this paper proposes a large-scale reasoning model, FUSAR-R1, for intelligent interpretation of SAR images. The model first constructs explicit chain-of-thought reasoning data by simulating the interpretation process of human experts and uses this data to guide instruction learning, thereby endowing the model with basic reasoning capabilities. Subsequently, a reinforcement learning strategy is introduced to optimize the model's outputs based on inference results, enabling self-correction and more reliable reasoning. Experimental results demonstrate that FUSAR-R1 consistently outperforms existing multimodal large-scale models across various SAR interpretation tasks, including target detection, target counting and classification, and land-cover category recognition.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUSAR-R1，一个面向SAR图像智能解译的大规模推理模型。通过构建人类专家解译过程的显式链式思维推理数据指导指令学习，赋予模型基础推理能力；再引入强化学习策略基于推理结果优化输出，实现自我纠正与更可靠的推理。实验表明FUSAR-R1在目标检测、目标计数与分类、土地覆盖类别识别等任务上均优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.motivation: 现有SAR视觉语言模型不具备人类专家的逐步分析、逻辑判断和自我纠正能力，难以支持复杂场景下可靠的智能解译。
AI.method: 1) 构建模拟人类专家解译过程的显式链式思维推理数据；2) 利用该数据指导指令学习，赋予模型基础推理能力；3) 引入强化学习策略，基于推理结果优化模型输出，实现自我纠正。
AI.result: FUSAR-R1在目标检测、目标计数与分类、土地覆盖类别识别等多种SAR解译任务中，性能始终优于现有多模态大模型。
AI.conclusion: FUSAR-R1通过链式思维推理与强化学习相结合，有效提升了SAR图像智能解译的推理能力和可靠性。

title: Local Brushstroke Quality Assessment via Vision-Language Feedback
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures. Accepted to the SAUAFG Workshop at CVPR 2026
summary: This paper investigates whether multimodal LLMs can evaluate local brushstroke quality in calligraphy and generate educationally useful natural language feedback. We construct an evaluation framework in which three multimodal LLMs (GPT-4o, Claude Sonnet 4, and Gemini 2.5 Flash) assess before-after image pairs of calligraphic works using a five-point ordinal scale, and compare their outputs against scores assigned by three expert calligraphers. We additionally examine a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) variant of Claude as a preliminary condition. Results show that all models achieve useful levels of absolute score accuracy (MAE), with GPT-4o performing best (MAE = 0.885). However, none of the models produce statistically significant overall rank correlations with human experts (Kendall's tau). Vocabulary analysis of generated rationales reveals characteristic evaluative biases in each model, and RAG is shown to improve rank correlation while worsening absolute accuracy, constituting an important negative result for text-based rule injection.

AI.tldr: 本文研究多模态大模型（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash）评估书法局部笔触质量并生成自然语言反馈的能力。模型使用五点量表评估书法作品修改前后对比，与三位专家评分比较。结果显示模型在绝对分数准确率上表现可用（GPT-4o最优，MAE=0.885），但均未实现与专家显著的整体秩相关。RAG虽提升秩相关但降低绝对准确率，构成文本规则注入的重要负面结果。
AI.motivation: 探究多模态大模型是否具备评估书法笔触局部质量的能力，以及能否生成教育学上有效的自然语言反馈，从而推动AI在艺术教育领域中的应用。
AI.method: 构建评估框架：三个多模态LLM（GPT-4o、Claude Sonnet 4、Gemini 2.5 Flash）对书法作品修改前后的图像对进行五点序数量表评分，与三位专家书法家的评分进行对比；同时考察Claude的检索增强生成（RAG）变体作为前置条件。
AI.result: 所有模型在绝对分数准确率（MAE）上达到可用水平，GPT-4o最佳（MAE=0.885）；但无一模型与人类专家产生统计显著的总体秩相关（Kendall's tau）。RAG改善了秩相关但恶化了绝对准确率。
AI.conclusion: 多模态LLM在书法评分任务中具备一定绝对准确率，但缺乏与人类专家一致的排序能力；文本规则注入（RAG）存在准确率与排序一致性之间的权衡，构成重要负面结果。

title: HCPG-Flow:Hierarchical Contact-Progress Guidance for Flow-Policy Robot Manipulation
summary: Flow policies can represent multimodal action distributions for robot manipulation, yet a robot must execute one action at each control step. When several proposals are sampled, critic-based ranking makes data collection depend on value estimates over candidate actions that may be weakly represented in replay. We introduce HCPG-Flow, an analytic rollout-time selector that augments SAC-Flow with hierarchical, object-centric contact-progress guidance while preserving its actor and critic objectives. HCPG switches from end-effector approach to task progress after contact, scores each proposal by the first-order reduction of a task-relevant distance, standardizes scores within the candidate set, and executes a temperature-controlled action embedding. Across ten simulated tasks, HCPG improves mean success over SAC-Flow on both benchmarks, including a 9.5 percentage-point gain on Maniskill. Four physical tasks further show high success with a 17.4% reduction in successful completion steps.Project page: https://hitxraz.github.io/HCPG-Flow/

AI.tldr: HCPG-Flow提出了一种基于层次化、以物体为中心的接触-进度引导的在线动作选择机制，替代了基于评论家的排序方法，在机器人操作任务中显著提升了成功率和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于流的策略在机器人操作中需要从多个动作候选中选择一个执行，但基于评论家的排序依赖于对候选动作的价值估计，而这些动作在回放缓冲区中可能表征较弱，导致数据收集效率低下。
AI.method: 在SAC-Flow基础上引入HCPG（Hierarchical Contact-Progress Guidance）：(1) 在末端执行器接近阶段和任务进度阶段之间切换；(2) 通过任务相关距离的一阶减少量对每个候选动作评分；(3) 在候选集内标准化分数；(4) 执行温度控制的动作嵌入。
AI.result: 在10个模拟任务中，HCPG在两个基准上均优于SAC-Flow，在Maniskill上提升9.5个百分点；在4个实物任务中实现了高成功率，成功完成步数减少17.4%。
AI.conclusion: HCPG-Flow通过解析式的在线动作选择机制，有效提升了基于流的策略在机器人操作中的性能和效率，验证了层次化接触-进度引导的有效性。

title: Scaling Limits of Constant-Stepsize SGD at Flat Minima
summary:
For stochastic gradient descent (SGD) with a constant stepsize $α$, the invariant law of the iterates, centered at a minimizer, describes the behavior of the algorithm over long time horizons. In the strongly convex case, this invariant law has the familiar $\sqrtα$ scaling and a Gaussian limit as $α\downarrow 0$. We show that this behavior changes fundamentally for convex objectives $H$ with flat minima and (sub)quadratic tails.
  More specifically, we study SGD with Markovian noise generated by a contractive driving chain. For every sufficiently small constant stepsize $α$, we prove existence, uniqueness, and geometric convergence to an augmented invariant law in a Wasserstein distance induced by an $α$-dependent metric. When the minimizer $x_\star$ has local flatness exponent $m\ge2$, meaning that $\nabla^2 H(x)\asymp \lVert x-x_\star\rVert^{m-2} I_d$ as $x\to x_\star$, we obtain a contraction bound with factor $1-cα^{m-1}$, where $c>0$ is a constant. This recovers the factor $1-cα$ in the quadratic case $m=2$. We then analyze the small-stepsize scaling limit. We show that the invariant law concentrates on the scale $α^{1/m}$ and that the rescaled iterates converge weakly to the stationary distribution of the stochastic differential equation $$
  dY_t=-h_0(Y_t)\,dt+Σ^{1/2}\,dB_t , $$ where $h_0$ is the limiting drift at the minimizer and $Σ$ denotes the asymptotic covariance. This recovers the Gaussian limit when $m=2$ and gives generally non-Gaussian stationary limits in the flat case $m>2$. Finally, we give corresponding results for coordinate-separable objectives with unequal flatness exponents.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了凸目标函数具有平坦极小点（局部平坦指数 m≥2）时，SGD的步长缩放律从经典的√α变为α^{1/m}，不变量从高斯变为非高斯，并建立了存在性、唯一性和几何收敛性。
AI.motivation: 经典SGD理论主要针对强凸情形，其不变分布呈高斯极限和√α缩放。但许多现代机器学习问题中目标函数在极小点附近是平坦的（如过参数化模型），需要理解这种平坦极小下的SGD渐近行为。
AI.method: 针对带有Markov噪声（由压缩驱动链生成）的SGD，使用α依赖的度量构造Wasserstein距离，证明增广不变测度的存在性、唯一性和几何收敛性。通过局部泰勒展开刻画平坦极小点（∇²H(x) ∝ ‖x-x₊‖^{m-2}I_d），分析小步长缩放极限，并推广到坐标可分离目标。
AI.result: 1) 强凸情形(m=2)恢复经典结果：收缩因子1-cα，缩放√α，高斯极限；2) 平坦情形(m>2)：收缩因子1-cα^{m-1}，缩放α^{1/m}，非高斯稳态极限（由SDE dY_t=-h_0(Y_t)dt+Σ^{1/2}dB_t的平稳分布给出）；3) 给出了坐标可分离目标各维度不同平坦指数的推广结果。
AI.conclusion: SGD在平坦极小点下的渐近行为与经典强凸情形有本质区别：步长缩放律更慢（α^{1/m}），极限分布非高斯。这为理解过参数化模型和深度学习中的SGD行为提供了理论基础。

title: From Overload to Insights: How AI Agents Can Support Scientists in Analyzing Complex Data
comment: Accepted for publication at the 42nd IEEE International Conference on Software Maintenance and Evolution
summary: Scientists at European XFEL conduct experiments that generate very large and complex datasets. The subsequent data analysis is challenging as scientists must combine their domain expertise with facility- and software-specific knowledge scattered across documentation, tools, and support channels. To address this problem, we designed and evaluated an agentic AI system tailored to the scientists' needs and integrated with the high-performance computing environment of European XFEL. Using a design science research approach, we conducted a rapid literature review, a systematic evaluation of 16 AI tools, multiple interviews, a focus group, and a user study with experts at European XFEL to develop and evaluate two prototypes. Our study identifies key knowledge challenges in scientific data analysis, derives requirements for an AI agent that supports knowledge retrieval and source code generation, and proposes design recommendations for a specialized system adaptable to the evolving AI tool landscape. These findings provide guidance for developing maintainable AI support in highly specialized scientific environments.

AI.tldr: 本文针对欧洲XFEL科学家的海量复杂数据分析难题，采用设计科学研究方法，通过文献综述、16种AI工具评估、访谈、焦点小组和用户研究，设计并评估了一种集成于高性能计算环境的智能AI代理系统，支持知识检索和代码生成，为高度专业化的科学环境中的AI辅助开发提供了设计建议。
AI.motivation: 科学家在进行超大复杂数据集分析时，需要将领域专业知识与分散在文档、工具和支持渠道中的设施/软件知识相结合，导致数据分析挑战巨大，亟需一个能够整合这些分散知识的AI系统。
AI.method: 采用设计科学研究方法，包括：快速文献综述、16种AI工具系统评估、多次访谈、焦点小组讨论，以及针对欧洲XFEL专家的用户研究，在此基础上开发并评估了两个原型系统。
AI.result: 识别了科学数据分析中的关键知识挑战，推导出AI代理支持知识检索和源代码生成的需求，提出了适应不断演变的AI工具环境的专业系统设计建议。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为在高度专业化的科学环境中开发可维护的AI辅助系统提供了指导方针，其设计建议有助于推动AI工具在科学数据分析领域的实际应用。

title: DMFNet: Dual-Backbone Multiscale Fusion Network for Urban Scene Classification
comment: Under review at InGARSS 2026. This work was conducted during the first author's Master's studies at Jadavpur University
summary: This article presents DMFNet, a dual-backbone multiscale feature fusion framework with residual feature propagation and spatial attention for remote sensing scene classification. Existing approaches often face challenges in effectively capturing multiscale feature interactions and learning robust feature representations from complex aerial scenes with high intra-class variability and inter-class similarity. To address these limitations, the proposed framework employs two pretrained backbone networks to extract diverse hierarchical feature representations. A multiscale feature fusion mechanism with residual feature propagation is introduced to enhance feature interaction across multiple resolution levels. In addition, a spatial attention module is introduced to emphasize informative spatial regions in multi-object scenes. Further, a two-stage training strategy consisting of backbone freezing followed by selective fine-tuning is adopted to ensure stable optimization and improved generalization. Experiments conducted on the benchmark AID dataset demonstrate that the DMFNet achieves an average accuracy of 97.46\% $\pm$ 0.14\%. Ablative analysis further show the importance of various components in unison.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DMFNet，一种用于遥感场景分类的双主干多尺度特征融合框架，结合残差特征传播和空间注意力，在AID数据集上达到97.46%的平均准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效捕获多尺度特征交互，且从复杂航空场景中学习鲁棒特征表示面临类内变异大、类间相似性高的挑战。
AI.method: 采用两个预训练主干网络提取分层特征；提出带残差传播的多尺度特征融合机制增强跨分辨率特征交互；引入空间注意力模块强调多目标场景中信息丰富的空间区域；采用两阶段训练策略（先冻结主干后选择性微调）确保稳定优化和泛化。
AI.result: 在AID基准数据集上平均准确率为97.46% ± 0.14%，消融实验验证了各组件的协同重要性。
AI.conclusion: DMFNet通过双主干、多尺度融合、残差传播和空间注意力的组合设计，有效提升了遥感场景分类性能。

title: SLAM in Low-Light Environments: Project Report
comment: Conducted as part of the certification program "Off-Road Visual Navigation: Development and Evaluation of Systems in Challenging Environments'' at the Faculty of Applied Sciences, Ukrainian Catholic University, in collaboration with the UCU UGV Club
summary: Simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) is one of the fundamental problems in robotics, as it enables autonomous operations in real-world scenarios. Under low illumination, reduced contrast, sensor noise, and motion blur degrade both feature extraction and feature matching, while compensating with LiDAR, depth, or thermal sensors raises cost, power draw, and integration complexity. Existing benchmarks remain dominated by well-lit indoor or daylight sequences, leaving open how far SLAM with standard RGB cameras can be pushed in the dark. We benchmark six systems spanning the feature-based, direct, filter-based, and learning-based paradigms - ORB-SLAM3, DSO, Kimera-VIO, OpenVINS, DPVO, and DPV-SLAM - on five LaMARia sequences of varying difficulty and illumination, reporting absolute and relative pose error alongside control-point recall. Kimera-VIO is the only system to track all five sequences to completion, combining the lowest relative pose error with steadily growing absolute error due to the absence of loop closure; DPVO and DPV-SLAM never lose tracking but incur absolute errors of roughly 100 m under low light; and the classical monocular pipelines (ORB-SLAM3, DSO) together with the filter-based OpenVINS fail outright or diverge on most of the harder and low-light sequences. The results suggest that RGB-only SLAM maintains stable low-light tracking only when both inertial fusion and global optimization are present. Closing the remaining gap will likely require low-light-specific learned front-ends or a return to complementary sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文在低光照条件下对六种代表性SLAM系统（ORB-SLAM3、DSO、Kimera-VIO、OpenVINS、DPVO、DPV-SLAM）进行了系统基准测试，使用LaMARia数据集五个难度递增的序列，评估绝对/相对位姿误差和控制点召回率。结果表明：仅Kimera-VIO（融合惯性+全局优化）成功完成所有序列；DPVO/DPV-SLAM虽未丢失追踪但低光下绝对误差约100米；经典单目及滤波方法在多数困难和低光序列中失败或发散。结论是RGB-only SLAM需同时具备惯性融合与全局优化才能维持稳定低光追踪，剩余差距需低光专用学习前端或回归互补传感来弥补。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM基准测试大多在良好照明或日间场景下进行，缺乏对低光照条件下RGB相机SLAM性能极限的系统性评估。该研究旨在填补这一空白，探究标准RGB相机在黑暗环境中的SLAM能力边界。
AI.method: 在LaMARia数据集的五个不同难度和照度序列上，对涵盖特征法(ORB-SLAM3)、直接法(DSO)、滤波法(OpenVINS)和学习法(DPVO, DPV-SLAM)六种SLAM系统进行基准测试，使用绝对位姿误差(APE)、相对位姿误差(RPE)和控制点召回率作为评估指标。
AI.result: Kimera-VIO是唯一完成所有五个序列的系统，具有最低RPE但缺乏闭环导致APE持续增长；DPVO和DPV-SLAM未丢失追踪但低光下APE约100米；ORB-SLAM3、DSO和OpenVINS在大多数困难及低光序列上失败或发散。
AI.conclusion: RGB-only SLAM只有在同时具备惯性融合与全局优化时才能在低光照下保持稳定追踪。要弥合现有性能差距，需要开发低光照专用的学习前端或回归使用互补传感器（如LiDAR、深度、热感传感器）。

title: Retrieval is Enough: Training-Free Interpretability with a Tool-Using Agent
summary: Interpretability methods for neural network activations span a wide cost spectrum, from cheap, training-free techniques (such as linear probes, PCA, SVD) to more expensive training-based ones (such as SAEs and activation oracles). Training-based methods are typically more powerful, in part because they leverage large activation datasets during training. This raises a natural question - do they actually surface insights that go beyond what is recoverable from the training dataset itself? To address this, we equip an LLM agent with a vector database of activations paired with their textual contexts, along with tools for manipulating activations - projecting out directions in latent space, computing activation differences and averages. The agent iteratively queries the database, forms hypotheses from the retrieved samples, and validates them by constructing linear probes. We call this method HARP, for Hypothesis-driven Agentic Retrieval and Probing. Despite not involving any training, HARP outperforms both activation oracles and SAE-based agents on concept discovery, concept detection, model steering, and secret elicitation. The training-free design also makes HARP substantially cheaper and more flexible: new datasets can be indexed on demand whenever existing ones prove insufficient. More broadly, our results suggest that current training-based methods do not yet extract insights beyond their training data, and motivate benchmarks that explicitly require interpretability methods to demonstrate such insights. We release our code at https://github.com/SriramB-98/HARP

AI.tldr: 提出HARP方法，一种基于假设驱动的智能体检索与探针技术，利用激活值向量数据库和文本上下文，无需训练即可进行概念发现、检测、模型引导和秘密提取，性能优于基于训练的方法（如SAEs和激活预言机），且成本更低、灵活性更高。
AI.motivation: 探究训练型可解释性方法是否真正发现了超越其训练数据本身可恢复的洞察，并质疑当前训练型方法的能力边界。
AI.method: HARP：为LLM智能体配备激活值向量数据库（带文本上下文）及操作工具（投影、求差、求平均），智能体迭代查询数据库、形成假设、通过构建线性探针验证。
AI.result: 在概念发现、概念检测、模型引导和秘密提取任务上，无训练的HARP优于激活预言机和基于SAE的智能体方法。
AI.conclusion: 当前训练型可解释性方法并未提取出超越其训练数据的洞察；未来需要设计明确要求方法展示此类洞察的基准测试。

title: AgentBrew: Lifelong Knowledge Brewing from Strong Teachers to Weak LLM Agents
summary: Deploying LLM agents typically requires a compact test-time student, even if a stronger teacher is available during training. We study knowledge brewing: distilling a teacher's interactive experience into a persistent external memory for the student. Crucially, this requires no weight updates, expert demonstrations, ground-truth labels, or test-time teacher access. This setting poses two challenges: environments provide only sparse, binary feedback, and teacher-authored notes must be inherently tailored to be concretely executable by a substantially weaker student. To address these hurdles, we propose AgentBrew, comprising two coupled components. First, a failure-triggered teacher--Ralph Loop mitigates sparse feedback by transforming student failures into environment-validated notes. Second, student-aware synthesis calibrates teacher knowledge to the weak executor's operational granularity, yielding model-specific, actionable guidance. Extensive evaluations and comprehensive ablations across coding, math, and tool-use tasks demonstrate that this asymmetric, training-free brewing paradigm produces highly capable yet deployable LLM agents.

AI.tldr: 提出AgentBrew框架，通过将教师交互经验蒸馏为持久外部记忆，无需权重更新、专家演示或测试时教师访问，即可提升弱学生代理在编程、数学和工具使用任务上的表现。
AI.motivation: 部署LLM代理时通常需要轻量级测试时学生模型，即使训练时有更强的教师可用。现有方法依赖权重更新或测试时教师访问，不适用于资源受限场景。亟需一种无需权重更新、无需专家演示、无需测试时教师访问的知识蒸馏范式。
AI.method: 提出AgentBrew，包含两个耦合组件：1) 失败触发的教师-Ralph Loop，通过将学生失败转化为环境验证的笔记来缓解稀疏反馈问题；2) 学生感知合成，根据弱执行者的操作粒度校准教师知识，生成模型特定的可执行指导。
AI.result: 在编程、数学和工具使用任务上的广泛评估和消融实验表明，这种非对称、无需训练的知识酿造范式能够产生高能力且可部署的LLM代理。
AI.conclusion: AgentBrew通过将教师交互经验蒸馏为持久外部记忆，无需权重更新、专家演示或测试时教师访问，即可显著提升弱学生代理在多种任务上的表现，为LLM代理的高效部署提供了新范式。

title: Privacy-Aware Synthetic Video Benchmarking and Relational Evaluation for Worker-Under-Suspended-Load Detection
comment: Accepted at the 3rd Workshop on Synthetic Data for Computer Vision (SynData4CV), CVPR 2026. OpenReview: https://openreview.net/forum?id=dMfhFmDWsg . Dataset and code: https://huggingface.co/datasets/govtech/SynthSite
summary:
Publicly shareable construction-video benchmarks remain scarce, especially for safety-critical hazards that are rare, dangerous to stage, and difficult to release. We study worker under suspended load, a relational hazard that depends on worker-load geometry and temporal persistence rather than object detection alone. We introduce SynthSite, a focused synthetic video benchmark of 55 clips spanning varied load configurations, viewpoints, clutter, occlusions, and surveillance conditions, together with a privacy-aware hybrid generation workflow that supports both publicly shareable benchmark creation and privacy-constrained synthetic video generation.
  We then ask whether worker appearance can be suppressed without undermining downstream hazard recognition. Under five whole-body privacy conditions, we evaluate worker and load retention, localization stability, and clip-level hazard recognition. We find that structure-preserving obfuscations retain substantially more downstream utility than appearance-smoothing baselines, and that preserving a raw visual reference alone does not guarantee the strongest agreement with human hazard labels. These findings suggest that privacy evaluation for construction safety analytics should assess not only appearance suppression, but also preservation of the geometric cues required for hazard reasoning. Our dataset and code are available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/govtech/SynthSite .

AI.tldr: 本文提出 SynthSite，一个包含55段合成视频的施工场景吊装危险识别基准数据集，并研究了在五种全身隐私保护条件下，不同模糊处理方法对下游危险识别任务的影响，发现结构保留型模糊方法比外观平滑方法能更好地保持几何线索和实用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有施工视频基准数据集稀缺，尤其是针对安全关键的危险场景（如工人位于悬挂负载下方）的数据集难以获取，因为这类场景罕见、危险且难以公开发布。同时，如何在保护工人隐私的前提下仍能有效识别危险行为是一个尚未充分研究的问题。
AI.method: 使用混合生成工作流构建 SynthSite 合成视频基准（55个片段，覆盖多种负载配置、视角、遮挡和监控条件）；在五种全身隐私条件（结构保留型模糊 vs. 外观平滑型基线）下评估工人和负载的保留率、定位稳定性以及片段级危险识别性能。
AI.result: 结构保留型模糊方法在下游危险识别任务中比外观平滑型基线保留更高的实用性；仅保留原始视觉参考并不能保证与人类危险标签的最佳一致性。
AI.conclusion: 施工安全分析的隐私评估不仅应考察外观抑制程度，还应评估危险推理所需的几何线索是否得到保留。

title: Lifelong Multi-Subsystem Pickup and Delivery with Buffer-Limited Handover Stations
summary: Coordinating payload transfers between subsystems is a critical challenge in lifelong Multi-Agent Pickup and Delivery (MAPD). We study systems where agents are confined to separate regions and must exchange payloads through shared handover stations. These stations, equipped with single docks and finite buffers, are inherently vulnerable to blocking and starvation. We formalize this problem as Multi-Subsystem MAPD with Buffer-limited Handover Stations (MS-MAPD-BHS). We then propose Handover-Aware Reservation and Routing (HARR), an online controller that couples per-subsystem planners. HARR uses a shared dock reservation calendar and a deterministic rolling-horizon projection of buffer occupancy to coordinate actions. A candidate route is accepted only if its dock interval is free and the resulting buffer occupancy projection remains within capacity. Under perfect execution, these checks ensure collision-free dock use and buffer-safe committed operations within the reservation horizon. In simulation, HARR achieves up to 77% higher throughput and 92% lower backlog than a fixed-dock ablation at moderate load, while also reducing planning time relative to a coupled station-aware Token Passing baseline. These results show that explicit interface coordination substantially improves stability in modular multi-subsystem transport.

AI.tldr: 针对多子系统MAPD中的缓冲区有限的手动站协调问题，提出HARR在线控制器，通过共享停靠站预约日历和滚动时域缓冲区占用预测进行协调，在仿真中相比固定停靠站方案吞吐量提升高达77%，积压降低92%。
AI.motivation: 多子系统MAPD中，子系统间通过共享手动站交换载荷，但有限缓冲区的手动站容易发生阻塞和饥饿，现有方法缺乏有效的接口协调机制，导致系统吞吐量受限且积压严重。
AI.method: 形式化定义MS-MAPD-BHS问题；提出HARR在线控制器，包含共享停靠站预约日历和确定性滚动时域缓冲区占用预测；候选路径仅当停靠站时间窗空闲且缓冲区占用不超容量时才被接受。
AI.result: 仿真实验中，中等负载下HARR相比固定停靠站消融方案吞吐量提升77%，积压降低92%；同时相比耦合的站感知Token Passing基线减少了规划时间。
AI.conclusion: 显式接口协调能显著提升模块化多子系统运输系统的稳定性，HARR通过预约机制和缓冲区预测有效缓解了手动站的阻塞与饥饿问题。

title: EA-RMENet -- Path Loss Prediction in Urban Environments using Deep Learning
summary: Accurate path loss prediction is a critical component of wireless network planning. Current path loss prediction methods typically struggle to balance the trade-off between accuracy and computational efficiency. This paper proposes the Efficient Attention Radio Map Estimation Network (EA-RMENet) which is an image data-driven, deep learning (DL) model designed for radio map estimation (RME). EA-RMENet uses a U-Net framework with an EfficientNetB5 encoder, Attention Gated (AG) skip connections, and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP). The EfficientNet encoder uses compound scaling to balance accuracy and efficiency. AG skip connections suppress irrelevant features, and the ASPP captures a multi-scale context. The model has a test prediction RMSE of 0.0334 on the RadioMapSeer3D dataset with an inference time of 0.022 seconds/sample. In the ICASSP 2023 Radio Map Prediction Challenge, the model ranks third with a competitive RMSE of 0.0406 this highlights the models potential for real-world RME.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EA-RMENet，一种基于U-Net框架结合EfficientNetB5编码器、注意力门控跳跃连接和空洞空间金字塔池化的深度学习模型，用于高效准确的无线网络路径损耗预测。在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上实现0.0334的RMSE和0.022秒/样本的推理速度，在ICASSP 2023挑战赛中排名第三。
AI.motivation: 现有路径损耗预测方法难以在准确性和计算效率之间取得平衡，需要一种既能保证预测精度又能实现快速推理的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构，采用EfficientNetB5作为编码器（通过复合缩放平衡精度与效率），引入注意力门控跳跃连接抑制无关特征，并使用空洞空间金字塔池化捕获多尺度上下文信息。
AI.result: 在RadioMapSeer3D数据集上测试预测RMSE为0.0334，推理时间仅0.022秒/样本。在ICASSP 2023无线电地图预测挑战赛中取得第三名，RMSE为0.0406。
AI.conclusion: EA-RMENet在预测精度和计算效率上均表现出色，具有实际无线电地图估计应用的潜力。

title: Beyond Semantic Equivalence: Logical Graphs for LLM Uncertainty Quantification
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) often produce confidently stated yet unreliable outputs, posing critical challenges for deployment in safety-sensitive applications. Existing uncertainty metrics such as semantic entropy capture agreement at the level of semantic equivalence, but largely ignore the logical relationships between distinct answers. As a result, they tend to overestimate uncertainty and falsely flag hallucinations in settings where generated responses are diverse in form yet logically compatible (e.g., differing only in granularity or specificity). We propose Logical Graph Uncertainty (LGU), a framework that explicitly models implication and incompatibility among answers. LGU aggregates probability mass along entailment chains, computes entropy over logically maximal hypotheses, and penalizes mutual incompatibility among them. Across multiple question-answering benchmarks, LGU consistently improves uncertainty estimation over existing methods, and outperforms the semantic entropy baseline by up to +7.1% AUROC and +3.5% AUARC across datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出逻辑图不确定性（LGU）框架，通过显式建模答案间的蕴含与不兼容关系，改进大语言模型的不确定性估计，在多项QA基准上超越语义熵等方法，AUROC最高提升7.1%。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性度量（如语义熵）仅捕捉语义等价层面的一致性，忽略了不同答案间的逻辑关系（如蕴含、不兼容），导致在形式上多样但逻辑兼容的生成场景中高估不确定性、误判幻觉。
AI.method: 提出Logical Graph Uncertainty (LGU)，显式建模答案间的蕴含链与不兼容关系，在逻辑极大假设上聚合概率质量计算熵，并对相互不兼容的假设施加惩罚。
AI.result: 在多个问答基准上，LGU一致优于现有方法，相比语义熵基线，AUROC提升最高7.1%，AUARC提升最高3.5%。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入逻辑关系建模，LGU能更准确地估计LLM的不确定性，减少对逻辑兼容答案的误判，提升安全敏感场景下的可靠性。

title: Clarify Before Executing: A Self-Evolving Agent for Resolving Intent Asymmetry in 3D Tool Orchestration
comment: Accepted to ACM Multimedia 2026 (ACM MM 2026). 26 pages including appendix, 8 figures. Code: https://github.com/xyzhu1225/CLARE
summary: A fundamental intent asymmetry plagues modern 3D asset creation: while state-of-the-art 3D toolchains demand precise, executable parameters, ordinary users typically provide vague, underspecified instructions. Current 3D agents treat this ambiguity as noise, defaulting to blind execution under a single-turn assumption. To address this limitation, we introduce CLARE, a clarification-aware and evolutionary 3D agent that treats intent asymmetry not as an execution error, but as an opportunity for strategic dialogue. By decoupling the generation pipeline into four specialized cognitive roles, CLARE intercepts and resolves underspecified instructions before invoking computationally expensive 3D tools to seamlessly execute tasks across five diverse domains: text-to-3D generation, single-view reconstruction, multi-view reconstruction, point cloud editing, and post-processing. Crucially, rather than relying on rigid manual rules, CLARE self-evolves its clarification policy via simulated multi-turn interactions. By optimizing a Multi-turn Reward, the agent internalizes the delicate balance between interaction efficiency and task completion. To rigorously test this, we construct 3D-Clarify, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 620 interaction scenarios with systematically injected ambiguity, missing information, and mistaken details. CLARE achieves state-of-the-art performance, with 60.40% and 43.34% success rates on single-step and multi-step tasks, respectively, more than doubling existing baselines. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that proactive clarification is the missing key to robust 3D execution. Code is available at https://github.com/xyzhu1225/CLARE.

AI.tldr: CLARE是一种澄清感知的演化式3D智能体，通过将生成流程解耦为四个专门认知角色，主动拦截和解决模糊指令，并利用多轮交互自演化澄清策略，在3D生成任务上实现超过基线两倍的成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有3D工具链要求精确参数，而用户通常提供模糊指令，当前3D智能体将此模糊性视为噪声，在单轮假设下盲目执行，导致意图不对称问题严重制约了3D资产生成的可用性。
AI.method: CLARE将生成流程解耦为四个专门认知角色来拦截和解决模糊指令；通过模拟多轮交互自演化澄清策略，优化多轮奖励以平衡交互效率与任务完成度；构建包含620个交互场景的3D-Clarify基准测试，系统注入模糊性、信息缺失和错误细节。
AI.result: 在单步任务上达到60.40%成功率，多步任务上达到43.34%成功率，超过现有基线两倍以上。
AI.conclusion: 主动澄清是实现稳健3D执行的关键缺失要素，CLARE证明了将意图不对称视为策略性对话机会而非执行错误的有效性。

title: Seg2Grasp: A Robust Modular Suction Grasping in Bin Picking
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Published in the 2024 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2024)
summary: Current bin picking methods that rely heavily on end-to-end learning often falter when confronted with unfamiliar or complex objects in unstructured environments. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Seg2Grasp, a modular pipeline designed for robust suction grasping in dynamic and cluttered bin scenarios. Seg2Grasp is built on a three-step process: Segmentation, Grasping, and Classification. The Segmentation module employs a Transformer-based model to generate class-agnostic object masks from RGB-D images, ensuring accurate detection across various conditions. The Grasping module uses surface normals and mask proposals to determine the optimal suction points, enhancing grasp success. Finally, the Classification module leverages fine-tuned open-vocabulary Mask-CLIP for precise object identification, enabling versatile handling of diverse objects. Real-world robotic experiments demonstrate that Seg2Grasp outperforms existing methods in success rates and adaptability, establishing it as a powerful tool for automated bin picking in industrial settings.

AI.tldr: Seg2Grasp是一种模块化管线，通过分割、抓取和分类三步骤，利用Transformer、表面法向量和开放词汇Mask-CLIP，在动态杂乱料箱场景中实现鲁棒的吸盘抓取，在成功率和适应性上优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于端到端学习的料箱抓取方法在遇到陌生或复杂物体时表现不佳，缺乏应对非结构化环境的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用模块化管线：(1) 分割模块使用Transformer模型生成与类别无关的物体掩码；(2) 抓取模块利用表面法向量和掩码提议确定最优吸盘点；(3) 分类模块使用微调后的开放词汇Mask-CLIP进行精确物体识别。
AI.result: 实际机器人实验表明，Seg2Grasp在成功率和适应性方面均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: Seg2Grasp是一种适用于工业自动化料箱抓取的有效工具，具有强鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: Compact convolutional neural networks for AI-based drone detection system
summary: The increasing use of first-person-view drones in modern conflicts has created a demand for compact and reliable detection systems capable of operating in complex electromagnetic environments. These drones continuously transmit video signals through onboard video transmitters, generating radio-frequency emissions that can be exploited for early detection. This study investigates the use of lightweight convolutional neural networks for automated detection of drone signals captured by a software-defined radio-based electronic warfare framework. Samples are converted into rasterized time-domain images, providing a computationally efficient input representation suitable for embedded systems. Several custom model architectures were designed and benchmarked in terms of accuracy, model size, and inference performance using a dataset containing approximately 40,000 labeled images. In addition to offline testing, the models were integrated into a GNU Radio signal processing chain for real-time evaluation. The results show that compact models can achieve high detection accuracy while maintaining low computational requirements, making them suitable for embedded radio-frequency monitoring applications. Compared with existing spectrogram-based RF detection methods, the proposed approach eliminates frequency-domain preprocessing and achieves comparable accuracy with significantly reduced computational cost.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于轻量级卷积神经网络和软件定义无线电的FPV无人机射频信号自动检测方法，通过将信号转换为时域光栅化图像作为输入，在约40,000个样本的数据集上验证了模型性能，并在GNU Radio平台上进行了实时测试。结果表明，该方案在消除频域预处理的同时，实现了与频谱图方法相当的检测精度，且计算成本显著降低，适合嵌入式射频监控应用。
AI.motivation: FPV无人机在现代冲突中的广泛使用产生了对紧凑、可靠的检测系统的需求，尤其是在复杂电磁环境中。这类无人机的视频发射机持续发射射频信号，可被利用进行早期检测，因此需要开发轻量级、高效的自动化检测方案。
AI.method: 使用软件定义无线电（SDR）构建电子战框架捕获无人机信号；将样本转换为光栅化时域图像作为输入表示；设计并基准测试多种自定义轻量级CNN架构；在包含约40,000个标注图像的数据集上评估模型的准确率、大小和推理性能；将模型集成到GNU Radio信号处理链中进行实时测试。
AI.result: 紧凑模型在保持高检测精度的同时实现了低计算需求；与基于频谱图的射频检测方法相比，所提方法消除了频域预处理步骤，以显著降低的计算成本达到了相当的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 基于时域图像和轻量级CNN的射频检测方案适用于嵌入式射频监控应用，能够在复杂电磁环境中实现高效、准确的FPV无人机检测。

title: Environment-free Synthetic Data Generation for API-Calling Agents
summary: Training API-calling large language model (LLM) agents demands massive amounts of high-quality trajectories. However, collecting such data at scale typically requires fully implemented environments with executable APIs and realistic, pre-populated backend databases, creating a major bottleneck for scalability. To overcome this, we propose an environment-free synthetic data generation approach that leverages LLMs as on-the-fly digital world models. Given only API specifications, our method generates trajectories mimicking interactions between an agent and a stateful environment. Specifically, an LLM first generates diverse tasks solvable with the provided APIs. A teacher agent then iteratively solves each task while an LLM simulator generates coherent synthetic API responses conditioned on the task context and simulation history. Finally, an LLM judge filters the trajectories to ensure the quality of the resulting dataset. We evaluate our approach on the challenging AppWorld and OfficeBench benchmarks, which include both information-retrieval and state-changing tasks. Fine-tuning models on our synthetic data yields significant performance gains, demonstrating that effective supervision for API-calling agents can be generated without any executable environment. Our results establish LLM-based API simulation as a practical, scalable solution for training agents across diverse API ecosystems.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种无需可执行环境的合成数据生成方法，利用LLM作为数字世界模型，仅凭API规范即可生成高质量的API调用智能体训练轨迹，在AppWorld和OfficeBench基准上显著提升了微调模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 训练API调用型LLM智能体需要大量高质量轨迹数据，但传统方法依赖完整实现的可执行环境和预填充后端数据库，这成为规模化扩展的主要瓶颈。
AI.method: 1) LLM根据API规范生成多样化任务；2) 教师智能体迭代求解任务，同时LLM模拟器根据任务上下文和历史生成一致的合成API响应；3) LLM评判器过滤轨迹以保障数据集质量。
AI.result: 在AppWorld和OfficeBench基准上，使用合成数据微调的模型取得了显著的性能提升，证明了无需可执行环境即可生成有效的监督信号。
AI.conclusion: 基于LLM的API模拟为跨多样API生态系统训练智能体提供了一种实用且可扩展的解决方案，有效解决了数据收集瓶颈问题。

title: PhysAgent: Reflective Agentic Physics Control for Physically Plausible Video Generation
summary: Recent advances in physics-grounded video generation leverage physics simulation as a physical prior to guide video synthesis toward physically plausible outcomes. The simulation process is controlled by physical specifications, which are typically generated by a vision-language model in a single pass. Such one-shot prediction often fails to accurately translate user intent into executable simulations, particularly for fine-grained object dynamics, complex motion trajectories, and temporally structured interactions. In this paper, we propose PhysAgent, a reflective agentic framework that closes the loop among physical program generation, physics simulation, stage-specific verification, and targeted program repair. Beyond improving the control of coupled physical parameters, our framework enables the agent to progressively realize complex trajectories, multi-stage interactions, and precise event outcomes by treating each physical program as an executable hypothesis. In addition, we design a set of physics-control APIs to support more stable and complex motion behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PhysAgent produces more physically plausible videos, achieves better prompt alignment, and generalizes more effectively across diverse physical scenarios.

AI.tldr: PhysAgent是一个反射式代理框架，通过物理程序生成、物理模拟、阶段性验证和定向程序修复的闭环，将用户意图逐步转化为可执行的物理模拟，从而生成更物理合理、与提示对齐的视频。
AI.motivation: 现有基于物理的视频生成方法依赖视觉语言模型单次生成物理规格，难以准确翻译用户意图，尤其在细粒度物体动力学、复杂运动轨迹和时间结构化交互方面表现不佳。
AI.method: 提出PhysAgent反射式代理框架，将物理程序视为可执行假设，通过物理程序生成→物理模拟→阶段性验证→定向程序修复的闭环迭代优化，并设计了物理控制API以支持更稳定复杂的运动行为。
AI.result: PhysAgent能生成更物理合理的视频，实现更好的提示对齐效果，并在多种物理场景中展现出更强的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 通过将物理程序视为可执行假设并进行反射式迭代修复，PhysAgent有效克服了单次预测的局限，实现了对复杂轨迹、多阶段交互和精确事件结果的渐进式实现。

title: VLN-AVP: Zero-Shot Vision-Language Navigation with Hybrid Long-Short-Term Memory for Autonomous Valet Parking
summary: Existing methods in Autonomous Valet Parking (AVP) typically rely on pre-built maps, which severely restricts their scalability to unseen environments and open-vocabulary targets. Inspired by the application of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) in Vision-Language Navigation (VLN) tasks, we propose VLN-AVP, a zero-shot navigation framework for AVP tasks. By combining the precise spatial perception of a Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) model with the general intelligence of VLMs, our framework 1) eliminates the dependency on pre-built maps, 2) interprets semantic environmental contexts in parking scenarios, and 3) enables intuitive navigation following natural language instructions. Specifically, we introduce a hybrid memory system: a short-term perception memory tracks semantic visual cues to address the limitations of VLM's single-frame reasoning in existing methods, while a long-term topological memory facilitates stable policy learning from past experiences. To bridge the gap in existing benchmarks, we also present the VLN-AVP dataset and benchmark. Featuring 10 high-fidelity parking scenes and over 1,000 navigation episodes, it has the largest number of garage scenes to date and is the first VLN benchmark for underground parking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that in simulation, our method achieves an over 25% improvement in success rate compared to VLN methods and an over 15% improvement compared to other autonomous driving methods. Furthermore, it attains a leading success rate in real-world vehicle experiments, proving its practical feasibility.

AI.tldr: 提出VLN-AVP，一种零样本自主代客泊车导航框架，通过结合BEV模型的精准空间感知与VLM的通用智能，消除对预建地图的依赖，支持自然语言指令导航，并引入混合记忆系统（短期感知记忆+长期拓扑记忆），在仿真和真实实验中均取得显著性能提升。
AI.motivation: 现有自主代客泊车方法严重依赖预建地图，限制了其在未知环境和开放词汇目标下的可扩展性。
AI.method: 提出VLN-AVP零样本导航框架，结合BEV模型的空间感知与VLM的通用智能；引入混合记忆系统（短期感知记忆跟踪语义视觉线索，长期拓扑记忆进行稳定策略学习）；构建VLN-AVP数据集和基准（首个地下停车场VLN基准，包含10个高保真场景和1000+导航片段）。
AI.result: 仿真中，相比VLN方法成功率提升超25%，相比其他自动驾驶方法提升超15%；真实车辆实验中取得领先成功率。
AI.conclusion: VLN-AVP框架有效解决了对预建地图的依赖，实现了零样本场景下的自然语言导航，且在实际应用中证明了可行性。

title: K-IPO: Kendall-constrained Importance Preserving Oversampling for Imbalanced Tabular Data
summary: Oversampling is widely used to address class imbalance in tabular classification, but existing methods can distort the feature importance ranking underlying model explanations. Although recent studies have quantified this distortion by comparing real and synthetic data, none have actively sought to prevent it. In this paper, we introduce Kendall-constrained Importance-Preserving Oversampling (K-IPO), a generator-agnostic, "generate-then-select" framework that preserves the original data's feature importance ranking during augmentation. K-IPO iteratively generates minority-class candidates and accepts them only if their inclusion maintains a user-defined minimum Kendall's tau (τ) correlation with the reference ranking. Optionally, stricter constraints can be applied to the highest-ranked features. We evaluated K-IPO on 20 imbalanced binary classification datasets using three classifiers and multiple explanation methods. In most cases, K-IPO achieved the best or tied-best results in feature importance preservation, explanation consistency, and class separability. It also generally improved predictive performance while maintaining competitive computational overhead.

AI.tldr: 提出K-IPO框架，通过"生成-选择"机制保留特征重要性排序，在20个不平衡数据集上实现了特征重要性保持、解释一致性和类别可分性的最优或并列最优结果。
AI.motivation: 现有过采样方法会扭曲特征重要性排序，且尚无研究主动预防这种扭曲。
AI.method: K-IPO是一个生成器无关的"生成-选择"框架，通过迭代生成少数类候选样本，仅当样本加入后保持与参考排序的Kendall's τ相关系数不低于用户定义阈值时才接受，并可对最高排名特征施加更严格约束。
AI.result: 在20个不平衡二分类数据集上，K-IPO在特征重要性保持、解释一致性和类别可分性方面达到最优或并列最优，同时提升预测性能且计算开销可控。
AI.conclusion: K-IPO有效防止过采样对特征重要性排序的扭曲，是一种兼顾解释性与性能的不平衡学习解决方案。

title: Lomekwi: Resource-Bounded Tool Discovery in LLM Agents
comment: All authors contributed equally. 17 pages, 6 figures. Presented at the 2026 Conference on Learning Theory Workshop on Learning in an Agentic World
summary: Existing tool-use benchmarks report a single success rate for complex, multistep tasks. Inspired by ideas from cognitive science, we distinguish tool use from tool discovery and decompose the latter into curiosity (the model's ability to discover the parts needed to build the tool), recognition (the model's ability to discover the process of creating the tool), and efficiency (the model's use of the tool after creation). We show that this framework can be applied to existing discovery tasks, such as Voyager. In addition, we provide evidence that recognition inversely scales with model size, and we introduce and analyze a class of combinatorial games that demonstrates this. We further observe inverse scaling in a separate environment designed to emulate real-world tasks.

AI.tldr: 论文提出将工具使用区分为工具使用与工具发现，并将工具发现分解为好奇心、识别和效率三个维度，发现识别能力随模型规模增大反而下降（逆缩放），并通过组合游戏和真实环境验证了这一现象。
AI.motivation: 现有工具使用基准仅报告单一成功率，忽略了工具发现与工具使用的本质区别。受认知科学启发，作者希望建立更细粒度的评估框架，揭示模型在不同子能力上的表现差异。
AI.method: 将工具发现分解为好奇心（发现所需部件）、识别（发现制造过程）和效率（制造后的使用）。将此框架应用于Voyager等现有任务，并设计组合游戏类和模拟真实任务的环境来验证逆缩放现象。
AI.result: 识别能力随模型规模增大反而下降（逆缩放）；在组合游戏和模拟真实任务的环境中均观察到该现象。
AI.conclusion: 工具发现的子能力之间存在非同步发展，识别能力在大模型中存在逆缩放现象，揭示了当前大模型在工具创造过程中的局限性。

title: Spatial Transport of Integration Error in Generative ODEs
summary: A trained flow or diffusion model is usually run with only a handful of solver steps, and the integration error this leaves behind is unevenly distributed across the image. We ask where that error is injected and how it reaches the endpoint, and answer with a signed source-and-transport accounting of few-step integration error, tested to first order. A perturbation experiment on five models at 256^2 resolution shows the learned dynamics spread local disturbances widely: near the start of sampling, under 10% of the summed endpoint response remains at the source. Signed one-step truncation residuals, propagated through the model's own linearized dynamics, reconstruct much of the endpoint error's direction and regional structure (cosine 0.81-0.87), and a region's error owes more to what arrives from elsewhere than to its own injection. Structure-destroying nulls, with protocols frozen before evaluation, locate what carries the account: randomizing contribution signs halves it, and reassigning which region receives each contribution, with content, norms, and signs intact, destroys it entirely. Where the injections land is readable from the model itself. The variation of its velocity or prediction field along the trajectory, a structure that emerges during training, predicts the final per-region gap (within-image rho of 0.57-0.70 on fine trajectories, weaker from the cheap solve alone). The prediction is partial because endpoint error depends not only on injected magnitude but on its sign, timing, and transport through the learned dynamics. A training penalty on the injected variation lowers few-step error, so the structure is one a model can be trained to change.

AI.tldr: 本文通过符号化的源-传输核算方法，系统分析了扩散/流模型在少步采样中积分误差的来源、传播与分布，发现误差主要由远距离传输贡献而非本地注入，并基于模型自身的速度场变化可部分预测最终误差，进一步提出通过训练惩罚减少误差。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散/流模型在少步求解时，积分误差在图像中分布不均，但误差从何处注入、如何传播到终点尚不清楚。本文旨在通过符号化的源-传输核算方法，系统回答这一问题。
AI.method: 采用一阶测试的符号化源-传输核算方法，对五个256^2分辨率模型进行扰动实验；通过模型自身线性化动力学传播单步截断残差；采用结构破坏消融实验（随机化贡献符号、重新分配接收区域）定位误差载体；利用模型速度/预测场沿轨迹的变化预测最终区域误差。
AI.result: 采样早期，不足10%的端点响应保留在源区域；传播后的单步残差可重建端点误差的方向与区域结构（余弦相似度0.81-0.87）；某区域的误差更多来自其他区域的贡献而非本地注入；随机化贡献符号使误差减半，重新分配区域则完全破坏；速度场变化可预测最终区域误差（rho=0.57-0.70）；对注入变化施加训练惩罚可降低少步误差。
AI.conclusion: 少步积分误差主要由远距离传输主导，其空间分布可从模型自身的速度场结构中部分预测，且该结构可通过训练主动改变，为改进少步采样质量提供了新方向。

title: From Sign Language Generation to Humanoid Execution: Vision-Language Guided Retargeting with Collision Mitigation
summary: Recent sign language generation (SLG) systems increasingly output dense 3D body representations, which better preserve full-body kinematics and geometry for downstream embodiment on humanoid robots. However, these generated motions frequently exhibit self-intersections such as hand-hand and hand-torso penetration. While such artifacts may be tolerated in offline rendering, they become critical in humanoid execution as they lead to infeasible inverse-kinematics (IK) solutions, collisions, and unstable retargeted trajectories. We present a system-level framework that bridges SLG outputs to humanoid joint-space execution via two components. First, we introduce a volumetric SMPL-X collision-mitigation module that projects generated signing motions toward physically plausible configurations while minimally deviating from the original trajectory. Second, we propose a vision-language-guided retargeting algorithm built on an IK backbone: a VLM serves as a visual critic over rendered humanoid motion, identifies embodiment-specific failure modes, and triggers targeted task-space corrections. Our results highlight collision handling and perception-guided refinement as key missing components for reliable humanoid signing.

AI.tldr: 提出一个系统级框架，通过体积碰撞缓解模块和视觉语言引导的重定向算法，将手语生成输出的3D人体表示转化为物理可行的人形机器人关节空间执行，解决自交碰撞问题。
AI.motivation: 现有的手语生成系统输出的密集3D人体表示常包含手-手、手-躯干等自交碰撞，在离线渲染中可容忍，但在人形机器人执行中会导致逆运动学解不可行、碰撞和不稳定的重定向轨迹。
AI.method: 1) 基于体积SMPL-X的碰撞缓解模块：将生成的手语运动投影到物理可行的姿态，同时最小化偏离原始轨迹；2) 视觉语言引导的重定向算法：以VLM作为视觉批评器，识别人形机器人特有的失败模式并触发针对性任务空间修正。
AI.result: 碰撞处理和感知引导的细化是实现可靠人形机器人手语的关键缺失组件。
AI.conclusion: 系统级框架通过碰撞缓解和VLM引导修正，有效桥接手语生成输出到人形机器人关节空间执行，解决了自交碰撞导致的不稳定问题。

title: Leakage-Robust Evaluation and Data-Scale Sensitivity of Attention-Enhanced Multi-Task Learning for Joint Fault Diagnosis and Remaining Useful Life Estimation
summary: Multi-task deep learning models that jointly perform fault classification and remaining useful life (RUL) regression are increasingly used in predictive maintenance, yet reported performance can be strongly affected by how sliding-window sequences are split into training and test sets. We investigate this issue using AMTLNet, an attention-enhanced multi-task architecture, on three public benchmarks: NASA C-MAPSS, NASA IMS, and the UCI Hydraulic System dataset. We show that naive splitting can inflate classification accuracy from a genuine 20-60 percent to 99.9 percent, or reduce it to 0 percent through degenerate class representation. To address this, we introduce a chunk-based, leakage-audited splitting protocol and evaluate all models using five seeds, one-way ANOVA, and Tukey HSD tests. On C-MAPSS, with 19,976 leakage-free training windows, AMTLNet matches a single-task CNN-LSTM baseline in classification, achieving 84.12 +/- 0.96 percent accuracy with Tukey p = 1.0, and reaches an R2 of 0.86 +/- 0.01 while significantly outperforming a naive multi-task baseline. On the smaller Bearing and Hydraulic datasets, multi-task training is unstable, but the failure mode differs: classification degrades for Bearing, whereas regression degrades for Hydraulic. We relate this asymmetry to label provenance and propose a practical framework for deciding when joint training is appropriate under data scarcity. Ablation results show that the multi-head attention branch is the main contributor to regression stability. Removing it reduces R2 from 0.861 to 0.766 and more than doubles classification variance, whereas the convolutional branch contributes little to regression despite using about one-third of the parameters. This study contributes a reusable leakage-audit protocol, seed-transparent evaluation, and evidence that task-specific stability depends more on label provenance than on task type.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多任务深度学习在预测性维护中因滑动窗口划分不当导致的性能评估偏差问题。提出了一种基于分块的数据泄漏审计协议，在C-MAPSS、IMS和液压系统三个公开数据集上系统评估了AMTLNet架构。研究发现：1）朴素切分可使分类准确率虚增至99.9%或降至0%；2）在C-MAPSS上AMTLNet达到84.12%分类准确率和R²=0.86；3）多任务训练在小数据集上不稳定且故障模式不对称（轴承受损于分类，液压受损于回归）；4）多头注意力分支是回归稳定性的主要贡献者。研究贡献了可复用的泄漏审计协议和种子透明的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 多任务深度学习模型在预测性维护中被广泛使用，但滑动窗口序列的划分方式会严重影响性能评估的可靠性。现有研究对此问题关注不足，导致报告的性能可能被严重高估或低估，缺乏系统的泄漏审计方法和稳健的评估协议。
AI.method: 使用AMTLNet（注意力增强的多任务架构）在三个公共基准数据集上进行实验，提出基于分块的数据泄漏审计协议，采用五种子、单因素方差分析和Tukey HSD检验进行统计评估，并通过消融实验分析各分支贡献。
AI.result: 1)朴素切分可将分类准确率从真实的20-60%虚增至99.9%或降低至0%；2)C-MAPSS上AMTLNet达84.12±0.96%分类准确率，R²=0.86±0.01；3)小数据集下多任务训练不稳定，轴承受损于分类，液压受损于回归；4)多头注意力分支是回归稳定性关键，移除后R²从0.861降至0.766，分类方差翻倍。
AI.conclusion: 任务特定的稳定性更多取决于标签来源而非任务类型；提出了在数据稀缺情况下判断是否适合联合训练的实用框架；贡献了可复用的泄漏审计协议和种子透明的评估方法。

title: Training Continuous Chain of Thought Models: A Tale of Two Regimes
summary: Continuous Chain-of-Thought methods replace verbose reasoning traces with a short sequence of dense latent representations. Earlier continuous CoT methods indirectly supervise the latent representations such that its final state match that of verbose reasoning traces, requiring autoregressive, slow generation during training. We introduce C-MTP, a simpler, faster direct supervision approach that models each latent as an average of the embeddings in the CoT traces to be compressed. Our approach outperforms a prior direct supervision method that approximates the distribution of compressed tokens, and performs competitively to slower indirect supervision approaches in existing evaluation setup with simplified CoT traces (less than 100 tokens). Lastly, we extend the evaluation of Continuous CoT methods to complex tasks with longer reasoning traces ($\ge$ few hundreds reasoning tokens). We find both direct and indirect supervision training methods perform poorly (roughly 65\% performance drop) in this setting, revealing the limitations of current continuous CoT methods. The code and checkpoints are released at https://github.com/Varun221/cmtp_research

AI.tldr: 本文提出C-MTP，一种通过将每个潜在表示建模为CoT轨迹中词嵌入平均值的直接监督方法，在简单任务上表现良好，但在复杂长推理任务上性能大幅下降（约65%），揭示了当前连续思维链方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有连续思维链方法存在两个问题：1) 间接监督方法需要自回归生成，训练速度慢；2) 直接监督方法仅近似压缩token的分布。作者希望提出一种更简单、更快的直接监督方法。
AI.method: C-MTP将每个连续潜在表示建模为被压缩的CoT轨迹中所有token嵌入的平均值，作为直接监督信号。这比先前近似分布的直接监督方法更简单。
AI.result: 1) C-MTP优于先前的直接监督方法；2) 与较慢的间接监督方法性能相当（在简单CoT轨迹（<100 token）的评估设置下）；3) 在复杂长推理任务（≥几百token）上，所有连续CoT方法性能均下降约65%。
AI.conclusion: C-MTP在简单场景下有效且高效，但当前连续思维链方法在处理长推理轨迹时存在根本性局限，需要新的突破。

title: OmniStyle-INR: Universal and Multimodal Style Transfer for INRs
summary: Style transfer remains a fundamental and highly important task across various data modalities, enabling creative manipulation conditioned by both reference images and textual descriptions. Recently, methods utilizing Gaussian Splatting have emerged as a unified representation for 2D images, video, 3D scenes, and 4D dynamics. However, representing videos and 2D images with Gaussian Splatting is structurally sub-optimal for dense continuous domains. The number of required Gaussians often approaches the total number of pixels, raising questions about the actual utility of such a representation for these specific modalities. In contrast, Implicit Neural Representations have established themselves as a much more popular and natural choice across all these data domains. Implicit Neural Representations naturally provide significant advantages, including data compression, inherent capabilities for super resolution, and seamless integration with deep generative models. To this end, we introduce OmniStyle-INR, a novel framework that leverages network-based continuous representations as a truly universal domain. Our approach successfully performs high-quality style transfer across all visual modalities, guided seamlessly by both text prompts and visual exemplars.

AI.tldr: 提出OmniStyle-INR框架，利用隐式神经表示作为统一域，实现跨图像、视频、3D场景和4D动态的高质量风格迁移，支持文本和图像双重引导。
AI.motivation: 高斯泼溅在表示2D图像和视频时存在结构次优性（高斯数量接近像素总数），而隐式神经表示在数据压缩、超分辨率和与深度生成模型集成方面具有自然优势，因此探索将INR作为通用域进行风格迁移。
AI.method: 基于网络的连续表示（隐式神经表示）作为统一表示域，构建OmniStyle-INR框架，实现跨视觉模态的风格迁移，支持文本提示和视觉示例双模态引导。
AI.result: 在2D图像、视频、3D场景和4D动态等所有视觉模态上成功实现高质量风格迁移。
AI.conclusion: 隐式神经表示作为统一表示域在跨模态风格迁移任务中表现出色，优于高斯泼溅方法，且能无缝整合文本和图像两种引导方式。

title: Polar Coordinate-based Differential Evolution for Moving Target Search Using Vision Sensor on Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
summary: In search and rescue operations, there is a period known as the "golden time" during which the probability of finding the target alive is highest. The objective of this work is to propose a new search algorithm for unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) with a focus on improving the detection probability and execution time. We approach this problem by first modeling target dynamics as a Markov process and the detection likelihood as a function of image quality and the observer's vision. We then employ Bayesian theory to derive a fitness function representing the probability distribution of the target's location over the search area. Finally, we introduce a new algorithm named polar coordinate-based differential evolution (PDE) to generate a UAV search path that maximizes this fitness function. The PDE algorithm utilizes polar coordinates to incorporate kinematic constraints and maneuver properties of the UAV, allowing for better exploration of the solution space. A series of simulations and comparative analyses have been conducted to evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm. Experiments involving a real UAV have also been conducted. Results demonstrate that the PDE algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art algorithms in terms of detection probability and execution time across diverse search scenarios while remaining practical for real-world applications. The source code of the algorithm is available at https://github.com/thuhangkhuat/PDE_target_search.

AI.tldr: 本文针对搜救任务中的"黄金时间"问题，提出了一种基于极坐标差分进化（PDE）的无人机搜索路径生成算法。通过马尔可夫过程建模目标动态、贝叶斯理论推导适应度函数，并结合极坐标引入无人机运动学约束，在仿真和真实实验中均优于现有算法，显著提升了检测概率和执行效率。
AI.motivation: 在搜救任务中，"黄金时间"内找到幸存者的概率最高，而现有无人机搜索算法在检测概率和执行时间上仍有提升空间。本文旨在提出一种新算法以改善这两项性能指标。
AI.method: 首先将目标动态建模为马尔可夫过程，将检测似然函数表示为图像质量与观察者视觉的函数；然后利用贝叶斯理论推导出代表目标位置概率分布的适应度函数；最后提出极坐标差分进化（PDE）算法，通过极坐标表示无人机运动学约束和机动特性，优化搜索路径以最大化该适应度函数。
AI.result: 一系列仿真和对比分析以及真实无人机实验表明，PDE算法在多种搜索场景下的检测概率和执行时间均优于当前最先进算法，且具备实际应用可行性。
AI.conclusion: PDE算法在搜救任务的"黄金时间"内能有效提升无人机搜索的检测概率并缩短执行时间，算法开源，适用于真实搜救场景。

title: Feedback Attribution and Representation Geometry: Metrics for Comparing Individual and Shared Rewards in MARL
comment: Accepted at the Reinforcement Learning from World Feedback Workshop, ICML 2026
summary: Cooperative multi-agent RL systems routinely use team-averaged rewards, a feedback-attribution choice that gives each agent the team outcome regardless of its individual contribution. We ask whether this leaves a measurable signature, geometric or behavioral, on learned representations. We propose EffRank/$n$ (effective rank normalized by agent count) and $D_\text{act}$ (mean pairwise KL divergence between agents' action distributions) as low-overhead diagnostics for reward-attribution effects, then test them on competent MAPPO agents in SMACv2 \texttt{protoss\_5\_vs\_5}, where unit type is encoded in the observation. In an observation $\times$ reward-attribution comparison (unit type observed vs.\ masked; individual damage-contribution reward vs.\ shared team reward), geometry follows observation rather than reward. With unit type observed, shared and individual rewards have similar EffRank/$n$ ($0.31{\pm}0.03$ vs.\ $0.29{\pm}0.02$) and probe accuracy ($0.75{\pm}0.05$ vs.\ $0.73{\pm}0.05$, both $\gg 1/3$ chance), while $D_\text{act}$ leans higher under individual rewards ($1.23{\pm}0.06$ vs.\ $1.07{\pm}0.20$). Masking unit type cuts the above-chance probe signal by more than half, to $0.49$ in both reward arms. In short: individually rewarded agents are competent and separable by role, but on SMACv2 the observation explains the geometry and reward attribution shows up mainly in behavior. Thus geometric diagnostics must control for observed role information and test persistent roles that are not directly observed. EffRank/$n$ and $D_\text{act}$ add $<$5\% overhead.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多智能体强化学习中团队平均奖励对智能体表征的影响，提出了EffRank/n和D_act两种低开销诊断指标，并在SMACv2场景下实验发现：观测信息主导表征几何结构，而奖励归因主要影响行为而非表征几何。
AI.motivation: 探究多智能体强化学习中团队平均奖励（即每个智能体获得相同的团队结果，而不考虑个体贡献）是否会在学习到的表征上留下可测量的几何或行为特征。现有的奖励归因方式可能影响智能体的学习效果和协作行为，但缺乏有效的诊断工具来量化这种影响。
AI.method: 提出两种低开销诊断指标：EffRank/n（有效秩除以智能体数量）和D_act（智能体动作分布之间的平均成对KL散度）。在SMACv2 protoss_5_vs_5场景中，使用MAPPO算法，通过观测×奖励归因的交叉对比实验（单位类型观测vs.遮蔽；个体伤害贡献奖励vs.团队共享奖励）来评估奖励归因的影响。
AI.result: 观测信息主导表征几何结构：有无单位类型观测对表征影响显著，而共享奖励与个体奖励之间的几何差异不显著。当单位类型可见时，共享奖励和个体奖励的EffRank/n分别为0.31±0.03和0.29±0.02，探针准确率分别为0.75±0.05和0.73±0.05（均远高于1/3随机水平）。D_act在个体奖励下略高（1.23±0.06 vs. 1.07±0.20）。遮蔽单位类型后，探针信号下降一半以上至0.49。
AI.conclusion: 个体奖励下的智能体具有胜任能力且可按角色区分，但在SMACv2上观测信息解释了表征几何结构，而奖励归因主要影响行为。因此，几何诊断必须控制观测到的角色信息，并测试未直接观测到的持久角色。EffRank/n和D_act的开销小于5%。

title: Expected Free Energy as Belief-Dependent Utility for rho-POMDPs
comment: 41 pages, 12 figures. Paper accepted as a spotlight at the 2026 International Workshop on Active Inference (IWAI); the workshop version will appear in the Springer Communications in Computer and Information Science (CCIS) series. Code and experiment data at https://github.com/PatrickAllenCooper/rho_aif
summary: An agent acting under partial observability must decide when to gather information and which observations are worth their cost. Standard POMDPs value information only through its eventual effect on reward. The $ρ$-POMDP framework instead rewards uncertainty reduction directly, through a belief-dependent utility $ρ$, but in practice both the choice of $ρ$ and the weight placed on it are tuned by hand for every task. We show that active inference removes this tuning entirely. Minimizing Expected Free Energy (EFE) is exactly equivalent to solving a $ρ$-POMDP whose utility is expected information gain, and the exploration weight is fixed at $w=1$ because the variational bound expresses pragmatic and epistemic value in the same units (nats). We prove this equivalence for observe-then-commit POMDPs and extend it to factored observation POMDPs, a broader class that covers interleaved observe-act problems such as non-destructive testing and mobile sensing, where gathering information leaves the hidden state unchanged. Experiments support the theory. Across environments ranging from the classic Tiger problem to RockSample and a new Structural Inspection benchmark with over 65,000 states, the untuned weight matches or outperforms reward-only planning at the same horizon, avoids the over-exploration of bonuses tuned per task, and sits near the reward-maximizing knee of the success-reward Pareto frontier. The practical payoff is an exploration objective that works out of the box. In applications such as fault detection and medical screening, where every test has a price and every missed fault has a cost, EFE supplies a belief-dependent utility that is derived rather than tuned.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了最小化期望自由能(EFE)等价于求解一个ρ-POMDP，其中探索权重被固定为w=1，无需手动调参。实验表明，这种无需调参的探索目标在多个基准任务中优于或持平于奖励导向规划，并避免了过度探索问题。
AI.motivation: 标准的ρ-POMDP框架虽然通过信念依赖效用ρ直接奖励不确定性减少，但ρ的选择及其权重需要为每个任务手动调参。本文旨在消除这一调参过程。
AI.method: 证明了最小化EFE等价于求解ρ-POMDP，其中效用为期望信息增益，探索权重固定为w=1。首先证明了"观察后提交"POMDP的等价性，然后扩展到因子化观察POMDP（涵盖交错观察-行动问题）。
AI.result: 在Tiger问题、RockSample和含65000+状态的结构检测基准上，无需调参的权重匹配或超越了相同规划深度下的纯奖励规划，避免了逐任务调参的过度探索，位于成功-奖励帕累托前沿的膝盖点附近。
AI.conclusion: EFE提供了一种从原理推导而非手动调参的信念依赖效用，在故障检测和医疗筛查等应用中具有实用价值——每个测试都有成本，每次漏检都有代价。

title: Disentangling Model and Human Data Uncertainty in Apparent Facial Age Estimation
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, ANNPR 2026 camera ready + appendix
summary: Estimating the apparent age of individuals from facial images is challenging due to the subjective nature of perception and the inherent variability of the data. We investigate the role of uncertainty estimation, attributing uncertainty jointly to a lack of knowledge (epistemic) or inherent noise/chance (aleatoric). Leveraging the APPA-REAL dataset, we train Bayesian Neural Networks on datasets of varying sizes using three BNN approximations: MC-DropConnect, Flipout, and Deep Ensembles using supervision on human aleatoric uncertainty available in the APPA-REAL dataset. Each model outputs both the predicted apparent age and the amount of aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. Our results confirm the hypothesis that the inherent aleatoric uncertainty remains stable across dataset sizes, while epistemic uncertainty increases as training data decreases.
