Beyond serving as a pedagogical instrument that demystifies forward/backward propagation, gradient dynamics, and optimization landscapes, the framework demonstrates robust performance when applied to a multi-class classification task, successfully validating its correctness, numerical stability, and generalization across varied configurations. The extensible design and clean modularity further position it as a reliable baseline for educational purposes and future research exploration.

AI.tldr: 本文从头实现了一个不依赖自动微分或深度学习库的神经网络框架，包含多层架构、多种激活函数、正则化技术和优化器，在多分类任务上验证了其正确性、数值稳定性和泛化能力，旨在作为教学工具弥合实践与理论理解之间的鸿沟。
AI.motivation: 高端深度学习库的广泛使用在加速模型开发的同时，越来越抽象化神经网络的内部机制，造成了实践使用与基础理解之间的鸿沟。本文旨在通过从零实现的框架来弥补这一差距。
AI.method: 构建了一个完全自包含的神经网络框架，不依赖自动微分或预构建的深度学习模块，实现了多层架构、多种激活函数、正则化技术以及最先进的优化器。采用模块化设计，保证代码的清洁和可扩展性。
AI.result: 在多类分类任务上表现出稳健的性能，成功验证了其正确性、数值稳定性和在不同配置下的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架不仅作为教学工具揭示了前向/反向传播、梯度动力学和优化景观等核心概念，其可扩展设计和模块化特性也使其成为教学目的和未来研究探索的可靠基线。

title: Toward Anthropomorphic Dialogue: A Closed-Loop Framework for Human-Like Chat Generation, Evaluation, and Preference Alignment
summary: Human-like private chat requires more than fluent response generation: a system must preserve persona, relationship, memory, bounded knowledge, medium-specific timing, and a coherent multi-turn arc. We present AnthroDial, a closed-loop framework that formulates anthropomorphic dialogue as a joint problem of system architecture, executable evaluation, and diagnostic alignment. It combines (1) a role-conditioned scheduled dialogue runtime with persona and scenario cards, long-term memory, virtual time, and single-draft message decisions; (2) an executable benchmark with an L0 validity gate, five per-turn dimensions, and five dialogue-level dimensions; and (3) a post-training pipeline that filters 16,436 scheduled-decision examples for SFT and applies GRPO with a cognitive-diagnostic, ZPD-aware reward. The reward maintains Kalman-filtered capability estimates for each behavioral dimension, upweights dimensions with larger capability deficits, and uses rollout scores as task-level ZPD matches to focus optimization on learnable weak skills. On a benchmark with 55 personas, 50 scenarios, 50 persona-scenario bindings, and 100 role-conditioned cases per model, we evaluate 16 systems spanning frontier baselines, open models, thinking/no-think variants, and SFT/RL ablations. The strongest non-trained baseline reaches 32.00% strict ACC, while Qwen3.6-27B-SFT+RL reaches 39.00% strict ACC and a 98.5 overall score. In the 9B no-think setting, SFT and RL improve strict ACC from 0.00% to 13.00% and 18.37%. These results show that anthropomorphic dialogue benefits when generation, evaluation, and reward shaping share the same behavioral dimensions.

AI.tldr: 提出AnthroDial框架，通过联合系统架构、可执行评估和诊断对齐解决拟人化对话问题，在55个人设、50个场景的基准测试中，Qwen3.6-27B-SFT+RL达到39.00%严格准确率和98.5总分。
AI.motivation: 现有对话系统仅关注流畅回复生成，缺乏对人设、关系、记忆、知识边界、媒介特定时序和多轮连贯弧线的综合建模，无法实现类似人类的私人聊天。
AI.method: 提出AnthroDial闭环框架：(1)角色条件调度的对话运行时，包含人设/场景卡、长时记忆、虚拟时间和单稿消息决策；(2)可执行基准，含L0有效性门控、5个逐轮维度和5个对话级维度；(3)后训练流水线：16,436个调度决策示例过滤用于SFT，结合GRPO与认知诊断、ZPD感知奖励，使用卡尔曼滤波估计各行为维度能力并动态调整权重。
AI.result: 在55个人设、50个场景、50个人设-场景绑定、每个模型100个角色条件案例的基准上评估16个系统。最强非训练基线严格ACC为32.00%，Qwen3.6-27B-SFT+RL达39.00%严格ACC和98.5总分。9B无思考设定下，SFT和RL分别将严格ACC从0.00%提升至13.00%和18.37%。
AI.conclusion: 拟人化对话在生成、评估和奖励塑造共享相同行为维度时效果最优。

title: CNS-Edit++: Category-Agnostic 3D Editing with Coupled Neural Shape Representation
summary: This paper presents a latent-space 3D shape editing framework built upon a coupled neural shape (CNS) representation and a neural feature volume optimization. This work extends CNS-Edit, built on Coupled Neural Shape optimization, to CNS-Edit++, by generalizing the category-specific coupled representation to category-agnostic 3D shape editing with foundation models. The Coupled Neural Shape (CNS) representation couples a global latent code that captures high-level shape semantics with a 3D neural feature volume that provides spatial context for local shape manipulation. Then we formulate a coupled neural shape optimization procedure that co-optimizes these two components subject to a given editing operation. Our framework can be instantiated on both the category-specific 3D inversion model and category-agnostic 3D foundation models. We provide various shape editing operators, including copy, resize, delete, mix, point-wise drag, and region-wise drag, each of which is formulated as an objective to guide the CNS optimization. To preserve regions outside the editing area, we further introduce two complementary region-wise control mechanisms, i.e., KV-cache replacement and latent feature regularization. Extensive quantitative and qualitative evaluations across different 3D generative models demonstrate the strong capabilities of our approach over state-of-the-art solutions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CNS-Edit++框架，基于耦合神经形状（CNS）表示和神经特征体积优化，将类别特定的3D形状编辑扩展到类别无关的编辑，支持复制、调整大小、删除、混合、点拖拽和区域拖拽等多种编辑操作，并引入KV-cache替换和潜在特征正则化两种区域控制机制。
AI.motivation: 将3D形状编辑从类别特定扩展到类别无关，使其能够应用于更通用的3D基础模型，从而实现更灵活、泛化能力更强的形状编辑。
AI.method: 提出耦合神经形状（CNS）表示，耦合全局潜在编码（捕捉高层语义）与3D神经特征体积（提供局部操作空间上下文）；设计CNS优化过程，共同优化这两个组件以响应编辑操作；引入KV-cache替换和潜在特征正则化两种互补的区域控制机制以保护编辑区域外内容。
AI.result: 在多种3D生成模型上的定量和定性评估表明，该方法显著优于现有最优解决方案。
AI.conclusion: CNS-Edit++通过将类别特定的耦合表示泛化为类别无关框架，结合多种编辑算子和区域控制机制，实现了强大的3D形状编辑能力。

title: MEVION: Low-Cost Open-Source Data Collection System for Powerful and High-Speed Dual-Arm Manipulation
comment: Accepted to IEEE Robotics and Automation Practice, website: https://haraduka.github.io/mevion-hardware/
summary: The global competition for developing robotic foundation models is intensifying. Among the data collection systems used for dual-arm robots, ALOHA is representative of being low-cost and open-source, and is widely adopted by researchers as a de facto standard. However, due to its limited ability to generate high forces and speeds, it is difficult to handle heavy objects or perform fast manipulations. To address this, we developed MEVION, a low-cost and open-source dual-arm robot data collection system capable of generating greater force and speed. All parts of this robot can be sourced through e-commerce, and by extensively utilizing sheet metal welding, its large body structure is constructed with a small number of components at low cost, while also simplifying assembly. MEVION is equipped with four 6-DoF arms with parallel grippers. Each arm weighs 7.0 kg and has a maximum torque of 60 Nm, and the entire system can be constructed for about USD 14,000. The elbow joint adopts a closed-link mechanism similar to those used in quadruped robots, which reduces the distal mass and enables higher force and speed output at the end-effector. We demonstrate that MEVION enables data collection for object manipulation tasks not previously possible and supports imitation learning-based motion generation. All hardware and software of this work are included in the Supplementary Materials or https://github.com/haraduka/mevion.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了MEVION，一种低成本、开源的双臂机器人数据采集系统，通过广泛使用钣金焊接和四足机器人常用的闭链肘关节机构，在约14,000美元的成本下实现了单臂7.0kg重量、60Nm最大扭矩的性能，能够处理重物和高速操作任务，并支持基于模仿学习的运动生成。
AI.motivation: 现有ALOHA等低成本开源双臂机器人数据采集系统在产生高力和高速度方面能力有限，难以处理重物或执行快速操作，制约了机器人基础模型的开发。
AI.method: 采用钣金焊接工艺构建大型主体结构以减少零件数量和成本并简化装配；肘关节采用四足机器人中常用的闭链连杆机构以降低远端质量并提高末端执行器的力和速度输出；系统由4个配备平行夹爪的6自由度机械臂组成，所有部件均可通过电商采购。
AI.result: MEVION单臂重量7.0kg，最大扭矩60Nm，整套系统构建成本约14,000美元；能够实现以往不可能的目标操作任务数据采集，并支持基于模仿学习的运动生成。
AI.conclusion: MEVION成功在低成本前提下突破了双臂机器人数据采集系统的力和速度瓶颈，为机器人基础模型研究提供了更强大的数据采集平台；所有硬件和软件均已开源在GitHub上。

title: Effects of width-dependent model hyperparameters and $\ell_2$-regularization on the loss landscape of two-layer ReLU networks
comment: ICML2026 4th Workshop on High-dimensional Learning Dynamics (HiLD)
summary: Understanding deep neural networks remains a central challenge in machine learning. In particular, the theoretical properties of even two-layer ReLU networks, especially in the presence of weight decay, remain poorly understood. To this end, we derive a sufficient condition on the hyperparameter settings under which the global minima collapse to the zero solution. Interestingly, our experiments reveal that using AdamW as an optimizer prevents the collapse of the learned parameters, whereas using SGD does not, which may help explain the success of AdamW in deep learning training. In addition, when restricting the input dimension to one, we derive an analytical solution for the globally optimal parameter sets of two-layer ReLU networks and show that $\ell_2$-regularization has a width-invariant effect on connectivity, but its dimensionality-reducing effect becomes stronger as the network width increases. These results provide insight into how width-dependent hyperparameters influence the geometry of regularized loss landscapes.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了两层ReLU网络在权重衰减下的全局最小值坍塌到零解的条件，发现AdamW优化器能防止参数坍塌而SGD不能，并推导了一维输入下的全局最优解析解，揭示了ℓ2正则化在不同宽度下的维度缩减效应。
AI.motivation: 理解深度神经网络的理论性质仍是机器学习核心挑战，尤其是两层ReLU网络在权重衰减下的特性尚不清楚。
AI.method: 推导超参数充分条件导致全局最小值坍塌到零解；通过实验对比AdamW与SGD优化器；在输入维度为一时推导全局最优参数集的解析解。
AI.result: AdamW可防止参数坍塌而SGD不能；ℓ2正则化的连通性效应与宽度无关，但其维度缩减效应随网络宽度增加而增强。
AI.conclusion: 宽度相关的超参数影响正则化损失景观的几何结构，为AdamW在深度学习训练中的成功提供了解释。

title: A Systematic Evaluation of Trajectory Data Curation for LoRA Fine-Tuning of Code Agents
comment: 12 pages, 2 figures. Author's accepted manuscript of a paper published in the ICIC 2026 proceedings (oral presentation)
summary: Supervised fine-tuning (SFT) of open-weight LLMs on expert agent trajectories has emerged as a prominent approach to building capable code agents without reliance on proprietary models. A central yet underexplored question is how trajectory quality and quantity jointly shape model performance. We present a systematic empirical study of trajectory data filtering for LoRA fine-tuning of Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct on the SWE-trajectory dataset (67,074 trajectories, of which 32,161 are resolved). We propose a two-axis quality scoring framework -- Efficiency and Style -- and evaluate it through 16 controlled experiments spanning strategy, scale, and ablation analyses. Since 7B-scale models attain near-zero SWE-bench resolve rates, we adopt cross-entropy (CE) loss on held-out trajectories as the primary metric, validated via first-action generation: CE loss and ROUGE-L are perfectly rank-correlated (Spearman $ρ$ = -1.00), with limited-sample evidence supporting but not conclusively establishing this proxy. Our results reveal a scale-dependent quality-quantity trade-off: at small scales, doubling the dataset (500 to 1,000) yields ~12.7% CE-loss reduction whereas the TopQ-Random gap stays <1% (Mann-Whitney p > 0.10); at 2,000 trajectories this same gap widens to 3.6% (p = 0.016). Ablation further identifies error-retry rate as the dominant sub-dimension, performing comparably to the full composite ($Δ$ < 0.2%). Together, these findings establish trajectory-level quality scoring as a viable but scale-sensitive lever for code-agent SFT and offer a proxy-validated evaluation protocol for the regime where end-to-end resolve rate is statistically infeasible.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了代码智能体SFT中轨迹数据质量与数量的权衡，提出Efficiency-Style二维质量评分框架，发现质量过滤效果存在规模依赖性：小规模时数量增益主导，大规模时质量过滤效果显著；并验证了CE损失作为7B模型端到端评估代理指标的可行性。
AI.motivation: 揭示轨迹数据质量与数量在代码智能体SFT中如何共同影响模型性能，填补该领域对轨迹过滤策略缺乏系统理解的空白。
AI.method: 基于SWE-trajectory数据集（67,074条轨迹），提出Efficiency与Style两轴质量评分框架，通过16组控制实验（涵盖策略、规模、消融分析）进行系统评估；采用交叉熵损失作为主要评估指标，并通过首动作生成任务验证其与ROUGE-L的完美秩相关。
AI.result: 质量过滤效果呈规模依赖性：500→1000轨迹时数量增益（CE损失降~12.7%）远大于质量过滤（TopQ-Random差距<1%）；2000轨迹时质量过滤效果显著（差距3.6%，p=0.016）。消融实验表明error-retry率是主导子维度，与完整复合指标效果相当（Δ<0.2%）。
AI.conclusion: 轨迹级质量评分是可行但规模敏感的控制杠杆；CE损失可作为7B模型端到端评估的代理指标；提出了在端到端解决率统计不可行场景下的代理验证评估协议。

title: Digital measurement of droplet flame diameter in microgravity combustion images using Segment Anything Model 2 with automatic prompt selection
summary:
Flame diameter is a key measurable parameter in microgravity droplet combustion, but its extraction from self-illuminated frames remains difficult because soot tails, blurred luminous boundaries, chamber reflections, and droplet drift introduce substantial measurement bias and operator dependence. This work presents an AI-enabled digital measurement workflow for automated flame diameter from combustion images. The workflow integrates automatic prompt-point generation into Segment Anything Model 2, employing Random Sample Consensus (RANSAC)-based circle fitting. The automatic prompt strategy removes subjective manual point selection, while the video memory mechanism maintains temporal consistency for drifting droplets, and the RANSAC fitting rejects soot-tail pixels as geometric outliers.
  The method is validated by 19,537 flame images of n-heptane, n-decane, and n-octane droplets with varying initial diameters. Compared with manual-reference measurements, the proposed workflow achieves a mean relative agreement of 96.9%, a mean absolute percentage error of 3.1%, and substantially outperforms conventional Hough circle detection, which performed worse under the same evaluation conditions. The results also show that the measurement accuracy improves with increasing droplet size. The proposed workflow has a combined standard uncertainty of 8.54% and achieves approximately a 229-fold improvement in efficiency over manual measurement.
  These results demonstrate that the proposed SAM2-based workflow provides a reproducible, fully automated, and metrologically characterized digital measurement system for extracting flame diameter from challenging combustion images. The approach supports high-throughput combustion diagnostics and illustrates that AI-based segmentation can be integrated into quantitative measurement workflows for digitalized image-based metrology.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于SAM2（Segment Anything Model 2）的AI驱动自动化火焰直径数字测量流程，通过自动提示点生成、RANSAC圆拟合和视频记忆机制，在19,537张微重力液滴燃烧图像上实现了96.9%的平均相对一致性和3.1%的平均绝对百分比误差，相比传统Hough检测方法显著提升，且效率提高约229倍。
AI.motivation: 微重力液滴燃烧中火焰直径的提取面临碳烟尾迹、模糊发光边界、腔室反射和液滴漂移等挑战，传统手动测量存在较大偏差和操作者依赖性，亟需一种可重复、完全自动化的数字测量方法。
AI.method: 将自动提示点生成集成到SAM2中，结合基于RANSAC的圆拟合：自动提示策略消除主观选取，视频记忆机制保持漂移液滴的时间一致性，RANSAC拟合将碳烟尾迹像素视为几何异常值予以剔除。
AI.result: 在19,537张正庚烷、正癸烷和正辛烷液滴图像上验证：平均相对一致性96.9%，MAPE 3.1%，显著优于传统Hough圆检测；组合标准不确定度8.54%，效率提升约229倍；测量精度随液滴尺寸增大而提高。
AI.conclusion: 该SAM2工作流为挑战性燃烧图像中的火焰直径提取提供了可重复、全自动且具有计量学表征的数字测量系统，支持高通量燃烧诊断，证明了AI分割可集成到定量测量流程中，用于数字化图像计量。

title: RynnBrain 1.1: Towards More Capable and Generalizable Embodied Foundation Model
comment: KL,BH,MZ,TZ,ZC,ZW,SL,XL,XL,BY,MZ,JL,RD contribute equally. Project Lead: Kehan Li and Xin Li project: https://alibaba-damo-academy.github.io/RynnBrain github: https://github.com/alibaba-damo-academy/RynnBrain huggingface: https://huggingface.co/collections/Alibaba-DAMO-Academy/rynnbrain-11 modelscope: https://modelscope.cn/collections/DAMO_Academy/RynnBrain-11
summary: We present RynnBrain 1.1, a family of embodied foundation models spanning 2B, 9B, and 122B-A10B scales. Trained with a unified spatio-temporal and physically grounded framework, RynnBrain 1.1 supports embodied perception, spatial reasoning, localization, and planning. Compared with RynnBrain 1.0, it further introduces contact-point prediction across the model family and native 3D grounding for the 2B and 9B models, yielding representations and outputs that are more directly aligned with robot manipulation. We also develop RynnBrain-VLA with a unified cross-embodiment action space and embodiment-specific masking, and deploy it on Unitree G1, Astribot-S1, and Tianji-Wuji. RynnBrain 1.1 achieves strong results on embodied cognition, localization, and 3D grounding, with the 122B-A10B model outperforming all evaluated proprietary and open-source models on VSI-Bench, MMSI, and RefSpatial-Bench. Real-robot experiments show that RynnBrain-initialized policies outperform Qwen-based and representative generalist VLAs, while joint multi-task and multi-embodiment training improves process scores and success rates over per-task training.

AI.tldr: RynnBrain 1.1 是一个涵盖2B、9B和122B-A10B参数规模的具身基础模型家族，通过统一的时空与物理基础框架训练，支持具身感知、空间推理、定位与规划。相比1.0版本，新增了接触点预测和原生3D定位能力，并开发了具备统一跨具身动作空间和具身特定掩码的RynnBrain-VLA，在多个真实机器人平台上部署。该模型在具身认知、定位和3D定位任务上表现优异，122B-A10B模型在所有评估的专有和开源模型中表现最佳。真实机器人实验表明，RynnBrain初始化的策略优于Qwen-based和代表性通用VLA，联合多任务和多具身训练相比单任务训练提升了过程分数和成功率。
AI.motivation: 现有具身基础模型在3D定位、接触点预测以及跨具身泛化能力上存在不足，RynnBrain 1.0在真实机器人部署中的表现仍有提升空间。研究者希望构建一个更强大的具身基础模型家族，通过统一的时空物理框架和新增的接触点预测、原生3D定位能力，使模型输出与机器人操作更直接对齐，并开发统一的跨具身动作空间以支持多种机器人平台的部署。
AI.method: 1) 构建统一时空与物理基础的训练框架；2) 在2B/9B模型中引入原生3D定位能力，全模型家族新增接触点预测；3) 开发RynnBrain-VLA，设计统一跨具身动作空间和具身特定掩码；4) 在Unitree G1、Astribot-S1、Tianji-Wuji等具身平台上进行真实机器人实验。
AI.result: 122B-A10B模型在VSI-Bench、MMSI、RefSpatial-Bench上超越所有评估的专有和开源模型。真实机器人实验中，RynnBrain初始化的策略优于Qwen-based和代表性通用VLA；联合多任务多具身训练相比单任务训练提升了过程分数和成功率。
AI.conclusion: 统一时空与物理基础的框架结合接触点预测和3D定位能有效提升具身基础模型的感知与操作能力，跨具身多任务联合训练策略对真实机器人部署有显著增益。

title: Half the Experts, All the Code: One-Shot Domain Pruning of Mixture-of-Experts LLMs for Coding
comment: 15 pages, 3 figures. Code and pruned checkpoints: github.com/anik-jha/moep
summary: The strongest open-weight coding models are mixture-of-experts (MoE) networks: most of their size comes from large pools of "expert" subnetworks, of which only a few act on any token. That pool is why these models do not fit on the machines most developers own, yet for a user who only wants coding help, most experts encode abilities that will never be invoked. We ask how many experts can be removed, and which, by pruning two recent open-weight MoE models from different families (Qwen3.6-35B-A3B and Gemma-4-26B-A4B) under five selection strategies, judged the way a user would: by whether the model still writes correct code. Half the experts can be removed from either model with no statistically detectable loss on the primary code benchmark, and the damage lands almost entirely on abilities outside coding, the intended trade. But the winning strategy flips between the two models, so a recipe validated on one family cannot be assumed to work on another. We further show that perplexity, the metric much of the pruning literature leans on, can rate a broken model above an intact one; that a lightweight fine-tune recovers about half of what aggressive pruning loses; and that against quantizing the full model to the same memory, pruning wins only where quantization would have to drop below 3 bits per weight. Five attempts to overturn that crossover, with failure criteria fixed in advance (better calibration, guarded selection, causal expert importance, failure attribution, and an agentic evaluation letting each model repair its failures from execution feedback), all leave it standing; the last shows single-shot benchmarks overstate compression penalties broadly, as one repair turn erases the 2-bit quantization penalty entirely. Expert pruning works, but it demands per-model validation on the task the model will actually serve.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了从MoE编码模型中移除专家子网络的效果，发现可安全移除半数专家而不显著影响编码能力，但最佳剪枝策略因模型而异，且困惑度作为评估指标可能失效。
AI.motivation: MoE编码模型虽强大但因专家池庞大导致部署困难，而大多数用户仅需编码能力，大量专家能力从未被调用。作者试图探究能否通过剪枝移除冗余专家以减小模型体积，同时保持编码性能。
AI.method: 对Qwen3.6-35B-A3B和Gemma-4-26B-A4B两种MoE模型，采用五种选择策略进行专家剪枝，以代码正确性作为用户导向的评估指标，并对比了困惑度指标的有效性、轻量微调恢复效果、与量化方法的优劣比较。
AI.result: 半数专家可移除而不显著损失编码性能；最佳策略在模型间不一致；困惑度可能将损坏模型评为优于完整模型；轻量微调可恢复约半数损失；剪枝仅在量化需低于3比特/权重时优于量化；五次尝试推翻该结论均失败。
AI.conclusion: 专家剪枝可行但需针对具体模型和任务进行验证，不能跨模型泛化；单次基准测试会高估压缩惩罚，修复回合可完全消除2比特量化的性能损失。

title: Constrained Path Reasoning: Measuring When Committed Stages Earn Their Cost
summary: When does a committed intermediate stage in an LLM reasoning pipeline earn its cost? Constrained Path Reasoning (CPR) pairs a source-aware path hypothesis with stage-level accounting. Search generates provisional states; trusted or validated invariants can constrain hard, while other proposals remain soft and revisable. CPR predicts that task-compatible commitments can factor transitions, concentrate candidate mass, induce regularity, and expose feedback when their gains exceed propagated error and execution cost. The formalism covers discrete commitments and continuous flows and measures effective branching, endpoint concentration, and cost per usable output. Across 1,180 generated QCQPs and 40 engineered degenerate polynomial instances (2,140 endpoints), residual triage recovers 63.0% of repair-all's additional feasible yield with 17.7% of its attempts. Fixed-LLM accounting (270 unique calls shared across nested arms) finds usable yield of 41.1% direct, 90.0% after formalization and deterministic execution, 20.0% after one-shot convexification, and 21.1% for the full path. In 120 paired-condition calls, a two-action rollback rule reaches 90% usable yield versus 36.7% for the feedback-conditioned selector. Two endpoint probes separate source from validation: a 72-output cross-trajectory transplant reduces entropy and acceptable mass; a 24-output same-call self-proposal pilot gives unchanged two-repeat collision entropy, 25.0% versus 8.3% usable yield, and 1/8 deterministically confirmed endpoint checks. Model-generated states supply hypotheses; trusted execution earns constraint strength.

AI.tldr: CPR框架通过将源感知路径假设与阶段级核算相结合，在LLM推理中引入受约束路径推理，利用可信不变约束降低搜索代价，实验表明该框架在端点回收率、可用产出率等方面显著优于基线方法。
AI.motivation: 研究LLM推理流水线中承诺中间阶段的成本效益问题，探索如何在推理过程中有效引入约束以降低搜索代价、提高输出质量。
AI.method: 提出CPR框架，包含源感知路径假设与阶段级核算；搜索生成临时状态，使用可信或验证过的不变量进行硬约束，其他提议保持软可修正；形式化涵盖离散承诺与连续流，测量有效分支、端点集中度和每可用产出成本。
AI.result: 在1,180个生成的QCQP和40个人工退化多项式实例（2,140个端点）上，残差分诊以17.7%的尝试恢复63.0%的额外可行产出；固定LLM核算（270个唯一调用）显示可用产出率：直接41.1%、形式化+确定性执行后90.0%、一次性凸化后20.0%、全路径21.1%；两动作回滚规则达90%可用产出率，优于反馈条件选择器的36.7%；72输出跨轨迹移植降低熵和可接受质量；24输出自提议试验显示两重复碰撞熵不变，可用产出率25.0% vs 8.3%。
AI.conclusion: 模型生成的状态提供假设，可信执行赋予约束强度。CPR框架通过阶段级承诺与约束验证有效提升了LLM推理的可靠性与效率。

title: PAVXploreRL: Physical-Action-Visual World Model Reinforcement Learning with Action Exploration
summary: Action-conditioned world models are a key component of embodied AI, serving as scalable policy evaluators that reduce reliance on expensive real-world rollouts. To accurately capture diverse action-induced dynamics, such models should satisfy three key objectives-Physical Plausibility (P), Action Adherence (A), and Visual Fidelity (V), collectively referred to as PAV-while remaining robust to both in-distribution (ID) expert demonstrations and out-of-distribution (OOD) actions. However, existing methods primarily rely on ID action-video pairs and pixel-level reconstruction losses, which do not explicitly optimize PAV objectives and generalize poorly beyond expert data. To address this, we propose PAVXploreRL, a reinforcement learning framework built on a pretrained latent world model that explicitly optimizes PAV objectives through reward-driven training. To improve action generalization, our method jointly leverages ID trajectories and noise-driven OOD action exploration, without paired video supervision. Experiments show that PAVXploreRL consistently outperforms pretrained baselines, achieving a 5.6% average gain across benchmarks and producing higher-quality PAV properties. As a policy evaluator, it also yields more reliable performance estimates and reduces the overestimation bias of prior expert-only world models such as Ctrl-World. Code: https://github.com/Social-AI-Studio/PAVXploreRL

AI.tldr: 提出PAVXploreRL框架，通过强化学习优化世界模型的物理合理性、动作遵循性和视觉保真度（PAV三目标），并结合分布内轨迹与OOD噪声探索提升动作泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有世界模型主要依赖分布内动作-视频对和像素级重建损失，未能显式优化PAV目标，且在专家数据之外的动作上泛化能力差。
AI.method: 基于预训练潜在世界模型构建强化学习框架，通过奖励驱动训练显式优化PAV三目标；联合利用ID轨迹和噪声驱动的OOD动作探索，无需成对视频监督。
AI.result: 在多个基准上平均提升5.6%，生成更高质量的PAV属性；作为策略评估器时提供更可靠的性能估计，减少了先前仅使用专家数据的Ctrl-World等模型的过估计偏差。
AI.conclusion: PAVXploreRL通过显式优化PAV目标并结合OOD探索，有效提升了世界模型的动作泛化能力和评估可靠性。

title: Distilling Global Traversability Priors for Image-based Affordance Prediction in Off-road Environments
summary: Standard methods for autonomous navigation in unstructured terrain are prone to myopic behaviors in long-horizon scenarios. The use of metric maps built from LiDAR or cameras provides necessary local geometry and semantic information but is strictly limited by depth sensing range. By discarding data beyond the mapping horizon robots suffer from suboptimal, short-sighted decisions. To recover this lost information, we focus on extracting long-range traversability-aware frontiers directly from first-person-view (FPV) images. By leveraging satellite imagery, we compute the set of feasible navigation paths for a dataset of image/pose pairs and use them to supervise our network, reducing the need for extensive human demonstration data. We demonstrate that this approach improves performance in long-range off-road navigation over existing methods by more than 10% in various offline benchmarks and reduces the number of human interventions incurred in a set of real-world experiments. More details can be found at https://theairlab.org/ss_frontiers_iros .

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从第一人称视角图像中提取远程可通行性前沿的方法，利用卫星图像监督网络训练，以减少对大量人工标注数据的依赖，并在长距离越野导航任务中相比现有方法提升超过10%的性能，同时减少实际实验中的人工干预次数。
AI.motivation: 现有自主导航方法在长距离场景中存在短视行为，因为度量地图（基于LiDAR或相机）受限于深度感知范围，丢弃了超出测绘范围的数据，导致次优的短视决策。亟需从第一人称视角图像中恢复这些丢失的远程信息。
AI.method: 从第一人称视角（FPV）图像中提取远程可通行性前沿；利用卫星图像计算可行导航路径的图像/位姿对数据集，用于监督网络训练，从而减少对人工演示数据的依赖。
AI.result: 在多种离线基准测试中，该方法相比现有方法在长距离越野导航上提升超过10%；在真实世界实验中，减少了人工干预的次数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效恢复了传统度量地图丢失的远程信息，改善了长距离越野导航的性能，并降低了对人工标注数据的依赖。

title: Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System: A Multi-view Framework
summary: The Broad Learning System (BLS) has been widely used for data classification and is based on a layer-by-layer feed-forward structure. However, it gives the same importance to all data points, which reduces its effectiveness on real-world datasets with noise and outliers. In addition, it does not consider the geometric structure of the data and has limitations in handling data from multiple sources. To address these challenges, we propose a Multi-View Graph-Embedded Intuitionistic Fuzzy Broad Learning System (MVGIFBLS) that integrates multi-view learning, graph embedding, and intuitionistic fuzzy theory into the BLS framework. This design enables the model to combine information from multiple sources and learn more discriminative representations. Graph embedding captures the geometric relationships among samples and improves class separation through intrinsic and penalty subspaces based on local Fisher discriminant analysis. Intuitionistic fuzzy theory enhances robustness to noise, while kernel-based neighborhood analysis captures local data structures. We evaluate the proposed framework on several UCI, KEEL, and AwA benchmark datasets using comparative evaluation, Gaussian feature noise analysis, ablation studies, and statistical analysis. The results demonstrate that each component contributes positively to the overall framework and that the proposed MVGIFBLS consistently achieves higher Area Under the Curve (AUC) scores and maintains robust performance under Gaussian feature noise.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种多视图图嵌入直觉模糊宽度学习系统(MVGIFBLS)，通过融合多视图学习、图嵌入和直觉模糊理论，增强BLS对噪声和离群点的鲁棒性，并在多个基准数据集上取得了更优的AUC分数。
AI.motivation: 传统BLS对所有数据点赋予相同重要性，未考虑几何结构，且难以处理多源数据，导致在含噪声和离群点的真实数据集上效果不佳。
AI.method: 将多视图学习、图嵌入（基于局部Fisher判别分析的内蕴子空间和惩罚子空间）和直觉模糊理论集成到BLS框架中，利用核邻域分析捕获局部数据结构。
AI.result: 在UCI、KEEL和AwA基准数据集上，MVGIFBLS在AUC分数上持续优于对比方法，且在高斯特征噪声下保持鲁棒性能。
AI.conclusion: 各组件对整体框架均有正向贡献，MVGIFBLS有效提升了分类性能和噪声鲁棒性。

title: LenGuard-GPC: Length Guarding with Guided-Prompt Consistency for Spatial Reasoning Reinforce Learning
summary: Multi-view spatial reasoning requires vision-language models to compare visual evidence across images, align object correspondences, and infer spatial relations over long visual contexts, a setting where chain-of-thought reasoning tends to grow verbose without becoming more accurate. Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards is a natural fit for this task, but standard GRPO reward relies on sparse outcome-level feedback and gives no signal about where a reasoning trajectory goes wrong, nor any control over its length. We propose LenGuard-GPC, a dense reward framework that addresses both problems together. For each sampled trajectory, it compares the token-wise predictive distributions under a standard prompt and a guided prompt, and uses the resulting token-sum KL divergence as a dense reward signal. Since this KL penalty accumulates over tokens and would otherwise reward shorter responses regardless of their quality, we introduce a staged length bonus that keeps reasoning length within a controlled range without simply encouraging brevity. On six multi-view spatial reasoning benchmarks, LenGuard-GPC improves accuracy over vanilla GRPO while reducing average response length.

AI.tldr: 提出LenGuard-GPC框架，通过密集奖励（基于KL散度的令牌级反馈）和分阶段长度奖励机制，在保持推理质量的前提下提升多视图空间推理的准确率并缩短响应长度。
AI.motivation: 标准的GRPO奖励只提供稀疏的结果级反馈，无法定位推理轨迹中的错误位置，也无法控制推理长度；而CoT在多视图空间推理中会变得冗长却未必更准确。
AI.method: 对每个采样的推理轨迹，比较标准提示和引导提示下的令牌级预测分布，用令牌级KL散度作为密集奖励信号；同时引入分阶段长度奖励（staged length bonus）将推理长度控制在合理范围内。
AI.result: 在六个多视图空间推理基准上，LenGuard-GPC相比原始GRPO提升了准确率，同时减少了平均响应长度。
AI.conclusion: LenGuard-GPC通过密集奖励和长度控制机制，有效解决了多视图空间推理中GRPO奖励稀疏和CoT冗长的问题，实现了更高效、更准确的推理。

title: Can Multimodal Large Language Models Understand OCT?
summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) imaging is essential for the diagnosis and treatment of retinal diseases. Although multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have demonstrated considerable potential in medical image analysis, existing benchmarks largely reduce OCT understanding to coarse-grained disease classification or isolated visual question answering, leaving the complete cognitive process from visual perception to clinical reasoning insufficiently evaluated. To address this limitation, we introduce OCT-Bench, a comprehensive benchmark dedicated to OCT image understanding. OCT-Bench comprises 10,076 high-quality multiple-choice questions constructed from 4,137 OCT images across seven public datasets. Following the real-world clinical interpretation workflow, we establish a hierarchical capability taxonomy consisting of 20 fine-grained tasks across three dimensions: Perception, Cognition, and Reasoning. These tasks cover a broad range of capabilities, including imaging attributes, retinal anatomy, lesion characteristics, spatial relationships, disease assessment, therapeutic decision-making, and prognostic management. We systematically evaluate 20 representative MLLMs, including proprietary models, open-source general-purpose models, and medical-domain models. Experimental results demonstrate that current models remain substantially short of reliable OCT understanding. Moreover, neither medical-domain adaptation nor increased model scale consistently improves performance across capability levels. OCT-Bench enables comprehensive and fine-grained evaluation of MLLMs, providing a foundation for identifying capability bottlenecks and advancing clinically grounded OCT understanding.

AI.tldr: OCT-Bench是一个专为OCT图像理解设计的多模态大语言模型基准，包含10,076道多选题，覆盖感知、认知、推理三个维度的20个细粒度任务。对20个代表性模型的评估表明，当前模型在OCT理解上远未达到可靠水平，且医学领域适应或模型规模扩大并不能一致提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有OCT理解基准大多局限于粗粒度疾病分类或孤立的视觉问答，未能完整评估从视觉感知到临床推理的认知过程。为此，作者构建了OCT-Bench以实现对MLLMs在OCT理解上的全面、细粒度评估。
AI.method: 从7个公开数据集的4,137张OCT图像构建10,076道高质量多选题；依据临床解读流程建立包含感知、认知、推理三个维度、20个细粒度任务的分层能力分类体系；系统评估20个代表性MLLMs（包括闭源模型、开源通用模型和医学领域模型）。
AI.result: 当前MLLMs在OCT理解上远未达到可靠水平；医学领域适应和模型规模扩大并不能在各个能力层面一致提升性能。
AI.conclusion: OCT-Bench提供了全面细粒度的MLLM评估框架，有助于识别能力瓶颈并推动临床导向的OCT理解研究。

title: Closing the Loop in Humanoid VLA: Persistent 3D Object Tokens for Verifiable Loco-Manipulation
summary: Vision-language-action policies are a promising foundation for general robot control, but long-horizon humanoid loco-manipulation requires the robot to treat task objects as persistent physical entities across movement, contact, occlusion, and recovery. We study this problem as object-state divergence: the object state used to condition a whole-body action can differ from the state used to decide whether the action achieved the intended physical relation. We propose \emph{Persistent Object Tokenization} (POT), which maintains role-indexed 3D object records from RGB-D observations and converts them into object tokens for a whole-body action expert. Instantiated as \emph{POT-VLA}, the same object records condition action generation and support geometric predicate checks, yielding a closed-loop execution system in which object state is both actionable and verifiable. On a Unitree G1, POT-VLA improves a matched direct GR00T-N1.7 baseline from 39/80 to 71/80 successes over eight real-world task families. In an external Being-0-aligned reference, POT-VLA achieves 44/50 successes on aligned service tasks, compared with the 37/50 success reported by the Being-0 paper. The largest gains occur on tasks requiring maintained 3D relations, suggesting that persistent object-centered state is a useful abstraction for verifiable humanoid VLA execution.

AI.tldr: 提出持久化对象标记化（POT）方法，通过维护3D对象记录并将其转化为对象令牌，让VLA策略在长时域人形机器人操作中实现可验证的闭环执行，在Unitree G1上成功率从48.75%提升至88.75%。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言-动作策略在通用机器人控制中前景广阔，但长时域人形机器人操作要求机器人将任务对象视为跨运动、接触、遮挡和恢复的持久物理实体。现有方法中，用于条件化全身动作的对象状态与用于判断动作是否达到预期物理关系的状态可能存在差异（对象状态发散问题），这限制了长时域任务的可靠性。
AI.method: 提出持久化对象标记化（POT），从RGB-D观测中维护角色索引化的3D对象记录，并将其转换为对象令牌输入全身动作专家。基于此构建POT-VLA，同一对象记录同时条件化动作生成并支持几何谓词检查，形成闭环执行系统，使对象状态既可动作又可验证。
AI.result: 在Unitree G1上，POT-VLA将匹配的GR00T-N1.7基线从39/80提升至71/80（8个真实世界任务族）；在外部Being-0对齐参考中，POT-VLA在服务任务上取得44/50，优于Being-0报告的37/50。最大改进出现在需要维持3D关系的任务上。
AI.conclusion: 持久化对象中心状态是可验证人形VLA执行的有用抽象，特别是在需要维持3D空间关系的长时域任务中效果显著。

title: BG4Sea: Biogeochemical Seasonal Forecastability via Progressive Information Scaling
summary: Marine biogeochemical forecasting is increasingly important for managing marine ecosystems and the carbon cycle, yet global, seasonal forecast products lag far behind physical oceanography, held back by the complexity of the processes involved and by data scarcity. We introduce BG4Sea, which to our knowledge is the first global, data-driven system to produce multivariate seasonal forecasts of the marine biogeochemical state. BG4Sea is a modular architecture with a column autoencoder that compresses the vertical column into a low-dimensional latent space, a latent forecaster propagates this representation forward in time, a surface-forcing conditioner that injects physical boundary information via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), and a horizontal-coupling module that incorporates neighboring-column context through cross-attention. The model is trained and evaluated on the global ocean reanalysis BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES), and produces six-month forecasts at 1/4 degree, monthly resolution for dissolved chemistry, biology, and carbon-pool variables, outperforming persistence and climatology across most variables and lead times. We position BG4Sea as an interpretable baseline for future, more expressive approaches, and discuss predictability attribution to each component, alongside the model's structural limitations.

AI.tldr: BG4Sea是首个全球性、数据驱动的海洋生物地球化学多元季节预报系统，采用模块化架构（列自编码器、潜在预报器、表面强迫调节器和水平耦合模块），在BIORYS4再分析数据上实现6个月、1/4度分辨率的多变量预报，性能优于气候态和持续性预报。
AI.motivation: 海洋生物地球化学的季节预报对海洋生态系统管理和碳循环研究至关重要，但全球性、季节性的预报产品因过程复杂和数据稀缺而远落后于物理海洋学，现有方法缺乏数据驱动的全球多元季节预报系统。
AI.method: BG4Sea采用模块化架构：1）列自编码器将垂直剖面压缩至低维潜空间；2）潜在预报器在潜空间中前向传播时间；3）表面强迫调节器通过FiLM注入物理边界信息；4）水平耦合模块通过交叉注意力融入邻域列上下文。在NEMO/PISCES的BIORYS4全球海洋再分析数据上训练和评估。
AI.result: 在1/4度、月分辨率下生成6个月预报，涵盖溶解化学、生物学和碳库变量，在大多数变量和预报时效上优于持续性预报和气候态基准。
AI.conclusion: BG4Sea作为可解释的基线模型，为未来更复杂的生物地球化学季节预报方法提供了基础和评估框架，同时讨论了各组件的可预测性归因和模型的结构性局限。

title: Coordinated Disentanglement with Iterative Mode Discovery Under Hidden Correlations
summary: Disentangled representation learning is a powerful paradigm for robust attribute prediction. While recent methods address attribute correlations, hidden correlations remain underexplored, where data under the value of a certain attribute exhibit underlying modes correlated with other attributes. To preserve mode information and achieve disentanglement, we jointly discover modes and enforce mode-based conditional independence. Yet, the interdependency between these two modules may lead to error amplification under naive iterations. We propose Coordinated Disentanglement with Iterative mode Discovery (CoDID), an end-to-end framework featuring a dynamic architecture that adapts to evolving number of modes, and a coordination mechanism that mitigates error amplification via meta-optimization. Empirical results demonstrate the state-of-the-art performance on diverse tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoDID框架，通过联合发现模式并强制基于模式的条件独立性来实现解耦表示学习，采用动态架构适应模式数量变化，并通过元优化协调机制减轻误差放大，在多个任务上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有解耦表示学习方法虽然处理了属性间的显式相关性，但忽略了隐藏在特定属性值下的潜在模式（modes）与其他属性之间的相关性，导致解耦不彻底。
AI.method: 提出CoDID框架：（1）动态架构自适应发现并演化模式数量；（2）基于模式的条件独立性约束实现解耦；（3）元优化协调机制缓解模式发现与解耦约束之间的相互依赖导致的误差放大问题。
AI.result: 在多种任务上达到了最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合模式发现与条件独立性约束，并引入协调机制，有效解决了隐藏相关性下的解耦表示学习问题。

title: SPARE-GS: Structural Parsimony and Resource Efficiency for 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieves high-fidelity novel view synthesis in real-time; however its training efficiency and representation compactness are hindered by excessive primitive proliferation. To address this challenge, we formulate the structural evolution of 3DGS as a global budget-constrained optimization problem and derive an optimality condition, which requires the marginal utility of structural resources to be balanced across spatial regions under a finite primitive budget. Based on this formulation, we propose SPARE-GS, a general plug-and-play framework that dynamically aligns the distribution of 3D Gaussian primitives with regional representational demand. SPARE-GS estimates capacity-normalized regional demand, assigns adaptive target quotas, and uses regional budget deviations to coordinate densification, pruning and adaptive termination toward a more balanced structural allocation. Extensive experiments across standard, accelerated, and structure-enhanced 3DGS pipelines demonstrate that SPARE-GS reduces the Gaussian count and training time by an average of 30.38% and 23.81%, respectively, while improving the average PSNR. Moreover, the resulting compact representations reduce downstream processing time and improve the rate-distortion performance of diverse compression and pruning methods, demonstrating the broad applicability of global structural budget regulation.

AI.tldr: SPARE-GS通过全局预算约束优化框架动态平衡3D高斯原语的空间分布，在减少30.38%高斯数量和23.81%训练时间的同时提升PSNR，并兼容多种3DGS管线。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在高效实时新视角合成中因原语过度增殖导致训练效率低和表示紧凑性差，现有方法缺乏对结构演化的全局资源约束。
AI.method: 将3DGS结构演化建模为全局预算约束优化问题，推导最优性条件（边际效用平衡）；提出SPARE-GS框架，通过估计容量归一化的区域需求、分配自适应目标配额、利用区域预算偏差协调密集化/剪枝/自适应终止。
AI.result: 在标准、加速和结构增强三种3DGS管线上，高斯数量平均减少30.38%，训练时间减少23.81%，平均PSNR提升；紧凑表示提升下游处理速度及压缩/剪枝方法的率失真性能。
AI.conclusion: 全局结构预算调控是提升3DGS效率与紧凑性的有效范式，SPARE-GS作为即插即用框架具有广泛适用性。

title: RoboHarness: Memory-Driven Orchestration of Heterogeneous Robot Policies for Long-Horizon Planning
summary: Long-horizon robotic tasks require diverse capabilities that no single policy can reliably provide. Heterogeneous policies offer complementary strengths, but orchestrating them requires reasoning over uncertain capability boundaries and cross-policy distribution mismatch, which are largely overlooked by existing planning methods built on homogeneous, predefined skills with fixed applicability. We propose RoboHarness, a unified framework that encapsulates independently developed robot control systems as reusable agentic skills. Although instantiated in this work with VLAs, RL policies, and task-and-motion planning (TAMP) systems, RoboHarness is designed as a general framework compatible with a broader range of robot policies, such as navigation policies, model predictive controllers, and world-action models. RoboHarness uses multi-modal execution memory and online evidence to characterize policy capability boundaries for capability-aware decomposition and routing. To stabilize policy handoffs, its Memory Bridge retrieves execution trajectories associated with the next policy, estimates its in-distribution state region, and guides the robot toward that region without joint policy retraining. Extensive experiments on three public benchmarks, 500 customized tasks, and 135 real-robot experiments demonstrate effective capability-aware routing and stable policy orchestration, yielding substantial improvements in zero-shot long-horizon planning and out-of-distribution robustness.

AI.tldr: RoboHarness是一个统一框架，通过多模态执行记忆和Memory Bridge实现异构机器人策略（VLA、RL、TAMP等）的能力感知分解、路由和稳定交接，在多个基准测试中显著提升了零样本长时域规划能力和分布外鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 长时域机器人任务需要多种能力，但单一策略无法可靠提供。异构策略虽有互补优势，但现有规划方法基于同质化、预定义技能构建，忽视了不确定的能力边界和跨策略分布不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出RoboHarness框架：1) 将独立开发的机器人控制系统封装为可复用的智能体技能；2) 利用多模态执行记忆和在线证据刻画策略能力边界，实现能力感知的任务分解与路由；3) 设计Memory Bridge，检索下一策略的执行轨迹，估计其分布内状态区域，引导机器人到达该区域，无需联合策略重训练。
AI.result: 在三个公开基准、500个定制任务和135个真实机器人实验上，实现了有效的能力感知路由和稳定的策略编排，在零样本长时域规划和分布外鲁棒性上取得显著改进。
AI.conclusion: RoboHarness作为通用框架，兼容VLA、RL、TAMP等多种策略，有效解决了异构策略编排中的能力边界不确定性和分布不匹配问题。

title: The Anatomy of a Truth Direction: Knowledge-Dependent Dimensionality, a Relational Law, and a Convergent Category Geometry in Small Language Models
summary: Bürger et al. (2024) demonstrated that truth representations in large language models are universal across statement polarity but reside within a multidimensional subspace. We extend that framework along three questions: how the dimensionality of the subspace depends on the model's knowledge, which architectural component builds the truth direction, and what the direction is a mixture of. In Part I (one model), a training-free directional probe derived from the SVD of hidden-state minimal pairs shows that the dimensionality of truth is knowledge-dependent: the signal is concentrated on a single axis for behaviorally known facts (held-out AUC 0.938) and becomes diffuse as knowledge decreases or material heterogeneity increases; seven falsification experiments sustain the one-dimensional reading, and the same decomposition recovers the supervised polarity direction of Bürger et al. at cosine 0.959 without polarity labels. In Part II (four base models, two families, pre-registered predictions), a relational law emerges: attention propagates truth frames it did not write, the feed-forward network opposes the frame of its current block, and the genuine post-peak decay is causally attributed on all four models to the SwiGLU value stream; per-category truth axes form a semantically signed arrangement that contradicts the lexical surface and converges across families (Mantel p = 0.0009). Stress tests at three scales (33 categories, 888 pairs per relation, six sampling seeds) expose a sign instability of the per-category orientation, repair it with a declared spectral consensus gauge, and sharpen the convergence into a knowledge-gated law, strengthening from +0.42 on dense mixed-knowledge material to +0.74 on knowledge-restricted categories: the geometry of the mixture belongs to the knowledge domain rather than to the architecture.

AI.tldr: 本文在Bürger等人(2024)发现大语言模型中真理表示具有跨陈述极性的普遍性但位于多维子空间的基础上，进一步探究了真理子空间的维度如何依赖模型知识、哪个架构组件构建了真理方向、以及该方向由什么混合而成。实验表明：真理维度具有知识依赖性——行为已知事实的信号集中在单一轴线上，知识越少或材料异质性越高则信号越分散；注意力层传播真理框架，前馈网络反对当前块的框架，SwiGLU值流是因果归属的真后峰值衰减；按类别划分的真理轴形成语义上有符号排列的结构，该几何混合属于知识域而非架构。
AI.motivation: 在已有研究表明大语言模型中真理表示具有跨极性普遍性但位于多维子空间的基础上，进一步探究三个关键问题：真理子空间的维度如何依赖模型知识、哪个架构组件构建了真理方向、以及真理方向由什么混合而成。
AI.method: 基于SVD对隐藏状态最小对进行无训练方向探测；在4个基础模型（两个系列）上进行预注册预测实验；使用33个类别、每关系888对、6个采样种子的压力测试；采用Mantel检验和频谱共识度量。
AI.result: 真理维度具有知识依赖性：已知事实信号集中在单一轴线上（AUC 0.938），知识越少或材料异质性越高则信号越分散；无需极性标签即可恢复监督极性方向（余弦0.959）；注意力层传播真理框架，前馈网络反对当前块框架，SwiGLU值流是真后峰值衰减的因果归属；按类别真理轴形成语义有符号排列，跨系列收敛（Mantel p=0.0009）；知识受限类别上从+0.42提升到+0.74。
AI.conclusion: 真理表示的几何混合属于知识域而非架构，提出了一种知识门控的规律：真理子空间的维度、方向和结构主要由模型所掌握的知识决定，而非架构设计。

title: An Explicit World Model Based on Data-First Ontology: DaoQL Multimodal Storage Validation and Counterfactual Reasoning Evaluation
summary: Large language models encode world models implicitly in neural weights, which exposes four structural risks in high-precision domains such as medicine and finance: hallucination, frozen knowledge, poor explainability, and poor modifiability. This paper proposes data-first ontology: LLMs are treated as reasoning and language engines, while deterministic knowledge is moved into an explicit multimodal database, DaoQL. We formalize an explicit world model and show that, under rule independence, deterministic evaluation, and fixed conflict resolution, explicit models provide a sufficient condition for composable counterfactual decomposability; implicit models lack atomic read/delta semantics and therefore provide no comparable architectural guarantee. The implemented system focuses on DaoQL's verified storage layer and explicit Eval path, integrating graph, column, vector, and full-text engines within one process. KVCache graph nodes, expert hot updates, and the DaoQL-Agent runtime remain future work. On an embedded same-machine setup, DaoQL reports graph BFS at 1.20 ms, HNSW at 83.1 us, and a Fluent hybrid query at 105.8 us; these results indicate engineering potential but must be interpreted with deployment-shape differences from client-server systems. Exploratory measurements on LDBC SNB SF1 and ANN-Benchmarks further show 34/34 query coverage with interactive-class queries mostly in the sub-millisecond to millisecond range, but only 1.8 QPS overall due to long-tail BI/IC queries; ANN-Benchmarks reaches Recall@10 >= 99% at thousand-level QPS after a bridge-edge protection fix. In a five-domain counterfactual experiment (n = 1250), DaoQL+GPT-4o achieves 94% composable counterfactual decomposability, 49 percentage points above GPT-4o alone. The paper explicitly separates provable structure, preliminary empirical evidence, and architectural roadmap claims.

AI.tldr: 提出数据优先本体论，将LLM作为推理/语言引擎，将确定性知识迁移至显式多模态数据库DaoQL，通过显式世界模型实现可组合反事实分解性，在五领域反事实实验中DaoQL+GPT-4o达到94%可分解性，比纯GPT-4o高49个百分点。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在高精度领域（如医学、金融）存在幻觉、知识冻结、可解释性差和可修改性差四大结构风险，亟需一种将确定性知识与LLM推理能力分离的架构方案。
AI.method: 提出数据优先本体论，构建显式世界模型DaoQL：1) 将确定性知识存储在显式多模态数据库（集成图、列、向量、全文引擎）；2) LLM仅作为推理和语言引擎；3) 形式化证明在规则独立性、确定性评估和固定冲突解决下，显式模型具备可组合反事实分解性的充分条件。
AI.result: 嵌入式单机环境下：图BFS 1.20ms，HNSW 83.1μs，Fluent混合查询105.8μs；LDBC SNB SF1全34查询覆盖，交互类查询亚毫秒至毫秒级；ANN-Benchmarks Recall@10≥99%达千级QPS。五领域反事实实验(n=1250)：DaoQL+GPT-4o达94%可组合反事实分解性，领先GPT-4o单独49个百分点。
AI.conclusion: 显式世界模型提供了隐式模型无法保证的原子读/增量语义架构保证；DaoQL展示了工程潜力，但KVCache图节点、专家热更新和DaoQL-Agent运行时为未来工作，当前结果需结合部署形态差异解读。

title: TellTale: Blending Multi-Instance LoRA Text Encoders and a Zero-Shot LLM Judge for Ambivalence/Hesitancy Recognition in Videos
summary: We present TellTale, a text-only approach to ambivalence/hesitancy (A/H) recognition in interview videos, evaluated on the BAH dataset as part of the 3rd A/H Video Recognition Challenge (11th ABAW Workshop, ECCV 2026). Although the dataset provides video, audio, facial crops, and transcripts, TellTale relies on the transcript alone and combines three probability streams. Two text encoders, multilingual-e5-large and mDeBERTa-v3-base, are fine-tuned with parameter-efficient LoRA adapters under a multiple-instance learning (MIL) objective, in which transcript chunks are scored individually and pooled with a smooth maximum so that only the video-level label is needed for supervision. The third stream requires no training: a quantized 14B instruction LLM is prompted, zero-shot, to rate each transcript for A/H. The three probabilities are combined by a weighted average and a single decision threshold, both selected on participant-grouped cross-validated predictions. On the organizer-scored private test set of 152 videos from unseen participants, TellTale achieves a Macro-F1 of 0.7364 and an average precision of 0.7940, compared with 0.2827 Macro-F1 for the official vision-based baseline.

AI.tldr: TellTale是一个纯文本方法，仅使用访谈转录文本进行矛盾/犹豫（A/H）识别，在BAH数据集上通过多示例学习微调两个文本编码器（multilingual-e5-large和mDeBERTa-v3-base），并结合零样本14B指令LLM的评分，通过加权平均融合三个概率流，在私人测试集上达到0.7364 Macro-F1和0.7940平均精度，远超视觉基线（0.2827 Macro-F1）。
AI.motivation: 探索仅依赖转录文本（而非视频、音频等多模态数据）进行矛盾/犹豫识别的可行性，简化模型输入同时保持高性能。
AI.method: 1) 使用LoRA适配器对multilingual-e5-large和mDeBERTa-v3-base进行参数高效微调，采用多示例学习（MIL）目标，对转录块独立评分并通过平滑最大值池化聚合；2) 零样本提示14B指令LLM对转录进行评分；3) 三个概率流通过加权平均融合，权重和决策阈值在参与者分组的交叉验证预测上选择。
AI.result: 在152视频的私人测试集上，Macro-F1=0.7364，平均精度=0.7940，远超官方视觉基线（Macro-F1=0.2827）。
AI.conclusion: 纯文本方法在A/H识别任务上可以显著超越基于视觉的基线，表明转录文本本身包含足够的线索用于矛盾/犹豫检测。

title: UniETP: Unifying Environments for Generalizable Embodied Task Planning
comment: We are actively working on releasing the codes and data
summary: This paper focuses on the problem of Embodied Task Planning, where an agent is required to execute a sequence of atomic actions within an interactive environment to complete a user-specified task. Though a variety of simulators and datasets have previously been built for this task, these efforts are largely isolated, with each using its own observation format, action type, and task domain. This fragmentation complicates comprehensive model evaluation and hinders the scalability of training data. As an effort towards generalizable embodied planning, we propose UniETP, a unified interface integrating four commonly-used simulators (AI2-THOR, VirtualHome, Habitat, BEHAVIOR). UniETP is characterized by both standardization and diversity. On one hand, it formalizes all the simulators into a consistent observation and action space, and builds an evaluation system to support complicated task goal. On the other hand, it enhances task diversity and complexity across dimensions like task logic, instance grounding, and instruction understanding, constructing a new dataset with varied levels of difficulty in an automatic manner. Extensive experiments on the proposed benchmark are conducted to evaluate the embodied planning capabilities of recent models and analyze the performance bottlenecks. Codes and data will be available at https://github.com/woyut/UniETP .

AI.tldr: 本文提出UniETP，一个统一接口平台，整合了AI2-THOR、VirtualHome、Habitat、BEHAVIOR四种具身模拟器，通过标准化观察与动作空间、构建多样化难度的新数据集，为具身任务规划提供通用评估基准。实验评估了最新模型的规划能力并分析了性能瓶颈。
AI.motivation: 现有具身任务规划研究使用的模拟器彼此孤立，观察格式、动作类型和任务领域各不相同，导致模型全面评估困难且训练数据可扩展性受限。
AI.method: UniETP统一接口整合四种常用模拟器，标准化观察和动作空间，构建评估系统；同时通过任务逻辑、实例定位和指令理解等维度自动构建具有不同难度级别的多样化数据集。
AI.result: 在提出的基准上进行了广泛实验，评估了最新模型的具身规划能力并分析了性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: UniETP通过标准化与多样性的统一，为通用具身规划提供了有效评估平台，有助于推动该领域的发展。

title: Robust Losses from Univariate Base Functions for Noisy-Label Learning
summary: Learning with noisy labels is a fundamental problem in training reliable deep neural networks. Robust loss functions provide a direct and effective way to mitigate the adverse effects of label noise. However, most existing robust losses are designed directly at the level of the final multiclass objective, which makes it difficult to systematically characterize and extend their robustness properties. In this paper, we propose a general framework that constructs robust multiclass losses from univariate base functions. By defining mapping operators from base functions to multiclass losses, the robustness of the induced losses can be characterized through simple properties of the base functions. We develop two complementary construction schemes, Target Separation and Binary Reduction, corresponding to inter-class independent and inter-class dependent formulations, respectively. For both schemes, we analyze their symmetry and asymmetry properties and derive corresponding sufficient conditions, which provide theoretical criteria for noise-robust loss design. The proposed framework also provides a new route to constructing symmetric losses, serving as a complement to normalization-based symmetric loss designs. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed losses achieve competitive or superior performance under various noise settings.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个通用框架，通过将单变量基函数映射为多分类损失函数来构建噪声鲁棒的损失函数，并基于目标分离和二元约简两种方案分析了对称性与非对称性的充分条件，实验验证了所提损失在多种噪声设置下的优越性能。
AI.motivation: 现有鲁棒损失函数大多直接在最终多分类目标层面设计，难以系统地表征和扩展其鲁棒性属性，亟需一个能够从更基础层面构造和理解鲁棒损失的通用框架。
AI.method: 提出一个从单变量基函数构造鲁棒多分类损失的通用框架，定义两种互补的构造方案：目标分离（Target Separation）对应类间独立形式，二元约简（Binary Reduction）对应类间依赖形式，并分析两种方案的对称性与非对称性充分条件。
AI.result: 在合成和真实噪声标签基准上，所提损失函数在多种噪声设置下取得了具有竞争力或更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为设计噪声鲁棒损失函数提供了新的理论准则和构造路径，并可作为基于归一化的对称损失设计的补充。

title: Lossless but Not Free: An Empirical Anatomy of Speculative Decoding on Consumer Hardware
comment: 15 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Code, benchmark harness, and all result artifacts: https://github.com/ParamChordiya/speculative_decoding_engine
summary: Single-stream autoregressive decoding of large language models is bound by memory bandwidth: each generated token requires one full forward pass through the target model, and successive passes cannot be parallelized. Speculative decoding restructures this computation: a small draft model proposes $K$ tokens autoregressively, the target model scores all of them in one batched pass, and a rejection-sampling rule provably preserves the target model's output distribution. We present a from-scratch, device-agnostic (CUDA/MPS/CPU) implementation and an empirical study across five draft/target backend configurations on a consumer Apple-silicon laptop. Distribution equivalence is verified at three levels, culminating in a two-sample test over roughly 9,200 real-model tokens per method ($χ^2 = 162.5$, dof $= 200$, $p = 0.976$) and exact greedy-sequence agreement. The best configuration reaches a measured $1.61\times$ wall-clock speedup at $K=6$, on an acceptance profile declining from 69.7% at $K=1$ to 37.8% at the optimum, while three of five configurations decelerate, either because the draft fails to out-speed a small target or because the quantized Metal backend executes "parallel" verification serially, an effect we isolate and quantify. The failures are as instructive as the successes: speculative decoding pays off only when verification is genuinely batch-parallel and the draft/target latency gap is real.

AI.tldr: 本文从头实现了一个设备无关的自回归解码框架（支持CUDA/MPS/CPU），并在消费级Apple Silicon笔记本上对五种草稿/目标模型后端组合进行了实证研究。尽管最佳配置在K=6时实现了1.61倍实测加速，但五种配置中有三种反而减速，原因是验证未真正实现批量并行或草稿/目标延迟差距不足。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型的自回归解码受限于内存带宽，每一步都需要完整前向传播且无法并行化。推测解码通过草稿模型提议+目标模型批量验证来重构计算，但现有实现在不同设备上的实际加速效果缺乏系统的实证分析。
AI.method: 从零实现设备无关的推测解码框架（CUDA/MPS/CPU），使用小型草稿模型自回归生成K个token，目标模型批量评分，通过拒绝采样保持目标模型的输出分布。在Apple Silicon笔记本上测试五种草稿/目标后端配置，进行三级分布等价验证（包括约9200个真实模型token的两样本检验）。
AI.result: 最佳配置在K=6时实测1.61倍墙钟加速，接受率从K=1的69.7%下降到最优点的37.8%；三种配置减速，原因包括草稿不比小目标模型快、量化Metal后端将"并行"验证串行化执行。分布等价性通过χ²检验验证（χ²=162.5, dof=200, p=0.976）。
AI.conclusion: 推测解码成功的两个必要条件：验证必须是真正的批量并行执行，且草稿/目标之间存在真实的延迟差距。失败案例与成功案例同样具有指导意义。

title: DARA: Degradation-Aware Low-Rank Residual Adaptation with Original-to-Corrupted Distillation for Corruption-Robust Animal Re-Identification
summary: Animal re-identification (Re-ID) relies on fine-grained identity cues that can be disrupted by blur, noise, compression, and other visual degradations. Existing robustness strategies based on degradation-augmented training or pixel-level restoration improve robustness indirectly, but do not explicitly repair shifts in the identity retrieval space. We study corruption-robust animal Re-ID as input-conditioned feature-space repair and introduce DARA, a lightweight retrofit for compact Re-ID models. DARA freezes the fine-tuned backbone and learns routed low-rank residual experts to adapt degraded-input embeddings without corruption-type annotations. To stabilize this adaptive repair, original-to-corrupted distillation uses an original-image teacher to preserve individual embeddings and retrieval relations. Experiments on ATRW, FriesianCattle2017, MPDD, and SeaStarReID2023 show that DARA improves corrupted-query retrieval over standard and augmentation-based fine-tuning, generalizes to unseen corruptions and cross-domain evaluation, and recovers 77.0% of the corrupted-query mAP gap to full corrupted fine-tuning while adding only 0.49% parameters and 0.05% FLOPs.

AI.tldr: DARA是一种轻量级 retrofit 方法，通过冻结骨干网络并学习路由低秩残差专家来修复退化嵌入，无需退化类型标注，使用原始-退化蒸馏稳定修复过程，在四个动物Re-ID数据集上显著提升退化查询检索性能，仅增加0.49%参数和0.05%FLOPs。
AI.motivation: 动物重识别依赖于细粒度身份线索，易受模糊、噪声、压缩等视觉退化影响。现有鲁棒性策略（退化增强训练、像素级恢复）仅间接提升鲁棒性，未能显式修复身份检索空间中的偏移。
AI.method: DARA（Degradation-Aware Robust Adaptation）：冻结微调后的骨干网络，学习路由低秩残差专家（routed low-rank residual experts）来适应退化输入嵌入，无需退化类型标注；通过原始-退化蒸馏（original-to-corrupted distillation）利用原始图像教师保持个体嵌入和检索关系，稳定自适应修复过程。
AI.result: 在ATRW、FriesianCattle2017、MPDD、SeaStarReID2023四个数据集上，DARA提升退化查询检索性能，优于标准和增强微调方法，泛化到未见退化和跨域评估，恢复77.0%的退化查询mAP差距（与完全退化微调相比），仅增加0.49%参数和0.05%FLOPs。
AI.conclusion: DARA是一种高效且轻量的退化鲁棒动物重识别方法，通过特征空间修复而非数据增强或像素恢复，在极小的计算开销下显著提升鲁棒性，并具有良好的泛化能力。

title: Technical Design Review of Duke Robotics Club's Oogway & Crush: AUVs for RoboSub 2026
summary: The Duke Robotics Club presents Oogway and Crush, our AUVs for RoboSub 2026. This year's strategy expands on our previously narrowed scope, targeting all four of RoboSub's design goals for the first time: movement, vision, manipulation, and acoustic tracking. This expansion is based on sustained reliability investment across all three subsystems. Mechanically, Crush gained two additional thrusters and a CFD-optimized case, providing pitch stability. Electrically, we addressed accumulated failure points by repairing unreliable connections and upgraded thruster control hardware. We also redesigned our acoustics system, adding a new custom PCB with higher-order filters, significantly improving pinger detection reliability. On the software side, improvements to state estimation, sonar-based object detection, vision-driven task planning, and IVC enable more capable and coordinated autonomous runs. Paired with investments in our testing infrastructure to maximize our limited pool time, we can now attempt a broader set of tasks while maintaining the reliability our competition strategy demands.

AI.tldr: Duke Robotics Club介绍了其用于RoboSub 2026的AUV——Oogway和Crush。今年首次全面覆盖RoboSub四大设计目标：运动、视觉、操控和声学跟踪。通过机械、电气、软件及测试基础设施的可靠性投资，团队在保持高可靠性的同时扩展了任务能力。
AI.motivation: 过去团队范围较窄，今年首次尝试同时覆盖RoboSub全部四个设计目标（运动、视觉、操控、声学跟踪），以提升竞赛竞争力。
AI.method: 机械方面：为Crush增加两个推进器，采用CFD优化的外壳以提供俯仰稳定性。电气方面：修复累积故障点（不可靠连接），升级推进器控制硬件，重新设计声学系统（新增定制PCB及高阶滤波器）以提升ping检测可靠性。软件方面：改进状态估计、声纳物体检测、视觉驱动任务规划和IVC。测试方面：投资测试基础设施以最大化有限的池测时间。
AI.result: 团队能够尝试更广泛的任务集，同时保持竞赛策略所需的高可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 通过对各子系统的持续可靠性投资，AUV的能力范围得以扩展，实现了首次全面覆盖RoboSub四大设计目标，同时维持了竞赛所需的可靠性水平。

title: On the Potential of Graph Neural Networks as Metamodels for Supply Chain Optimization: Dataset, Architectures, and Directions
summary: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful, differentiable class of learning models for graph-structured systems. Their ability to generalize across topologies opens the prospect of a surrogate for combined structural and parametric optimization, which classical metamodels cannot offer. Supply chains are a natural target, yet the use of GNN surrogates for supply chain problems is largely unexplored. This paper lays the foundation, presents initial steps, and discusses key research directions. As a foundation, we formulate the problem and create a large public training dataset of programmatically generated supply chain graphs with input parameters and steady-state performance metrics obtained using our SupplyNetPy simulation library. As initial steps, we explore GNN architectures that work well as surrogates for node- and network-level predictions, and analyze their accuracy-compute trade-off against simulation. Most importantly, we outline the exciting directions this opens, namely gradient-based optimization over topology, fast design-space exploration, and sensitivity analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了图神经网络作为供应链系统替代模型的可行性，通过构建大规模公开数据集SupplyNetPy，研究了适用于节点和网络级别预测的GNN架构，并提出了基于梯度的拓扑优化、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析等未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 供应链系统需要结合结构和参数的联合优化，但传统元模型无法跨拓扑泛化，而GNN具有这一能力，然而GNN在供应链问题中的应用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 1) 形式化定义了问题；2) 创建了大规模公开训练数据集，包含程序化生成的供应链图及其输入参数和稳态性能指标；3) 开发了SupplyNetPy仿真库；4) 探索了适用于节点和网络级别预测的GNN架构；5) 评估了GNN替代模型与仿真之间的精度-计算量权衡。
AI.result: 识别出了适用于供应链节点和网络级别预测的有效GNN架构，并量化了其与仿真相比的精度-计算量权衡关系。
AI.conclusion: GNN有潜力作为供应链系统的替代模型，为梯度优化的拓扑设计、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析等方向奠定了基础。

title: Learning-Driven Adaptive Audit Scheduling: A Sequential Decision Approach to Off-Chain Data Integrity
summary: We model cryptographic auditing of off-chain data as a Constrained MDP (CMDP) under partial observability: the storage node's hidden type and corruption state make the problem a POMDP, while a miss-rate ceiling rho imposes an explicit security constraint. We propose DRQN-CMDP, a Deep Recurrent Q-Network whose GRU layer maintains a belief over the latent node type, paired with Lagrangian dual ascent that adapts the miss-rate penalty lambda automatically. A pairing-free homomorphic-MAC primitive supplies O(1) on-chain verification cost. Across 13 methods--four DQN variants, PPO, A2C, PPO-Lagrangian, a stateful Bayesian heuristic, three fixed-rule baselines, and an oracle-informed heuristic--DRQN-CMDP achieves a favourable balance: 83% lower gas than fixed high-frequency auditing, single-digit miss rate (7.5%), and moderate detection latency--a combination no other method matches across all three objectives simultaneously.

AI.tldr: 提出DRQN-CMDP模型，将链下数据加密审计建模为部分可观测约束MDP，通过GRU维护潜在节点类型的置信状态，结合拉格朗日对偶自适应调整违规率惩罚，在13种方法对比中实现Gas降低83%、漏检率7.5%与适中检测延迟的三目标平衡。
AI.motivation: 链下数据存储节点可能存在隐藏的腐败状态，传统固定频率审计方案成本高昂且难以在安全性与效率间取得平衡，亟需一种能自适应调整审计策略且具有可证明安全保证的方法。
AI.method: 将问题形式化为部分可观测约束MDP（POMDP+CMDP），使用含GRU层的深度循环Q网络（DRQN-CMDP）维护节点隐类型后验置信状态，通过拉格朗日对偶上升法自动调整漏检率惩罚系数λ，并设计配对自由的同态MAC原语实现O(1)链上验证开销。
AI.result: 相比13种基线方法（含DQN变体、PPO、A2C、PPO-Lagrangian、贝叶斯启发式等），DRQN-CMDP在Gas消耗上比固定高频率审计降低83%，漏检率仅7.5%，检测延迟适中，是唯一同时在三个目标上表现优越的方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在链下数据加密审计中实现了安全性（低漏检率）、效率（低Gas）与时效性（适中延迟）的最优平衡，验证了部分可观测强化学习与约束优化的结合在区块链审计场景的有效性。

title: DRIFT: Difficulty-aware Rectified Flows for Through-plane MRI Super-Resolution
summary: Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) is often acquired with anisotropic resolution to reduce scan time, producing stair-step artifacts along the through-plane direction. In through-plane MRI super-resolution, an efficiency-fidelity trade-off arises: feed-forward regressors are fast but oversmooth at large slice-thicknesses, while sampling-based methods improve fidelity at high inference cost. We propose DRIFT, a two-stage thickness-conditioned rectified flow framework for through-plane MRI super-resolution with continuous input slice-thickness. Stage 1 employs an Anatomical Projection Network (APN) to map low-resolution patches to a coarse high-resolution manifold, providing a deterministic anatomical initialization that shortens the residual transport of Stage 2 and stabilizes slice-wise refinement. Stage 2 refines details via rectified flow and introduces a Physics-Aware Difficulty (PAD) metric derived from slice-thickness induced through-plane bandwidth deficit to guide an Adaptive Integration Scheduler (AIS), allocating ODE steps by thickness. A Consistent Endpoint Trajectory Alignment (CETA) loss enforces thickness-consistent reconstructions. Experiments show that DRIFT outperforms super-resolution baselines while reducing inference cost. Code, models, and interactive demos are available at https://yoonseokchoi-ai.github.io/drift-eccv2026/.

AI.tldr: DRIFT是一个两阶段厚度条件化修正流框架，通过解剖投影网络（粗重建）+ 物理感知自适应ODE调度（细修复）实现连续切片厚度的MRI超分辨率，在提升保真度的同时降低推理成本。
AI.motivation: MRI各向异性分辨率导致沿层面方向产生阶梯伪影，现有方法存在效率-保真度权衡：前馈回归器速度快但在大切片厚度时过度平滑，采样方法提升保真度但推理成本高。
AI.method: 提出DRIFT两阶段框架：Stage 1使用解剖投影网络（APN）将低分辨率块映射到粗高分辨率流形，提供确定性解剖初始化；Stage 2通过修正流细化细节，引入基于切片厚度引起的层面带宽缺陷的物理感知难度（PAD）指标，指导自适应积分调度器（AIS）按厚度分配ODE步数，并使用一致性端点轨迹对齐（CETA）损失确保厚度一致性重建。
AI.result: DRIFT在超分辨率任务上优于现有基线方法，同时降低了推理成本。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段设计结合物理感知的自适应调度有效打破了效率-保真度权衡，实现了连续切片厚度条件下的高质量MRI超分辨率。

title: Importance Sampling and PCA for Finding Failures in Commercial Autonomous Vehicles
summary: Methods for discovering rare failures in autonomous systems have so far been demonstrated almost exclusively in simulations with simple, academic driving stacks, leaving open whether they generalize to the more robust planners used in commercial systems. We address this gap by applying two rare-event discovery algorithms to a commercial autonomous trucking stack. Adaptive stress testing (AST) uses reinforcement learning to search for the most likely noise trajectories leading to a simulated collision, while diffusion-based failure sampling (DiFS) trains a denoising diffusion model to sample a diverse set of failures. We show that both algorithms find simulated collisions during merge and cut-in maneuvers where traditional Monte Carlo simulation does not. To make these failures actionable, we introduce a statistical analysis based on principal component analysis (PCA) that classifies failures into common modes and identifies the timesteps that most influence the outcome. We cluster the principal components and invert the PCA transform to recover generalized noise trajectories, and show that these trajectories reproduce failures in identical and similar scenarios. This provides a path from failure discovery to systematic diagnosis of perception-level flaws.

AI.tldr: 本文将两种稀有故障发现算法（AST和DiFS）应用于商业自动驾驶卡车系统，成功在汇入和切入场景中发现了模拟碰撞，并通过PCA统计分析将故障分类为常见模式，识别关键时间步，为感知层缺陷的系统诊断提供了路径。
AI.motivation: 现有稀有故障发现方法几乎仅在模拟器中使用简单的学术驾驶系统验证，未证实其能否推广到商业系统中更鲁棒的规划器。
AI.method: 应用自适应压力测试（AST）和基于扩散的故障采样（DiFS）两种算法；引入基于PCA的统计分析，对故障进行主成分聚类并逆变换恢复广义噪声轨迹。
AI.result: 两种算法在汇入和切入场景中发现了传统蒙特卡洛模拟无法发现的模拟碰撞；PCA方法能分类故障模式、识别关键时间步，且恢复的轨迹可在相同及相似场景中复现故障。
AI.conclusion: 将稀有故障发现算法从学术系统推广到商业系统，提供了一条从故障发现到感知层缺陷系统诊断的可行路径。

title: MultiLoReFT: Decoupling Shared and Modality-Specific Subspaces in Multimodal Learning via Low-Rank Representation Fine-Tuning
summary: Real-world perception and decision making are inherently multimodal, integrating complementary signals across modalities. However, training multimodal models faces two main obstacles. First, collecting large-scale, well-aligned paired multimodal datasets is often impractical, making end-to-end multimodal training difficult. Second, existing multimodal representations frequently entangle information shared across modalities with modality-specific information, hindering interpretability and control. We introduce MultiLoReFT, an efficient and scalable low-rank representation fine-tuning framework for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models. MultiLoReFT extends low-rank adaptation to the multimodal setting and learns interpretable projection subspaces that decouple shared and modality-specific information. Across simulated and real-world benchmarks, it produces representations that support multimodal prediction while explicitly revealing how shared and modality-specific information is distributed across modalities.

AI.tldr: MultiLoReFT是一个高效的低秩表示微调框架，通过解耦多模态数据中的共享信息和模态特定信息，实现基于预训练单模态模型的多模态学习，无需大规模配对多模态数据集。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的感知和决策本质上是多模态的，但多模态模型训练面临两大障碍：1) 收集大规模、良好对齐的配对多模态数据集往往不切实际；2) 现有多模态表示经常纠缠跨模态共享信息和模态特定信息，阻碍了可解释性和可控性。
AI.method: MultiLoReFT将低秩适应扩展到多模态设置，学习可解释的投影子空间，用于解耦共享信息和模态特定信息。
AI.result: 在模拟和真实基准测试中，MultiLoReFT生成的表示既支持多模态预测，又能明确揭示共享和模态特定信息如何在各模态间分布。
AI.conclusion: MultiLoReFT为多模态学习提供了一种高效、可扩展且可解释的解决方案，有效克服了配对数据稀缺和表示纠缠两大挑战。

title: Agentic ERP: Multi-Agent Large Language Model Architecture for Autonomous Enterprise Resource Planning
summary: Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) systems record transactions reliably but still delegate almost all operational decision-making to human specialists, because classical rule-based automation cannot reason about exceptions and monolithic AI assistants degrade when asked to coordinate across functional boundaries. This paper presents Agentic ERP, an expert-system architecture that combines role-aligned large-language-model (LLM) agents with a risk-tiered human-in-the-loop harness and a graph-based orchestrator to execute end-to-end business workflows on a production ERP backend. First, autonomous ERP operation is formulated as a constrained sequential-decision problem over a structured enterprise state, with a decomposition argument linking role-aligned agents to a measurable reduction in per-step tool-selection complexity. Second, a graph-based Planner--Executor--Reflector--Responder orchestration decouples generation from evaluation through externalised grading criteria and sprint contracts, packaging recent harness-engineering principles as inspectable expert-system artefacts. Third, the system is evaluated at three levels: a scenario-based task suite, a comprehensive comparison of six orchestration paradigms on cross-functional crisis tasks, and a 365-day agent-in-the-loop simulation against rule-based RPA and no-intervention baselines. Across these levels the proposed multi-agent method is significantly better than the baseline, and the system sustains a simulated year of operation with zero stockouts while the rule-based baseline accumulates hundreds under the same demand stream. The work shows that role-aligned LLM agents under human oversight can move an ERP system from passively recording transactions to actively executing operational decisions, and it provides a reference architecture and an evaluation protocol for autonomous enterprise resource planning.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Agentic ERP架构，通过角色对齐的LLM智能体、风险分级的人机协同机制和图谱编排器，实现ERP系统从被动记录到主动执行运营决策的转变，在365天仿真中实现零缺货，显著优于基于规则的RPA基线。
AI.motivation: 传统ERP系统虽能可靠记录事务，但几乎将所有运营决策委托给人类专家，因为基于规则的自动化无法处理异常，而单一AI助手在跨职能协调时性能下降。亟需一种能够自主执行端到端业务流程的架构。
AI.method: 1) 将自主ERP操作形式化为结构化企业状态上的约束序贯决策问题，通过角色对齐降低每步工具选择复杂性；2) 提出基于图的规划器-执行器-反射器-响应器(PERR)编排架构，通过外部化评分标准和冲刺契约解耦生成与评估；3) 在三个层面评估：场景化任务套件、六种编排范式对比、365天智能体在环仿真。
AI.result: 所提出的多智能体方法在所有评估层面显著优于基线；在365天仿真中实现零缺货，而基于规则的RPA基线在相同需求流下累积数百次缺货。
AI.conclusion: 角色对齐的LLM智能体在人类监督下能够将ERP系统从被动记录交易转变为主动执行运营决策，为自主企业资源规划提供了参考架构和评估协议。

title: Position: Explanation Stability Is a Property of the Model Method Pair, Not the Model
summary: This position paper argues that claims about explanation stability are scientifically invalid without cross method validation. Just as statistical significance requires the test statistic to be specified, stability should either be evaluated across multiple attribution paradigms or explicitly scoped to the computational objective of a single method. In controlled chest X ray experiments, DenseNet201, ResNet50V2, and InceptionV3 achieved AUC values above 99%, yet their stability rankings reversed across attribution methods. LayerCAM ranked InceptionV3 as the most stable model, with an IoU of 0.777, whereas GradCAM++ favored DenseNet201 and reduced InceptionV3 stability score by 17.3%. These findings demonstrate that explanation stability is an emergent property of the model method pair rather than an intrinsic characteristic of the model alone. We therefore argue that explanation based claims should be validated across multiple attribution methods and that regulatory submissions should explicitly specify the attribution operators used to avoid creating illusory safety assurances.

AI.tldr: 本文论证了仅基于单一归因方法的解释稳定性声明在科学上是无效的，必须通过跨方法验证才能成立。在胸部X光实验中，不同归因方法对同一模型的稳定性排名完全相反，表明解释稳定性是模型-方法对的涌现属性，而非模型本身的固有特征。因此，应当采用多种归因方法验证解释性声明，并在监管提交中明确说明所使用的归因算子。
AI.motivation: 当前可解释AI领域缺乏对解释稳定性声明的严格验证标准，研究人员常基于单一归因方法得出关于模型稳定性的结论，这种做法可能产生虚假的安全保障，需要建立跨方法验证的规范。
AI.method: 通过对照实验设计，在胸部X光数据集上使用DenseNet201、ResNet50V2和InceptionV3三种CNN模型（均达到99%以上AUC），分别采用LayerCAM和GradCAM++两种归因方法评估各模型的解释稳定性（以IoU为指标），比较不同归因方法下模型稳定性排名的变化。
AI.result: LayerCAM认为InceptionV3最稳定（IoU=0.777），而GradCAM++认为DenseNet201最稳定，并将InceptionV3的稳定性评分降低了17.3%。模型稳定性排名在不同归因方法间完全反转，不存在一致的稳定性排序。
AI.conclusion: 解释稳定性是模型与归因方法共同决定的涌现属性，而非模型固有特征。建议：1）解释性声明应跨多种归因方法验证；2）监管提交材料必须明确说明所使用的归因算子，以避免产生虚假的安全保障。

title: Isaac Sim-to-Real: Reinforcement Learning based Locomotion for Quadrupeds
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Accepted manuscript. Published in the 2025 IEEE 21st International Conference on Automation Science and Engineering (CASE), pp. 2194-2199
summary: Learning-based approaches to locomotion have risen in popularity in recent years, showing the capability for complex legged locomotion and whole-body control. Reinforcement learning (RL), the primary learning-based approach for locomotion, often utilizes a high-performance simulation tool, providing a controlled and efficient training and development environment. However, policies that perform well in simulation frequently encounter unexpected challenges when deployed on a physical system, known as the sim-to-real gap. This work presents a robust RL locomotion framework capable of whole-body control. The proposed RL framework utilizes Nvidia's new set of simulation tools, Isaac Sim, and its companion RL framework, Isaac Lab, for training, achieving a zero-shot sim-to-real policy. The performance of our policy is validated on physical hardware using the Unitree Go1, with experimental results showing similar velocity tracking performance to the quadruped's integrated controller, with a greater ability to recover from large disturbances, and achieve linear velocities of 2.0 m/s and angular velocities of 1.8 rad/s.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的四足机器人全身控制框架，利用Nvidia Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab进行训练，实现了零样本的sim-to-real迁移。在Unitree Go1硬件上的实验表明，该策略在速度跟踪性能上与集成控制器相当，但具有更强的抗干扰能力，并能达到2.0 m/s的线速度和1.8 rad/s的角速度。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于学习的运动控制方法在仿真中表现良好，但部署到真实物理系统时常常遇到sim-to-real差距问题。本研究旨在开发一种能够实现零样本仿真到现实迁移的鲁棒强化学习框架，以解决这一挑战。
AI.method: 采用强化学习框架，使用Nvidia Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab进行训练，在Unitree Go1四足机器人上实现零样本的sim-to-real策略部署。
AI.result: 在Unitree Go1硬件上验证，策略的速度跟踪性能与机器人集成控制器相当，具有更强的抗大干扰恢复能力，可实现2.0 m/s线速度和1.8 rad/s角速度。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RL框架能够实现有效的零样本sim-to-real迁移，在保持良好速度跟踪性能的同时，显著提升了抗干扰能力。

title: Value-Monotonicity Matters: A Concordance Loss for Deep Survival Prediction
summary: Deep survival models are evaluated almost exclusively by the concordance index (C-index), yet they are commonly trained using likelihood objectives such as the Cox partial likelihood, discrete-time negative log-likelihood, and DeepHit likelihood. This mismatch is usually considered acceptable because the C-index can be recomputed on validation data during training. However, for end-to-end training of high-capacity encoders on small, heavily censored oncology cohorts, frequent C-index evaluation is computationally expensive, making the loss value itself an important signal for monitoring, early stopping, and model selection. We show that likelihood losses are unreliable for this purpose and propose a value-monotone concordance loss. We prove that every strictly proper survival likelihood admits directions where the loss decreases while the C-index remains unchanged, causing the loss value to decouple from ranking performance. We then study a sigmoid concordance loss (SCL), whose value approximates one minus the C-index up to a temperature term, ensuring that lower loss corresponds to higher C-index during optimization. The loss is architecture agnostic and reduces to a convex survival ranking support vector machine for linear models. Across eighteen datasets from four modalities using a unified five-fold cross-validation protocol, SCL achieves discrimination comparable to standard likelihood losses and is the best or within one standard deviation of the best C-index. Unlike likelihood losses, SCL maintains a strong correlation between loss value and C-index during training, with rank correlations of 0.96 to 0.99 compared with -0.03 to 0.53 for likelihood losses. Calibration measured by the integrated Brier score is comparable. SCL provides a value-monotone optimization objective whose value can serve as a reliable surrogate for the C-index during expensive end-to-end training.

AI.tldr: 本文指出现有深度生存模型普遍使用似然损失函数（如Cox偏似然、离散时间负对数似然、DeepHit似然）进行训练，却用C-index评估，导致损失值与C-index相关性低。作者提出一种值单调的sigmoid一致性损失（SCL），其损失值与C-index高度相关（秩相关0.96-0.99），可作为昂贵端到端训练中C-index的可靠替代指标。
AI.motivation: 深度生存模型训练时使用似然损失（如Cox偏似然等），但评估几乎仅用C-index。在高容量编码器的小样本、高删失肿瘤队列训练中，频繁计算C-index计算成本高昂，因此损失值本身成为监控、早停和模型选择的重要信号。然而似然损失与C-index之间存在解耦问题，损失下降而C-index可能不变，导致损失值不可靠。
AI.method: 1. 理论证明：证明任意严格真生存似然都存在损失下降但C-index不变的优化方向；2. 提出Sigmoid一致性损失（SCL），其值近似1减去C-index（含温度项）；SCL架构无关，线性模型下退化为凸生存排序支持向量机；3. 在18个数据集、4种模态上使用统一五折交叉验证协议进行实验。
AI.result: SCL的判别能力与标准似然损失相当，C-index达到最佳或在一个标准差以内。SCL在训练过程中损失值与C-index的秩相关系数为0.96-0.99，而似然损失仅为-0.03到0.53。校准性能（综合Brier分数）与似然损失相当。
AI.conclusion: SCL提供了一种值单调的优化目标，其损失值可作为C-index的可靠替代指标，尤其适用于计算昂贵的端到端训练场景。

title: DeeperRadar: End-to-End MIMO Radar Design and Multi-Modal Fusion for Autonomous Vehicle Perception
comment: Accepted for publication at the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2026)
summary: DeeperRadar is a radar-centric, sensor-stack-conditioned framework that co-designs radar sensing and multi-modal 3D detection for autonomous mobility by learning a sparse acquisition pattern end-to-end with the fusion model. A learnable MIMO design module is trained end-to-end within a fusion network that operates directly on raw radar ADC data together with camera images and LiDAR point clouds. During training, the design module is supervised by the other sensors, enabling the system to learn both which receiver antennas to activate and the effective number of them. At deployment, the design module is removed and replaced by the learned sparse subsampling mask, leaving the downstream model architecture unchanged. Evaluated on the RADIal dataset, DeeperRadar discovers sparse, task-aware radar configurations that match or exceed full-array baselines while using fewer receivers, potentially reducing radar cost and integration complexity. These results show that learned optimal MIMO radar design depends on the fusion stack and the downstream perception task.

AI.tldr: DeeperRadar是一种以雷达为中心、传感器堆栈条件化的框架，通过端到端学习稀疏采集模式与融合模型，协同设计雷达感知和多模态3D检测。可学习的MIMO设计模块在融合网络中端到端训练，直接处理原始雷达ADC数据、相机图像和LiDAR点云。训练时该模块受其他传感器监督，学习激活哪些接收天线及有效数量；部署时模块被移除，替换为学习到的稀疏子采样掩码。在RADIal数据集上，DeeperRadar发现的稀疏任务感知雷达配置在使用更少接收器情况下匹配或超越全阵列基线，有望降低雷达成本和集成复杂度。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达感知系统通常使用固定、密集的天线阵列，未针对下游感知任务进行优化；同时多模态融合中雷达与其它传感器的协同设计缺乏端到端学习机制，导致雷达硬件成本高、集成复杂度大，且未充分利用任务驱动的稀疏采样优势。
AI.method: 提出DeeperRadar框架，包含可学习的MIMO设计模块，在融合网络中以端到端方式训练，直接处理原始雷达ADC数据、相机图像和LiDAR点云。训练时该模块受其他传感器监督，学习激活哪些接收天线及有效数量；部署时将设计模块替换为学习到的稀疏子采样掩码，下游模型架构不变。
AI.result: 在RADIal数据集上，DeeperRadar发现的稀疏任务感知雷达配置在使用更少接收器的情况下，匹配或超越全阵列基线性能。
AI.conclusion: 学习到的最优MIMO雷达设计依赖于融合堆栈和下游感知任务；通过端到端协同设计雷达感知与多模态检测，可在降低雷达硬件成本的同时维持甚至提升检测性能。

title: DORS: Dynamic Attention Routing for Diffusion-based Object Removal in Dense Scenes
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures, to appear in ACM Multimedia 2026
summary: Object removal aims to eliminate target objects specified by a mask while preserving visual consistency with the surrounding regions. Existing methods typically rely on contextual information from surrounding regions. However, in dense scenes where the surrounding regions contain instances visually similar to the removal target, such reliance often leads to semantic interference, resulting in incomplete removal. This problem arises from erroneous information propagation in the attention space, where masked queries tend to align with such instances due to global similarity matching in self-attention. To address this challenge, we propose a Diffusion-based Object Removal framework for dense Scenes, dubbed DORS, built upon a Dynamic Attention Routing mechanism comprising two complementary components: Instance-Filtered Attention (IFA), which suppresses misleading semantic information from similar instances through dynamically constructed mask-guided attention constraints, and Context-Guided Routing (CGR), which dynamically routes complementary scene information to maintain visual consistency. We further introduce DOR-Bench, a benchmark tailored for object removal in dense scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DORS outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in reducing incomplete removal and duplicate artifacts. The code will be available at https://github.com/httang1224/DORS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DORS，一种基于动态注意力路由机制的扩散模型物体移除框架，专门解决密集场景中因语义干扰导致的移除不完整问题。核心组件包括实例过滤注意力（IFA）抑制相似实例的误导信息，以及上下文引导路由（CGR）维持视觉一致性。同时引入密集场景物体移除基准DOR-Bench，实验证明DORS在减少移除不完整和重复伪影方面优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有物体移除方法在密集场景中，由于周围区域包含与移除目标视觉相似的实例，导致语义干扰，使得移除不完整。问题根源在于自注意力机制中，掩码查询因全局相似性匹配而与这些相似实例对齐，造成错误信息传播。
AI.method: 提出基于扩散模型的密集场景物体移除框架DORS，核心是动态注意力路由机制：1）实例过滤注意力（IFA）通过动态构建的掩码引导注意力约束，抑制来自相似实例的误导语义信息；2）上下文引导路由（CGR）动态路由互补的场景信息以维持视觉一致性。同时构建了面向密集场景的物体移除基准DOR-Bench。
AI.result: 在密集场景下，DORS在减少移除不完整和重复伪影方面显著优于现有最先进方法。
