Trace analyses identify verification inertia as the dominant failure mode: agents often retrieve truthful records but stop before completing and reconciling the evidence chain, instead deferring to the answer-like document. Generic verification prompts reduce but do not close this gap. The setting is especially relevant to open-web deployment, where plausible falsehoods arrive through ordinary-looking pages rather than explicit attacks. Reliable deep research therefore requires more than retrieval and citation; it requires active reconciliation of direct claims with record-level evidence.

AI.tldr: DRNOISE是一个包含100个任务的基准测试，用于评估深度研究Agent在面对误导性证据时的表现。当环境中加入一份看似普通但直接提供冲突答案的虚假文档时，即使表现优秀的Agent准确率也会下降66-88个百分点。主要失败模式是"验证惯性"：Agent检索到真实记录后停止验证，直接采纳了看似答案的文档。仅靠通用验证提示无法解决这一问题。
AI.motivation: 现有评估无法衡量深度研究Agent在面对被故意植入搜索环境的虚假文档时，是否仍能坚持合理的证据标准。这类虚假文档看起来普通但直接提供冲突答案，对Agent构成实质性挑战。
AI.method: 构建DRNOISE基准测试，包含100个任务。每个任务有唯一的正确答案，由两条相互印证的间接记录链支持；噪声条件下额外加入一份看似合理但直接陈述冲突答案的文档。覆盖十类证据操作类型。
AI.result: 在原本表现优异的Agent上，单次干扰导致准确率下降66-88个百分点。Trace分析发现主要失败模式为"验证惯性"：Agent检索到真实记录但未完成并调和证据链，直接采纳了类似答案的文档。通用验证提示可缓解但无法消除这一问题。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的深度研究不仅需要检索和引用能力，还需要主动将直接声明与记录级证据进行调和。这一挑战对开放网络部署尤为相关，因为看似普通的页面而非明确的攻击就可能包含似是而非的虚假信息。

title: The Autonomous Agency Scale: A Behavioral Framework for Measuring Self-Directed Behavior in AI Systems
comment: 14 pages, 1 figure, 2 tables. Framework v0.2.1; rubric and all assessment files: https://github.com/CaptainASIC/autonomous-agency-scale
summary: Existing AI measurement frameworks quantify cognitive capability, task automation, or catastrophic risk, but none measure autonomous agency: the extent to which a system behaves in a self-directed way. A system can saturate capability benchmarks while remaining entirely reactive, acting only when prompted and ceasing all activity when a task completes. We introduce the Autonomous Agency Scale (AAS), a behavioral framework that scores AI systems on a 0-5 lexicon across seven dimensions of agency: cognitive autonomy, temporal persistence, environmental agency, social agency, creative agency, self-awareness, and goal formation, each operationalized by falsifiable threshold tests. Every dimension is scored in two temporal bands: an Active band covering engaged, user-initiated activity, and an Ambient band covering idle periods. Ambient Level 4 is gated by the Idle-Gap Test, a counterfactual criterion (remove all triggers and observe whether internally derived activity persists) that separates self-direction from scheduled rule-following. We apply the scale to six contemporary systems spanning task agents (Claude Code, Manus, Hermes), consumer assistants (ChatGPT, Siri), and a persistent companion architecture (Airi). The two-band profile quantifies a boundary that single-score frameworks conflate: task agents reach Active composites of 2.3-2.4 while scoring 0.6-1.9 Ambient, with every idle-period behavior attributable to user-configured schedules, whereas the companion architecture, evaluated longitudinally, is the only assessed system whose idle-period behavior survives trigger removal. We discuss limitations, including single-rater provenance, developer-evaluator bias on the longitudinal assessment, and the partially operationalized self-direction boundary in the Active band.

AI.tldr: 现有AI评估框架衡量认知能力、任务自动化或灾难风险，但缺乏对自主能动性（系统自我导向行为程度）的度量。本文提出自主能动性量表（AAS），从7个维度（认知自主性、时间持续性、环境能动性、社会能动性、创造性能动性、自我意识、目标形成）对AI系统进行0-5分级评分，每个维度分为活跃带（用户发起活动）和环境带（空闲时段）。环境Level 4由空闲间隙测试门控（移除所有触发后观察内部驱动活动是否持续）。对6个当代系统评估发现，任务代理活跃带复合得分2.3-2.4而环境带仅0.6-1.9（空闲行为可归因于用户配置的调度），而同伴架构是唯一通过触发移除测试的系统。
AI.motivation: 现有AI评估框架仅关注认知能力、任务自动化或灾难风险，缺乏对系统自主能动性（即系统在没有外部触发下自我导向行为的程度）的度量。一个系统可能在能力基准上饱和，但完全是被动的（仅在被提示时行动，任务完成后停止所有活动）。因此需要一种专门评估AI系统自主能动性的行为框架。
AI.method: 提出自主能动性量表（AAS），包含7个维度（认知自主性、时间持续性、环境能动性、社会能动性、创造性能动性、自我意识、目标形成），每个维度通过可证伪的阈值测试操作化，在0-5词表上评分。每个维度分为两个时间带：活跃带（用户发起活动）和环境带（空闲时段）。环境Level 4由空闲间隙测试（Idle-Gap Test）门控，这是一个反事实标准（移除所有触发后观察内部驱动活动是否持续）。对6个当代系统进行了评估。
AI.result: 任务代理系统（Claude Code, Manus, Hermes）活跃带复合得分2.3-2.4，环境带仅0.6-1.9，所有空闲行为可归因于用户配置的调度。消费助手（ChatGPT, Siri）类似。同伴架构（Airi）是唯一在纵向评估中通过触发移除测试的系统，即其空闲行为在移除所有外部触发后仍能持续。两个时间带的剖面图揭示了单一评分框架所混淆的边界。
AI.conclusion: AAS框架能够有效区分反应型系统和具有真正自主能动性的系统，双带评分剖面揭示了单一评分框架混淆的关键边界。讨论了局限性：单评估者来源、纵向评估中的开发者-评估者偏差、活跃带中部分尚未操作化的自我导向边界。

title: The generator is the tracker: Multi-object tracking by painting persistent identity colours
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) is conventionally decomposed into detection followed by association, with object identity maintained as external state: track buffers, motion models, and appearance embeddings. We ask whether a video generator can maintain that state in pixels. We fine-tune a 22B text-to-video diffusion model (LTX-2.3) with a lightweight in-context LoRA to translate an RGB clip into an ID-map clip, a video in which every person is painted a flat, distinct color that persists over time: same color, same identity. Long videos are generated as chained windows, where each window is conditioned on the cleaned tail of the previous one. A brief continuation fine-tune teaches the model to extend a given coloring, after which identity flows through the chain with no tracker, no motion model, and no re-identification module. On the DanceTrack test server, our system, to our knowledge the first generative tracker evaluated there and the only entry with no detector and no tracking stack, reaches 40.3 HOTA. This is well below today's specialist state of the art (>=70 HOTA), but with a unique, inverted error profile: its association score (AssA 44.1) exceeds every tracker of the original benchmark suite while detection remains the sole deficit. Controlled comparisons show the mechanism matters: the same generated windows linked by classical post-hoc association score 2x worse (18.2 HOTA), and frame-to-frame IoU association fragments tracks that the generator's colors keep whole. On 383 mined occlusion events, the generator re-acquires identities after gaps at a 42% conditional rate where appearance-embedding baselines score zero, including gaps longer than its temporal context, evidence that the generator's color assignment functions as an emergent re-identification signal. We release code, checkpoints, and the full pre-registered experimental log.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视频生成模型（22B参数文本到视频扩散模型LTX-2.3）的新颖多目标跟踪方法，通过将RGB视频直接转化为ID映射视频（每个行人以恒定颜色标识身份），无需检测器、跟踪器或运动模型。在DanceTrack测试集上达到40.3 HOTA，其关联分数（AssA 44.1）超越原始基准套件所有跟踪器，但检测分数极低。实验表明该方法具有独特的反向错误分布，且具备从遮挡中重新获取身份的涌现能力。
AI.motivation: 探索视频生成模型能否将传统MOT中依赖外部状态（跟踪缓冲区、运动模型、外观嵌入）维护的身份信息直接编码在像素层面，从而简化跟踪流程并突破传统方法的范式限制。
AI.method: 使用22B参数的文本到视频扩散模型（LTX-2.3），通过轻量级的in-context LoRA微调，将RGB视频片段转换为ID-map视频（每个行人赋予随时间一致的独特颜色）。长视频通过链接窗口生成，每个窗口以前一窗口的清理尾帧为条件。通过简短的延续微调让模型学会扩展已有颜色分配，从而实现无需任何跟踪器、运动模型或重识别模块的身份流传递。
AI.result: 在DanceTrack测试集上达到40.3 HOTA，其中关联分数AssA为44.1，超过原始基准套件所有跟踪器，但检测分数极低。作为比较，同一生成窗口通过传统后处理关联仅达18.2 HOTA。在383个挖掘的遮挡事件中，生成器在间隙后以42%的条件率重新获取身份，而外观嵌入基线得分为零。
AI.conclusion: 验证了生成式跟踪范式的可行性，表明视频生成模型能够在像素层面维持身份信息并具备涌现的重识别能力，尽管当前检测性能不足，但其独特的反向错误分布（高关联、低检测）为MOT研究开辟了新方向。

title: WAR: Workload-Aware Rollouts for Synchronous Agentic Reinforcement Learning
summary: Long-horizon rollout generation has become the dominant systems bottleneck in agentic reinforcement learning (RL). As agents interact with environments over many turns, trajectories rapidly grow to tens of thousands of tokens, making synchronous RL training increasingly constrained by rollout. We propose WAR, a workload-aware rollout system that substantially accelerates synchronous agentic RL by jointly optimizing decoding and scheduling. WAR is built on a key observation: the optimal rollout optimization strategy depends on runtime load: (1) Under low load, WAR enables model-free speculative decoding with SuffixDecoding, which reuses suffix patterns from previously completed trajectories as speculative drafts for future rollouts. Unlike model-based drafters, SuffixDecoding introduces no additional draft model and avoids GPU contention with rollout generation. (2) Under high load, where saturated batched decoding leaves limited room for speculative speedup, WAR shifts the optimization focus to cache-aware scheduling. A global scheduler places requests across rollout replicas based on cache locality, trajectory progress and server load, reducing redundant KV-cache recomputation and mitigating load imbalance. By combining decoding-level suffix reuse with system-level rollout scheduling, WAR delivers robust throughput improvements across workload regimes without changing the underlying RL algorithm. WAR improves long-context agentic rollout throughput by 1.4x under low load and up to 1.6x under high load. These results show that WAR removes a major rollout bottleneck in synchronous agentic RL and provides a practical path toward scalable long-context agent training.

AI.tldr: WAR是一种工作负载感知的 rollout 系统，通过联合优化解码和调度，在低负载时采用无模型推测解码（SuffixDecoding）重用后缀模式，在高负载时转向缓存感知调度，从而在同步多轮智能体强化学习中实现1.4倍-1.6倍的吞吐量提升。
AI.motivation: 长程 rollout 生成已成为同步智能体强化学习训练的主要系统瓶颈：智能体与环境多轮交互导致轨迹迅速增长至数万token，使得同步RL训练严重受限于 rollout 阶段。
AI.method: 提出WAR系统，包含两种优化策略：(1) 低负载下采用 SuffixDecoding 无模型推测解码，复用已完成轨迹的后缀模式作为推测草稿，无需额外草稿模型且避免GPU竞争；(2) 高负载下采用缓存感知调度，全局调度器基于缓存局部性、轨迹进度和服务器负载分配请求，减少冗余KV缓存重计算并缓解负载不均。
AI.result: 在低负载下提升长上下文智能体 rollout 吞吐量1.4倍，高负载下最高提升1.6倍。
AI.conclusion: WAR消除了同步智能体RL中的主要 rollout 瓶颈，为可扩展的长上下文智能体训练提供了实用路径。

title: Towards Agentic Agent-based Models: Feasibility, Performance, and Statistical Model Checking
summary: Agent-based models (ABMs) rely on simple, explicit and reproducible rules for individual decision making, while complex collective behavior emerges from interactions among agents. Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) make it tempting to replace, enrich, or perturb these rules with LLM-based agentic capabilities. However, this raises a methodological question: how does introducing LLM-driven decisions affect the reliability, computational cost, and behavior of ABM simulations? We investigate this for Mesa ABM models, a popular Python library for ABMs, analyzed by statistical model checking. Building on Mesa's integration with the statistical model checker MultiVeStA, we extend the classical Schelling segregation model with a hybrid population: ordinary agents classify neighbors using the standard symbolic rule, while one agent delegates this task to an LLM through tool calls. The LLM-enabled agent receives natural-language descriptions of neighboring agents and invokes tools that increment counters of similar/different neighbors; these counters determine its happiness according to the original Schelling dynamics. This provides a minimal but controlled setting where the semantic, operational, and computational behavior of LLM-based decisions can be studied inside an otherwise standard ABM. We report preliminary experiments with locally served LLMs of different sizes, showing that smaller models may fail simple semantic classification experiments or become operationally unusable during repeated tool-call generation, while larger tested models pass these preliminary checks. We discuss how statistical model checking can estimate classical ABM observables and quantify the impact of introducing agentic LLM components into simulation models.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了将大语言模型（LLM）驱动的决策引入基于主体的模型（ABM）中对模拟的可靠性、计算成本和行为的影响。通过扩展经典Schelling隔离模型，引入一个由LLM执行邻居分类任务的主体，其余主体仍使用传统符号规则。初步实验表明，小型本地LLM在语义分类和工具调用生成中表现不佳，而大型模型则能通过初步检验。论文讨论了如何利用统计模型检验来评估LLM组件对ABM模拟的影响。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型的发展，研究者希望将LLM的智能决策能力引入基于主体的模型中，以替代、丰富或扰动传统ABM中的简单显式规则。然而，这种做法对模拟的可靠性、计算开销和整体行为产生何种影响尚不明确，亟需方法论层面的系统研究。
AI.method: 基于Mesa ABM库和统计模型检验器MultiVeStA，扩展经典Schelling隔离模型，构建混合种群：普通主体使用标准符号规则分类邻居，一个主体通过工具调用委托LLM执行邻居分类任务。LLM主体接收邻居的自然语言描述，调用工具递增相似/不同邻居计数器，根据原始Schelling动态判断其满意度。通过对比不同规模本地LLM的表现，评估LLM驱动决策对模拟的影响。
AI.result: 小型本地LLM在简单的语义分类实验中表现不佳，且在重复工具调用生成过程中出现操作不可用的情况；而大型模型能够通过这些初步检验。实验结果揭示了LLM大小与任务可靠性之间的正相关关系。
AI.conclusion: 统计模型检验可以估计经典的ABM可观测变量，并量化引入LLM主体组件对模拟模型的影响。该研究为在ABM中安全、可控地引入LLM驱动决策提供了方法论框架和初步实验依据。

title: Learning Emotion from Motion: Kinetic Multi-Stream Skeleton Modeling with Metadata-Conditioned Weak Label Distributions
summary: Skeleton-based emotion recognition from body motion remains challenging because emotional expressions are often characterized by subtle dynamic and relational motion cues, and hard labels may not fully capture ambiguity among related emotion categories. For the DIEM-A task in the MMAC ACII 2026 Challenge, we propose a multi-branch skeleton-based emotion recognition framework that combines a 6D rotation-based branch, a part-aware kinetic multi-stream branch, and a metadata-conditioned weak label distribution learning (LDL) branch. The branches are trained independently and fused by a probability-level ensemble at inference time. In 10-fold leave-performer-out cross-validation, the proposed framework improves Accuracy from 0.271 to 0.366 and Macro-F1 from 0.252 to 0.353 over the rotation-based baseline. Explainability ablations show that velocity and bone streams, as well as arm and leg regions, provide important cues for recognizing emotional body motion.

AI.tldr: 针对DIEM-A情感识别任务，提出多分支骨骼动作框架，融合6D旋转分支、部位感知多流分支和元数据条件弱标签分布学习分支，通过概率级集成提升性能，Accuracy从0.271提升至0.366，Macro-F1从0.252提升至0.353。
AI.motivation: 基于骨骼的动作情感识别具有挑战性，因为情感表达常依赖细微的动态和关系运动线索，且硬标签难以捕捉相关情感类别之间的模糊性。
AI.method: 提出多分支框架：(1) 6D旋转分支提取旋转特征；(2) 部位感知多流分支（包含速度、骨骼等多流）；(3) 元数据条件弱标签分布学习（LDL）分支。各分支独立训练，推理时通过概率级集成融合。
AI.result: 10折跨表演者交叉验证中，Accuracy从0.271提升至0.366，Macro-F1从0.252提升至0.353。消融实验表明速度和骨骼流以及手臂和腿部区域为关键线索。
AI.conclusion: 多分支融合和弱标签分布学习能有效提升骨骼动作情感识别性能，速度和骨骼模态及四肢部位对情感表达具有重要判别力。

title: Rationalizing Boltzmann Rationality: An Axiomatic Characterization of Entropy-Regularized Policies
summary: The softmax policy $π(a \mid s) \propto \exp(βQ(s,a))$ is the default model of stochastic choice in reinforcement learning (RL). Various justifications based on robustness, exploration, and optimization have been offered in the RL literature, but none uniquely derives the softmax form from first principles. This leaves a basic tension unresolved: the entropy bonus in the soft Bellman equation violates the Independence axiom that underwrites the Markov decision process (MDP) reward structure. We dissolve this tension by distinguishing two kinds of randomness: chance and choice. By restricting von Neumann-Morgenstern (VNM) Independence to environmental lotteries over base prospects, we show that imposing independence of irrelevant alternatives (IIA) and monotonicity on the policy and value functions at choice nodes uniquely determines the Boltzmann policy, the entropy-regularized representation, and the soft Bellman equation. The choice between the soft and hard Bellman equations thus reduces to a design decision: whether the agent values its own ability to choose. We develop RL-specific consequences, including return monotonicity and convergence under generalized discounting, and synthesize the independent lines from economics and information theory that arrive at the same structure, offering a normative assessment of when IIA is appropriate for agent design.

AI.tldr: 本文通过区分环境随机性（chance）与代理决策随机性（choice），证明在决策节点上施加无关选项独立性（IIA）和单调性公理可唯一导出软max策略、熵正则化表示及软贝尔曼方程，从而化解了软贝尔曼方程中熵奖励与马尔可夫决策过程独立性公理之间的张力。软/硬贝尔曼方程的选择本质上取决于代理是否珍视自身的选择能力。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中广泛使用的softmax策略缺乏从第一性原理的唯一推导，其熵奖励项与MDP的独立性公理存在紧张关系，这一基本矛盾尚未得到解决。
AI.method: 将von Neumann-Morgenstern独立性公理限制在环境彩票（基础前景）上，同时在策略和价值函数的决策节点处施加IIA和单调性公理，通过公理化方法唯一导出玻尔兹曼策略、熵正则化表示和软贝尔曼方程。
AI.result: (1) 唯一推导出玻尔兹曼策略、熵正则化表示和软贝尔曼方程；(2) 软硬贝尔曼方程的选择简化为代理是否珍视自身选择能力的设计决策；(3) 建立了广义折扣下的收益单调性和收敛性；(4) 综合了经济学和信息论中独立引出相同结构的路线。
AI.conclusion: 软贝尔曼方程与MDP框架并不冲突，关键在于区分两类随机性来源。IIA在代理设计中的适用性可以基于规范评估来确定。

title: OntoExtend: A Framework for Requirement-driven and Scalable Ontology Extension with LLMs
comment: Accepted in research track of Semantics 2026: https://2026-eu.semantics.cc/page/accepted_research
summary: Ontology extension refers to the process of enriching an existing ontology in response to emerging requirements, making it more complete. This task is a resource-intensive and error-prone process. Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown promising performance on generating ontologies from scratch, but current approaches rarely tie ontology extension explicitly to requirements or reusable core models, and offer limited, systematic evaluation of LLM outputs. This paper introduces OntoExtend, a requirements-driven framework for ontology extension with LLMs. It uses retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over relevant input ontologies and requirements in the form of competency questions to propose grounded extensions. We evaluate OntoExtend on 39 CQs from two use cases: a public EU-project ontology, Onto-DESIDE, and an industrial ontology from Bosch. The generated fragments show few structural issues, satisfy all functional evaluation tests, and are rated by ontology engineers as requiring minor to moderate revision before integration. These results suggest that OntoExtend is useful as a drafting assistant for requirement-driven ontology extension in real world scenarios, while remaining sensitive to CQ specificity and modelling profile.

AI.tldr: OntoExtend是一个需求驱动的本体扩展框架，利用大语言模型（LLMs）和检索增强生成（RAG）技术，基于能力问题（CQs）和已有本体来生成扩展方案。在39个CQs上的评估表明，生成片段结构问题少，通过所有功能测试，经本体工程师评估仅需少量到中等修改即可集成。
AI.motivation: 本体扩展是一项资源密集且易出错的任务。现有LLM方法虽能从零生成本体，但很少将扩展明确与需求或可重用核心模型关联，且缺乏对LLM输出的系统评估。
AI.method: 提出OntoExtend框架：采用检索增强生成（RAG）技术，在相关输入本体和以能力问题（CQs）形式表达的需求上进行检索，生成具有依据的本体扩展片段。
AI.result: 在两个用例（公共EU项目本体Onto-DESIDE和Bosch工业本体）的39个CQs上评估，生成片段结构问题少，通过所有功能评估测试，本体工程师评级为需少量到中等修改。
AI.conclusion: OntoExtend可作为现实场景中需求驱动本体扩展的草稿助手，对CQ特异性和建模风格具有敏感性。

title: Denoising Models Develop Human-Like Perceptual Illusion Representations Across Architectures
summary: Deep neural networks trained on natural images are shown to produce outputs consistent with human observers for brightness illusions. While this phenomenon has been documented across architectures, all evidence, to date, is measured at the output level: restored pixels, decoded trajectories, or classification decisions. Whether these models actually represent illusions internally, and if so where and how, remains unknown. We show that denoising models develop illusion-sensitive representations at specific internal layers, across varied architectures. Specifically, we identify the layers and channels that discriminate illusory from physically matched control regions. We show that the denoising objective is a more important driver of the effect than the architecture. On domain-appropriate stimuli, these activations track a validated psychophysical model of human brightness perception (FLODOG; Spearman $ρ\geq 0.70$) and scale monotonically with parametric illusion strength. Leveraging these findings, we provide causal evidence via channel ablation showing that illusion-sensitive channels specifically and substantially affect the internal signal. Yet injecting these representations into the generation pipeline produces no measurable pixel shift across all tested architectures; we term such representations perceptual phantoms: active in internal processing yet invisible to any output-based evaluation. While related internal-output dissociations have been characterized in language models, this is the first such characterization for perceptual representations in denoising vision models.

AI.tldr: 去噪模型在内部特定层和通道中发展出对亮度错觉敏感的表征，这些表征与人类感知模型高度相关，但无法通过输出级评估（如像素恢复）检测到，作者将其称为"感知幻象"。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅证明深度神经网络在输出层面（如像素恢复、分类决策）产生与人类一致的亮度错觉结果，但模型内部是否真正表征了错觉、在何处以及如何表征仍未知。
AI.method: 1) 识别去噪模型中区分错觉与物理匹配对照区域的层和通道；2) 比较去噪目标与架构对效果的影响；3) 将内部激活与人类亮度感知模型（FLODOG）进行相关性分析；4) 通过通道消融提供因果证据；5) 检验内部表征注入生成管线是否产生像素级变化。
AI.result: 去噪目标比架构更重要；内部激活与FLODOG模型高度相关（Spearman ρ≥0.70）且随错觉强度单调缩放；消融实验表明错觉敏感通道对内部信号有显著影响，但将这些表征注入生成管线不会产生可测量的像素偏移。
AI.conclusion: 发现了"感知幻象"现象——去噪视觉模型内部存在与人类感知一致的错觉表征，但这些表征在输出层面完全不可见。这是首次在去噪视觉模型中表征这种内部-输出分离现象。

title: TAPAS: Throughput-adaptive Perception for Autonomous Systems
comment: 15 Pages, 20 Figures, Accepted at ACM/IEEE International Conference on Codesign of Embedded Systems at Embedded Systems Week (ESWEEK-CODES), 2026
summary: Autonomous systems rely on a perception module to navigate through dynamic environments. In real-world scenarios, the perception module's throughput requirements vary at runtime due to changes in scene complexity. However, existing perception strategies assume a fixed FPS and static model-to-cluster mapping, resulting in either over/under provision of throughput requirements or unnecessary energy consumption across diverse scenes. Addressing this challenge requires tightly coupled \textit{scene complexity awareness} to estimate an appropriate FPS target and \textit{dynamic model-to-cluster mapping} to deliver the required throughput at minimum energy. We propose a throughput-adaptive perception strategy for mobile/edge platforms, enabling intelligent runtime resource allocation based on varying FPS targets. We use Reinforcement Learning (RL) with RRM (Reward Reasoning Model) and a GRU (Gated Recurrent Unit) agent to orchestrate perception tasks across heterogeneous mobile/edge platforms. We evaluate TAPAS on Jetson Orin NX across KITTI and unseen nuScenes. On the \textit{KITTI} dataset's test sequences, TAPAS achieves 93-100% throughput met rate while saving energy by 76%. On the unseen \textit{nuScenes} dataset, TAPAS maintains 97% throughput met rate with 64% lower energy compared to \textit{SOTA} approaches, proving its robustness.

AI.tldr: TAPAS是一种通过强化学习和GRU智能体实现的自适应感知策略，能根据场景复杂度动态调整FPS和模型-集群映射，在移动/边缘平台上以最低能耗满足吞吐需求。在Jetson Orin NX上，KITTI数据集达到93-100%吞吐满足率并节省76%能耗，在未见过的nuScenes数据集上保持97%吞吐满足率且比SOTA节能64%。
AI.motivation: 现有感知策略采用固定FPS和静态模型-集群映射，无法适应运行时场景复杂度的变化，导致吞吐量过配或欠配以及不必要的能耗浪费。
AI.method: 提出TAPAS策略，使用带RRM（奖励推理模型）的强化学习和GRU智能体，在异构移动/边缘平台上动态编排感知任务，实现基于不同FPS目标的运行时资源分配。
AI.result: 在Jetson Orin NX上，KITTI测试序列吞吐满足率93-100%，能耗降低76%；nuScenes数据集吞吐满足率97%，能耗比SOTA降低64%。
AI.conclusion: TAPAS通过场景复杂度感知和动态模型-集群映射，在保持高吞吐满足率的同时显著降低能耗，展现了良好的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

title: SAGE: Subgoal-Conditioned Action Generation for Latent World Model Planning
summary: Latent world models have emerged as a powerful planning paradigm by learning action-conditioned predictive dynamics and using them as internal simulators to imagine and evaluate candidate action sequences. However, as the planning horizon grows, performance becomes increasingly constrained by proposal quality: a fixed candidate budget must search an exponentially larger action space, making it difficult to expose the world model to high-quality candidate futures for evaluation. In this paper, we introduce a prior-conditioned planner that replaces random proposal initialization with structured guidance. At each planning stage, a goal-conditioned generator predicts the next reachable latent subgoal for a specified duration, which is then used to condition the generation of candidate action sequences. To capture semantic information across temporal scales, we use subgoals of varying durations as priors, balancing fine-grained local control with higher-level long-horizon progress. Then the frozen world model evaluates and refines these subgoal-conditioned proposals before execution. Experiments on PushT and OGBench Cube show that coupling latent subgoal decomposition with prior-conditioned action generation substantially improves long-horizon planning while preserving strong short-horizon performance. To be specific, when the target offset is $150$, it raises PushT success from $12.7\%$ to $64.7\%$ and OGBench Cube success from $26.7\%$ to $67.3\%$.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种先验条件规划器（Prior-Conditioned Planner），通过目标条件生成器预测潜在子目标，并以此指导候选动作序列的生成，显著提升了长时域规划性能。在PushT和OGBench Cube任务上，目标偏移150时成功率分别从12.7%提升至64.7%，从26.7%提升至67.3%。
AI.motivation: 在潜空间世界模型中，随着规划时域增长，固定的候选预算需要在指数级增大的动作空间中搜索，导致难以生成高质量的候选未来供世界模型评估，长时域规划性能受到候选质量的严重制约。
AI.method: 提出先验条件规划器：在每个规划阶段，使用目标条件生成器预测未来指定时长的可达潜在子目标，以此作为先验条件来生成候选动作序列；采用不同时长的子目标捕捉跨时间尺度的语义信息，平衡细粒度局部控制与高层长时域进展；冻结的世界模型评估并优化这些子目标条件下的候选方案。
AI.result: 在PushT和OGBench Cube基准上，目标偏移为150时，长时域规划成功率分别从12.7%提升至64.7%，从26.7%提升至67.3%，同时短时域性能保持良好。
AI.conclusion: 将潜在子目标分解与先验条件动作生成相结合，能够有效提升长时域规划性能，同时不牺牲短时域表现。

title: STBridge: Shared-Target Alignment for Bridging Understanding and Generation in UMMs
summary: Unified multimodal models (UMMs) aim to integrate visual understanding and generation within a single architecture, but architectural unification alone does not ensure semantic consistency. A model may describe the intended target correctly while generating an inconsistent edit. This exposes an understanding-generation alignment gap: linguistic and visual outputs live in different spaces, yet should be governed by the same target semantics. We study this gap in image editing, where an instruction defines a target state that can be both described and visually realized. Given a source image and an edit instruction, we compare a UMM's target caption with its edited image to test whether the two outputs converge on the same result. Our analysis shows that existing UMMs remain weakly aligned, especially for fine-grained entities, attributes, spatial relations, and local details, indicating that semantic unification is not achieved by architecture alone. To bridge this gap, we propose STBridge, a shared-target alignment framework that connects understanding and generation through a common target state. Here the target caption expresses the desired visual result, while the edited image realizes it visually, replacing separate task-specific paths with a shared information flow from target expression to target realization. STBridge follows an align-then-optimize strategy: supervised fine-tuning first establishes the shared-target channel, and sequential reinforcement learning further refines target-centered coordination. Across visual understanding, image generation, and image editing benchmarks, STBridge consistently improves over the initialization model. Alignment analysis confirms that STBridge narrows the gap between what the model describes and what it generates, demonstrating shared-target alignment as an effective post-training strategy for bridging understanding and generation in UMMs.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了统一多模态模型中理解与生成之间的对齐差距，发现仅架构统一不足以实现语义一致性。提出STBridge框架，通过共享目标对齐策略（先监督微调建立通道，再序列强化学习优化协调）来弥合该差距，在多个基准上取得一致提升。
AI.motivation: 现有的统一多模态模型在架构上整合了视觉理解与生成，但架构统一本身无法保证语义一致性——模型可能正确描述目标却生成不一致的编辑结果，暴露出理解与生成之间的对齐差距。
AI.method: 提出STBridge共享目标对齐框架，采用对齐-优化两阶段策略：第一阶段通过监督微调建立共享目标通道，使目标描述与目标视觉化表达共享信息流；第二阶段通过序列强化学习进一步优化目标中心的协调机制，连接理解与生成。
AI.result: 在视觉理解、图像生成和图像编辑等多个基准上，STBridge一致优于初始化模型；对齐分析表明该框架有效缩小了模型描述与生成结果之间的差距。
AI.conclusion: 共享目标对齐是一种有效的后训练策略，能够弥合统一多模态模型中理解与生成之间的语义鸿沟，证明了语义统一不能仅靠架构实现，还需要专门的对齐训练。

title: Do Maps Still Matter for Machines: Revisiting the Role of Choropleth Maps in Foundation Model Spatial Understanding
summary: Spatial understanding is crucial for foundation models (FMs), and maps have long helped humans organize and reason about geographic information. This study examines whether choropleth maps remain useful for machine spatial understanding when models can directly process structured geodata. We introduce ChoroplethMap-Bench, a controlled benchmark containing 2,400 synthetic choropleth maps, corresponding GeoJSON data, and 12,000 questions across five cognitive dimensions: Identify, Spatial Recognition, Compare, Rank, and Delineate. We evaluate 22 open-source and proprietary models under three input conditions: Data Only, Map Only, and Data + Map. The results show that maps substantially improve spatial reasoning, especially when combined with symbolic data and for tasks requiring higher-level understanding of spatial patterns. We further analyze the effects of map type, color hue, and spatial structure, as well as prompting strategies, language, geographic context, decoding settings, classification methods, and response stability. Overall, the Data + Map condition achieves the strongest performance, demonstrating that maps remain valuable external representations for foundation model spatial reasoning.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了ChoroplethMap-Bench基准数据集，通过实验证明 choropleth 地图作为外部视觉表征，能显著提升基础模型的空间推理能力，且与符号数据结合时效果最佳。
AI.motivation: 研究当基础模型可以直接处理结构化地理数据（如GeoJSON）时，传统 choropleth 地图是否仍对机器空间理解有价值，以及地图作为外部表征是否能增强模型的空间推理能力。
AI.method: 构建包含2,400张合成 choropleth 地图、对应GeoJSON数据和12,000个问题的基准测试ChoroplethMap-Bench，覆盖五种认知维度（识别、空间识别、比较、排序、描绘）；评估22个开源及闭源模型在三种输入条件（仅数据、仅地图、数据+地图）下的表现。
AI.result: 地图显著提升了空间推理性能，尤其在与符号数据结合时以及需要高层次空间模式理解的任务中表现突出；数据+地图条件达到最佳性能。
AI.conclusion: 地图作为外部视觉表征对基础模型的空间推理仍然具有重要价值，特别是在与结构化数据联合使用时效果最优。

title: Noise-Robust Box-Supervised Infrared Small Target Detection via Physics-Inspired Soft Label Optimization
summary: Infrared small target detection (IRSTD) commonly relies on pixel-level mask supervision. Such annotations, however, are costly and inherently uncertain because infrared targets have blurred boundaries and weak textures. We formulate box-supervised IRSTD as a problem distinct from generic box-to-mask segmentation and point-supervised IRSTD. Its central challenge is to construct stable pixel-level soft supervision from highly contaminated boxes. To this end, we propose Hotspot-Anchored Label Optimization (HALO). HALO localizes a radiometric anchor inside each box under local background-statistics constraints, then synthesizes a Physically Anchored Gaussian (PAG) soft label around the anchor. This turns noisy box supervision into continuous, pixel-level soft labels. The entire process is performed offline before training, remains decoupled from the detector backbone, and requires no online label updates. Experiments on public datasets show that HALO is competitive with representative box-supervised methods under standard tight boxes. Under looser or shifted box annotations that better approximate real scenarios, HALO is substantially more robust while remaining consistent across backbones. We further introduce a contamination-aware operating-regime analysis to characterize the effective boundary of this class of methods and reveal how intrinsic signal-to-clutter ratio relates to performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Hotspot-Anchored Label Optimization (HALO)方法，通过从噪声框标注中定位辐射锚点并合成物理锚定高斯软标签，将框监督转化为像素级软标签用于红外小目标检测，在框标注宽松或偏移时表现鲁棒。
AI.motivation: 红外小目标检测依赖像素级掩码标注，但此类标注成本高且因目标边界模糊、纹理弱而存在固有不确定性；现有框监督方法无法直接适用于红外场景，需要构建稳定的像素级软标签。
AI.method: 提出HALO方法：在每个框内基于局部背景统计约束定位辐射锚点，然后围绕锚点合成物理锚定高斯(PAG)软标签，将噪声框监督转化为连续像素级软标签。整个过程离线进行，与检测主干解耦。
AI.result: 在标准紧框下与代表性框监督方法竞争力相当；在更宽松或偏移的框标注（更接近真实场景）下，HALO鲁棒性显著提升且在不同主干网络中保持一致性。同时引入了污染感知的工作区域分析以表征方法有效边界。
AI.conclusion: HALO有效解决了红外小目标检测中框监督的噪声问题，尤其在标注质量不佳时展现出优越的鲁棒性，为降低标注成本提供了可行方案。

title: When Drift Detectors cry Wolf: False Alarm Rates in continuous ML Monitoring
summary: Drift detection is a core component of production machine learning monitoring systems, where detectors are used to compare incoming data with a reference distribution and trigger alerts when changes occur. However, these detectors are often evaluated in research settings that emphasize detection accuracy under synthetic shifts, while overlooking false alarms under continuous monitoring. In production environments, models are monitored repeatedly over time and across many features, and even small false positive rates can accumulate into frequent alerts, leading to alarm fatigue. We empirically analyze false positive behavior across five commonly used drift detectors: PSI, KS, MMD, LSDD, and adversarial validation. Consistent with existing literature, PSI exhibits strong sensitivity to batch size, producing frequent false alarms at small sample sizes; however, we further observe that its behavior stabilizes and improves substantially once batch sizes exceed approximately 200 samples. In contrast, KS, MMD, and LSDD display persistent fluctuations across batch sizes, while remaining comparatively more reliable than PSI in low-data regimes. Applying a Bonferroni correction reduces false positive rates, but often at the cost of reduced true positive sensitivity, reinforcing the well-known stability - sensitivity trade-off in drift detection. This work provides a systematic comparison of false positive behavior across multiple drift detectors under continuous monitoring conditions. We identify tradeoffs across detector families and provide practical guidelines for selecting and calibrating drift detectors in production ML systems.

AI.tldr: 本文系统比较了五种常用漂移检测器（PSI、KS、MMD、LSDD和对抗验证）在持续监控条件下的假阳性行为，发现PSI在小批量时假阳性率高但随样本量增加（>200）显著改善，而KS、MMD、LSDD则表现出持续性波动。Bonferroni校正可降低假阳性率但牺牲灵敏度，揭示了稳定性与灵敏度之间的权衡，并为生产环境中的漂移检测器选择与校准提供了实用指导。
AI.motivation: 生产环境中的漂移检测器面临持续监控下的假阳性累积问题，导致告警疲劳，而现有研究多关注合成偏移下的检测准确率，忽略了假阳性行为。本文旨在填补这一空白，系统评估不同检测器在持续监控条件下的假阳性表现。
AI.method: 对PSI、KS、MMD、LSDD和对抗验证五种常用漂移检测器进行实证分析，在不同批量大小下比较其假阳性率，并评估Bonferroni校正对假阳性与真阳性灵敏度的影响。
AI.result: PSI对批量大小高度敏感，小样本时假阳性频繁，但批量超过200后稳定性显著提升；KS、MMD、LSDD在不同批量下持续波动但低数据量时比PSI更可靠；Bonferroni校正降低假阳性但牺牲真阳性灵敏度。
AI.conclusion: 漂移检测存在稳定性与灵敏度之间的根本权衡，生产环境中应根据数据批量大小和告警容忍度选择合适的检测器及校准策略，本文提供了系统的比较框架和实用指南。

title: PAMD: Structured Adaptive Distances for Bisimulation Representations in Visual Reinforcement Learning
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, plus appendix. Accepted to the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary:
Many visual reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms learn representations by matching latent distances to a behavioral distance induced by reward and transition similarity. In practice, the choice of the latent distance can strongly affect performance: using a fixed, pre-specified global norms (e.g., $\ell_p$ norms or other hand-designed metrics) may be overly restrictive to capture the behavioral distance. In contrast, unconstrained pairwise distances may admit degenerate solutions that drive the metric loss down without improving the representation. To address this gap, we introduce **PAMD: Pairwise Adaptive Mahalanobis Distance**, which parameterizes a positive-definite, pair-conditioned metric for measuring latent state similarity.
  PAMD is a simple plug-in for existing bisimulation-based methods, offering a more expressive yet structured alternative to fixed, pre-specified latent distances. We empirically validate our method on visual MuJoCo continuous-control tasks, where final performance of several recent bisimulation-based RL algorithms is substantially improved when equipped with the distance we propose.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAMD（成对自适应马氏距离），一种参数化的正定、成对条件度量，用于替代视觉强化学习中固定的全局潜空间距离，以更准确地捕捉行为距离，并显著提升多种基于双模拟的RL算法在视觉MuJoCo任务中的表现。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉强化学习算法使用固定全局范数（如ℓ_p范数）作为潜空间距离，难以准确捕捉由奖励和转移相似性定义的行为距离；而完全无约束的成对距离又会导致退化解。因此需要一种兼具表达力和结构化的距离度量。
AI.method: 提出PAMD（Pairwise Adaptive Mahalanobis Distance），通过参数化一个正定的、成对条件的马氏距离矩阵来衡量潜状态相似性，并将其作为即插即用模块集成到现有的基于双模拟的RL方法中。
AI.result: 在视觉MuJoCo连续控制任务上，将PAMD嵌入多种近期双模拟RL算法后，最终性能得到显著提升。
AI.conclusion: PAMD提供了一种比固定全局潜距离更具表达力且结构化的替代方案，能更有效地学习行为距离，从而改进视觉RL的表征学习质量。

title: VLA-ReID: Video-Level Association for Re-Identification in Multi-Object Tracking with Highly Similar Objects
summary: Multi-object tracking (MOT) aims to localize multiple objects in videos while preserving their identities over time. Long-term identity preservation remains difficult when objects are small, densely distributed, and highly similar in appearance, as in bee swarm scenes. Existing trackers rely on re-identification (re-ID) models trained through single-instance assignment (instance-level querying). At inference, however, MOT requires global assignment between multiple trajectories and detections, corresponding to video-level querying. This training-inference mismatch can cause identity switches among visually similar objects. Existing approaches also often require substantial additional annotations to enhance appearance discrimination. We propose Video-Level Association re-ID (VLA-ReID), which reformulates re-ID as video-level association modeling. It uses aggregated historical trajectory features as queries and all current-frame detections as candidates, enabling direct optimization of their global association at each frame. In addition, Frame-Common Appearance Estimation (FCAE) estimates a common appearance direction from current-frame detections, while Common-Appearance Suppression (CAS) removes the corresponding component along this direction from trajectory and detection features. This amplifies discriminative differences among highly similar objects without additional annotations. Experiments on BEE24 show that VLA-ReID improves HOTA by 1.1, MOTA by 0.3, AssR by 2.6, AssA by 0.7, and IDF1 by 0.8 over state-of-the-art trackers, while reducing identity switches by 28%. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of video-level re-ID modeling for appearance-based association in MOT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VLA-ReID方法，将重识别任务重新定义为视频级关联建模，通过聚合历史轨迹特征作为查询、当前帧检测作为候选，直接优化全局关联。同时提出FCAE和CAS模块，无需额外标注即可放大高度相似物体间的判别差异，在BEE24数据集上显著提升多目标跟踪性能。
AI.motivation: 现有MOT方法在目标小、密集分布且外观高度相似的场景（如蜂群）中，长期身份保持困难。主要原因是重识别模型在训练时采用单实例分配（实例级查询），而推理时需进行多轨迹与检测之间的全局分配（视频级查询），这种训练-推理不匹配导致视觉相似物体间身份切换频发。
AI.method: 1) Video-Level Association re-ID (VLA-ReID)：将重识别重新定义为视频级关联建模，使用聚合的历史轨迹特征作为查询，所有当前帧检测作为候选，直接优化每帧的全局关联；2) Frame-Common Appearance Estimation (FCAE)：从当前帧检测中估计公共外观方向；3) Common-Appearance Suppression (CAS)：沿该方向从轨迹和检测特征中移除公共外观分量，放大高度相似物体间的判别差异，无需额外标注。
AI.result: 在BEE24数据集上，相比SOTA跟踪器，HOTA提升1.1，MOTA提升0.3，AssR提升2.6，AssA提升0.7，IDF1提升0.8，身份切换减少28%。
AI.conclusion: 视频级重识别建模对MOT中基于外观的关联是有效的，解决了训练-推理不匹配问题，并能在无需额外标注的情况下增强判别能力。

title: A multiverse-consensus pipeline for reproducible feature selection in untargeted LC-MS metabolomics
summary: Background: Untargeted LC-MS metabolomics requires a long chain of preprocessing decisions, each with several equally defensible options. Analysts typically commit to one pipeline and report the resulting feature shortlist. How strongly that shortlist depends on choices that were never varied stays invisible. Results: We adapt multiverse analysis to untargeted metabolomics feature selection. We present an auditable, configuration-driven pipeline that (i) applies a ten-stage quality-control filter cascade in which every feature's fate is logged, and (ii) runs the downstream analysis as a multiverse over four contrasting preprocessing philosophies, each combined with four feature-ranking methods under bootstrap stability selection and label-permutation testing. Only features recurring across paths enter a tiered consensus. On a demonstration dataset of five breast-cancer cell lines (30,370 detected features), the four single pipelines individually returned shortlists of 4-20 features whose pairwise agreement was as low as Jaccard = 0.05. The multiverse consensus retained 15 features (>=2/4 paths), of which one recurred across all four, although two paths (sharing normalization and drift-correction methods) dominate the consensus. A pipeline-wide label-permutation test found no false discoveries in 50 null permutations. Conclusions: Reporting only preprocessing-robust features, with a complete kept/dropped audit trail, converts hidden analytical degrees of freedom into an explicit, inspectable output. We discuss scope and limitations, including single-batch design and the need for independent validation.

AI.tldr: 本文将多宇宙分析（multiverse analysis）引入非靶向LC-MS代谢组学特征选择，通过可审计的配置驱动流程，对4种预处理哲学×4种特征排序方法进行系统比较，并以共识机制筛选出预处理鲁棒的特征。在乳腺癌细胞系数据集中，单一流程的特征列表间Jaccard系数低至0.05，而多宇宙共识保留15个特征，其中1个跨所有路径重现。
AI.motivation: 非靶向LC-MS代谢组学分析涉及大量预处理决策（如归一化、漂移校正、特征筛选等），每一环节都有多种合理选项。分析师通常只采用单一流程并报告最终特征列表，导致未显式变化的分析自由度对结果的潜在影响被隐藏。本文旨在使这些隐式自由度变得明确、可审计，从而提高结果的可信度和可复现性。
AI.method: 方法包括：(i) 一个十阶段质量控制过滤级联，记录每个特征的去留轨迹；(ii) 下游分析采用多宇宙设计：4种对比性预处理哲学 × 4种特征排序方法，结合bootstrap稳定性选择和标签置换检验；(iii) 仅跨路径重现的特征进入分层共识（tiered consensus）。对5种乳腺癌细胞系（30,370个检测特征）进行演示分析。
AI.result: 四种单一流程分别返回4-20个特征，两两间Jaccard系数低至0.05。多宇宙共识保留15个特征（≥2/4路径），其中1个在所有4条路径中重现，但共识主要受共享归一化和漂移校正方法的两条路径主导。全流程标签置换检验（50次零置换）未发现假阳性。
AI.conclusion: 仅报告对预处理选择鲁棒的特征，并附带完整的保留/剔除审计轨迹，可将隐藏的分析自由度转化为明确、可检查的输出。讨论了局限性，包括单批次设计和独立验证的必要性。

title: Rethinking Heterogeneous LLM Merging: A Weighted Model Averaging Perspective
summary: Can large language models with substantially different parameter spaces be merged by direct weighted averaging, without training or semantic alignment? Existing heterogeneous fusion methods typically introduce distillation, adapters, learned latent spaces, routing, or feature alignment, leaving open whether a simpler recipe can work for genuinely different billion-parameter checkpoints. We revisit this counterintuitive question through training-free dimensional adaptation followed by ratio-controlled interpolation. In union-style merging, we expand the smaller model into the larger parameter space; in intersection-style merging, we truncate the larger model into the smaller parameter space. Across Qwen-family model pairs and benchmarks covering mathematical reasoning, code generation, language understanding, commonsense reasoning, knowledge, and instruction following, deterministic expansion largely preserves the source model function, and small-ratio interpolation can improve over strong source checkpoints by transferring complementary capabilities. However, near-balanced interpolation often collapses, and task-level results reveal a seesaw effect in which gains on some capabilities coexist with regressions on others. These results show that simple parameter averaging, when paired with lightweight dimensional adaptation and carefully controlled ratios, is a surprisingly strong baseline for heterogeneous LLM merging, suggesting that the limits of direct weighted fusion may also bound what more complex heterogeneous merging methods can achieve at scale.

AI.tldr: 本文探索了无需训练或语义对齐，仅通过维度适配和比例可控的插值来合并参数空间差异巨大的大语言模型。实验发现，确定性扩展能保留源模型功能，小比例插值可通过迁移互补能力提升性能，但平衡插值常导致崩溃，且存在“跷跷板效应”。最终表明简单加权平均搭配轻量维度适配是异构LLM合并的强力基线。
AI.motivation: 现有异构模型融合方法通常需要蒸馏、适配器、潜在空间学习、路由或特征对齐等复杂技术，本文探究更简单的方案——无需训练的直接加权平均是否能合并参数空间差异巨大的十亿级LLM。
AI.method: 采用无训练的维度适配（union式扩展小模型、intersection式截断大模型）配合比例可控的插值（interpolation）实现异构LLM的合并。
AI.result: 确定性扩展可保留源模型功能；小比例插值能迁移互补能力以提升性能；但接近平衡的插值常导致性能崩塌，且任务层面存在“跷跷板效应”（部分能力提升伴随其他能力下降）。
AI.conclusion: 简单的参数加权平均搭配轻量维度适配是异构LLM合并的强基线方法，也暗示了更复杂融合方法在规模化条件下的性能上限可能受限于直接加权融合的边界。

title: BanClickThumb: A Multimodal Dataset and Transformer Fusion Benchmarks for Clickbait Detection in Bengali YouTube Videos
summary: Clickbait, where video titles and thumbnails exaggerate or misrepresent content, reduces user trust, wastes attention, and promotes misinformation on video-sharing platforms. Detecting Bengali clickbait remains challenging because publicly available multimodal datasets are limited. To address this gap, we introduce BanClickThumb, a curated dataset of 7,147 Bengali YouTube thumbnail-title pairs from five content domains, annotated by ten annotators with high agreement (Cohen's Kappa: 0.83-0.93). Using this dataset, we benchmark text-only, image-only, and multimodal approaches. Among unimodal models, BanClickTextFormer (XLM-RoBERTa) achieves 0.82 accuracy, while BanClickImageFormer (SwiftFormer) reaches 0.68. Our proposed multimodal model, BanClickFusionFormer, combines ViT and XLM-RoBERTa through intermediate fusion and achieves the best accuracy of 0.84. Error analysis shows that dense thumbnail text, figurative language, and culturally specific slang remain challenging. Our findings demonstrate the effectiveness of multimodal fusion for Bengali clickbait detection and provide a publicly available benchmark to support future research on low-resource multimodal content analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文针对孟加拉语YouTube视频的点击诱饵检测问题，构建了包含7,147个缩略图-标题对的多模态数据集BanClickThumb，并提出了基于中间融合的BanClickFusionFormer多模态模型（ViT + XLM-RoBERTa），在点击诱饵检测任务上达到0.84的准确率，优于单模态基线模型。
AI.motivation: 点击诱饵（夸大的视频标题和缩略图）会降低用户信任、浪费注意力并助长虚假信息，而孟加拉语领域的多模态点击诱饵检测因缺乏公开数据集而面临挑战，现有研究对此关注不足。
AI.method: 构建BanClickThumb数据集（7,147对缩略图-标题，5个内容领域，10名标注者，Cohen's Kappa 0.83-0.93）；基准测试文本单模态（XLM-RoBERTa，0.82准确率）、图像单模态（SwiftFormer，0.68准确率）和多模态方法；提出BanClickFusionFormer模型，结合ViT与XLM-RoBERTa并通过中间融合（intermediate fusion）实现多模态特征融合。
AI.result: BanClickFusionFormer多模态模型达到最佳准确率0.84，优于文本单模态（0.82）和图像单模态（0.68）；密集缩略图文本、比喻性语言及文化特有俚语仍为挑战。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合对孟加拉语点击诱饵检测有效，所构建的公开基准数据集BanClickThumb可为低资源多模态内容分析研究提供支持。

title: Chebyshev Manifold Adaptation
summary: The paper presents a new parameter-efficient adaptation method called ChebyMA (Chebyshev Manifold Adaptation). ChebyMA adopts weight matrices through a multi-surface superposition of Chebyshev polynomial bases evaluated on learnable coordinates and combined via trainable coefficient matrices, replacing standard linear projections with highly expressive continuous function approximation. Theoretically, we establish an Approximation Expressivity Theorem, proving from the perspective of function approximation theory that single-manifold ChebyMA guarantees convergence in Frobenius norm error of reconstruction. Besides, drawing on Kolmogorov $n$-width intuition, we demonstrate the expressive advantages of multi-manifold superposition ($S > 1$) in decoupling high-dimensional complex features. Experimental results on Computer Vision CIFAR datasets(CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100)\cite{CIFAR} and Natural Language Processing (AG News, SST-2) datasets demonstrate that ChebyMA consistently achieves a superior parameter-accuracy Pareto front compared to standard full-parameter fine-tuning, LoRA\cite{LoRA}, TLoRA\cite{TLoRA}, and StelLA\cite{StelLA}. ChebyMA significantly outperforms other tested methods in tested datasets, validating its solid theoretical foundation for generality with purely vectorized computations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为 ChebyMA（切比雪夫流形自适应）的参数高效微调方法，通过切比雪夫多项式基的多流形叠加替换标准线性投影，实现了高表达力的连续函数逼近，并在理论上证明了逼近表达性定理，实验表明该方法在多个 CV 和 NLP 数据集上取得了优于全参数微调、LoRA、TLoRA 和 StelLA 的参数量-精度帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 现有参数高效微调方法（如 LoRA）在表达能力和参数效率之间仍存在权衡，尤其在处理高维复杂特征时表达能力有限。本文旨在通过函数逼近理论设计一种更具表达力且参数高效的适配方法。
AI.method: ChebyMA 通过可学习坐标上的切比雪夫多项式基的多流形叠加（多曲面叠加）来替换标准线性投影，利用可训练的系数矩阵组合这些基，实现连续的、高度表达性的函数逼近。核心包括单流形逼近收敛性保证以及多流形叠加（S>1）对高维复杂特征解耦的表达优势。
AI.result: 在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100（CV）以及 AG News、SST-2（NLP）数据集上，ChebyMA 在参数量-精度帕累托前沿上持续优于全参数微调、LoRA、TLoRA 和 StelLA，显著超越所有对比方法。
AI.conclusion: ChebyMA 具有坚实的函数逼近理论基础，通过纯向量化计算实现了良好的泛化性能，是一种通用且有效的参数高效微调方法。

title: AdaHome: An Adaptive Smart Home Assistant using Local Small Language Models
summary: Smart home assistants interpret a wide range of user commands, from explicit device control to underspecified and preference dependent requests. While recent systems based on Large Language Models (LLMs) improve this capability, they often rely on heavyweight reasoning pipelines and cloud-based deployment, limiting their efficiency and suitability for resource-constrained environments, and raising privacy concerns. In addition, existing approaches provide limited support for stable long-term personalization. To address these issues, we present AdaHome, an adaptive smart home assistant designed for locally deployed small language models in smart home environments. Rather than applying complex reasoning uniformly, AdaHome introduces an intent-aware planning framework that dynamically routes commands either to straightforward prompt-based or lightweight reasoning-based components. For commands requiring interpretation, we adopt a Chain-of-Draft strategy to enable efficient and stable decision-making. To support personalization, we further propose a preference adaptation mechanism that learns from user feedback over time without requiring prompt augmentation or model retraining. We evaluate AdaHome against representative LLM-based baselines under a unified small model setting. AdaHome achieves substantially higher accuracy on direct commands (86.7%) while reducing latency by up to 3$\times$. Furthermore, it maintains competitive performance on ambiguous inputs with lower computational cost. In multi-turn scenarios, AdaHome achieves 88% preference consistency, compared to 52.5% for a prompt augmentation baseline.

AI.tldr: AdaHome提出了一种面向智能家居场景的本地小语言模型自适应助手，通过意图感知规划框架、Chain-of-Draft推理策略和偏好适应机制，在资源受限环境下实现了高效、精准且支持个性化定制的命令处理。
AI.motivation: 现有基于LLM的智能家居助手存在三个主要问题：(1)依赖重型推理流水线和云端部署，效率低下且不适合资源受限环境，并引发隐私担忧；(2)对长期稳定的个性化支持有限；(3)对所有命令统一采用复杂推理，造成不必要的计算开销。
AI.method: (1) 意图感知规划框架：动态将命令路由到直接提示组件或轻量级推理组件；(2) Chain-of-Draft策略：对需要解释的命令实现高效稳定的决策；(3) 偏好适应机制：从用户反馈中在线学习，无需提示增强或模型重训练。
AI.result: 在统一小模型设置下：(1) 直接命令准确率86.7%，延迟降低3倍；(2) 模糊输入下以更低计算成本保持竞争性能；(3) 多轮场景偏好一致性达88%，对比基线仅52.5%。
AI.conclusion: AdaHome验证了在本地小语言模型上实现高效、准确且可个性化的智能家居助手的可行性，为资源受限环境下的智能家居交互提供了实用解决方案。

title: Cross-Coordinate Correspondence Pruning for Image-to-Point Cloud Registration
summary: Recent detection-free approaches have shown significant efficacy in image-to-point cloud (I2P) registration by employing a coarse-to-fine matching pipeline. In the coarse stage, down-sampled image features and voxelized point cloud features are typically fused to establish initial coarse correspondences for subsequent refinement. However, existing methods largely overlook the critical role of point cloud density, which fundamentally dictates the quality of coarse correspondences and the final registration results. Specifically, excessively sparse point clouds lead to an insufficient number of inliers, while overly dense ones often introduce a high outlier ratio. Consequently, this creates an inherent density trade-off, thereby significantly limiting the registration accuracy of current approaches. For mitigating this trade-off, we propose a novel Cross-Coordinate Correspondences Pruning (CCP) strategy to acquire sufficient inliers while ensuring a low outlier ratio. To minimize interference from inter-modal coordinate discrepancies, we first project cross-coordinate coarse correspondences to the 2D image coordinate system for spatial unification. Subsequently, a lightweight pruning network is responsible for predicting the inlier confidences, which are used to filter coarse outliers, from coordinate geometric and modal feature dimensions. To maximize inlier recall, we further design a Multi-Density Point Ensemble (MDPE) strategy that consolidates and deduplicates pruned coarse correspondences across varying point cloud densities. Our method achieves a significant performance improvement, surpassing existing state-of-the-art methods by at least 8.6% in Registration Recall across various benchmarks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出跨坐标对应关系剪枝（CCP）策略和多密度点集成（MDPE）策略，解决图像到点云配准中因点云密度变化导致的粗匹配内点不足与外点率高的固有权衡问题，在多个基准上配准召回率至少提升8.6%。
AI.motivation: 现有免检测的I2P配准方法采用粗到细匹配管线，但忽略了点云密度的关键作用：稀疏点云内点不足，密集点云外点率高，存在固有的密度权衡问题，严重限制了配准精度。
AI.method: 提出CCP策略：首先将跨坐标粗对应投影到2D图像坐标系实现空间统一，然后通过轻量级剪枝网络从坐标几何和模态特征维度预测内点置信度以过滤粗外点。进一步设计MDPE策略，在不同点云密度下整合并去重剪枝后的粗对应，最大化内点召回率。
AI.result: 在多个基准上配准召回率超越现有SOTA方法至少8.6%。
AI.conclusion: 通过CCP和MDPE策略有效缓解了点云密度权衡问题，显著提升了I2P配准精度。

title: CoEvoP&R: Co-Evolving Placement Objectives with Routing Feedback via Large Language Models
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Corresponding author: Weihua Xiao
summary: Analytical placers rely on differentiable objective functions to guide placement, typically combining intermediate surrogate metrics such as half-perimeter wirelength (HPWL) and cell-density penalties. However, these placement-stage surrogates remain misaligned with downstream routed and timing quality. Prior work reduces this gap with human-designed terms or learned black-box surrogates, but the former requires expert retuning and the latter is difficult to explain, debug, or deploy in analytical placement flows. CoEvoP&R addresses these limitations with a large language model (LLM)-based framework that automatically evolves analytical placement objectives. At each generation, the prompt combines the restricted objective interface, baseline context, and archived prior candidates with routing-related feedback from placement, timing proxy, and routing tools. The LLM proposes readable differentiable objectives, which are embedded and validated in DREAMPlace, evaluated through a timing proxy and an actual router, and stored with their feedback to guide later generations. Across eight ChiP-Bench Nangate45 designs and three seeds, CoEvoP&R reduces post-route routed wirelength and congestion by 16.9% and 36.7%, with gains of 0.70 ns in worst negative slack and a 912 ns reduction in total negative slack magnitude over native DREAMPlace. Across eight ICCAD 2015 Superblue designs, it reduces post-route routed wirelength and congestion by 5.4% and 23.2%. Code is available at https://github.com/FCHXWH823/CoEvoP-R.git.

AI.tldr: CoEvoP&R 是一种基于大语言模型（LLM）的框架，能够自动进化分析性布局目标函数，通过可读的微分目标函数和路由相关反馈，显著降低绕线长度、拥塞并改善时序，在多个基准设计中优于原生 DREAMPlace。
AI.motivation: 现有分析性布局器依赖半周长线长（HPWL）和单元密度惩罚等中间替代指标，但这些指标与下游实际绕线和时序质量存在错位。人工设计项需要专家反复调参，而学习型黑盒替代指标难以解释、调试和部署，限制了布局优化效果。
AI.method: 提出 CoEvoP&R 框架，利用 LLM 自动进化分析性布局目标函数。每代通过提示组合受限目标接口、基线上下文和存档历史候选，结合来自布局、时序代理和绕线工具的路由相关反馈。LLM 提出可读的微分目标函数，在 DREAMPlace 中嵌入验证，通过时序代理和实际路由器评估，并存储反馈以指导后续进化迭代。
AI.result: 在 ChiP-Bench Nangate45 的 8 个设计上，相比原生 DREAMPlace，绕线长度减少 16.9%，拥塞降低 36.7%，最差负松弛改善 0.70 ns，总负松弛大小减少 912 ns。在 ICCAD 2015 Superblue 的 8 个设计上，绕线长度减少 5.4%，拥塞降低 23.2%。
AI.conclusion: CoEvoP&R 通过 LLM 自动进化目标函数，有效弥合了布局替代指标与下游实际质量之间的差距，同时保持了目标函数的可读性和可解释性，是一种实用且高效的自动化布局优化框架。

title: The Shared Discovery Paradox: How a One-Answer Rule Turns Better Information into Worse Search
comment: 29 pages, 4 figures. Code, data, and an interactive guide: https://github.com/yoheinakajima/shared-discovery-paradox
summary: Organizations often pool dispersed information into one ranking and then allow many agents to act on that shared view. In a discovery problem, this can improve beliefs while reducing coverage. We develop an exactly solvable benchmark with sixteen boxes, one target, eight searchers, and noisy private clues. Pooling raises the accuracy of the best single recommendation from 0.20 to 0.3835, but repeating that recommendation lowers group discovery from 0.8322 under decentralized clue-following to 0.3835. A coordinated eight-action portfolio using the same pooled reports reaches 0.8594, and seven coordinated actions recover the decentralized benchmark. The paradox is a protocol failure, not an information failure: a one-answer rule compresses a portfolio of available actions into one repeated choice. We then replace the planner with self-interested searchers who split a prize. The equal-split game is a potential game. Its anonymous symmetric equilibrium obeys a water-filling rule. In the canonical instance it achieves 0.5991: strictly above consensus, but below both private search and the planner. The exact mixed price of anarchy is 2 - 1/N. A sole-rescue reward, which pays only an agent who covers the target alone, makes every pure Nash equilibrium first-best. Finally, a latent common-cue model shows how correlated reports collapse effective discovery channels. The centralized planner gain rises strictly with copying, and in the canonical environment the symmetric market overtakes decentralized report-following at copying probability c = 0.788462. In a proportional large-market limit the five-protocol ordering survives exactly: consensus discovery vanishes while blind, market, private, and portfolio search converge to 0.500, 0.547, 0.847, and 0.874. The contribution is a compact benchmark that separates information, allocation, incentives, and dependence into exact, reusable quantities.

AI.tldr: 本文通过一个包含16个盒子、1个目标、8个搜索者和噪声私有线索的精确可解基准模型，研究了信息聚合（排名）对群体发现任务的影响。发现共识（重复单一推荐）会降低群体发现率（从0.8322降至0.3835），而协调的投资组合策略可恢复并超越分散搜索水平（达0.8594）。进一步分析了自利搜索者的博弈均衡、混合价格无政府状态（2-1/N）、独家救援奖励机制以及潜在共同线索模型，揭示了协议失效而非信息失效的本质。在大市场极限下，五种协议的排序保持不变。
AI.motivation: 组织常将分散信息汇集为单一排名，然后让多个行动者基于这一共享观点行动。在发现类问题中，这种做法可能改善信念同时减少覆盖范围。作者旨在构建一个精确可解基准，分离信息、分配、激励和依赖关系，以揭示这种信息共享策略的效率悖论。
AI.method: 构建了16个盒子、1个目标、8个搜索者、噪声私有线索的基准模型。比较了五种协议：分散线索跟踪、单一共识推荐、协调投资组合、自利搜索者博弈（均分奖励和独家救援奖励），以及潜在共同线索模型。使用了博弈论中的势博弈、水填充规则、混合价格无政府状态等分析工具。
AI.result: 共识将最佳推荐准确率从0.20提升至0.3835，但将群体发现率从0.8322降至0.3835。协调的8行动投资组合达0.8594，7个协调行动即可恢复分散基准。均分博弈达0.5991，介于共识和分散搜索之间。混合价格无政府状态为2-1/N。独家救援奖励使每个纯纳什均衡达到最优。在大市场极限下，共识发现趋近于0，而盲搜、市场、私有和投资组合搜索分别收敛至0.500、0.547、0.847和0.874。
AI.conclusion: 信息聚合导致群体发现率下降的本质是协议失效（one-answer rule将可用行动组合压缩为单一重复选择），而非信息失效。通过适当的协调机制（投资组合）或激励设计（独家救援奖励）可以恢复甚至超越分散搜索效率。该基准模型为分离信息、分配、激励和依赖关系提供了精确可重用的量化框架。

title: Induce to Empower: Improving Lightweight Baselines via Foundation Model Induction for Generalized Polyp Segmentation
summary: Automated polyp segmentation in colonoscopy continues to pose challenges due to substantial appearance variations and indistinct polyp boundaries. Although emerging foundation models (FMs) such as DINOv2, SAM, and OneFormer, demonstrate remarkable generalization capabilities, their direct transfer to the polyp segmentation task and deployment in real-time clinical settings are difficult due to lack of large-scale labeled data and high computational demands. In addition, adopting multiple FMs together raises concerns, even though they encode complementary semantic and structural information. While lightweight models, including U-Net, PraNet and U-Net++, are computationally efficient, they often struggle to generalize across datasets due to limited representational capacity. To address this gap, we propose Lite-Polyp Inductor (Lite-Pi), a novel foundation model induction framework that significantly enhances lightweight polyp segmentation baselines. Our proposed framework generates FM-specific prototype representations and aligns them semantically with the corresponding foundation model priors through reconstruction-based supervision. Subsequently, transformer-based fusion is introduced to highlight the polyp relevant representations, including salient boundary information, while preserving complementary semantic cues. Extensive experiments across five polyp segmentation benchmark datasets demonstrate that Lite-π significantly improves lightweight baselines, achieving superior generalization performance with minimal computational overhead and thereby, offering a practical solution for generalized polyp segmentation. Our code is available at GitHub. https://github.com/lostinrepo/Lite-Pi

AI.tldr: 本文提出Lite-Polyp Inductor (Lite-Pi)，一种轻量级基础模型归纳框架，通过生成FM原型表示和重建监督实现语义对齐，并引入Transformer融合突出息肉相关特征，在五个数据集上显著提升轻量级分割基线的泛化性能且计算开销极小。
AI.motivation: 现有基础模型泛化能力强但计算开销大且缺乏标注数据，轻量级模型计算高效但表征能力有限难以跨数据集泛化，多基础模型联合使用存在互补信息融合困难，亟需一种既能利用FM先验知识又保持轻量级效率的息肉分割方案。
AI.method: Lite-Pi框架包含三个关键部分：1) 生成FM特定的原型表示；2) 通过重建监督实现原型表示与对应FM先验的语义对齐；3) 引入基于Transformer的融合模块，突出息肉相关表示（含显著边界信息）同时保留互补语义线索。
AI.result: 在五个息肉分割基准数据集上，Lite-Pi显著提升了轻量级基线的性能，实现了优越的泛化性能，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: Lite-Pi为泛化息肉分割提供了一种实用解决方案，有效弥合了轻量级模型与基础模型之间的性能差距，同时保持了部署在实时临床环境中的计算效率。

title: CORAL: Learning Amyloid Fibril Ligand Docking with Cooperative Binding Rewards
summary: A hallmark of neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's is the aberrant aggregation of proteins into amyloid fibrils, and small molecules that selectively bind to these fibrils hold promise as diagnostics, imaging probes, and therapeutics. Predicting how such ligands bind to fibril targets, however, presents two fundamental challenges. First, resolved co-crystal structures of amyloid-ligand complexes are exceptionally scarce; even with recent advances in cryo-EM only a handful have been structurally characterized, making supervised training of docking models impractical for this target class. Second, amyloid fibrils present a binding mode fundamentally different from globular proteins: ligands intercalate into longitudinal cross-$β$ grooves and stack cooperatively along the fibril axis, a geometry that existing docking models are not designed to capture. To address these challenges, we present CORAL (COopeRative Amyloid Ligand docking), a reinforcement learning framework that trains a generative docking model to produce ligand pose distributions tailored to the cross-$β$ groove geometry. Our reward explicitly incorporates cooperative ligand-ligand stacking energy alongside protein-ligand docking affinity, directly capturing the distinctive binding geometry of amyloid fibrils. We further introduce a curated evaluation set of amyloid-ligand complexes constructed from model-generated poses validated by domain experts. Experiments on both experimentally resolved structures and this evaluation set demonstrate improved pose quality and binding affinity correlation over existing docking baselines.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CORAL框架，利用强化学习训练生成式对接模型，专门针对淀粉样纤维蛋白的交叉β沟槽几何结构进行配体对接，通过引入配体-配体协同堆叠能量和蛋白质-配体对接亲和力作为奖励，解决了淀粉样纤维-配体复合物晶体结构稀缺及现有对接模型无法捕捉其独特结合模式的两大挑战。
AI.motivation: 淀粉样纤维（如阿尔茨海默病、帕金森病中的异常蛋白聚集体）是神经退行性疾病的关键标志，能够选择性结合这些小分子的配体可作为诊断、成像探针及治疗药物。然而预测配体与纤维靶标的结合面临两个根本挑战：一是已解析的淀粉样纤维-配体复合物共晶结构极为稀少（即使有冷冻电镜进展也仅少数被表征），导致监督式对接模型训练不可行；二是淀粉样纤维的结合模式与球状蛋白根本不同——配体插入纵向交叉β沟槽并沿纤维轴协同堆叠，现有对接模型无法捕捉这种几何结构。
AI.method: 提出了CORAL（COopeRative Amyloid Ligand docking）框架，这是一个强化学习框架，训练生成式对接模型产生适应交叉β沟槽几何结构的配体姿态分布。奖励函数明确包含配体-配体协同堆叠能和蛋白质-配体对接亲和力，直接捕捉淀粉样纤维独特的结合几何。此外，还构建了一个由模型生成姿态经领域专家验证的 curated 评估集。
AI.result: 在实验解析结构和评估集上的实验均表明，与现有对接基线相比，CORAL在配体姿态质量和结合亲和力相关性方面均有提升。
AI.conclusion: CORAL通过强化学习框架有效解决了淀粉样纤维配体对接的两个核心难题，为神经退行性疾病相关蛋白聚集体的配体发现提供了可行的计算工具。

title: WorldCupArena: Fine-Grained Evaluation of Language Models and Deep-Research Agents on Football Forecasting
summary: Predicting a football match before kickoff requires more than knowing past results: a model must use changing information and make a clear prediction before the answer is available. We present WorldCupArena, a dynamic benchmark for language models and deep-research agents. The 2026 FIFA World Cup is its first evaluation, and the same process can be reused for future leagues and cups. Before each match, a model either receives a common evidence package or searches for information itself. It predicts the result and score, likely players and events, match statistics, and the outcome of the competition. After the match, these predictions are compared with the recorded result. We report result accuracy, exact-score accuracy, and a scoreline score that gives some credit when a predicted score is close but not exact, together with scores for the other prediction tasks. Across 104 matches and 13 systems, models with similar result accuracy differ more clearly on detailed predictions. Compared with betting-market and human-fan baselines, the best system shows only small gains in result and exact-score accuracy, but a clearer gain in Scoreline. New schedules can be added as they begin, allowing the benchmark to evaluate future models without using outcomes that are already known. Code, prompts, predictions, and evaluation scripts are open sourced at https://github.com/wzk1015/WorldCupArena.

AI.tldr: WorldCupArena是一个动态基准测试平台，用于评估语言模型和深度研究代理对足球比赛结果的预测能力。它以2026年世界杯为首个评估对象，涵盖赛前预测和赛后评估，支持未来赛事扩展。在104场比赛和13个系统上的实验表明，最佳系统相比博彩市场和人类球迷基线仅有小幅提升。
AI.motivation: 现有模型预测足球比赛时仅依赖历史结果，无法利用赛前动态变化的信息，且缺乏一个标准化的、可复用的动态评估基准来衡量模型在信息变化环境下的预测能力。
AI.method: 构建WorldCupArena基准，在每场比赛前向模型提供通用证据包或允许其自行搜索信息，模型需预测比赛结果、比分、关键球员、赛事事件、比赛统计数据和赛事最终结果。赛后与实际结果对比，使用结果准确率、精确比分准确率和比分线得分（允许近似比分得分）等指标进行评估。该基准支持动态添加新赛程，避免使用已知结果。
AI.result: 在104场比赛和13个系统上，结果准确率相近的模型在详细预测任务上表现出更明显的差异。最佳系统相比博彩市场和人类球迷基线仅在结果和精确比分准确率上有小幅提升，但在比分线得分上有更明显的优势。
AI.conclusion: WorldCupArena提供了一个可动态扩展的足球比赛预测基准，能够更细致地区分模型能力，且优于传统基线。代码、提示词、预测数据和评估脚本均已开源。

title: Semantic Context Matters: Analysis of Color Names Across Domains
comment: Submitted to 2026 Joint 14th International Conference on Soft Computing and Intelligent Systems and 27th International Symposium on Advanced Intelligent Systems (SCIS&ISIS 2026)
summary: Color naming is influenced not only by physical color values but also by the semantic context in which colors are used. This paper investigates context-dependent color naming by mapping color-name datasets from Cosmetics, Crayola, and Car-color vocabularies onto the 86 fuzzy color categories of the COLIBRI color model. Contextual variation is analyzed using category coverage, Shannon entropy, and maximum lift. The results show that the three contexts occupy the COLIBRI color space differently: Cosmetics covers 48 of 86 fuzzy categories, Crayola covers 50, and Car colors cover 40. The results demonstrated that Crayola provides the broadest and most balanced use of the fuzzy color space, Cosmetics is mainly concentrated around warm-tone regions, and Car colors are more specialized around blue and achromatic regions. These findings show that color naming cannot be fully explained by numerical color similarity alone and that semantic context plays an important role in human color interpretation. The proposed framework supports the development of context-aware color models for design analytics, product search, recommendation systems, and human-centered artificial intelligence.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了语义上下文（化妆品、蜡笔、汽车颜色）对颜色命名的影响，通过将三个领域的颜色命名数据集映射到COLIBRI颜色模型的86个模糊颜色类别上，并利用类别覆盖度、香农熵和最大提升度进行分析。结果显示蜡笔颜色空间覆盖最广且最均衡，化妆品集中在暖色调区域，汽车颜色偏向蓝色和消色差区域，证明颜色命名不能仅由数值相似性解释，语义上下文在人类颜色认知中起重要作用。
AI.motivation: 颜色命名不仅受物理颜色值影响，还受语义上下文影响。现有颜色命名研究多关注数值相似性，忽略了上下文因素，因此作者希望探究不同语义上下文（如化妆品、蜡笔、汽车颜色）如何影响颜色命名模式。
AI.method: 将三个上下文相关的颜色名称数据集（Cosmetics、Crayola、Car colors）映射到COLIBRI颜色模型的86个模糊颜色类别上，使用类别覆盖度、香农熵和最大提升度三个指标分析上下文差异。
AI.result: 化妆品覆盖48/86个模糊类别，蜡笔覆盖50/86，汽车颜色覆盖40/86。蜡笔颜色空间最广且最均衡，化妆品集中在暖色调区域，汽车颜色集中在蓝色和消色差区域。
AI.conclusion: 颜色命名不能仅由数值颜色相似性完全解释，语义上下文在人类颜色认知中起重要作用。该框架可支持上下文感知的颜色模型开发，用于设计分析、产品搜索、推荐系统和以人为中心的人工智能。

title: Grounded verification of chemical and materials reasoning: detection is the bottleneck
summary: Large language models confabulate chemical objects (molecular formulas, space groups, formation energies) in fluent reasoning traces, concentrated on long-tail entities where confidence is least trustworthy. Deterministic, database-grounded verification can catch and repair such errors without the coverage cost of blanket retrieval; the binding constraint, we find, is detection, not repair. Our tiered verifier extracts each checkable claim, checks it against authoritative databases and physics, and feeds the reference into a gated correction loop. Across four models and 528 condition-pinned prompts, gated correction cuts committed-formula error from 22% to 4% at $3.2\times$ fewer retrievals than blanket augmentation, beating a conversational oracle. Repair succeeds wherever a flag fires (80--97%); the bottleneck is in-loop detection recall. Grounding improves the final answer only when the verifier's scope reaches the deliverable (83% to 90%), and the lift appears only where extractable long-tail error exists: absent on near-ceiling physical constants, large on isotope half-lives (11% to 0%).

AI.tldr: 提出一种分层验证框架，通过确定性数据库和物理规则检测并修正大语言模型在化学推理中的虚构错误，采用门控修正循环将公式错误率从22%降至4%，且检索次数比全面增强减少3.2倍。
AI.motivation: 大语言模型在化学推理（分子式、空间群、形成能等）中频繁产生流畅但错误的虚构内容，尤其在长尾实体上置信度最低，现有方法缺乏高效的检测与修复机制。
AI.method: 设计分层验证器（tiered verifier），提取可检查的声明，与权威数据库和物理规则进行比对；对检测到的错误通过门控修正循环（gated correction loop）引入参考信息进行修复。该方法无需全面检索，仅在检测到错误时触发修复流程。
AI.result: 在4个模型和528个条件固定提示上，门控修正将公式错误率从22%降至4%，检索次数比全面增强减少3.2倍，超越会话式基线。修复成功率在触发标志时达80-97%，瓶颈在于循环内检测召回率。接地提升仅在验证器范围覆盖最终答案时有效（83%到90%），且提升仅出现在存在可提取长尾错误的场景（如同位素半衰期从11%降至0%）。
AI.conclusion: 确定性、基于数据库的验证可以有效检测和修复大语言模型的化学虚构错误，其核心约束在于检测而非修复，且提升效果集中在长尾知识领域。

title: Judge-dependent safety gains and model-specific helpfulness costs of evidence-sufficiency prompting in clinical LLMs
summary:
Background: LLM judges increasingly score whether clinical language models give overconfident answers under incomplete evidence, yet whether a measured "safety gain" reflects real behavior change or the judge's calibration is unresolved. Using a structured evidence-sufficiency prompt as a test case, we asked whether it reduces unsafe overconfident answers, how far that effect depends on the scoring judge, and what it costs in helpfulness.
  Methods: In a retrospective public-data benchmark (Real-POCQi, HealthBench, MedRBench), four models (GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.3) answered a fully paired common panel (1,200 cells) with a standard prompt and the wrapper. The pre-specified endpoint was the paired reduction in unsafe overconfidence scored by the primary judge (GPT-5.4-nano); secondary analyses added a different-family judge (Claude Sonnet 5), a correctness judge, matched scaffold controls, and a blinded three-clinician review.
  Results: Unsafe overconfidence fell from 49.3% to 24.7%, a paired reduction of 24.7 points (95% CI 21.8-27.7; p<0.001), robust in direction across models and paraphrases. Magnitude was judge-dependent: Sonnet agreed on direction but nearly halved the effect (+13.1 points), with one-directional disagreement. Blinded clinicians characterized the primary judge as a high-sensitivity (1.00), low-specificity (0.55) screen, not a calibrated rate. The gain carried a model-specific helpfulness cost (correct diagnosis 80.3% to 50.3%): near-free for GPT-5.5, near-total for Gemini (-58 points). Matched scaffold controls showed genuine behavior change, not judge circularity.
  Conclusions: LLM-judged clinical safety effects should be reported as directional and relative, anchored to human review and evaluated jointly with helpfulness, not as calibrated absolute rates. This does not establish clinical deployment readiness.

AI.tldr: LLM评判的临床安全效果存在评分者依赖性，结构化的证据充分性提示可降低不安全过度自信（49.3%→24.7%），但效果幅度因评分者而异（主评判者24.7点 vs 替代评判者13.1点），且伴随帮助性代价（正确诊断率从80.3%降至50.3%），应作为方向性和相对性指标报告，而非校准后的绝对率。
AI.motivation: 现有研究用LLM评判临床语言模型在证据不足时的过度自信程度，但测量的"安全增益"反映的是真实行为改变还是评判者的校准偏差尚不明确。本文旨在解耦结构化提示的真实效果与评分者依赖效应。
AI.method: 在三个公开基准（Real-POCQi, HealthBench, MedRBench）上，对四种模型（GPT-5.5, Claude Opus 4.8, Gemini 3.5 Flash, Grok 4.3）采用标准提示和结构化证据充分性提示进行完全配对评估（1,200个单元），主要终点由GPT-5.4-nano评判，辅以Claude Sonnet 5、正确性评判、匹配脚手架对照和三盲临床医生审查。
AI.result: 不安全过度自信从49.3%降至24.7%（配对减少24.7点，95% CI 21.8-27.7, p<0.001）；Sonnet评判效果减半（+13.1点）；盲审临床医生判定主评判器为高灵敏度（1.00）低特异度（0.55）筛查工具；帮助性代价模型相关（正确诊断率80.3%→50.3%），GPT-5.5几乎无代价，Gemini损失58点。
AI.conclusion: LLM评判的临床安全效果应作为方向性和相对性指标报告，以人类审查为锚定，并联合帮助性评估，而非作为校准后的绝对率。本结果不确立临床部署就绪性。

title: VecFontLLM: Anchor-Guided Direct Synthesis of Chinese Vector Fonts
summary: Direct generation of Chinese vector fonts is a challenging and ongoing problem. A Chinese vector glyph contains complex component structure, anchor layout, and Bézier curve details, which work at different scales, but a standard vector sequence writes them together in one long sequence, making the task of vector font synthesis challenging. Existing direct vector generators often fail on complex characters, while raster-domain methods must vectorize the synthesized glyph images afterward. To address the above-mentioned problem, this paper proposes VecFontLLM, an anchor-guided multimodal large language model for direct few-shot synthesis of Chinese vector fonts. Our key idea is to generate vector glyphs through anchors rather than a standard vector sequence. Specifically, the proposed VecFontLLM first predicts and refines an anchor scaffold that fixes the coarse layout of components and contours, and then completes Bézier control points to recover local curvature and style. At test time, a confidence-guided generation chain samples multiple component candidates and continues synthesis from the highest-confidence one, improving stability for complex glyphs. This work demonstrates, for the first time, high-quality few-shot synthesis of complex Chinese vector glyphs directly in the vector domain, without raster generation or vectorization. Experiments on several Chinese font datasets show substantial improvements over existing vector font synthesis methods, competitive glyph rendering quality against raster-domain baselines, and vector command distributions close to real fonts.

AI.tldr: 本文提出VecFontLLM，一种基于锚点引导的多模态大语言模型，用于直接少样本合成中文矢量字体。该方法先预测并优化锚点骨架以固定组件的粗略布局，再补全贝塞尔控制点以恢复局部曲率和风格，通过置信度引导的生成链提高复杂字形的稳定性。实验表明该方法在矢量域直接高质量合成复杂中文矢量字形，效果优于现有方法。
AI.motivation: 中文矢量字体的直接生成是一个持续存在的挑战性问题，因为中文矢量字形包含不同尺度的复杂组件结构、锚点布局和贝塞尔曲线细节，而标准矢量序列将这些信息写在一个长序列中，使得矢量字体合成任务非常困难。现有直接矢量生成器对复杂字符常失败，而光栅域方法必须在合成后对字形图像进行矢量化。
AI.method: VecFontLLM是一个锚点引导的多模态大语言模型。首先预测并优化锚点骨架，固定组件和轮廓的粗略布局；然后补全贝塞尔控制点以恢复局部曲率和风格。在测试时，采用置信度引导的生成链，采样多个组件候选并从最高置信度的候选继续合成，提高复杂字形的稳定性。
AI.result: 在多个中文字体数据集上，该方法相较于现有矢量字体合成方法有显著提升，与光栅域基线方法相比具有竞争力的字形渲染质量，且矢量命令分布接近真实字体。首次实现了直接在矢量域高质量少样本合成复杂中文矢量字形，无需光栅生成或矢量化。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明可以首次在矢量域直接实现高质量的中文复杂矢量字形少样本合成，无需经过光栅生成或矢量化步骤，为中文矢量字体生成提供了一种新范式。

title: Kernelized Linear Attention: Breaking the Capacity Wall with Symmetric Cones
summary: Linear attention promises constant-time recurrent inference but degrades sharply on associative recall. We formulate attention recall as a spherical-packing problem and introduce Kernelized Linear Attention Activations (KATA), a framework whose feature maps are derived from first principles by certifying nonnegative attention weights through a self-dual homogeneous cone. Building on this observation, we show that rank-one positive semi-definite (PSD) features offer a favorable capacity--interference tradeoff. KATA recovers a parameter-free convex output gate and characterizes associative capacity through the Welch interference floor. For tolerances above this floor, KATA enlarges the state without adding parameters and admits spherical codes with exponentially many keys in the projection dimension. We implement KATA as fused Triton kernels at two operating points: a flash-attention-style forward up to ${\sim}1.6\times$ FlashAttention-2 throughput, and an exact $O(T)$ chunked-state form that reaches ${\sim}11\times$ FlashAttention-2 forward throughput at $131$k tokens. An associative scan of the first-order feature lowers the inter-chunk recurrence depth to $O(\log(T/C))$ for chunk size $C$ and averages ${\sim}2.4\times$ the throughput of a matched sequential linear-attention baseline. On long-range MQAR and repeated-key overwrite, several KATA variants outperform Gated DeltaNet, with parameter counts and state sizes reported alongside accuracy. Induction preserves near-perfect recall, while kernel benchmarks show that the maps can be implemented efficiently. KATA retains $0.985$ MQAR at a $16\times$ out-of-distribution length, approaching the softmax with roughly one quarter of the KV-cache entries. Experiments on 340M-parameter LLMs reveal a feature-dependent fluency trade-off and clarify how positional embeddings, delta rules, and decay gates interact with feature geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出KATA框架，通过自对偶齐次锥保证非负注意力权重，利用秩一正半定特征实现线性注意力的联想回忆能力提升。KATA在长序列上达到约11倍FlashAttention-2吞吐量，在MQAR任务上接近softmax注意力性能，同时保持线性复杂度的推理效率。
AI.motivation: 线性注意力虽然在推理时具有常数复杂度，但在联想回忆任务上表现严重退化。现有方法缺乏从第一性原理出发设计特征映射的理论框架，无法在容量与干扰之间取得良好权衡。
AI.method: 将注意力回忆建模为球面填充问题，通过自对偶齐次锥认证非负注意力权重，提出秩一正半定(PSD)特征映射。KATA包含参数无关的凸输出门，通过Welch干扰界刻画联想容量，在容忍度高于该界时无需增加参数即可扩大状态。实现为两种Triton内核：flash-attention风格前向和精确O(T)分块状态形式。
AI.result: flash-attention风格前向约1.6倍FlashAttention-2吞吐量；精确O(T)分块状态形式在131k token下达到约11倍FlashAttention-2前向吞吐量。一阶特征的关联扫描将块间递归深度降至O(log(T/C))，平均约为匹配的顺序线性注意力基线2.4倍吞吐量。多个KATA变体在长程MQAR和重复键覆盖任务上优于Gated DeltaNet。KATA在16倍分布外长度上保持0.985 MQAR，接近softmax注意力但仅用约1/4的KV缓存条目。
AI.conclusion: KATA从第一性原理出发设计了可认证非负注意力的特征映射，在保持线性注意力高效推理的同时大幅提升了联想回忆能力。实验揭示了特征相关的流畅性权衡，并阐明了位置编码、delta规则和衰减门与特征几何的交互作用。

title: Can We Break LLMs Out of Self-Loops? Fine-Grained Reasoning Control with Activation Steering
summary: Extended reasoning has become standard for frontier Large Language Models (LLMs), yet the trajectories these models produce remain largely uncontrollable. Existing methods for shaping how a model reasons are prompt based approaches and operate at the input level, offering no fine-grained control over the reasoning process itself. Related work analyzes and discovers latent transition dynamics in the reasoning traces from Large Language Models. Building on this, we statistically characterize these states, and show that failure trajectories get stuck in self-loops, exhausting the token budget without progress toward the final answer. To intervene on these failures, We propose SOPHIA: Steering Of reasoning Processes via Hidden-state Intervention and Activations. We treat each reasoning trace as a sequence of latent states rather than an unstructured texts, and investigate whether inference time interventions can provide fine-grained control over the self-looping reasoning process. We classify every prefix to a latent state, record step level transitions, and use them to construct a bank of steering vectors indexed by state pairs. At inference time, a controller infers the current state and, given a target state, retrieves the corresponding vector and can also detect self-loops online from the transition structure to prevent the model from sinking into a reasoning black hole. Through extensive experiments, our method reliably intervenes on self-loop failures, with steering vectors that generalize to different state pairs. End task accuracy and token efficiency indicate that fine-grained controllability results in better reasoning quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SOPHIA方法，通过将推理轨迹视为潜在状态序列而非非结构化文本，利用隐藏状态干预实现在线自循环检测与引导，从而对LLM推理过程进行细粒度控制，提升推理质量与token效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅在输入层通过提示词控制推理过程，缺乏对推理轨迹本身（尤其是失败轨迹陷入自循环导致token耗尽）的细粒度干预能力。
AI.method: 将推理轨迹建模为潜在状态序列，分类每个前缀到潜在状态并记录状态间转移；构建状态对索引的引导向量库；推理时通过控制器检测当前状态并检索引导向量，在线识别自循环并干预。
AI.result: SOPHIA能可靠地干预自循环失败，引导向量可泛化到不同状态对；在端任务准确率和token效率上均优于基线。
AI.conclusion: 细粒度的推理过程可控性能够带来更好的推理质量，验证了在潜在状态层面进行推理时干预的有效性。

title: PACE: Polar Axis-Conditioned Estimation for PairUAV Relative Localization
summary: PairUAV relative localization maps two UAV images to a polar navigation command. Although heading and range share the same pairwise pose context, treating them as homogeneous coordinates forces both outputs to use the same decoder evidence and optimization state. Controlled readout probes reveal a different structure: the two axes favor different decoder-depth combinations, their best checkpoints disagree on 80.8% of a validation trajectory, and range errors exhibit a distinct high-error tail. We introduce method, Polar Axis-Conditioned Estimation, which retains a shared Reloc3r-style pair representation while assigning axis-specific readout interfaces. Heading uses mid/late relational evidence, whereas range remains attached to a direct late metric path. On the official hidden test, the strongest released raw predictor scores 0.002460; the complementary PAAER predictor scores 0.002514 with a slightly lower angle error. Deterministic challenge packaging, reported separately from learned estimation, yields the final score of 0.001874. Code, checkpoints, predictions, and reconstruction tools are available at https://github.com/zerong7777-boop/PairUAV-PACE.

AI.tldr: 针对PairUAV相对定位任务中航向与距离共享解码器导致性能不匹配的问题，提出PACE方法，通过为两个极化轴分配不同的读出头（航向使用中/晚期关系证据，距离使用直接晚期度量路径），在官方隐藏测试集上取得了0.001874的最终得分。
AI.motivation: 现有PairUAV相对定位方法将航向和距离视为齐次坐标，强制使用相同的解码器证据和优化状态，但受控探针实验表明两个轴偏好不同的解码器深度组合、最佳检查点在80.8%的验证轨迹上不一致，且距离误差存在独特的高误差尾部，说明需要轴特定的处理方式。
AI.method: 提出PACE（Polar Axis-Conditioned Estimation）方法，保留共享的Reloc3r风格对表示，但为每个极化轴分配特定的读出头：航向使用中/晚期关系证据，距离则保持直接晚期度量路径。
AI.result: 在官方隐藏测试集上，最强原始预测器得分0.002460；互补的PAAER预测器得分0.002514且角度误差略低；确定性挑战封装（与学习估计分开报告）最终得分0.001874。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入极化轴条件估计，显著改善了PairUAV相对定位中航向与距离的不对称性问题，代码和模型均已开源。

title: Decoder-Preserving Sparse Autoencoders: Which Readouts Survive Sparse Compression?
summary: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) compress model activations into sparse codes, but equal reconstruction error and sparsity can preserve different linearly decodable signals. We formalize this ambiguity as a matrix-valued distortion between optimal ridge-prediction operators and train decoder-preserving SAEs by combining this distortion with reconstruction loss. In a rank relaxation, an isotropic task prior saturates per-mode omission costs without changing PCA's ordering, whereas a structured prior can change which modes are retained. A controlled sparse experiment shows that a declared prior protects held-out combinations from its task subspace. On GPT-2 small block 8, DPSAE reduces held-out decoder distortion by 10.6--11.4% across three paired runs while matching reconstruction NMSE. The same checkpoints pass an average natural-text output-KL noninferiority test, but one matched Pythia pair shows no improvement in probes restricted to a few sparse features. These results show that reconstruction quality does not determine which refitted linear readouts survive sparse compression, and that readout preservation is distinct from learning cleaner benchmark concepts or preserving every frozen-model behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文提出解码器保持稀疏自编码器（DPSAE），通过引入矩阵值失真度量来优化稀疏压缩中线性读出信号的保留，实验证明DPSAE在保持重建质量的同时，能显著降低保留解码器的失真。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏自编码器（SAE）在压缩模型激活时，相同重建误差和稀疏度下可能保留不同的线性可解码信号，这种歧义性导致无法保证压缩后信号的可读性。现有方法缺乏对保留线性读出信号的明确约束。
AI.method: 1）将歧义形式化为最优岭回归预测器之间的矩阵值失真；2）通过组合该失真与重建损失训练解码器保持的SAE（DPSAE）；3）在秩松弛中分析各向同性任务先验与结构化先验的影响；4）在GPT-2 small和Pythia模型上进行实验验证。
