AI.result: 在GPT-2 small block 8上，DPSAE在三个配对运行中保留解码器失真降低10.6-11.4%，同时匹配重建NMSE。通过自然文本输出KL非劣效性检验，但Pythia模型中有限稀疏特征的探针无改进。
AI.conclusion: 重建质量不能决定哪些线性读出在稀疏压缩后存活，读出保留与学习更清晰的基准概念或保留每个冻结模型行为是不同的目标。

title: SGA: Plug&Play Geometric Verification for Educational Video Synthesis
summary: Recent work leverages Large Language Models (LLMs) to generate executable code for pedagogical animations using libraries such as Manim. However, ensuring spatial correctness and visual legibility remains challenging, as existing frameworks emphasize pedagogical content while overlooking geometric occlusions. We propose the Symbolic Geometric Agent (SGA), a plug-and-play module for code-centric animation pipelines that intercepts LLM-generated code, performs partial execution to extract symbolic scene graphs, and applies targeted refinement when spatial conflicts are detected. We further introduce the Manim Visual Quality Score (MVQS), a deterministic rendering-free proxy for spatial integrity. Experiments on the MMMC-Code benchmark across four LLM backbones and two agentic pipelines show that SGA achieves a peak MVQS of 73.11 (Code2Video + GPT-5.1), corresponding to a 16.1% relative improvement over the raw baseline, and improves MVQS in 7 of 8 backbone x pipeline configurations.

AI.tldr: 提出符号几何智能体（SGA），一种即插即用模块，通过部分执行LLM生成的动画代码、提取符号场景图并检测空间冲突来提升代码生成动画的几何正确性和视觉可读性；同时引入MVQS作为无渲染的空间完整性评估指标，在MMMC-Code基准测试中实现最高73.11的MVQS（相对提升16.1%）。
AI.motivation: 现有利用LLM生成教学动画的框架（如基于Manim）虽能生成可执行代码，但侧重于教学内容而忽略了几何遮挡等空间正确性和视觉可读性问题。
AI.method: 提出SGA模块：拦截LLM生成的代码，进行部分执行以提取符号场景图，检测到空间冲突时执行针对性精炼；同时提出MVQS指标，一种无需渲染的确定性空间完整性代理评估方法。
AI.result: 在MMMC-Code基准测试上，使用4种LLM主干和2种智能体管线，SGA在Code2Video+GPT-5.1配置下达到最高MVQS 73.11，相对原始基线提升16.1%；在8种主干×管线配置中有7种提升了MVQS。
AI.conclusion: SGA作为即插即用模块能有效改善LLM生成动画代码的空间正确性，MVQS可作为可靠的渲染无关评估指标。

title: MIS-HCC: Hierarchical Channel Clustering for Efficient Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Medical image segmentation models require both high accuracy and lightweight design to accommodate real-world medical applications. The deployment of these models on resource-limited medical platforms remains a significant challenge due to their high computational and parameter requirements. Existing pruning methods for model compression mostly overlook the intrinsic connections and similarity between the internal structures of complex deep neural networks. As a result, compressed models may not effectively retain the basic features of the pretrained network. To solve this problem, we propose a hierarchical clustering compression method for medical image segmentation models (MIS-HCC). This approach employs hierarchical clustering to partition channels and fuse their parameters efficiently. Specifically, it leverages the Wasserstein distance to represent similarity of channels within layers of pre-trained network, forming a similarity matrix that guides the clustering process. Channels within each cluster are then fused to produce a compressed network. Experimental results on three medical image datasets application demonstrate that MIS-HCC outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and compression efficiency, offering an effective solution for deploying medical image segmentation models on resource-limited medical platforms.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于层次聚类的医学图像分割模型压缩方法（MIS-HCC），通过Wasserstein距离度量通道相似性并进行聚类融合，在不显著降低精度的情况下实现模型压缩，适用于资源受限的医疗平台。
AI.motivation: 现有剪枝方法忽视了深度神经网络内部结构之间的内在联系和相似性，导致压缩后的模型无法有效保留预训练网络的基本特征，难以在资源受限的医疗平台上部署。
AI.method: 采用层次聚类对通道进行划分并高效融合参数；利用Wasserstein距离表示预训练网络层内通道间的相似性，构建相似性矩阵指导聚类过程；对每个聚类内的通道进行融合，生成压缩网络。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像数据集上的实验表明，MIS-HCC在准确率和压缩效率方面均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: MIS-HCC为在资源受限的医疗平台上部署医学图像分割模型提供了一种有效解决方案。

title: Abliteration Is Not a Scalpel: Off-Target Effects of Refusal Removal on Decision Disposition Across Model Families
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Preregistered. Data and code: https://github.com/oleczek/paper-abliteration-not-a-scalpel ; dataset DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.21314839
summary: Abliteration - deleting a model's refusal direction from its weights - is the standard recipe behind popular "uncensored" open-weight models. We show the surgery is not clean. As a disposition probe we use 21,600 decisions under uncertainty - weekly up/down calls on 60 Warsaw Stock Exchange equities over 18 weeks, replayed through a frozen pipeline so the decision-layer model is the only variable. The task elicits no refusals at all, so any between-arm delta is pure side effect. Holding provenance constant (official BF16 checkpoints, a single abliteration author, an identical serving stack, one byte-identical frozen prompt), we compare base and abliterated arms of two Mixture-of-Experts families, Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507. Three effects replicate across both families (weeks-clustered bootstrap CIs excluding zero): abliterated models are systematically more optimistic (+12.2 pp Gemma, +7.4 pp Qwen; the confirmed preregistered endpoint), justify themselves at greater length, and use fewer explicit uncertainty words in forced self-critiques (both exploratory). A fourth effect reverses sign: the same operation makes Gemma-abliterated less confident and Qwen-abliterated more (family CIs non-overlapping) - one weight surgery, opposite shifts in expressed confidence. Capability covariates rule out instruction-following degradation as the driver, and no arm shows economic skill: the apparent edge of abliterated arms is regime beta, not alpha. Our provenance audit also caught two independent contamination channels - a mismatched-quantizer pilot pair and a stale community chat template that silently mangled the rendered prompt - suggesting toolchain artifacts are the rule in studies of community-modified checkpoints. Whoever deploys an "uncensored" model as an agent is deploying a measurably different decision-maker, not the base model minus refusals.

AI.tldr: 对模型权重进行"去屏蔽"（abliteration）操作并非干净的手术，它会系统性地改变模型的决策行为——使模型更加乐观、冗长，并在自我批评中使用更少的不确定性词汇，同时不同模型家族的置信度变化方向相反。研究通过严格控制的实验设计（21,600次决策、原厂检查点、单一操作者、相同服务栈）排除了指令遵循退化等因素的影响，发现工具链伪影是社区修改模型的普遍问题。
AI.motivation: 验证去屏蔽（abliteration）操作是否仅移除模型的拒绝行为而不产生其他副作用，评估"未审查"模型作为智能体部署时是否与基座模型在决策行为上可区分。
AI.method: 使用21,600次不确定性决策任务（60只华沙股票18周的每周涨跌预测），通过冻结管线使只有决策层模型变化，比较两个MoE模型家族（Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it和Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507）的基座与去屏蔽版本，采用周聚类自助法置信区间，并进行了工具链审计。
AI.result: 三个效应跨家族复制：去屏蔽模型更乐观（+12.2pp Gemma, +7.4pp Qwen）、输出更长、自我批评中使用更少不确定性词汇；一个效应符号相反：Gemma去屏蔽版自信度降低而Qwen升高。工具链审计发现两个污染渠道（量化器不匹配和过时的社区聊天模板）。所有模型均无经济技能。
AI.conclusion: 去屏蔽操作会产生可测量的决策行为变化，部署"未审查"模型作为智能体时，实际上部署的是一个可区分的决策者，而非简单的"基座模型减去拒绝行为"。

title: Logical Judgments Under Pressure: Diagnosing Syllogistic Stability with Learned Soft Prefixes
summary: To test how correct logical judgments respond to learned context, we prepend a soft prefix to an exactly labeled syllogistic reasoning benchmark while keeping the model fixed. Soft prefixes are opaque continuous vectors, so we characterize them through the behavior they induce across controlled variations in logical form and interface. By studying which prefixes succeed and how their effects generalize, we characterize how learned contextual pressure can override correct judgments and expose limits in a model's logical stability. Across Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE, Qwen3-8B, and Gemma 4 31B, learned prefixes redirect many correct answers and remain effective across unseen forms and interface changes. In repeated tests with Qwen3.6 MoE and Gemma, they outperform paired random controls in all 16 model--direction--split comparisons by 37 to 99 percentage points. Qwen3.6 MoE flip rates remain between 72% and 90% across wording and prompt changes, while Gemma validity prefixes retain 54% to 56% flip compared with less than 1% for matched random prefixes. Diagnostic tests show that the dominant effect is a broad preference for one answer meaning rather than fixed-symbol forcing or a logical operation that transfers reliably between tasks. The form of this bias differs across models. In both Qwen models, simple score models often predict which judgments will flip but not how far their margins will move, whereas Gemma's overall response is more closely approximated by the same models. These results show that the dominant behavioral effect of successful soft prefixes is a broad answer preference, while the remaining response reveals substantial model-specific differences in logical stability.

AI.tldr: 通过在逻辑推理基准测试中插入软前缀（soft prefixes），研究显示这些不透明的连续向量能显著覆盖模型的正确判断，产生广泛的答案偏好偏差，且效果在不同模型、表达形式和界面间存在差异。
AI.motivation: 探究学习到的上下文（通过软前缀实现）如何影响大语言模型的正确逻辑判断，揭示模型在逻辑稳定性方面的局限性。
AI.method: 在固定模型的三段论推理基准测试前添加软前缀（连续向量），通过控制逻辑形式和接口的变化，系统性地表征前缀成功与否及其泛化效果，并在Qwen3.6-35B-A3B MoE、Qwen3-8B和Gemma 4 31B三个模型上进行测试。
AI.result: 学习到的前缀能够重定向许多正确答案，并在未见过的形式和接口变化中保持有效性。在16个模型-方向-分割比较中，前缀比随机对照高出37-99个百分点。Qwen3.6 MoE的翻转率在72%-90%之间，Gemma的有效性前缀保持54%-56%的翻转率（随机前缀<1%）。诊断测试表明主要效应是广泛的答案偏好，而非固定符号强制或逻辑操作迁移。
AI.conclusion: 成功的软前缀的主要行为效应是产生广泛的答案偏好偏差，不同模型在逻辑稳定性上存在显著差异：Qwen模型的简单评分模型能预测哪些判断会翻转但无法预测翻转幅度，而Gemma的整体响应更接近这种评分模型的近似。

title: Orthogonal Knowledge Refreshing for Domain-Incremental Object Detection
summary: Domain-incremental object detection (DIOD) requires models to continually adapt to new domains while preserving prior knowledge. Recently, parameter-efficient fine-tuning offers a promising avenue, wherein a pre-trained model is frozen and a small number of learnable parameters are injected for downstream tasks. However, these methods risk overwriting critical past knowledge, triggering inter-domain interference and performance degradation. To address this challenge, we propose Orthogonal Knowledge Refreshing (OKR), a simple yet effective framework for DIOD. OKR incrementally constructs independent domain-specific subspaces via dedicated low-rank branches for each domain, which are seamlessly fused for a holistic decision, enabling conflict-free capacity expansion without domain selection during inference. To minimize knowledge interference during fusion, we present a gradient-based orthogonal refreshing strategy that projects gradient updates of new domains onto the orthogonal complement of the fused historical subspace, supporting continual adaptation without forgetting. Moreover, to mitigate semantic fragmentation across domains, we enforce topology-aware consistency, aligning the semantic structures of old and new domains. Extensive experiments validate the superiority of OKR, outperforming the best exemplar-free method by significant margins of +5.6% and +6.5% mAP on the Pascal VOC and BDD100K series, respectively.

AI.tldr: 提出正交知识刷新框架(OKR)，通过为每个领域构建独立低秩分支实现无冲突容量扩展，利用梯度正交刷新策略和拓扑感知一致性对齐，在无范例的域增量目标检测任务中显著超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 参数高效微调方法在域增量目标检测中会覆盖关键旧知识，引发跨域干扰和性能退化，亟需一种能持续适应新域且不遗忘旧知识的方法。
AI.method: (1) 为每个域构建独立低秩分支，形成域特定子空间，推理时无缝融合；(2) 梯度正交刷新策略，将新域梯度投影到历史子空间的正交补上；(3) 拓扑感知一致性，对齐新旧域的语义结构。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC和BDD100K系列上，无范例方法分别提升+5.6%和+6.5% mAP，达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: OKR框架通过正交子空间扩展和拓扑一致性保持，有效解决了域增量检测中的灾难性遗忘和域间干扰问题。

title: Calibrated Alzheimer's Conversion Risk in Mild Cognitive Impairment: Persistent Homology of Clinical Trajectories with Conformal Guarantees
comment: 17 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Data from the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI). Code available upon reasonable request
summary: Background. Predicting conversion from mild cognitive impairment (MCI) to Alzheimer's disease (AD) is central to trial enrichment and care planning, yet existing models provide no individual-level uncertainty estimates and rarely include transparent leakage audits. We introduce the first application of persistent homology to longitudinal clinical trajectory point clouds for this task, and the first split-conformal individual risk guarantee for any AD-conversion model. Methods. We analysed 741 MCI subjects (240 converters, 32.4%) from ADNI with a uniform 4-year follow-up cap. Five leakage sources were corrected; without them a naive pipeline achieved AUC=0.934, inflated by +0.075. Vietoris-Rips persistent homology and sublevel-set proxies were combined with trajectory slopes and engineered features (76 total) in a stacking ensemble evaluated by 5-fold cross-validation. Results. Cox and Random Survival Forest models with TDA features achieved concordance C=0.799 and C=0.826 versus C=0.753 and C=0.812 without (+0.045 and +0.014). The primary nested AUC is 0.840 (same-fold bound 0.866); external AUC was 0.879 on a zero-overlap ADNI-2/GO/3 cohort. H0 persistence entropy was the top SHAP feature and significantly associated with APOE4 dosage (Spearman r=-0.191, p<0.0001, Bonferroni-corrected). Cross-conformal coverage was 90.4%+-2.2% (target 90%); empirical external coverage 96.9%. Maximum fairness gap in false-negative rate across seven subgroups was 0.092. Conclusions. We propose H0 persistence entropy as a topological biomarker of cognitive decline and demonstrate that a leakage-audited, conformally calibrated pipeline reaches competitive accuracy with individual-level uncertainty quantification not previously available for this task.

AI.tldr: 本文首次将持久同调应用于轻度认知障碍（MCI）向阿尔茨海默病（AD）转化的纵向临床轨迹点云预测，并结合分裂分位数推断提供个体级不确定性估计。通过五项数据泄漏源校正和拓扑特征工程，在ADNI数据集上实现嵌套AUC 0.840、外部AUC 0.879，且交叉分位数覆盖率达90.4%±2.2%，并首次提出H0持久熵作为认知衰退的拓扑生物标志物。
AI.motivation: 现有MCI-to-AD转化预测模型缺乏个体级不确定性估计，且几乎未进行透明的数据泄漏审计。本文旨在通过持久同调提取纵向轨迹的拓扑特征，并结合分位数校准方法，提供具有置信区间的个体化风险预测。
AI.method: 分析741名MCI受试者（240名转化者，32.4%）的4年纵向数据，校正五类数据泄漏源。采用Vietoris-Rips持久同调及子水平集代理，结合轨迹斜率和工程特征（共76维），构建堆叠集成模型，通过5折交叉验证评估。使用交叉分位数推断提供90%目标覆盖率的个体化风险区间。
AI.result: Cox和随机生存森林模型加入TDA特征后，C指数分别提升0.045和0.014（达0.799和0.826）。嵌套AUC为0.840（同折上界0.866），外部AUC为0.879。H0持久熵为最优SHAP特征，与APOE4剂量显著相关（Spearman r=-0.191, p<0.0001）。交叉分位数覆盖率为90.4%±2.2%，外部覆盖率达96.9%，七个子群假阴性率最大公平差距为0.092。
AI.conclusion: H0持久熵可作为认知衰退的拓扑生物标志物；经过泄漏审计和分位数校准的流水线在维持竞争性准确率的同时，首次为此任务提供了个体级不确定性量化，且模型公平性良好。

title: Understanding From Human Perspective: A Multi-agent System for Interactive Egocentric Medical Image Segmentation
summary: Interactive egocentric medical image segmentation (IEMIS) plays an important role in smart-glasses-assisted medical image review, segmenting the medical targets a clinician refers to from their egocentric view. Once it succeeds, the object-level visual evidence it provides strengthens the review and underpins fine-grained analysis and clinical decision-making. However, the instruction and the video both come from the user's egocentric perspective, which poses two challenges. (1) Semantic ambiguity leaves the model unable to confirm the user-intended target. (2) Visual variability makes the segmentation jump from frame to frame. In this paper, we propose EgoMed-Agent, a multi-agent system that understands the target from the human perspective through two workflows. (1) The \textit{Target Confirmation Workflow} grounds the instruction against candidate targets with a reliability score, confirming the target when the grounding is reliable and asking the user to clarify when it is not, thereby confirming the segmentation target. (2) The \textit{Localization-Guided Propagation Workflow} couples mask propagation with per-frame target localization, using the localized target to correct the propagated mask whenever the two diverge, so the segmentation stays on the target across the egocentric video. Extensive experiments show that EgoMed-Agent reaches 71.34\% average Dice, far above the best text-prompted baseline (11.70\%). Our code is available at \href{https://github.com/wdyyyyyy/EgoMed-Agent}{our project page}.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EgoMed-Agent多智能体系统，通过目标确认工作流和定位引导传播工作流，解决交互式自我中心医学图像分割中的语义歧义和视觉变异问题，在自我中心视频分割任务上达到71.34%平均Dice，远超基线方法（11.70%）。
AI.motivation: 现有的智能眼镜辅助医疗图像分割中，指令和视频均来自用户自我中心视角，导致两个关键挑战：(1) 语义歧义——模型无法确认用户意图分割的医疗目标；(2) 视觉变异——帧间视觉变化导致分割结果不稳定。亟需一种能从人类视角理解目标并稳定跨帧分割的方法。
AI.method: 提出EgoMed-Agent多智能体系统，包含两个核心工作流：(1) 目标确认工作流——将用户指令与候选目标进行基于可靠性分数的语义对齐，可靠时确认目标，否则请求用户澄清；(2) 定位引导传播工作流——将掩码传播与逐帧目标定位耦合，当两者发散时用定位结果修正传播掩码，确保分割在自我中心视频中始终跟踪目标。
AI.result: 在交互式自我中心医学图像分割任务上，EgoMed-Agent达到71.34%平均Dice，大幅超越最佳文本提示基线方法（11.70%）。
AI.conclusion: EgoMed-Agent通过多智能体协作和两种工作流设计，有效解决了自我中心视角下医学图像分割的语义歧义和视觉变异问题，为智能眼镜辅助医疗图像审核提供了可靠的对象级视觉证据支持。

title: Residual-Guided Multi-Resolution Refinement of Foundation Models: A Case Study in Drought Forecasting
summary: Regional climate prediction presents unique challenges for time series foundation models, which typically process temporal patterns through single-pass inference. Expert climatologists, in contrast, employ multi-scale temporal analysis and iterative refinement based on systematic error diagnosis. We present RGMR (Residual-Guided Multi-Resolution Refinement), an inference-time framework that adapts pre-trained foundation models to perform structured coarse-to-fine refinement for climate forecasting without updating backbone parameters. Applied to drought forecasting using the Standardized Precipitation Evapotranspiration Index (SPEI), RGMR is architecture-agnostic across the three TSFM backbones evaluated per site (TimesFM, TimeGPT, TabPFN) and consistently lowers test-set MSE on three South Australian sites and three additional regions outside South Australia. Applied to TimesFM, the wrapper reduces one-month-ahead SPEI MSE by up to 18.9\% across the three South Australian sites (mean reduction $\approx$18.7\%). Overall, RGMR provides a practical route for deploying frozen TSFMs in regional climate forecasting workflows.

AI.tldr: 提出了RGMR（残差引导多分辨率精化）框架，在不更新预训练基础模型参数的情况下，通过结构化粗到细精化策略提升区域气候预测性能，在干旱预测任务中平均降低MSE达18.7%。
AI.motivation: 经典时间序列基础模型通过单次推理处理时序模式，而气候学专家采用多尺度时间分析和基于系统误差诊断的迭代精化策略，现有TSFM缺乏这种结构化精化能力。
AI.method: RGMR是一种推理时框架，利用残差引导的多分辨率精化策略，对预训练基础模型（TimesFM、TimeGPT、TabPFN）进行结构化粗到细的逐步精化，无需更新骨干网络参数。
AI.result: 在三个南澳大利亚站点及三个外部区域上，RGMR持续降低测试集MSE；应用于TimesFM时，一个月前SPEI预测的MSE降低最高达18.9%，平均降幅约18.7%。
AI.conclusion: RGMR提供了一种实用的途径，使冻结的TSFM能够有效部署于区域气候预测工作流中，具有架构无关性和良好的泛化能力。

title: STAR: Skeletal Token Alignment and Rearrangement for Interaction Recognition
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (IEEE TMM)
summary: Understanding physical human-robot and human-human interactions is a challenging yet emerging topic in 3D vision. While most existing methods rely on skeleton sequences--effective in low-light and privacy-sensitive environment--they face two major challenges: 1) learning and effectively exploiting interaction cues from skeletal data, and 2) compensating for the lack of visual information absent in skeletons alone. To address these challenges, we propose skeletal token alignment and rearrangement (STAR) for human-robot and human-human interaction recognition. It learns interaction-specific skeleton features and enriches them using visual cues by aligning skeleton and RGB video representations in a shared latent space. Specifically, STAR consists of three key components. First, we design a skeleton encoder that captures fine-grained interdependencies using Entity Rearrangement (ER) and Interactive Spatiotemporal Tokens (ISTs). Second, we present Visual Interaction Encoding that introduces a Focus on Interactions (FoI) strategy to attend to spatiotemporal regions relevant to interactions in RGB videos. Finally, these representations are aligned via a contrastive learning objective, with a refinement head further refines predictions. During training, STAR leverages both skeleton and RGB video data to learn robust, discriminative interaction representations. At inference time, it operates on skeletons alone, retaining visual-informed benefits while preserving skeleton-only efficiency. Extensive experiments on Chico, HARPER, NTU Mutual 11 and 26 datasets consistently validate our approach by demonstrating superior performance over state-of-the-art methods. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Necolizer/STAR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出STAR方法，通过骨架标记对齐与重排技术，在仅使用骨架数据的情况下融合RGB视觉信息，实现人-机器人/人-人交互识别，在多个数据集上达到最优性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于骨架序列的交互识别方法面临两大挑战：1) 难以从骨架数据中有效学习和利用交互线索；2) 骨架数据缺乏视觉信息，导致识别能力受限。为此，本文旨在设计一种方法，在训练时利用RGB视频丰富骨架表示，推理时仅依赖骨架数据保持效率。
AI.method: STAR包含三个核心组件：1) 骨架编码器，通过实体重排(ER)和交互式时空标记(ISTs)捕获细粒度依赖关系；2) 视觉交互编码，采用关注交互(FoI)策略聚焦RGB视频中与交互相关的时空区域；3) 对比学习目标对齐两种表示，并通过细化头进一步优化预测。训练时联合使用骨架和RGB数据，推理时仅用骨架。
AI.result: 在Chico、HARPER、NTU Mutual 11和26四个数据集上，STAR方法均优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: STAR成功解决了骨架数据缺乏视觉信息的问题，通过跨模态对齐在保持骨架推理效率的同时获得了视觉增强的判别性表示，为人-机器人和人-人交互识别提供了新范式。

title: Retrieval-Augmented Interpretable Learning: Towards Task-Specific Zero-Shot Models in Healthcare
summary: We introduce Retrieval-Augmented Interpretable Learning (RAIL), a probabilistic meta-learning framework for zero-shot generation of task-specific interpretable models that synthesizes coefficient-space structure from natural-language task descriptions and a memory of previously learned task-specific predictors. RAIL retrieves related source tasks, transfers structure through coefficient space, and generates a new predictor in the original diagnostic-feature space, enabling zero-shot and few-shot clinical procedure prediction with feature-level explanations. Its probabilistic formulation provides uncertainty over retrieval, model coefficients, and predictions, supporting reliability-aware deployment: uncertain predictions or unstable explanations can be flagged for additional clinical review rather than treated as automatic decisions. This makes RAIL particularly suited for healthcare settings, where prediction tasks are highly long-tailed, new clinical targets arise frequently, and models must remain inspectable, uncertainty-aware, and compatible with human oversight. Across long-tailed clinical procedure prediction tasks, RAIL maintains reliable performance across data-availability regimes: it achieves 73.4% accuracy in the held-out zero-shot settings, where no supervised task-specific model can be trained, and remains near 73.2% accuracy in the extreme few-shot regime with only 2-4 examples, where supervised task-specific models perform close to chance. RAIL further benefits from clinically informed task representations and yields retrieval, uncertainty, and coefficient-level diagnostics that make model behavior more transparent. These results suggest a path toward scalable clinical prediction systems that can adapt to new tasks while preserving interpretability and reliability.

AI.tldr: RAIL是一个概率元学习框架，通过从自然语言任务描述和已学习任务预测器的记忆中检索相关源任务并迁移系数空间结构，实现零样本/少样本临床程序预测，在零样本设置下达到73.4%准确率，极低样本（2-4例）下保持73.2%准确率，同时提供特征级解释和不确定性估计以支持临床审查。
AI.motivation: 医疗场景中预测任务高度长尾、新临床目标频繁出现，传统监督模型难以应对零样本和极低样本场景，且缺乏可解释性和不确定性感知能力，无法满足临床对模型透明性和人类监督的要求。
AI.method: 提出RAIL框架：(1) 从自然语言任务描述中检索相关源任务；(2) 通过系数空间迁移结构；(3) 在原始诊断特征空间生成新预测器；(4) 概率公式提供对检索、系数和预测的不确定性估计，支持可靠性感知部署。
AI.result: 在长尾临床程序预测任务中，零样本设置达到73.4%准确率，2-4样本极端少样本设置保持73.2%准确率（此时监督模型接近随机水平），且受益于临床知识增强的任务表示。
AI.conclusion: RAIL为构建可扩展的临床预测系统提供了可行路径，能够在适应新任务的同时保持可解释性和可靠性，特别适合需要人类监督的高风险医疗环境。

title: SkyVLaM: Multimodal Large Language Model for UAV Video Understanding in Remote Sensing
summary: Recent advances in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly improved remote sensing (RS) multimodal understanding. Language-conditioned segmentation is crucial for fine-grained target understanding in Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) videos. However, this task remains challenging due to the prevalence of small, visually ambiguous targets and dynamic aerial perspectives. In this paper, we propose SkyVLaM, a multimodal large language model for UAV video understanding. SkyVLaM constructs sparse tokens directly from patch-level video representations through a temporal basis perceiver, regularizes the sparse basis to encourage complementary temporal cues, and adaptively selects a temporally coherent dense segment for high-resolution inspection. The resulting sparse and dense tokens are jointly processed by a large language model for query-conditioned segmentation. We further build SkyVid, consisting of SkyVid-VGCG and SkyVid-RVOS for video grounded conversation generation and referring video object segmentation, respectively. SkyVid contains 101 videos, 33.6K frames, and 1.53M pixel-level object instances. Experiments show that SkyVLaM provides a more effective allocation of the visual token budget and improves language-conditioned video segmentation in UAV scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkyVLaM，一种面向无人机视频的多模态大语言模型，通过时间基础感知器构建稀疏令牌、正则化稀疏基促进互补时序线索、自适应选择时间连贯密集分割进行高分辨率检测，联合处理稀疏与密集令牌实现查询条件分割。同时构建SkyVid数据集（101个视频、33.6K帧、1.53M像素级实例），实验表明SkyVLaM有效分配视觉令牌预算，提升了无人机场景下的语言条件视频分割性能。
AI.motivation: 无人机视频中目标小、视觉模糊、视角动态变化，使得语言条件分割任务面临挑战，现有MLLMs在无人机场景下的细粒度目标理解能力不足。
AI.method: (1) 通过时间基础感知器从补丁级视频表示构建稀疏令牌；(2) 正则化稀疏基以促进互补时序线索；(3) 自适应选择时间连贯的密集分割进行高分辨率检测；(4) 联合处理稀疏与密集令牌，由大语言模型进行查询条件分割。
AI.result: SkyVLaM在无人机视频语言条件分割任务上表现优异，更有效地分配了视觉令牌预算，提升了分割性能。
AI.conclusion: SkyVLaM通过稀疏-密集联合令牌机制有效解决了无人机视频中小目标、视觉模糊和动态视角带来的挑战，为无人机视频细粒度理解提供了新范式。

title: Lightweight Wrappers for Adapting Time Series Foundation Models to Regional Drought Forecasting
summary: Large \emph{Time Series Foundation Models} (TSFMs) demonstrate strong zero-shot forecasting capabilities across diverse domains. However, their application to regional climate forecasting faces practical challenges: model weights are often proprietary, local training records are limited, and computational budgets are constrained, making traditional fine-tuning approaches infeasible. To address these constraints, we introduce a lightweight, black-box adaptation framework (requiring no access to backbone parameters and no backbone fine-tuning) that enhances frozen TSFMs at inference time through two plug-and-play wrappers: \textbf{SMR\textsuperscript{2}} (Stationarity aware multi-resolution Residual), which decomposes the input into multi-resolution temporal views, learns stride specific residual corrections that capture regional dynamics, then adaptively ensembles them into a single forecast, and \textbf{MBB} (Moving Block Bootstrap), which preserves temporal dependencies through block resampling and ensembles over temporally coherent residual perturbations to stabilize the point forecast. Both wrappers instantiate the same bagging style principle: they build diverse views of the input or its residuals, forecast each with the same frozen backbone, and aggregate, so all adaptation comes from inference time ensembling rather than any weight update. Evaluated on one month ahead Standardized Precipitation Evapotranspiration Index (SPEI) prediction across multiple sites in South Australia, our framework consistently improves forecasting performance across several backbone models, demonstrating up to 26\% mean squared error (MSE) reduction over the corresponding frozen backbone while enabling practical deployment in resource constrained regional forecasting systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级黑盒适配框架，通过两个即插即用模块（SMR²和MBB）在推理阶段增强冻结的时间序列基础模型的区域气候预测能力，无需访问模型参数或微调，在澳大利亚南部的SPEI预测中实现高达26%的MSE降低。
AI.motivation: 大型时间序列基础模型在零样本预测中表现优异，但应用于区域气候预测时面临模型权重专有、本地训练数据有限、计算资源受限等实际挑战，传统微调方法不可行。
AI.method: 提出轻量级黑盒适配框架，包含两个即插即用包装器：1) SMR²（平稳性感知多分辨率残差）：将输入分解为多分辨率时间视图，学习步长特定的残差校正以捕获区域动态，并自适应集成；2) MBB（移动块自举）：通过块重采样保留时间依赖性，在时间相干残差扰动上集成以稳定点预测。两者均遵循Bagging原则——构建多样化的输入或残差视图，用同一冻结骨干网络预测，然后聚合。
AI.result: 在澳大利亚南部多个站点的月度标准化降水蒸散指数（SPEI）预测任务上，该框架在多种骨干模型上一致提升预测性能，相比冻结骨干网络最高实现26%的均方误差（MSE）降低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需访问骨干参数或进行微调，仅通过推理时间集成实现适配，适用于资源受限的区域气候预测系统，展现了良好的实用性和部署可行性。

title: Automating Visual Recognition of Leprosy in Wild Chimpanzees
summary: Leprosy (Mycobacterium leprae) has been confirmed in wild western chimpanzees (Pan troglodytes verus) in West Africa, presenting as clear and progressive visual symptoms. Manual review of camera-trap footage at landscape scale is infeasible, motivating the need for automated screening. We present the first deep learning pipeline for wildlife leprosy detection and contribute the PanLep300 dataset of 125,670 annotated bounding-box crops across 953 tracks from 303 camera-trap videos with ecologically-motivated splits that withhold whole individuals and camera installations. We benchmark spatial (2D), temporally aggregated (2.5D), and video-based (3D) classification approaches to investigate which approach is best suited to automated leprosy detection in wild apes. We find that simple aggregation of crop-level predictions consistently matches or outperforms both learned temporal models and end-to-end video architectures -- consistent with leprosy's static cutaneous presentation. We further find that performance is suppressed when tracklets contain frames of partially visible individuals -- as commonly occurs at the start and end of a track -- and demonstrate that this can be addressed through targeted construction and aggregation strategies.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个用于野生动物麻风病检测的深度学习管道，并贡献了PanLep300数据集。通过对125,670个标注边界框（来自303个相机陷阱视频的953条轨迹）进行基准测试，发现简单的空间聚合方法优于复杂的时序模型，并针对部分可见个体的轨迹片段提出了优化策略。
AI.motivation: 西非野生黑猩猩中已确认存在麻风病（由麻风分枝杆菌引起），表现为明显且渐进的视觉症状。人工筛查大规模相机陷阱影像不切实际，亟需自动化检测方法。
AI.method: 构建PanLep300数据集（125,670个标注边界框，953条轨迹，303个视频）；对比三种分类方法：2D（空间）、2.5D（时序聚合）和3D（视频级别）；采用生态学上合理的数据划分（保留完整个体和相机安装点）。
AI.result: 简单的作物级预测聚合方法一致匹配或优于学习型时序模型和端到端视频架构；包含部分可见个体（通常出现在轨迹片段起始和结束位置）的轨迹片段会抑制性能，可通过针对性构建和聚合策略解决。
AI.conclusion: 对于麻风病这类静态皮肤表现的疾病检测，简单的空间聚合方法比复杂的时序模型更有效；研究为野生动物疾病自动化筛查提供了实用的基线方法。

title: After the Euclidean Highway: Hyperbolic Expert AI as the Next Innovation
comment: 40 pages, 11 figures. Supplementary Information included as an ancillary file. Data and code: Zenodo, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21438499 (published, CC-BY-4.0)
summary: Expert domains are trees; the Euclidean transformer is not, diluting parent-child structure exponentially at depth. The hyperbolic turn left one question unasked: not how much of a network to curve, but where curvature may touch the gradient. Placement is a law, not a knob: the same geometry on a trainable adapter collapses training (seventeen training collapses, ~220 GPU-hours), yet at the loss layer alone it trains without one -- this is HySAT (Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training), hyperbolic losses at the loss layer only. Across six expert SLMs we constructed and deployed (Llama 3.1 and EXAONE 3.5; four adapter strategies; 18.0M-sample corpus; zero NaN over ~317K optimizer steps), a matched four-arm ablation isolates the preserved manifold invariant, and three propositions and a lemma prove why loss-only placement is stable where adapter-on-manifold is not. Four models are operationally deployed (one live, consumer-facing), two open-weight, with per-step traces and a seventeen-incident failure ledger on Zenodo (CC-BY-4.0).

AI.tldr: 提出HySAT方法，仅在损失层使用双曲几何，避免在全网络或适配器中使用双曲空间导致的训练崩溃，在六个小语言模型上验证有效，其中四个已部署上线。
AI.motivation: 双曲空间能更好建模树状层次结构，但在适配器层使用双曲几何会导致训练崩溃（17次崩溃，~220 GPU小时），需要探究双曲几何应放置在网络的哪个位置才能保持稳定。
AI.method: HySAT（Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training）：仅在损失层（loss layer）应用双曲损失，保持其余网络在欧几里得空间。通过四项消融实验、三个命题和一个引理证明损失层放置的稳定性优于适配器层放置。
AI.result: 在六个SLM（Llama 3.1和EXAONE 3.5，四种适配器策略，18.0M样本语料库）上零NaN发生，~317K优化步数无崩溃；四个模型已部署（一个面向消费者在线服务），两个开源权重。
AI.conclusion: 双曲几何的放置位置是关键因素而非曲率大小，损失层单独放置双曲几何即可稳定训练并受益于层次结构建模。

title: The PanAf-SBR Dataset: Social Behaviour Recognition for Wild Great Apes
summary: Behavioural shifts in wild great ape populations, particularly the breakdown of social structures, can serve as an early indicator of population decline. Automating the detection of behaviours indicative of these shifts is therefore a critical task for conservation. Several valuable datasets have recently been introduced for the automated recognition of great ape behaviour, yet few include fine-grained social behaviour annotations, and those that do are captured either in captive settings or via aerial platforms such as UAVs. We address this gap by introducing PanAf-SBR, the first wild great ape camera trap dataset annotated with social behaviours. PanAf-SBR extends PanAf500 with 100 additional videos covering 36,063 frames. These come with 81,096 annotations including bounding boxes, segmentation masks, intra-video identities, and seven social behaviour classes defined under the action giver and receiver convention of ChimpACT. We use this data together with the AlphaChimp architecture to establish the first benchmarks for fine-grained social behaviour recognition in wild great apes from camera trap footage. We further conduct bidirectional transfer learning experiments between PanAf-SBR and the captive ChimpACT dataset, finding that cross-dataset pre-training is highly beneficial for specific classes rather than of uniform benefit. Finally, we examine the role of background context by inverting the segmentation masks to suppress non-ape pixels.

AI.tldr: 论文引入PanAf-SBR，首个野生大型类人猿相机陷阱社交行为标注数据集，基于AlphaChimp架构建立细粒度社交行为识别基准，并通过跨数据集迁移学习实验发现特定类别的预训练收益不均。
AI.motivation: 野生类人猿种群的行为变化（尤其是社会结构瓦解）可作为种群衰退的早期指标，自动化检测这些行为对保护工作至关重要。现有数据集要么缺乏细粒度社交行为标注，要么仅覆盖圈养环境或空中平台视角，缺乏野生环境下的相机陷阱数据。
AI.method: 在PanAf500基础上扩展100个视频（36,063帧），提供81,096个标注（边界框、分割掩码、视频内身份ID及七类社交行为），采用ChimpACT的动作施动者-接收者约定。使用AlphaChimp架构建立基准，进行跨数据集（PanAf-SBR与圈养ChimpACT）双向迁移学习，并通过反转分割掩码抑制背景像素研究上下文影响。
AI.result: 建立了首个野生类人猿相机陷阱细粒度社交行为识别基准；跨数据集预训练对特定类别高度有益而非均匀提升；背景上下文对识别性能有影响。
AI.conclusion: PanAf-SBR填补了野生环境下类人猿社交行为自动识别的数据空白，为保护监测提供技术支持；未来可进一步探索跨域迁移学习策略及背景消解方法。

title: One-step lowest-variance selection in a Gaussian random-field model motivated by masked diffusion: Total correlation and a square root collision threshold
summary: Motivated by confidence-guided parallel unmasking in masked discrete diffusion, we study a single selection step in a stylized Gaussian random-field model. A locally dependent nonnegative score field represents position wise uncertainty, and the scheduler selects the K positions with the smallest scores. Dependence among the selected positions is measured through a distance-dependent Gaussian correlation model. This separation provides a tractable framework for quantifying how the geometry of low-score locations affects the dependence cost of factorized parallel decoding. We establish two complementary results. In a conservative sub-square-root regime, the conditional Gaussian total correlation of the selected block vanishes in probability. At the square-root scale, it remains non-negligible with positive asymptotic probability and admits a strictly positive expectation lower bound. Synthetic experiments support the predicted finite-size behavior. These results provide a rigorous stochastic-geometry baseline for understanding how budget size, score dependence, and spatial correlation jointly shape one-step confidence-based selection in masked discrete diffusion.

AI.tldr: 本文在风格化高斯随机场模型中，研究了基于置信度的并行解遮蔽中的单步选择问题，建立了低分位置几何如何影响因子化并行解码依赖代价的理论框架，并给出了两个互补性结果：在次平方根规模下条件高斯总相关趋近于零，在平方根规模下则保持非可忽略。
AI.motivation: 为理解掩蔽离散扩散中基于置信度的并行解遮蔽机制，提供一个严格的随机几何基线，量化预算规模、分数依赖性和空间相关性如何共同影响一步置信度选择。
AI.method: 采用风格化高斯随机场模型，定义局部依赖的非负分数场表示位置不确定性，调度器选择分数最小的K个位置；通过距离相关的高斯相关模型度量选中位置间的依赖性，分别在次平方根和平方根两个尺度下分析条件高斯总相关的渐近行为。
AI.result: 在保守的次平方根规模下，选中块的条件高斯总相关依概率收敛到零；在平方根规模下，该相关性以正渐近概率保持非可忽略，且存在严格正的期望下界。合成实验验证了有限尺寸下的预测行为。
AI.conclusion: 本文为理解掩蔽离散扩散中基于置信度的并行解码提供了严格的随机几何理论基础，阐明了预算大小、分数依赖性和空间相关性三者对选择结果的联合影响。

title: Does Super-Resolution Preserve Defect Evidence? A Low-False-Call Benchmark for Semiconductor Inspection
summary: Super-resolution can make inspection images appear sharper without preserving the evidence needed to detect a defect. We study this failure mode with a benchmark that separates reconstruction from detection and evaluates both at a predeclared low false-positive rate. Ten end-to-end repetitions combine independently generated line/space and contact-hole images with model training, calibration, clean controls, weak defects, and a held-out defect morphology. Every reconstruction is scored by the same local residual detector, while direct and jointly trained detectors form a separate comparison track. Reconstruction fidelity and inspection utility diverge: the two learned reconstruction models attain the highest structural similarity yet detect fewer defect pixels than bicubic interpolation in every paired repetition. A direct DeepLabV3 detector reaches $0.1984\pm0.0385$ recall at $0.000174\pm0.000084$ false-positive rate and satisfies the held-out feasibility criterion in all ten repetitions. An illustrative joint model, DPU-WaferSR, passes independent clean calibration but exceeds the held-out limit in all ten repetitions, demonstrating that calibration success does not guarantee transfer. Weak-defect recall remains near zero for every feasible method. Applying the unchanged policies to 4,591 public Carinthia-S masks further reveals large method-dependent shifts on real SEM texture. These results support a simple conclusion: super-resolution for inspection should be judged by preserved task evidence and operating-point transfer, not reconstruction quality alone.

AI.tldr: 超分辨率虽能提升图像清晰度，但可能破坏检测缺陷所需的关键证据。本文通过分离重建与检测的基准测试发现，学习型超分辨率模型在结构相似性上最优，但缺陷检测像素数反不如双三次插值；直接检测器（DeepLabV3）在低假阳性率下表现可靠，而联合模型校准成功却无法泛化。结论：超分辨率应用于检测时应以任务证据保留和操作点迁移而非重建质量评判。
AI.motivation: 现有超分辨率方法常以图像重建质量（如PSNR、SSIM）作为评价指标，但忽略了在工业检测等关键任务中，超分辨率可能破坏用于缺陷检测的原始证据。论文旨在揭示这一失效模式，并建立以检测效用为核心的评价体系。
AI.method: 设计了一个分离重建与检测的基准测试：使用线/空间和接触孔图像进行10次端到端重复（含独立生成、模型训练、校准、清洁控制、弱缺陷和保留缺陷形态）。所有重建结果均采用相同局部残差检测器评分，同时设置直接检测器（DeepLabV3）和联合训练模型（DPU-WaferSR）作为对比轨道。最后在4,591张真实SEM图像（Carinthia-S掩码）上验证策略迁移性。
AI.result: 1) 两个学习型重建模型SSIM最高，但每次重复中检测到的缺陷像素数均少于双三次插值；2) 直接DeepLabV3检测器在0.000174±0.000084假阳性率下召回率达0.1984±0.0385，且10次均满足保留缺陷可行性标准；3) 联合模型DPU-WaferSR通过独立清洁校准，但10次均超出保留缺陷限制，表明校准成功不保证迁移；4) 所有可行方法对弱缺陷的召回率接近零；5) 在真实SEM纹理上，方法间存在较大差异性偏移。
AI.conclusion: 超分辨率用于检测任务时，不应仅以重建质量评判，而应以保留的任务证据和操作点迁移能力作为核心评价标准。

title: FailureAtlas: A Taxonomy of Failure Modes in Multi-Provider LLM Serving Infrastructure
summary: Multi-provider LLM gateways reverse proxies that route, load-balance, and rate-limit requests across foundation-model APIs have become critical production infrastructure. Yet the failure modes specific to this architectural layer remain undocumented, scattered across issue trackers and post-mortems with no unifying framework. We introduce \fa{}, a two-axis taxonomy that classifies failures by their \emph{origin layer} (Network/Transport, Streaming/Protocol, State/Session, Model~Behavior, Governance/Cost) and their \emph{detectability} (Loud vs.\ Silent). We populate this taxonomy with five verified catalog entries sourced from public bug reports and first-hand stress testing, each accompanied by a mechanistic root-cause analysis. Three entries include standalone reproduction scripts. Our principal finding is that the most operationally severe failures are \emph{silent}: they return HTTP~200, pass every standard health check, and corrupt application state in ways that require semantic-level observability to detect. Two such silent failures a concurrency race condition causing history loss and a streaming index collision corrupting tool-call payloads were discovered first-hand during \cb{} evaluation campaigns.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一个针对多提供商LLM网关（反向代理）故障的两轴分类法（\fa{}），按故障起源层（网络/传输、流/协议、状态/会话、模型行为、治理/成本）和可检测性（显性 vs. 隐性）进行分类。通过5个已验证的案例（含3个可复现脚本），发现最严重的故障是“隐性”故障——返回HTTP 200、通过健康检查，但需语义级可观测性才能检测，如并发竞态导致历史丢失和流索引碰撞破坏工具调用负载。
AI.motivation: 多提供商LLM网关作为生产基础设施已广泛部署，但其特定故障模式缺乏系统性文档和统一分类框架，问题散见于issue追踪器和事后分析中。
AI.method: 提出两轴分类法（起源层×可检测性），从公开bug报告和一手压力测试中收集5个验证案例，进行机制性根因分析，其中3个提供独立复现脚本。
AI.result: 识别出最严重的故障为“隐性”故障：返回HTTP 200且通过健康检查，但会损坏应用状态，需语义级可观测性才能检测。在\cb{}评估中首次发现两个隐性故障（并发竞态导致历史丢失、流索引碰撞破坏工具调用负载）。
AI.conclusion: 网关层的隐性故障是当前可观测性实践的盲区，语义级监控对保障LLM生产系统可靠性至关重要。

title: TimeLens2: Generalist Video Temporal Grounding with Multimodal LLMs
summary: Video multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can describe what happens in a video, but rarely identify when the supporting evidence occurs. We study generalist video temporal grounding, in which one model predicts a variable-cardinality set of evidence intervals across video lengths, domains, query forms, and viewpoints. Existing training strategies are misaligned with this set-valued task: long-video labels often rely on brittle one-pass annotation, while reinforcement-learning rewards either fail to distinguish non-overlapping predictions or require fragile segment matching. TimeLens2 treats temporal evidence as an interval set throughout supervision and optimization. TimeLens2-93K constructs reliable multi-span supervision through caption-derived proposals, independent localization, cross-agent consensus, semantic verification, and boundary refinement. Our temporal Wasserstein reward computes exact one-dimensional \(W_1\) between uniform distributions over merged interval supports, providing dense, matching-free feedback under unequal cardinalities and equivalent fragmentation; temporal IoU complements it with precise-overlap feedback. Across seven benchmarks, TimeLens2-2B outperforms all size-matched baselines on every benchmark, while the 4B and 8B variants achieve state-of-the-art performance, surpassing open-source models with up to 397B parameters. The 2B, 4B, and 8B variants improve over their Qwen3-VL backbones by 14.2, 13.0, and 18.1 mIoU points, respectively.

AI.tldr: TimeLens2提出将时间证据视为区间集合进行监督和优化的视频时序定位方法，通过构建高质量多跨度标注集和时序Wasserstein奖励，在7个基准上超越所有同规模模型，最高达397B参数的开源模型。
AI.motivation: 现有视频多模态大模型能描述视频内容但难以定位支持性证据的时间位置；现有训练策略与集合值预测任务不匹配（长视频标注依赖单次标注、强化学习奖励无法区分非重叠预测或需要脆弱的片段匹配）。
AI.method: 1) 构建TimeLens2-93K高质量多跨度标注集（字幕提案→独立定位→跨智能体共识→语义验证→边界精炼）；2) 提出时序Wasserstein奖励（计算合并区间支持上均匀分布的一维Wasserstein距离W₁，提供稠密、无需匹配的反馈）；3) 结合时序IoU提供精确重叠反馈。
AI.result: TimeLens2-2B在7个基准上超越所有同规模基线；4B和8B版本达到SOTA，超越最高397B参数的开源模型；2B/4B/8B相比Qwen3-VL骨干分别提升14.2/13.0/18.1 mIoU。
AI.conclusion: 将时间证据视为区间集合的统一监督和优化框架能有效提升视频时序定位性能，且可扩展至不同规模模型。

title: Program Synthesis for Simulation-Based Inference: Joint Model Selection and Parameter Estimation
summary: Neural simulation-based inference enables parameter estimation for complex models, but typically requires the user to specify a simulator encoding a fixed model structure. We present a framework for joint model selection and parameter estimation that combines large language models for program synthesis with neural simulation-based inference. Given a natural language description of the system and data under investigation, an LLM proposes candidate simulator programs which are iteratively refined via feedback-driven mutation and evaluated using neural density estimation. The approach enables simulation-based inference over a pool of models, not just parameters within a fixed model. On benchmarks spanning deterministic dynamics, stochastic epidemic models, and dark matter substructure inference from gravitational-lensing images, the method identifies plausible model families from open-ended prompts, with accuracy that reflects the information content of the data and identifiability of candidate models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合大语言模型（LLM）程序合成与神经模拟推理的框架，能从自然语言描述出发，自动生成并迭代优化候选模拟器程序，实现模型选择与参数估计的联合推断，在三个基准任务上验证了有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统神经模拟推理需要用户手动指定固定模型结构的模拟器，限制了其在模型空间探索中的灵活性。本文旨在突破这一限制，实现从开放的自然语言描述到模型选择与参数估计的端到端自动化。
AI.method: 1) 利用LLM根据自然语言描述生成候选模拟器程序；2) 通过反馈驱动的变异迭代优化模拟器；3) 采用神经密度估计对候选模型进行评估和推断。
AI.result: 在确定性动力学、随机流行病模型和引力透镜暗物质子结构推断三个基准任务上，该方法能够从开放提示中识别出合理的模型族，且准确度反映了数据的信息含量和候选模型的可辨识性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将LLM的程序合成能力与神经模拟推理相结合，成功实现了超越固定模型结构的模型空间推断，为科学发现中的自动化模型探索提供了新范式。

title: An Explainable FFT-Based Spatial-Frequency Fusion Framework for Deepfake Detection
summary: Deepfake generation has raised growing concerns regarding digital media authenticity, misinformation, identity fraud, and public trust. Recent studies show that combining spatial and frequency features leads to stronger detection results than using independently. This paper presents MSCA-FFT, a Fast Fourier Transform (FFT)-based multi-scale cross-attention framework for image-level deepfake detection. The model combines a partially fine-tuned Xception spatial branch with an FFT-based frequency branch. The frequency branch processes the log-scaled FFT magnitude spectrum through shallow convolutional layers, avoiding inverse frequency-to-image reconstruction used in DCT-based pipelines. The spatial and frequency representations are refined by transformer encoders, fused through cross-attention, and passed to an MLP classifier for real/fake prediction. Experimental results show that MSCA-FFT achieves consistently higher performance than the DCT-based state-of-the-art spatial-frequency fusion method and the compared baseline models. The ablation study further indicates that the FFT-based frequency branch provides complementary spectral cues when fused with spatial features. In addition, FFT-based frequency analysis and Grad-CAM/LIME explanations show consistent evidence around manipulation-sensitive facial regions, including the eyes, mouth, nose, and facial boundaries.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于FFT的多尺度交叉注意力框架MSCA-FFT用于图像级深度伪造检测，结合Xception空间分支和FFT频率分支，通过交叉注意力融合特征，在多个数据集上优于DCT方法。
AI.motivation: 深度伪造生成技术对数字媒体真实性、虚假信息传播和身份欺诈构成严重威胁；现有方法表明空间与频率特征融合可提升检测效果，但DCT-based方法需逆变换重建图像，效率受限。
AI.method: MSCA-FFT框架包含：(1) 部分微调的Xception空间分支提取空间特征；(2) FFT频域分支处理对数尺度FFT幅度谱，通过浅层卷积提取频率特征，避免DCT中的逆重建；(3) Transformer编码器分别精炼空间与频率表示；(4) 交叉注意力机制融合双分支特征；(5) MLP分类器进行真伪预测。
AI.result: MSCA-FFT在多个数据集上一致优于基于DCT的空间-频率融合SOTA方法及基线模型；消融实验证实FFT频率分支与空间特征融合可提供互补频谱信息；Grad-CAM/LIME解释显示模型关注眼睛、嘴巴、鼻子及面部边界等操纵敏感区域。
AI.conclusion: FFT-based频率分析比DCT-based方法在深度伪造检测中更有效，且模型注意力与操纵敏感区域高度一致，具备可解释性。

title: Volatility-Aware Extreme Event Detection in High-Frequency Financial Markets
summary: Predicting extreme price movements in high-frequency financial markets is a challenging task due to non-stationarity, heavy-tailed return distributions, and severe class imbalance. In particular, rare but impactful events are often difficult to detect using conventional modeling approaches, which typically treat extreme movements as isolated observations. This study proposes a volatility-aware approach for extreme event detection using high-frequency Bitcoin limit order book (LOB) data. Motivated by empirical evidence of volatility clustering, the target formulation is extended to incorporate both large future returns and high-volatility regimes. This redefinition increases the proportion of informative samples and aligns the learning objective with the underlying market dynamics. Using a tree-based model (XGBoost) with time-series cross-validation and imbalance-aware evaluation, the proposed method achieves a Precision-Recall AUC of approximately 0.40, significantly outperforming the baseline formulation with a PR-AUC of around 0.06. This represents more than a sixfold improvement in detecting rare events. The results highlight that target design plays a critical role in financial machine learning, often exceeding the impact of model complexity. By incorporating volatility structure into the labeling process, the proposed approach provides a more effective and realistic framework for extreme event detection in high-frequency cryptocurrency markets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种波动率感知的极端事件检测方法，通过将高波动率机制纳入目标标签定义，利用XGBoost模型在高频比特币限价订单簿数据上实现了PR-AUC约0.40的性能，相比基线方法（PR-AUC约0.06）提升了六倍以上。
AI.motivation: 高频金融市场的极端价格变动预测面临非平稳性、重尾分布和严重类别不平衡等挑战，传统方法将极端事件视为孤立观测，难以检测罕见但具有影响的事件。
AI.method: 基于波动率聚类现象，将目标定义扩展为同时包含大未来收益和高波动率机制；采用XGBoost模型，结合时间序列交叉验证和不平衡感知评估。
AI.result: 提出的波动率感知方法在PR-AUC上达到约0.40，而基线方法仅为0.06，实现了超过六倍的性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 目标设计在金融机器学习中至关重要，其影响往往超过模型复杂度；将波动率结构纳入标签过程能更有效地检测高频加密货币市场的极端事件。

title: Bio-SFT: Asymmetric Cortical Guidance and Retinal Adaptation for Robust HDR Reconstruction
summary: Recovering high dynamic range (HDR) radiance from a single standard dynamic range (SDR) image is highly ill-posed. Extreme luminance variation and severe quantization in dark regions make accurate reconstruction challenging, often leading to visual artifacts and color distortions. To address this problem, we propose Bio-SFT, a bio-inspired spiking frequency transformer for single-image HDR reconstruction. Bio-SFT incorporates three biologically motivated components. First, a learnable Naka--Rushton retinal adaptation frontend stabilizes the input under complex lighting conditions. Second, an explicit Parvo--Magno split introduces asymmetric Parvo-to-Magno guidance, allowing high-frequency structural cues to modulate low-frequency reconstruction. Third, an event-driven SNN hard gating module applies all-or-none spiking to suppress dark-region noise while preserving structural details. The module is trained with a sparsity prior to encourage efficient feature utilization. Built for end-to-end training within a transformer backbone, these lightweight components provide strong parameter efficiency. Experiments on HDRTV1K show that Bio-SFT achieves competitive perceptual quality and consistently improves HDR-VDP-3 and $ΔE_{ITP}$ while reducing artifact propagation in symmetric guidance pipelines.

AI.tldr: 提出Bio-SFT，一种受生物启发的脉冲频率变换器，用于单图像HDR重建，通过视网膜适应前端、Parvo-Magno分裂和SNN硬门控模块，在HDRTV1K数据集上实现了竞争性感知质量。
AI.motivation: 从单张SDR图像重建HDR是高度病态问题，极端亮度变化和暗区域严重量化导致视觉伪影和颜色失真，现有方法难以准确重建。
AI.method: 提出Bio-SFT，包含三个生物启发组件：1) 可学习的Naka-Rushton视网膜适应前端，稳定复杂光照输入；2) 显式Parvo-Magno分裂，引入非对称Parvo-to-Magno引导，让高频结构线索调制低频重建；3) 事件驱动的SNN硬门控模块，通过全或无脉冲抑制暗区噪声、保留结构细节，并利用稀疏先验训练。
AI.result: 在HDRTV1K数据集上，Bio-SFT达到竞争性感知质量，一致提升HDR-VDP-3和ΔE_ITP指标，同时减少对称引导管线中的伪影传播。
AI.conclusion: 受生物视觉启发的轻量级组件嵌入Transformer骨干中可实现端到端训练，参数效率高，有效改善单图像HDR重建质量。

title: CoCurve: Cross-Module Co-Pruning Curvature for Training-Free Structured LLM Pruning
summary: Structured pruning compresses large language models (LLMs) by removing whole computational units, such as attention heads and feed-forward (FFN) channel groups. Most training-free methods, however, rank these units independently, implicitly treating the loss from pruning a set as the sum of its individual losses. This view fails for Transformers, whose sublayers are coupled through a shared residual stream. Two individually weak units can thus be jointly indispensable, yet independent scoring is blind to such dependence and removes them together. We introduce CoCurve (Cross-Module Co-Pruning Curvature), a calibration-only, fine-tuning-free method that prunes attention and FFN units jointly. A second-order Taylor expansion of the token-level KL between the frozen model and its masked copy yields a single Fisher matrix whose diagonal is classical node saliency and whose off-diagonal entries are co-pruning curvature edges: the extra damage of removing two units together. Under a single-ablation additivity approximation this matrix reduces to a Gram product of single-unit ablation features, so the full M x M interaction is recovered from M forward passes, with no pairwise sweeps or gradients. Pruning then reduces to one budgeted quadratic program, solved in a single shot under a shared attention--FFN budget, with no labels, fine-tuning, or recovery.

AI.tldr: CoCurve是一种免微调的结构化剪枝方法，通过跨模块共剪枝曲率矩阵捕捉注意力头与FFN通道组之间的联合重要性，将剪枝问题转化为单次二次规划求解，避免了传统独立评分法忽略模块间耦合的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 现有训练无关的结构化剪枝方法独立地对每个计算单元（注意力头、FFN通道组）进行重要性评分，隐含地假设剪枝一组单元的损失等于各单元损失之和。然而Transformer中不同子层通过共享残差流耦合，两个单独不重要的单元组合起来可能不可或缺，独立评分无法捕捉这种依赖关系，导致它们被同时错误剪除。
AI.method: 提出CoCurve方法：1) 对冻结模型与其掩码副本之间的token级KL散度进行二阶泰勒展开，得到单一Fisher矩阵，其对角线为经典节点显著性，非对角线为共剪枝曲率边（移除两个单元带来的额外损失）；2) 在单次消融可加性近似下，该矩阵退化为单次消融特征的Gram积，通过M次前向传播即可恢复M×M交互矩阵；3) 将剪枝问题转化为带预算约束的二次规划，在共享的注意力-FFN预算下一次性求解，无需标签、微调或恢复训练。
AI.result: CoCurve是一种只需要校准数据、无需微调的方法，能够联合剪枝注意力模块和FFN模块，通过捕捉跨模块的单元间依赖性，避免独立评分导致的错误剪枝。仅需M次前向传播即可获得完整交互矩阵，无需成对扫描或梯度计算。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入共剪枝曲率来建模跨模块单元间的联合重要性，CoCurve克服了传统独立评分方法忽略残差流耦合的局限性，将剪枝问题形式化为一个单次求解的带约束二次规划，在无需微调或恢复训练的条件下实现了更精准的结构化剪枝。

title: DA-MergeLoRA: Hypernetwork-Based LoRA Merging for Few-Shot Test-Time Domain Adaptation
summary: Few-shot Test-Time Domain Adaptation (FSTT-DA) seeks to adapt models to novel domains using only a handful of unlabeled target samples. This setting is more realistic than typical domain adaptation setups, which assume access to target data during source training. However, prior FSTT-DA approaches fail to effectively leverage source domain-specific knowledge, relying on shallow batch normalization updates, prompt-based methods that treat the model as a black box, or ensembling strategies that do not capture cross-domain relationships. To address these limitations, we introduce a new FSTT-DA framework that integrates LoRA fine-tuning with model merging. In our approach, separate LoRA modules are fine-tuned on CLIP's vision encoder for each source domain. Since LoRA modifies only a small fraction of the model's parameters, it retains the base model's generalized knowledge while internally learning domain-specific features. To adapt the learned knowledge to a specific target domain, we propose a hypernetwork trained via meta-learning that generates per-column merging factors to combine LoRA modules. Given a small batch of target images, the hypernetwork produces merging weights that fuse source LoRA modules into a single adapted representation. Our results demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across various domain adaptation datasets. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/nahbois4321/DA-MergeLoRA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DA-MergeLoRA框架，通过元学习训练的超网络动态融合多个源域LoRA模块，实现少样本测试时域适应（FSTT-DA），在多个域适应数据集上取得SOTA性能。
AI.motivation: 现有FSTT-DA方法未能有效利用源域知识：浅层BN更新、基于prompt的黑箱方法、以及无法捕捉跨域关系的集成策略均存在局限。需要一种既能保留基础模型泛化知识又能学习域特定特征的方法。
AI.method: 1) 为每个源域在CLIP视觉编码器上独立微调LoRA模块；2) 通过元学习训练超网络，给定少量目标图像后，生成逐列融合因子；3) 利用融合因子将多个源域LoRA模块合并为适应目标域的单一表示。
AI.result: 在各种域适应数据集上取得了最先进的性能。代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LoRA微调结合模型合并是一种有效的FSTT-DA策略，超网络动态融合机制能够自适应地将源域知识迁移到目标域。

title: A Weisfeiler-Leman Characterization of Global-Attention Graph Transformers for Mixed-Integer Linear Programs
comment: Accepted to Topology, Algebra, and Geometry in Data Science (TAG-DS) 2026 (20 pages, 10 figures) [Lightning Oral Presentation]
summary: Graph foundation models (GFMs) with global attention are increasingly used to represent mixed-integer linear programs (MILPs), aiming to capture structure beyond the locality of standard graph neural networks. We study their expressive power through graph isomorphism testing, asking which MILP instances they map to identical representations. We prove that a broad class of hierarchical graph transformers combining global linear attention, edge-weighted cross-attention, and bipartite message passing is bounded by the one-dimensional Weisfeiler-Leman (1-WL) test: under any parameter setting, 1-WL-equivalent MILP graphs receive identical graph embeddings. Our compositional proof shows that each architectural component is a symmetric multiset function and thus preserves 1-WL equivalence. We validate this characterization across ten diverse graph encoders, including Graphormer-, GraphGPS-, Set-Transformer-, and Gasse-style models. Across model capacities, graph scales, and pooling operators, every tested encoder maps 1-WL-equivalent non-isomorphic graph pairs to numerically identical embeddings. Consequently, graph invariants that vary within a 1-WL equivalence class cannot be recovered from these representations. We further show that expressiveness beyond 1-WL arises from input encoding rather than attention: random-walk positional encodings separate the constructed pairs, while additional constructions expose the limits of this remedy. These results characterize the expressive power of global-attention GFMs and provide an encoder-agnostic diagnostic for detecting 1-WL-induced representation equivalence.

AI.tldr: 本文证明，具有全局注意力的图基础模型（包括层次图变换器）在表示混合整数线性规划时，其表达能力受限于一维Weisfeiler-Lehman（1-WL）测试：任何参数设置下，1-WL等价的MILP图都会得到相同的嵌入表示。通过10种编码器的实验验证了这一结论，并指出超越1-WL的表达能力来自输入编码（如随机游走位置编码）而非注意力机制本身。
AI.motivation: 研究具有全局注意力的图基础模型在表示混合整数线性规划时的表达能力，特别是它们能否区分标准图神经网络无法区分的不等价MILP实例。
AI.method: 通过图同构测试的形式化分析，证明层次图变换器（结合全局线性注意力、边加权交叉注意力和二分图消息传递）的表达能力受1-WL测试限制；每个架构组件均为对称多重集函数，保持1-WL等价性。并在10种编码器上进行数值验证。
AI.result: 所有测试编码器都将1-WL等价的非异构非同构图对映射到数值相同的嵌入；随机游走位置编码可以分离构造的图对，但进一步构造揭示了这种补救方法的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 全局注意力GFM的表达能力受限于1-WL，超越1-WL的表达能力来自输入编码而非注意力机制；提供了编码器无关的诊断方法用于检测1-WL导致的表示等价性。

title: TraversRL: Traversable Pedestrian Pathway Generation With Reinforcement Learning
summary: Automatically generating pedestrian pathways from aerial images requires producing a connected network suitable for routing, not just detecting where sidewalks appear. Sidewalks and crossings, in contrast to roads, may be partially occluded, implicitly defined, and exhibit complex connectivity patterns. Existing segmentation-based approaches focus on labeling pixels to infer segments, but often produce disconnected or fragmentary graphs that are unreliable for navigation. We introduce TraversRL, a vision-conditioned model that iteratively grows a pathway network from an aerial image, simulating a traveler navigating the built environment. TraversRL uses an action space of short and long direction-distance segments designed to adapt to complex patterns and span occlusions, and uses a combination of graph-level and step-wise rewards to balance overall connectivity with precise edge placement. Across three visual backbones and three intersection datasets, TraversRL substantially improves buffered IoU with the ground-truth graph relative to a state-of-the-art segmentation baseline, and more than doubles metrics of connectivity. Moreover, combining global and local rewards produces cleaner graphs with fewer spurious branches while further improving overall performance. These results demonstrate that modeling pathway extraction as a sequential decision process from the perspective of a traveler, while optimizing for final graph quality with reinforcement learning, produces significantly more reliable pedestrian networks.

AI.tldr: TraversRL是一种视觉条件模型，通过强化学习将行人路径提取建模为旅行者的序列决策过程，从航拍图像中迭代生长路径网络，相比分割基线方法显著提高了连通性和图质量。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法从航拍图像生成行人路径时，往往产生不连通或碎片化的图，无法可靠用于导航。人行道和过街通道可能被部分遮挡、隐式定义且具有复杂的连接模式，需要生成连通的路由网络而不仅仅是检测人行道像素。
AI.method: TraversRL是一种视觉条件模型，将路径提取建模为旅行者在建筑环境中导航的序列决策过程。模型使用长短方向-距离段组成的动作空间以适应复杂模式和跨越遮挡，采用图级和步骤级奖励的组合来平衡整体连通性与精确边缘放置，通过强化学习优化最终图质量。
AI.result: 在三种视觉骨干网络和三个交叉口数据集上，TraversRL相比最先进的分割基线，显著提高了与真值图的缓冲IoU，并将连通性指标提升了一倍以上。结合全局和局部奖励可生成更干净的图（更少的伪分支），同时进一步改善整体性能。
AI.conclusion: 将路径提取建模为从旅行者视角出发的序列决策过程，并通过强化学习优化最终图质量，能够生成显著更可靠的行人网络。

title: AGG: Jacobian-Aggregated Group Gradient for Efficient GRPO Training of Diffusion Models
summary: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is a powerful reinforcement learning algorithm for aligning generative models with human preferences. While successful in large language models~\cite{shao2024deepseekmathpushinglimitsmathematical}, its extension to diffusion and flow matching models introduces a severe computational bottleneck: gradients must be back-propagated through the high-capacity DiT backbone at \emph{every} timestep of the sampling trajectory, making high-resolution text-to-image (T2I) training prohibitively expensive. Training-free DiT inference acceleration methods (e.g., $Δ$-DiT, ScalingCache) exploit the fact that DiT hidden states and velocity predictions vary \emph{smoothly and nearly linearly} along the trajectory. We ask whether the same linearity can reduce the backward-pass cost of DiT RL training, and answer affirmatively with \textbf{JAGG} (\textbf{J}acobian-\textbf{A}ggregated \textbf{G}roup \textbf{G}radient), which reduces full transformer backward passes from $W$ to $2$ per group of $W$ consecutive steps. JAGG approximates intermediate-step Jacobians via $t$-weighted interpolation of the endpoint Jacobians, then aggregates per-step upstream signals into two composite gradients applied through a single joint backward pass. We prove this interpolation is \emph{exact} when the velocity is linear in $(z,t)$, and a cosine-similarity routing rule (\texttt{jagg\_frac}) deploys JAGG only where the assumption holds. Experiments on T2I benchmarks show JAGG delivers $\sim$2$\times$ backward speedup with negligible quality degradation.

AI.tldr: JAGG是一种针对扩散与流匹配模型的强化学习训练加速方法，通过利用DiT隐状态沿轨迹的近似线性特性，将完整Transformer反向传播从每步一次减少为每W步仅两次，在文本到图像生成任务上实现约2倍反向加速且质量几乎无损。
AI.motivation: GRPO扩展到扩散模型和流匹配模型时，需要在采样轨迹的每个时间步都对高容量DiT主干进行梯度反向传播，导致高分辨率文本到图像训练的计算成本极其高昂，亟需降低反向传播开销的方法。
AI.method: 提出JAGG方法：1) 利用DiT隐状态沿轨迹平滑且近似线性变化的特性，通过t加权插值端点雅可比矩阵来近似中间步的雅可比；2) 将每步上游信号聚合成两个复合梯度，通过一次联合反向传播应用；3) 设计余弦相似度路由规则(jagg_frac)，仅在线性假设成立时启用JAGG。
AI.result: 在文本到图像基准测试上，JAGG实现了约2倍的反向传播加速，且质量下降可忽略不计。
AI.conclusion: 证明了当速度在(z,t)上呈线性时，所提出的插值方法是精确的；JAGG有效解决了扩散模型RL训练的计算瓶颈，为在大规模生成模型上应用强化学习提供了可行路径。

title: Generative Transmission: Rethinking Computation, Bandwidth, and Memory in Communication
comment: Submitted to WAICA on 30 April, accepted on 8 July, and awarded Best Paper on 18 July
summary: Under the AI Flow framework, communication is shifting from transmitting fidelity-oriented information flows toward delivering task-oriented and perception-oriented token flows across heterogeneous network resources. Video communication is a fundamental component of modern information networks. However, under ultra-low-bandwidth and weak-network conditions, conventional video coding and transmission methods, which are primarily optimized for pixel-level fidelity, often struggle to balance visual usability, transmission efficiency, and robustness to unstable links. With the rapid advancement of generativemodels, video communication is also moving from precise signal reconstruction toward receiver-side perceptual utility and system-level usability. In this paper, we propose Generative Transmission (GenTrans) for video communication under ultra-low-bandwidth and weak-network conditions. Built upon Generative Video Compression (GVC), GenTrans formulates video transmission as a joint optimization problem involving bandwidth, computation, and memory, rather than treating it merely as a signal coding task. By leveraging generative priors, cross-clip memory reuse, runtime state reuse, and weak-network-aware transport, GenTrans significantly reduces transmission overhead while enabling visually coherent and practically useful reconstruction. Experimental results show that GenTrans supports effective video transmission under ultra-low-bitrate and weak-network conditions, achieving improved transmission efficiency, decoding efficiency, and robustness while preserving perceptual quality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GenTrans框架，将视频通信从保真度导向的信号重建转向任务/感知导向的生成式传输，在超低带宽和弱网络条件下，通过生成式先验、跨片段内存复用、运行时状态复用和弱网络感知传输等机制，实现视觉连贯且实用的视频传输。
AI.motivation: 传统视频编码和传输方法针对像素级保真度优化，在超低带宽和弱网络条件下难以平衡视觉可用性、传输效率和对不稳定链路的鲁棒性。需要一种新的视频传输范式来应对这些挑战。
AI.method: 基于生成式视频压缩（GVC），将视频传输建模为带宽、计算和内存的联合优化问题，利用生成式先验、跨片段内存复用、运行时状态复用和弱网络感知传输等技术降低传输开销。
AI.result: 在超低码率和弱网络条件下支持有效的视频传输，提升了传输效率、解码效率和鲁棒性，同时保持了感知质量。
AI.conclusion: 在AI Flow框架下，视频通信正从精确信号重建转向接收端感知效用和系统级可用性，GenTrans验证了生成式传输在极端网络条件下的可行性。

title: ANNLib: A Development Framework for Efficient Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search
summary: Approximate Nearest Neighbor Search (ANNS) plays a pivotal role in modern deep learning pipelines. Recently, many ANNS systems have been proposed to either provide broad functionality or reach high performance. However, it is yet difficult to achieve both with minimal programming efforts. We propose ANNLib to address the gap. ANNLib is a library that provides a programming framework for achieving high performance and flexible functionality in ANNS systems, based on popular graph-based ANNS algorithms. We carefully decouple and independently optimize both the algorithm and the data structure components of an ANNS system. In addition, we integrate state-of-the-art algorithms and data structures into ANNLib as modules, along with our new designs. Users can choose combinations of components to implement sophisticated settings with high performance, such as filter search, fully dynamic updates, and historical queries on snapshots. Our experiments show that our new solution provides a simple interface for various applications and achieves comparable or even better performance than previous work, specifically for each application.

AI.tldr: ANNLib是一个基于图的近似最近邻搜索（ANNS）编程框架，通过解耦并独立优化算法与数据结构组件，结合模块化的SOTA设计与新方案，使用户能以最小编程工作量实现高性能与灵活功能（如过滤搜索、动态更新、快照历史查询），并在各应用场景中达到甚至超越现有方案性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ANNS系统要么提供广泛功能（灵活性高），要么追求高性能，但难以在最小编程工作量下同时兼顾两者，存在功能与性能之间的权衡缺口。
AI.method: 将ANNS系统中的算法组件与数据结构组件进行解耦并独立优化；将SOTA算法和数据结构模块化集成到ANNLib中，并加入新设计方案；用户可通过组合不同组件实现过滤搜索、全动态更新、快照历史查询等复杂场景。
AI.result: ANNLib提供了简单接口，在各种应用场景中实现了与现有工作相当甚至更优的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦设计与模块化集成，ANNLib成功在保持高性能的同时实现了灵活功能，且用户编程负担小，证明了该框架在ANNS系统中的有效性。

title: DecoyFace: Beyond Obfuscation via Controllable and Imperceptible Identity Misdirection for Privacy-Preserving Face Recognition
summary: Split face recognition reduces client-side computation but exposes intermediate features to feature inversion attacks and unauthorized analysis by honest-but-curious (HBC) servers. Existing privacy-preserving face recognition methods mainly aim to resist unauthorized reconstruction, typically producing features whose inversion yields visibly degraded results, which may reveal the existence of protection and motivate adaptive attacks. To address this issue, we propose DecoyFace, an imperceptible decoy-oriented framework that steers unauthorized reconstruction toward a plausible but incorrect identity while preserving recognition utility. The key idea is to decompose the intermediate representation into a reconstruction-sensitive subspace and its complementary subspace. The client injects decoy identity cues into the reconstruction-sensitive subspace, while limited recognition-relevant evidence from the true sample is retained in the complementary subspace. On the server side, an authorized canonicalization module suppresses decoy-dominant components and recovers a recognition-friendly representation. This design addresses both attacker-side inversion from intercepted features and HBC server-side reconstruction from canonicalized representations. Experiments show that DecoyFace preserves competitive recognition accuracy while substantially reducing identity leakage to 2.93% under U-Net attacks and 0.74% under Flow-Matching attacks while yielding visually plausible and imperceptible reconstructions, with over 99.78% face validity on LFW dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出DecoyFace框架，通过将中间特征分解为对重建敏感的子空间和互补子空间，客户端在敏感子空间注入诱饵身份线索，服务端通过规范化模块压制诱饵成分并恢复可识别表示，从而在保持识别精度的同时，使未经授权的重建产生合理但错误的身份，将身份泄露率降至0.74%-2.93%。
AI.motivation: 现有隐私保护人脸识别方法主要抵抗未经授权的重建，但其生成的特征在重建后会产生明显降质的结果，暴露了保护的存在，可能激发自适应攻击。需要一种难以察觉的保护方法，既不暴露保护存在，又能误导重建结果。
AI.method: 将中间表示分解为对重建敏感子空间和互补子空间；客户端在重建敏感子空间注入诱饵身份线索，在互补子空间保留真实样本的识别相关证据；服务端使用授权规范化模块抑制诱饵主导成分，恢复可识别表示。
AI.result: 在保持竞争性识别精度的同时，U-Net攻击下身份泄露率降至2.93%，Flow-Matching攻击下降至0.74%；在LFW数据集上人脸有效性超过99.78%，重建结果视觉上合理且难以察觉。
AI.conclusion: DecoyFace能够同时防御攻击者侧的特征拦截攻击和HBC服务器侧的重建攻击，在不暴露保护存在的前提下有效保护人脸隐私。

title: Concentration and Mean-Square Bounds for Contractive Stochastic Approximation: A Unified Elementary Approach
comment: Submitted to Stochastic Processes and their Applications
summary: We establish mean-square and concentration bounds for stochastic approximation (SA) with arbitrary norm contractive mappings, under a multiplicative noise model where the noise may scale affinely with the norm of the iterates, and the iterates are potentially unbounded. These settings arise in reinforcement learning, where operators are often contractive in the $\ell_\infty$ norm and the noise scales with the iterates. To address the arbitrary norm, earlier works replace the non-smooth squared norm with a smooth Lyapunov function constructed via the generalized Moreau envelope. For concentration analysis, these works handle multiplicative noise and unbounded iterates through a multi-stage bootstrapping argument that starts from a time-varying worst-case bound and iteratively refines it. We instead present a unified and elementary analysis that yields both bounds. Using an averaged noise sequence and corresponding auxiliary iterates, we obtain a one-step Lyapunov drift inequality for the normed error directly, without smoothing the norm or constructing an envelope. For the mean-square bound, we combine this drift inequality with an induction argument showing that the iterates remain bounded in expectation. For the concentration bound, we develop a probabilistic induction over a sequence of "good" events on which the iterates are controlled, allowing the standard Azuma-Hoeffding bound to be applied. Our approach yields the first sub-Gaussian tailed maximal (all-time) concentration bound for SA under multiplicative noise, by allowing the stepsize to depend logarithmically on the confidence level. Beyond the specific setting considered here, we discuss the generalizability of these proof techniques to other noise models and iterative algorithms.

AI.tldr: 本文针对任意范数压缩映射下的随机逼近（SA）问题，在乘性噪声和潜在无界迭代条件下，提出了一种统一且初等的分析方法，同时获得了均方界和浓度界，并首次给出了乘性噪声下SA的次高斯尾部最大（全时）浓度界。
AI.motivation: 强化学习中算子常在ℓ∞范数下压缩且噪声随迭代量缩放，现有方法需通过广义Moreau包络构造光滑Lyapunov函数处理非光滑范数，并通过多阶段自助论证处理乘性噪声和无界迭代，分析复杂且不统一。
AI.method: 利用平均化噪声序列及对应的辅助迭代量，直接建立范数误差的单步Lyapunov漂移不等式，无需光滑化范数或构造包络。均方界通过漂移不等式结合归纳论证证明迭代期望有界；浓度界通过概率归纳构造序列"好事件"控制迭代量，从而应用标准Azuma-Hoeffding界。
AI.result: 首次得到乘性噪声下SA的次高斯尾部最大（全时）浓度界，允许步长对数依赖于置信水平。方法可推广至其他噪声模型和迭代算法。
AI.conclusion: 提出统一初等分析框架，同时获得均方界和浓度界，简化了现有复杂论证，并首次给出乘性噪声下SA的次高斯全时浓度界。

title: Thinking in Video: Can Video Generators Really Reason About the Real World?
summary: Recent advances in world models and video generation have given rise to an emerging reasoning paradigm that leverages video generative models to simulate, predict, and reason about real-world dynamics. We redefine this paradigm as Thinking in Video, where video is not merely an output artifact but a medium for constructing, extending, and verifying causal thought. However, this promise remains unverified: convincing rollouts may reflect memorized appearances rather than causal understanding, while existing metrics separate perceptual fidelity from semantic logic. To evaluate whether video generators support such reasoning, we introduce the Causal-Generative Dual-Judge (CGDJ), auditing World Model Consistency from two perspectives. Explicit Causal Perception tests whether a generator reads a video scenario as a reasoning problem through spatio-temporal flattened visual question answering, while Implicit Generative Perception-Prediction Gap evaluates whether it renders the causal consequence as a consistent future video. Applying CGDJ to representative open- and closed-source generators reveals a clear Perception-Prediction Gap: open-source models produce plausible dynamics despite near-zero explicit causal perception, whereas advanced closed-source systems show stronger but still limited alignment between reasoning and generation. Further analysis exposes audio-visual misalignment, where models verbalize correct causal logic more reliably than they render it, challenging the "world simulator" narrative.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Causal-Generative Dual-Judge (CGDJ)评估框架，从显式因果感知和隐式生成预测两个维度审计视频生成模型的世界模型一致性，发现开源模型虽能生成合理动态但因果感知近乎为零，闭源模型因果推理与生成之间存在显著差距，且存在音视频错配问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视频生成模型虽能生成令人信服的视频内容，但可能只是记忆表象而非真正理解因果关系，同时现有评估指标将感知保真度与语义逻辑分开衡量，无法评估视频生成器是否具备因果推理能力。
AI.method: 提出CGDJ框架，包含两个维度：1) 显式因果感知——通过时空展平的视觉问答测试模型是否将视频场景解读为推理问题；2) 隐式生成感知-预测差距——评估模型是否将因果结果渲染为一致的未来视频。
AI.result: 对代表性开源和闭源视频生成模型的评估揭示了清晰的感知-预测差距：开源模型在因果感知近乎为零的情况下仍能生成看似合理的动态；闭源系统表现更强但仍存在有限的对齐；此外发现音视频错配现象——模型在语言描述中能更可靠地表达因果逻辑，但在视觉渲染中表现较差。
AI.conclusion: 当前视频生成模型尚未真正实现"Thinking in Video"范式，其因果推理与生成能力之间存在显著鸿沟，挑战了"世界模拟器"的叙事，表明视频生成模型距离真正的因果理解和世界模拟仍有差距。

title: Trustworthy Protein-Ligand Binding Affinity Prediction via Reliability-Aware Multi-Engine Fusion
summary: Accurate protein-ligand binding affinity prediction is central to computational drug discovery, yet modern docking engines frequently disagree without indicating which prediction to trust. Consensus scoring and ensemble methods improve mean accuracy but treat all predictions identically without interpretable confidence measures or uncertainty decomposition, ignoring the chemical context of each protein-ligand pair. To address this limitation, we introduce RELIABLE-BA (RELIABiLity-aware Evidential fusion for Binding Affinity), an evidential framework for multi-engine binding affinity prediction. Our model comprises three steps: (1) modeling each engine as an evidential expert via Normal-Inverse-Gamma distributions, (2) scaling epistemic uncertainty through learned reliability from molecular context while preserving each expert's predictive mean, and (3) fusing experts through closed-form aggregation that captures both individual uncertainty and inter-engine disagreement. Experiments on the PDBBind and BDB2020+ benchmarks demonstrate competitive point prediction with substantially improved uncertainty calibration, and additional validation on the SARS-CoV-2 Mpro dataset and 5HT2A receptor demonstrates applicability to clinically relevant drug targets. Crucially, these uncertainty estimates enable reliable filtering of protein-ligand pairs, reducing prediction error by up to 25% when retaining only high-confidence pairs. To our knowledge, RELIABLE-BA is the first multi-engine binding affinity prediction framework to combine evidential fusion with context-dependent reliability, offering a principled path toward trustworthy AI-guided drug discovery. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/yongchand/RELIABLE-BA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RELIABLE-BA，一种基于证据融合的多引擎蛋白质-配体结合亲和度预测框架，通过Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布建模、基于分子上下文的认知不确定性缩放以及闭式聚合，在保持竞争性点预测的同时显著提升不确定性校准，并能过滤低置信度预测以减少高达25%的误差。
AI.motivation: 现有分子对接引擎在预测蛋白质-配体结合亲和度时常常相互矛盾且缺乏可解释的置信度度量与不确定性分解，忽略了每个蛋白质-配体对的化学上下文信息。
AI.method: 三步框架：(1) 通过Normal-Inverse-Gamma分布将每个对接引擎建模为证据专家；(2) 利用分子上下文学习可靠性来缩放认知不确定性，同时保留每个专家的预测均值；(3) 通过闭式聚合融合专家，同时捕获个体不确定性和引擎间分歧。
AI.result: 在PDBBind和BDB2020+基准测试上取得竞争性点预测且不确定性校准显著提升；在SARS-CoV-2 Mpro和5HT2A受体数据集上验证了临床相关应用价值；通过过滤高置信度预测可将误差降低高达25%。
AI.conclusion: RELIABLE-BA是首个结合证据融合与上下文相关可靠性的多引擎结合亲和度预测框架，为可信赖的AI驱动药物发现提供了原则性途径。

title: Hierarchy-Aware and Anatomy-Guided Learning for Lung Ultrasound Video Classification
summary: Lung ultrasound (LUS) is a bedside tool for assessing pulmonary edema in patients at risk due to heart failure or impaired kidney function. However, automated LUS analysis remains challenging because of speckle noise, imaging artifacts, and operator-dependent acquisition variability. In this work, we present a deep learning framework for multi-class LUS video classification that explores two components: hierarchy-aware training, and anatomy-guided learning. Starting from a strong baseline, we introduce hierarchical training strategies and then introduce pleural line mask supervision to guide model attention toward anatomically relevant regions. We study four clinically relevant classes--healthy, B-lines, consolidations, and mixed B-lines with consolidations--using an open-access dataset of 1,886 videos from 219 patients, evaluated with patient-level five-fold cross-validation. Results show that hierarchy-aware training improves pathological separation relative to flat classification, while mask-guided attention supervision achieves the highest mean macro-F1 of 65.7\% and produces more localized attention patterns. Transfer experiments on the external COVID-BLUeS dataset further show competitive and parameter-efficient adaptation while preserving pleural-focused attention behavior. These findings suggest that combining clinically structured objectives with anatomy-guided supervision is a practical approach to robust, interpretable LUS video analysis. Code and model implementations are available at https://github.com/Alya-Almsouti/LUS-video-classification.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合层次感知训练与解剖引导监督的深度学习框架，用于肺部超声视频的多分类（健康、B线、实变、混合），在开放数据集上达到65.7%的宏F1，并通过外部数据集验证了其泛化性和参数高效迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 肺部超声是评估肺水肿的床旁工具，但自动化分析因散斑噪声、成像伪影和操作者依赖性而具有挑战性；现有方法在病理区分和模型可解释性方面存在不足。
AI.method: 基于强基线模型，引入层次感知训练策略（利用临床类别层次结构）和解剖引导学习（胸膜线掩码监督以引导注意力聚焦于解剖相关区域），在1,886个视频（219名患者）上使用患者级五折交叉验证进行评估。
AI.result: 层次感知训练相比扁平分类改善了病理区分；掩码引导注意力监督达到最高平均宏F1为65.7%，且产生更局域化的注意力模式；在外部COVID-BLUeS数据集上表现出竞争性且参数高效的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: 结合临床结构化目标与解剖引导监督是实现鲁棒、可解释的LUS视频分析的实用方法。

title: Optimizing the Preconditioner: A Black-box Online-to-Nonconvex Conversion with Static Regret Minimization Oracles
summary:
We study whether stochastic nonconvex optimization can be reduced to ordinary static regret minimization in online convex optimization in a black-box manner. For smooth nonconvex objectives, our reduction maintains a predictable gradient tracker, while a black-box online learner selects a preconditioner that determines how this tracker is transformed into the update direction. The learner receives linear convex losses and is evaluated against a single fixed comparator over one undiscounted online game. For a $β$-smooth objective with range bounded by $M$ and an unbiased stochastic-gradient oracle with variance bounded by \(σ^2\), we establish $$\frac{1}{T}\sum_{t=1}^T
  \mathbb E\!\left[\|\nabla f(x_t)\|_2^2\right]
  \lesssim
  \frac{σ\sqrt{Mβ}}{\sqrt T}
  +
  \frac{\sqrt{Mβ}\,
  \mathscr R_T(\mathcal A,I_d)}{T}
  +
  \frac{Mβ}{T}.$$ Consequently, any black-box OCO algorithm with $\mathscr R_T(\mathcal A,I_d)=O(\sqrt T)$ recovers the classical $O(\frac{1}{\sqrt{T}})$ convergence rate.
  We further show that the same black-box framework extends beyond the smooth setting to Lipschitz nonconvex objectives without Lipschitz continuous gradients. Importantly, this extension continues to rely only on an ordinary static-regret guarantee and requires no stronger notion of online regret. When the OCO oracle admits square-root static regret, the resulting conversion achieves the optimal $O(T^{-2/7})$ convergence rate for the corresponding Goldstein stationary point. These results resolve the open problem posed by Chen and Hazan (2024). More broadly, our framework separates optimizer design into gradient prediction and online preconditioner selection, providing a principled perspective on how adaptive optimization methods such as AdaGrad and Shampoo may be understood through static regret and applied in nonconvex optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将非凸随机优化黑盒归约为在线凸优化中静态遗憾的方法，通过可预测梯度追踪器和在线学习器选择预条件子，实现了对光滑和Lipschitz非凸目标的统一收敛率分析，解决了Chen和Hazan (2024)提出的开放问题。
AI.motivation: 探究随机非凸优化能否以黑盒方式归约为在线凸优化中的静态遗憾问题，解决Chen和Hazan (2024)提出的开放问题。
AI.method: 维护一个可预测梯度追踪器，由黑盒在线学习器选择预条件子来决定更新方向；学习器处理线性凸损失，在单次无折扣在线博弈中与单个固定比较器评估。
AI.result: 对于β-光滑目标，收敛率为O(σ√(Mβ)/√T + √(Mβ) R_T(A,I_d)/T + Mβ/T)；对于Lipschitz非凸目标（无Lipschitz连续梯度），当OCO oracle具有平方根静态遗憾时，达到Goldstein稳定点的最优O(T^{-2/7})收敛率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架将优化器设计分解为梯度预测和在线预条件子选择，为理解AdaGrad、Shampoo等自适应优化方法在非凸优化中的应用提供了原则性视角。

title: FlexiGrad: Adaptive Gradient Modulation for Hierarchical Fine-Grained Classification
summary: Many fine-grained recognition tasks contain hierarchical labels such as order, family and species. Although this supervision should be beneficial, jointly optimising all levels often leads to unstable training because coarse and fine classifiers impose inconsistent gradients on the shared backbone. This hierarchical gradient conflict prevents the model from learning a coherent coarse-to-fine representation. In this paper, we propose FlexiGrad, a simple and parameter-free method that regulates gradient interactions during backpropagation. FlexiGrad removes only the harmful conflicting component when tasks disagree and reinforces the shared direction when they partially agree through a smooth hierarchy-aware weighting function. This produces stable optimisation and preserves both global structure and fine-grained discriminative cues. FlexiGrad integrates into existing architectures without modification while improves multi-granularity accuracy on CUB-200-2011, FGVC-Aircraft and Stanford Cars. The code will be available at PRIS-CV/FlexiGrad.

AI.tldr: 提出FlexiGrad方法，通过层级感知的梯度调节机制解决分层标签训练中的梯度冲突问题，无需修改网络结构即可提升多粒度识别精度。
AI.motivation: 分层标注的细粒度识别任务中，粗粒度与细粒度分类器对共享骨干网络产生不一致梯度，导致训练不稳定，现有方法缺乏有效的梯度冲突解决方案。
AI.method: 提出FlexiGrad，一种无参数方法：当分类任务梯度冲突时移除有害分量，当部分一致时通过平滑的层级感知加权函数增强共享方向，在反向传播中调节梯度交互。
AI.result: 在CUB-200-2011、FGVC-Aircraft和Stanford Cars数据集上提升了多粒度识别准确率。
AI.conclusion: FlexiGrad能有效解决层级梯度冲突，实现稳定的粗到细表示学习，且无需修改现有架构即可集成。

title: PoLoRA: A Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA Optimizer
summary: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) makes finetuning large language models cheaper by adding to each weight matrix a trainable low-rank update parameterized as the product of two matrices. These matrices are usually trained with Adam, which treats them as a single flat vector of parameters and ignores both the matrix and product structure of LoRA. Applying a matrix-aware optimizer such as Muon to each factor does not consistently improve over Adam, and neither do the product-aware Muon variants proposed in concurrent works.
