AI.tldr: 本文利用锯齿状持续同调（zigzag persistent homology）分析TabPFN（一种基于Transformer的表格数据基础模型）的内部表示拓扑结构，发现其拓扑特征（如H₀碎片化计数、H₁循环活动）与数据集级别的可靠性、预测误差和过度自信程度存在显著相关性，表明拓扑分析可用于诊断TabPFN在困难几何结构上的推理行为。
AI.motivation: TabPFN在表格预测任务上表现出色，但其在结构困难的表格几何数据上的内部行为仍缺乏理解，需要一种方法来诊断其推理可靠性。
AI.method: 使用锯齿状持续同调，将TabPFN每层表示视为演化的点云；构建包含扭曲圆环、环面、球面、Hopf链环、三叶结和Swiss roll等已知真实概率的合成表格任务基准；分析H₀碎片化、H₁持久性等拓扑特征与预测误差、过度自信等指标的关系。
AI.result: H₀碎片化计数与平均绝对残差正相关；困难几何结构同时增加H₁循环活动和H₀碎片化，但H₁持久性变短；这些拓扑描述符与贝叶斯误差、平均绝对残差和过度自信相关。
AI.conclusion: 锯齿状持续同调能够诊断TabPFN推断的上下文任务几何结构的可靠性，并提供了识别模型在拓扑应力状态下何时运行的上下文级视图。

title: To Blend In, First Decouple: Rethinking Camouflage Image Generation via Context-Decoupled Representations
summary: Camouflage image generation (CIG) focuses on generating visually concealed objects that seamlessly blend into their backgrounds. Existing methods typically follow either background-guided paradigms that adapt object appearance via style transfer, or foreground-guided strategies that outpaint surrounding regions conditioned on object features. However, they still suffer from appearance discrepancy and background artifacts. We attribute these limitations to cross-context representation leakage, where object and background cues are entangled in a coupled conditional space, resulting in ambiguous control and degraded camouflage fidelity. To tackle this, we propose a new context-decoupled generative paradigm, termed CamoDreamer, which aims to isolate contextual conditional guidance and explicitly decouple latent camouflage features into coordinated object and background control streams. First, a Contrast-aware Contextual Bridge is designed to model cross-context discrepancies and construct contrast-aware dual conditional guidance. Second, Context-Decoupled Assimilation Streams are employed to separate generative interactions conditioned on the dual guidance, while facilitating background rendering with target-aware cues in the latent space. Finally, a Frequency-Adaptive Contextual Blend module integrates complementary high-frequency textures and low-frequency structures from decoupled features to improve holistic coherence. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CamoDreamer consistently outperforms existing methods with a substantial margin, while maintaining a relatively lightweight design.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种上下文解耦的伪装图像生成方法CamoDreamer，通过对比感知上下文桥、解耦同化流和频率自适应混合模块，解决了现有方法中跨上下文表示泄漏导致的生成质量差问题，在轻量级设计下大幅超越现有方法。
AI.motivation: 现有伪装图像生成方法（背景引导或前景引导）存在外观不一致和背景伪影问题，本质原因是物体与背景线索在耦合条件空间中纠缠（跨上下文表示泄漏），导致控制模糊和伪装保真度下降。
AI.method: 1) 对比感知上下文桥（Contrast-aware Contextual Bridge）建模跨上下文差异，构建对比感知的双条件引导；2) 上下文解耦同化流（Context-Decoupled Assimilation Streams）基于双条件引导分离生成交互，在潜空间中用目标感知线索辅助背景渲染；3) 频率自适应上下文混合模块（Frequency-Adaptive Contextual Blend）融合解耦特征中的互补高频纹理和低频结构，提升整体连贯性。
AI.result: 大量实验表明CamoDreamer在各项指标上以显著优势超越现有方法，同时保持相对轻量化的设计。
AI.conclusion: 跨上下文表示泄漏是伪装图像生成的关键瓶颈，通过显式解耦物体和背景的条件控制流可以有效提升伪装保真度与整体连贯性。

title: DiFA: Inference-Time Forward-Process Alignment for Diffusion Models
summary: The prevailing inference framework for diffusion models formulates generation fundamentally as a problem of numerical integration. This perspective casts the model as an exact estimator, neglecting the inherent statistical uncertainty of the denoising process. In this work, we propose Forward-Process Aligned Diffusion prediction (\textbf{DiFA}), a training-free framework that reframes inference-time data prediction refinement as a sequential state estimation problem. Rather than reusing past outputs solely for numerical integration, DiFA treats iterative data predictions along the reverse trajectory as correlated observations to build a forward-aligned temporal consensus. Inspired by Kalman filtering, this consensus aggregates historical predictions according to structural consistency and noise-level compatibility. To counteract the over-smoothing tendency of temporal consensus, we introduce a deviation guidance mechanism to adaptively preserve residual details. Empirically, DiFA yields significant improvements on CIFAR-10 and ImageNet across the evaluated metrics, including FID, IS, and FD-DINOv2, demonstrating that aligning inference with the forward statistical structure substantially improves generative fidelity.

AI.tldr: DiFA是一种无需训练的新框架，将扩散模型的推理过程从数值积分问题重新定义为序列状态估计问题，通过类似卡尔曼滤波的前向对齐时间共识聚合历史预测，并引入偏差引导机制保留细节，在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上显著提升了FID、IS和FD-DINOv2等指标。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散模型的推理框架将生成视为数值积分问题，将模型视为精确估计器，忽略了去噪过程中固有的统计不确定性。
AI.method: 提出DiFA框架，将推理时的数据预测优化重新定义为序列状态估计问题。受卡尔曼滤波启发，根据结构一致性和噪声水平兼容性聚合历史预测，构建前向对齐的时间共识；并引入偏差引导机制以自适应保留残差细节，对抗时间共识的过度平滑倾向。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10和ImageNet上，DiFA在FID、IS和FD-DINOv2等指标上均取得显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 将推理过程与正向统计结构对齐可以显著提高生成保真度。

title: Measuring Monosemanticity in Sparse Autoencoders via Latent Activation Coherence
comment: This is a preprint version. A shorter version of this paper has been accepted for presentation and publication in the post-workshop proceedings of the 8th International Workshop on eXplainable Knowledge Discovery in Data Mining (XKDD 2026), co-located with ECML PKDD 2026. The appendix is included only in this preprint and is not part of the peer-reviewed proceedings paper
summary: Within Explainable Artificial Intelligence, mechanistic interpretability uses Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) to extract more interpretable features from neural representations. However, assessing their monosemanticity, and thus explanation quality, remains challenging. Existing metrics require external concept labels or depend on pretrained embedding models, making them sensitive to encoder's geometry. We introduce the Tversky Monosemanticity Score (TMS), a label-free metric that operationalizes monosemanticity as activation-set coherence of binarized SAE latents, and does not require external embedding encoders. We evaluate TMS on SAEs trained on features from pretrained vision and vision-language models (DINOv3, CLIP, BLIP2), two common SAE regimes (TopK, BatchTopK), multiple sparsity levels, and expansion factors. Our results show that TMS is less affected by encoder anisotropy than its embedding-based alternative, while remaining aligned with established monosemanticity indicators. TMS also reveals distinct SAE training dynamics across base models. Moreover, under encoder anisotropy, TMS provides a stronger indication of probe-based concept deletion effectiveness, while being competitive otherwise.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Tversky Monosemanticity Score (TMS)，一种无需外部标签或嵌入模型的新型单语义性评估指标，通过二值化SAE潜变量的激活集一致性度量单语义性，在视觉和视觉-语言模型的多种SAE训练范式下，相比嵌入基指标受编码器各向异性影响更小，且与已有单语义性指标保持一致。
AI.motivation: 现有单语义性评估指标要么需要外部概念标签，要么依赖预训练嵌入模型，导致对编码器几何结构敏感，缺乏无偏、无需外部资源的评估方法。
AI.method: 提出Tversky Monosemanticity Score (TMS)，通过将SAE潜变量二值化后计算其激活集的Tversky相似度来衡量单语义性，无需外部标签或嵌入编码器。
AI.result: 在DINOv3、CLIP、BLIP2等视觉和视觉-语言模型上，TMS比嵌入基替代指标受编码器各向异性影响更小，与已有单语义性指标保持一致，能揭示不同基模型的SAE训练动态差异，且在编码器各向异性下对基于探针的概念删除效果提供更强的指示。
AI.conclusion: TMS是一种更鲁棒、无需外部资源的单语义性评估指标，尤其在编码器各向异性条件下表现更优。

title: Harness Engineering for LLM-Driven GPU Kernel Generation
comment: 24 pages, 6 figures. Extended technical report on our submission to the MLSys 2026 FlashInfer AI Kernel Generation Contest. Code: https://github.com/syhya/mlsys26-flashinfer-contest
summary: Large language models (LLMs) can assist GPU kernel generation, but their practical effectiveness depends on whether generated code can be reliably constrained, validated, profiled, and selected. This paper presents a harness-centered system for LLM-driven GPU kernel optimization in the MLSys 2026 FlashInfer AI Kernel Generation Contest on NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPUs. The system separates an evaluation harness from a profile-backed optimization controller: the harness enforces compilation, correctness, official-aligned timing, and artifact archival, while the controller turns profiler and workload evidence into bounded candidate-generation decisions. Human-authored skills capture operator constraints, references, profiling procedures, and promotion rules, while Codex and Claude Code agents generate candidate kernels inside those constraints. Across five operator definitions, the retained official-aligned artifacts achieved mean-latency speedups over supplied FlashInfer baselines of 1.62x, 18.05x, 29.68x, 1.12x, and 13.70x. The Agent-Assisted kernels outperform the Full-Agent artifacts across the evaluated definitions, indicating that expert-provided optimization directions, high-quality references, and workload context remain critical for reliable AI-driven kernel optimization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种以评估框架为中心的LLM驱动GPU内核优化系统，用于MLSys 2026 FlashInfer AI内核生成竞赛。该系统将评估框架与基于性能分析数据的优化控制器分离，在人工编写的技能约束下，利用Codex和Claude Code智能体生成候选内核。在NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPU上，针对五个算子定义，系统实现了相对于FlashInfer基线1.12x至29.68x的平均延迟加速比，且Agent-Assisted方法优于完全自动化Agent方法。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在GPU内核生成方面具有潜力，但其实际效果取决于生成代码能否被可靠地约束、验证、性能分析和选择。现有的方法缺乏一个系统化的框架来确保生成内核的正确性、性能和可复现性。
AI.method: 提出一个以评估框架（harness）为中心的系统，包含两部分：1）评估框架负责编译验证、正确性检查、官方对齐的计时和工件归档；2）基于性能分析数据的优化控制器将性能分析和工作负载证据转化为有边界的候选生成决策。人工编写的技能（skills）捕获算子约束、参考实现、性能分析流程和提升规则，Codex和Claude Code智能体在这些约束内生成候选内核。
AI.result: 在NVIDIA Blackwell B200 GPU上，针对五个算子定义，保留的官方对齐工件相对于FlashInfer基线实现了1.62x、18.05x、29.68x、1.12x和13.70x的平均延迟加速比。Agent-Assisted（智能体辅助）内核在所有评估定义上均优于Full-Agent（完全自动化智能体）工件。
AI.conclusion: 专家提供的优化方向、高质量参考实现和工作负载上下文对于可靠的AI驱动内核优化仍然至关重要。完全自动化的智能体方法效果不及人工辅助的智能体方法，表明在GPU内核优化这一复杂任务中，领域知识引导不可或缺。

title: CDIS: Cross-Dimensional Class-Agnostic 3D Instance Segmentation via 2D Mask Tracking and 3D-2D Projection Merging
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures. Published in the proceedings of the 2025 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS)
summary: Class-agnostic 3D instance segmentation is critical for robotic systems operating in unknown environments, enabling perception of previously unseen objects for reliable manipulation and navigation. Existing approaches typically project per-frame 2D instance masks into 3D and merge them, which often breaks object identities across time and yields fragmented 3D instances. We introduce Cross-Dimensional Class-Agnostic 3D Instance Segmentation (CDIS), a zero-shot framework that explicitly tracks 2D instance masks across frames and associates them with 3D superpoints, creating a feedback loop between 2D and 3D. This cross-dimensional reasoning links temporally stable 2D tracks with spatially coherent 3D regions, producing globally consistent 3D instance labels without any 3D-specific training. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that CDIS achieves higher accuracy and consistency than state-of-the-art zero-shot methods, while remaining efficient and scalable to diverse real-world environments.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种跨维度类无关3D实例分割框架CDIS，通过2D掩膜追踪与3D超点关联的反馈机制，在无需3D训练的情况下实现全局一致的3D实例分割，性能优于现有零样本方法。
AI.motivation: 现有类无关3D实例分割方法通常将逐帧2D实例掩膜投影到3D并合并，导致跨时间的目标身份断裂和3D实例碎片化问题，无法满足机器人在未知环境中对先前未见物体的可靠感知需求。
AI.method: 提出CDIS零样本框架，核心为跨维度推理反馈机制：显式追踪2D实例掩膜在帧间的运动轨迹，并将这些时间上稳定的2D轨迹与空间上连续的3D超点进行关联，构建2D与3D之间的反馈循环，最终生成全局一致的3D实例标签。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上的实验表明，CDIS在准确性和一致性上均优于最先进的零样本方法，且高效可扩展，适用于多样化的真实环境。
AI.conclusion: CDIS通过跨维度反馈机制有效解决了2D到3D投影带来的身份断裂问题，实现了无需3D训练的全局一致3D实例分割，为机器人未知环境感知提供了高效可靠的方案。

title: Information-Based Exploration via Random Features for Reinforcement Learning
summary: Representation learning has enabled classical exploration strategies to be extended to deep Reinforcement Learning (RL), but often makes algorithms more complex and theoretical guarantees harder to establish. We introduce Random Feature Information Gain (RFIG), grounded in Bayesian kernel methods theory, which uses random Fourier features to approximate information gain and compute exploration bonuses in non-countable spaces. We provide error bounds on information gain approximation and avoid the black-box aspects of neural network-based uncertainty estimation, for optimism-based exploration. We present practical details that make RFIG scalable to deep RL scenarios, enabling smooth integration into standard deep RL algorithms. Experimental evaluation across diverse control and navigation tasks demonstrates that RFIG achieves competitive performance with well-established deep exploration methods while offering superior theoretical interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Random Feature Information Gain (RFIG)方法，利用随机傅里叶特征近似信息增益，为基于乐观探索的深度强化学习提供具有理论保证的探索奖励，在多种任务上取得竞争性能。
AI.motivation: 表征学习虽将经典探索策略扩展到深度强化学习，但常导致算法复杂化且难以建立理论保证。作者希望设计一种兼具理论可解释性和实用性的深度探索方法。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯核方法理论，使用随机傅里叶特征近似信息增益，在不可数状态空间中计算探索奖励；提供近似误差界，避免神经网络黑箱不确定性估计；给出可扩展至深度RL的实践细节。
AI.result: 在多种控制与导航任务上，RFIG与成熟的深度探索方法性能相当，同时具有更优的理论可解释性。
AI.conclusion: RFIG提供了一种在深度强化学习中兼顾理论保证与实用性能的探索方法，弥补了当前深度探索方法在理论解释性上的不足。

title: BrainNext: A General-Purpose Self-Supervised Foundation Model for Brain MRI Analysis
summary: Foundation models pretrained using self-supervised learning have transformed computer vision by learning transferable representations from large-scale unlabeled data. However, existing foundation models for neuroimaging remain limited by task-specific training, slice-based learning strategies, or relatively small pretraining datasets, restricting their generalizability across diverse brain MRI applications. In this work, we present BrainNext, a general-purpose self-supervised foundation model for volumetric brain MRI analysis. BrainNext combines masked autoencoder (MAE) pretraining with a native three-dimensional Bi-Directional xLSTM-UNet architecture to learn rich anatomical representations from 60,551 unlabeled brain MRI examinations spanning multiple MRI modalities. The pretrained model is subsequently adapted to downstream tasks through lightweight task-specific fine-tuning. We evaluate BrainNext on the Foundation Models for Medical Imaging (FOMO) 2025 Method Track, encompassing classification, segmentation, and brain-age estimation, where it achieved second place overall and ranked first in the meningioma segmentation task on the official FOMO 2025 challenge leaderboard, demonstrating strong transferability across heterogeneous neuroimaging tasks. These results highlight the potential of large-scale self-supervised pretraining to learn robust and transferable volumetric representations, establishing BrainNext as a scalable foundation model for diverse brain MRI applications.

AI.tldr: BrainNext是一个基于自监督学习的通用脑MRI基础模型，结合掩码自编码器预训练与原生3D Bi-Directional xLSTM-UNet架构，在60,551张未标记脑MRI扫描上学习解剖表征，在FOMO 2025挑战赛中获总排名第二、脑膜瘤分割任务第一，展现了跨异构神经影像任务的强迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有神经影像基础模型受限于任务特定训练、基于切片的学习策略或较小的预训练数据集，限制了其在不同脑MRI应用中的泛化能力。因此，需要一种通用、可扩展的神经影像基础模型来学习鲁棒且可迁移的体素级表征。
AI.method: BrainNext采用掩码自编码器（MAE）自监督预训练范式，结合原生三维Bi-Directional xLSTM-UNet架构，在包含多模态的60,551张未标记脑MRI扫描上进行预训练，随后通过轻量级任务特定微调适配下游任务。
AI.result: 在FOMO 2025方法赛道中，BrainNext获得总体第二名，并在脑膜瘤分割任务中排名第一，证明了其在分类、分割和脑龄估计等多种异构神经影像任务上的强迁移性。
AI.conclusion: 大规模自监督预训练能够学习鲁棒且可迁移的体素级表征，BrainNext可作为面向多样化脑MRI应用的可扩展基础模型。

title: fSRD: Fuzzy Spectral Region Decomposition -- Automated Multi Operator Koopman Representations via an Adaptive Spectral Learning Architecture
comment: 66 pages, 30 figures, corresponding author = Charles Bokor
summary: Highly nonlinear chaotic dynamical systems remain difficult to model due to fundamental trade-offs between complexity, expressivity, and data efficiency. Modern machine learning methods achieve strong predictive performance but often rely on a-priori system knowledge or curated data with limited interpretability. Koopman operator theory offers a promising direction via linear representation in an infinite-dimensional observable space. However, many data-driven Koopman methods seek globally valid operators for which useful finite-dimensional spectral embeddings remain difficult to identify under these constraints. To overcome associated limitations, we introduce Fuzzy Spectral Region Decomposition (fSRD), a fully automated learning framework for estimating finite Koopman representation via multiple operators. The proposed method realizes a data-adaptive framework for assembling locally invariant embeddings, termed Invariant Decomposition. fSRD achieves highly accurate linear reconstructions of nonlinear systems while learning finite-dimensional representations of their induced evolution operators, bridging interpretable operator-theoretic models with expressive data-driven sequence learning. These embeddings are adaptively constructed via a global fuzzy tree model, drawing inspiration from fuzzy neural architectures to learn the induced dynamics while prioritizing parsimonious solutions. Empirical results across canonical chaotic systems (e.g., Lorenz and Duffing) and high-dimensional real-world data demonstrate strong predictive accuracy, interpretability, and robust expressivity across data-rich and data-limited regimes, highlighting the method's generality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出模糊谱区域分解（fSRD），一种全自动学习框架，通过多个Koopman算子估计有限维表示，利用模糊树模型构建局部不变嵌入，在混沌动力系统建模中实现了高精度线性重构、可解释性和数据高效性。
AI.motivation: 高度非线性的混沌动力系统难以建模，现有方法在复杂性、表达力和数据效率之间存在根本性权衡；数据驱动的Koopman方法寻找全局有效算子时，难以识别有用的有限维谱嵌入。
AI.method: 提出fSRD框架，通过多个算子估计有限Koopman表示；利用全局模糊树模型自适应构建局部不变嵌入（Invariant Decomposition），借鉴模糊神经架构学习诱导动力学，优先追求简约解。
AI.result: 在Lorenz、Duffing等典型混沌系统和高维真实数据上，fSRD在数据充足和有限场景下均展现出强预测精度、可解释性和鲁棒表达力。
AI.conclusion: fSRD弥合了可解释的算子理论模型与富有表达力的数据驱动序列学习之间的鸿沟，为非线性动力系统建模提供了一种通用且高效的框架。

title: Medical Imaging Fusing Vision Transformer: Laryngeal Cancer Screening with Explanation
summary: Early and timely screening of laryngeal cancer is crucial for improving clinical outcomes. In recent years, NBI endoscopy has become a standard diagnostic tool for the detection of laryngeal lesions. However, its effective use requires well-trained clinicians and the procedure is time-consuming and subject to interobserver variability. In this context, the application of artificial intelligence (AI) offers a promising solution to support clinical decision-making. In this work, we proposed applying transformer and attention mechanism for analyzing the narrow band imaging and distinguish benign and malignant lesions. Results show it has good classification performance with F1 (82.72%), accuracy(82.33%). In addition, the result of laryngeal cancer screening is explainable for clinicians. The explainability is utilizing the state of art segmentation method (MedSAM) to provide the useful pathological information area for clinicians. The proposed methodology fusing classification and segmentation provides a translating on laryngeal cancer screening.

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合Transformer与注意力机制的AI方法，用于分析窄带成像内镜图像，对喉部良恶性病变进行分类（F1: 82.72%, 准确率: 82.33%），并利用MedSAM分割模型提供可解释的病理信息区域，辅助临床喉癌筛查。
AI.motivation: 喉癌早期筛查对改善临床预后至关重要，虽然NBI内镜是标准诊断工具，但其有效使用依赖训练有素的临床医师，且耗时、存在观察者间变异。因此需要借助AI来辅助临床决策。
AI.method: 提出基于Transformer和注意力机制的模型对NBI图像进行良恶性病变分类；同时利用SOTA分割方法MedSAM提供可解释的病理信息区域，融合分类与分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 融合分类与分割的AI方法为喉癌筛查提供了一种可解释的辅助工具，具有临床转化潜力。

title: MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models
comment: 20 pages, 3 figures, 9 tables, 2 algorithms, under review at TMLR
summary: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance, but often at prohibitive training cost - a challenge that is especially acute for compact models ($\leq 4 \, \mathrm{B}$ parameters) trained under limited budgets. We introduce MADA-RL, a post-training framework that specializes compact models into generator and critic roles and trains them with a debate-aware learning signal, fine-tuning only a small subset of parameters via LoRA adapters. Our central contribution is a counterfactual critic advantage: a dynamic, role-conditioned baseline that redefines the critic's advantage as its reward minus the generator ensemble's per-instance accuracy. This explicitly optimizes critics to improve over generator consensus rather than to merely reproduce a correct answer, yielding more targeted credit assignment than static mean-reward normalization. At deployment, the specialized agents are composed in a lightweight multi-round protocol. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, MADA-RL raises the accuracy of the DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B model from $39.9 \, \%$ to $41.9 \, \%$ ($+2.0$ points, $p < 0.001$) using $16$ times fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned baselines, placing it on the accuracy-trainable-parameter Pareto front. It approaches, but does not surpass, the strongest baselines (DeepScaleR, STILL-3), which are trained on substantially larger datasets; we analyse this gap and the associated inference-time cost directly. A controlled study isolates the source of MADA-RL's gains: the counterfactual advantage produces the highest critic improvement rate of any model evaluated, indicating that trained critics learn to correct generator errors rather than to imitate them.

AI.tldr: MADA-RL提出了一种面向紧凑型语言模型（≤4B参数）的后训练框架，通过将模型分工为生成器和评论家角色，并引入反事实评论家优势（counterfactual critic advantage）进行辩论感知训练。该方法仅用全参数微调1/16的可训练参数，在5个数学推理基准上将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B的准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%，处于准确率-可训练参数的帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型推理能力强但训练成本高，这一挑战在紧凑模型（≤4B参数）和有限预算下尤为突出。现有方法要么全参数微调成本过高，要么静态均值奖励归一化无法提供精细的信用分配。
AI.method: 将紧凑模型专业化分工为生成器（generator）和评论家（critic）两种角色，通过LoRA适配器仅微调少量参数。核心创新是反事实评论家优势：将评论家的优势定义为自身奖励减去生成器集成的逐实例准确率，从而优化评论家超越生成器共识而非简单复现正确答案。部署时采用轻量级多轮协作协议。
AI.result: 在5个数学推理基准上，MADA-RL将DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B的准确率从39.9%提升至41.9%（+2.0点，p<0.001），可训练参数仅为全微调基线的1/16，处于准确率-可训练参数的帕累托前沿。但未超越使用更大数据集训练的DeepScaleR和STILL-3等强基线。消融实验表明反事实优势产生了最高的评论家改进率。
AI.conclusion: MADA-RL验证了在紧凑模型和有限预算下，通过角色分工与反事实优势信号实现高效后训练的可行性。评论家被训练去纠正而非模仿生成器的错误，实现了参数效率与性能的良好权衡。论文也客观分析了与强基线的差距及推理开销。

title: ReViV: Reconstructing the Viewer and the View in 4D from Monocular Egocentric Video
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. The first two authors contributed equally, and their author order is interchangeable
summary: Egocentric devices, such as wearable front-facing cameras, provide a unique perspective for capturing the continuous interaction between a human viewer and the surrounding environment. A holistic and efficient multimodal model capable of reconstructing this 4D representation is therefore highly desirable. However, existing approaches often rely on auxiliary inputs such as pre-computed camera trajectories, treat scene perception and human ego-motion modeling as separate problems despite their strong interdependency, and suffer from slow inference time. To address these limitations, we present ReViV, the first unified framework for holistic egocentric 4D reconstruction that extracts both viewer and view dynamics from a single monocular RGB video. We formulate the task as learning the full joint probability distribution over multimodal signals, including RGB video, camera trajectory, gaze direction, full-body motion, hand motion, and depth. Powered by a Masked Generative Egocentric Transformer, ReViV operates within a single feed-forward architecture to simultaneously reconstruct the temporally consistent 4D reconstruction across the viewer and the view with fast inference speed. Extensive experiments on diverse benchmarks, including HoloAssist, HOT3D, ARCTIC, Aria Digital Twin, and TACO, demonstrate that ReViV achieves state-of-the-art accuracy and efficiency across holistic ego-body, hand, and gaze reconstruction, camera tracking, while maintaining highly competitive egocentric depth estimation without relying on heavy task-specific priors. Code and models are fully open-sourced: https://reviv4d.github.io/.

AI.tldr: ReViV是首个从单目RGB视频中同时重建观察者（全身运动、手部运动、注视方向、相机轨迹）和观察场景（深度）的统一4D重建框架，采用掩码生成式自编码器架构，实现快速、高精度的自我中心4D重建。
AI.motivation: 现有自我中心4D重建方法存在三个主要问题：依赖辅助输入（如预计算相机轨迹）、将场景感知与人体自我运动建模作为独立问题处理（忽视其强相互依赖性）、推理速度慢。亟需一个统一、高效的多模态模型来重建连续的4D表示。
AI.method: 提出ReViV统一框架，将任务建模为学习多模态信号（RGB视频、相机轨迹、注视方向、全身运动、手部运动、深度）的全联合概率分布；核心架构为掩码生成式自我中心Transformer（Masked Generative Egocentric Transformer），采用单一前馈架构同时重建观察者和观察场景的时序一致4D表示。
AI.result: 在HoloAssist、HOT3D、ARCTIC、Aria Digital Twin、TACO等多个基准上，ReViV在自我身体、手部、注视重建和相机跟踪方面达到SOTA精度，同时在自我中心深度估计上保持高度竞争力，且无需依赖重型任务特定先验。
AI.conclusion: ReViV证明了统一框架在自我中心4D重建中的有效性，通过联合建模观察者与场景的互依赖关系，实现了精度与效率的双重提升，为可穿戴设备感知提供了新范式。

title: FlashPDE: A Drop-in Fused Triton Operator Library for Neural PDE Solvers
comment: 9 pages of main text, 4 figures. Code available at https://github.com/factnn/FlashPDE
summary: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) solve PDEs by incorporating physical constraints into neural-network training, but large-scale problems are limited by automatic-differentiation memory overhead and inefficient execution of grid-based PDE operators. We present FlashPDE, a drop-in fused operator library for grid-based scientific machine learning. FlashPDE replaces fragmented PyTorch finite-difference execution with differentiable Triton kernels. Each operator integrates fused stencil evaluation, an analytic discrete-adjoint backward pass, and boundary-gradient correction within a unified torch.autograd.Function interface. The library provides 14 differentiable PDE operators covering 17 configurations across 1D--3D elliptic, parabolic, and Navier--Stokes systems, while remaining independent of neural architectures and training strategies. Experiments on an NVIDIA A100 GPU show that FlashPDE reduces peak memory usage by up to 37.0x compared with coordinate-based automatic differentiation and reduces CUDA kernel launches by up to 3.5x compared with eager PyTorch finite-difference implementations. Across six representative PDE benchmarks, FlashPDE achieves up to 2.30x end-to-end time-to-solution speedup and up to 19.2x kernel-level acceleration while maintaining numerical agreement with PyTorch finite-difference references. FlashPDE provides a hardware-efficient execution layer that bridges differentiable PDE solvers and GPU-optimized numerical computation within the PyTorch ecosystem.

AI.tldr: FlashPDE 是一个即插即用的融合算子库，通过可微分的 Triton 内核替代 PyTorch 有限差分执行，在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上实现了最高 37.0x 的峰值内存减少、3.5x 的 CUDA 内核启动减少以及 2.30x 的端到端加速，为基于网格的 scientific machine learning 提供了硬件高效的执行层。
AI.motivation: Physics-Informed Neural Networks (PINNs) 在求解 PDE 时受限于自动微分的内存开销以及基于网格的 PDE 算子执行效率低下，亟需一种硬件高效的融合算子库来桥接可微分 PDE 求解器与 GPU 优化的数值计算。
AI.method: FlashPDE 提供可微分的 Triton 内核，将碎片化的 PyTorch 有限差分执行替换为融合模板评估、解析离散伴随反向传播以及边界梯度修正，并通过统一的 torch.autograd.Function 接口封装了 14 个可微分 PDE 算子，覆盖 1D-3D 椭圆、抛物线和 Navier-Stokes 系统。
AI.result: 在 NVIDIA A100 GPU 上，相比基于坐标的自动微分，峰值内存使用减少高达 37.0x；相比 PyTorch 有限差分实现，CUDA 内核启动减少高达 3.5x；在六个代表性 PDE 基准测试中，端到端加速最高达 2.30x，内核级加速最高达 19.2x，且数值精度与 PyTorch 有限差分参考一致。
AI.conclusion: FlashPDE 在 PyTorch 生态内提供了硬件高效的执行层，有效桥接了可微分 PDE 求解器与 GPU 优化的数值计算，显著提升了大规模 PINNs 问题的内存效率和计算速度。

title: Toward Optimal Adenovirus Detection Using YOLO26
summary: This study systematically benchmarks different data augmentation setups across YOLO26 model size variants to determine the most effective setup for adenovirus detection in TEM images. The benchmarked setups include NAS, GAS, GMAS and DAS, all evaluated under identical training conditions. The adenovirus dataset, selected from the published TEM virus dataset, was re-annotated by leveraging adenovirus particle positions to generate YOLO-compatible bounding box annotations. The experimental results demonstrated the impact of the benchmarked data augmentation setups on adenovirus detection with YOLO26 and indicated the most effective data augmentation setup.

AI.tldr: 本研究系统比较了四种数据增强策略（NAS、GAS、GMAS、DAS）在YOLO26模型不同规模变体上对腺病毒透射电镜图像检测的效果，确定了最优增强方案。
AI.motivation: 透射电镜图像中腺病毒的自动检测对病毒研究和诊断具有重要意义，但数据增强策略对检测性能的影响尚未被系统研究。该研究旨在通过统一条件下基准测试不同数据增强方案，找出最适合腺病毒检测的设置。
AI.method: 选取公开TEM病毒数据集中的腺病毒子集，利用腺病毒粒子位置重新标注生成YOLO兼容的边界框标注。在YOLO26模型的不同规模变体上，在相同训练条件下对NAS、GAS、GMAS和DAS四种数据增强方案进行系统基准测试。
AI.result: 实验结果显示了不同数据增强方案对YOLO26腺病毒检测性能的影响，并指出了最有效的数据增强方案（具体方案名称需查阅原文）。
AI.conclusion: 通过系统基准测试确定了适用于透射电镜图像中腺病毒检测的最优数据增强方案，为病毒检测任务中数据增强策略的选择提供了实践指导。

title: L1 Augmented Attention as an Improved Vector Similarity Metric
summary: Scaled dot product attention conflates directional alignment and vector magnitude, limiting its effectiveness as a similarity metric in Transformer models. We introduce L1 augmented attention, a simple and computationally parallelizable modification that subtracts a learned, head specific L1 distance between queries and keys from the dot product score. This hybrid similarity captures complementary geometric information. Dot product rewards directional alignment, while L1 penalizes coordinate deviations. To reduce the cost of L1 computation, we project queries and keys into low dimensional subspaces whose parameters specialize to preserve informative L1 structure. Evaluated on WikiText 2 using a compact transformer, L1 augmented attention achieves up to a 14.5% reduction in perplexity over the original transformer baseline and outperforms an RBF L2 kernel. Analysis of norm variance and learned L1 weights reveals distinct geometric roles across layers and strong head level specialization. These results demonstrate that enriching attention with L1 geometry provides a principled and effective improvement to similarity computation in modern language models, with practical benefits for both accuracy and parallel efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本文提出L1增强注意力机制，通过在点积注意力中减去可学习的L1距离，结合方向对齐与坐标偏差惩罚，提升Transformer模型的相似度计算能力。在WikiText 2上，紧凑型Transformer的困惑度降低最高14.5%，且具有良好的并行计算效率。
AI.motivation: 标准缩放点积注意力将方向对齐与向量幅度混为一谈，限制了其作为相似度度量的有效性。现有注意力机制未能充分利用几何信息，特别是L1距离所捕捉的坐标偏差信息。
AI.method: 提出L1增强注意力机制：在点积得分中减去可学习的、头部特定的L1距离。为降低L1计算成本，将查询和键投影到低维子空间，其参数专门化以保留有信息的L1结构。
AI.result: 在WikiText 2数据集上，使用紧凑型Transformer，困惑度最高降低14.5%，优于原始Transformer基线和RBF L2核。分析显示不同层和学习到的L1权重具有不同的几何角色，且头部级专业化程度强。
AI.conclusion: 用L1几何丰富注意力机制为现代语言模型的相似度计算提供了原则性且有效的改进方案，在准确性和并行效率上均有实际收益。

title: FF-ProCams: Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting for Projector-Camera System
summary:
Projector-camera (ProCams) systems achieve active scene perception and controllable appearance manipulation via structured illumination, serving as a core infrastructure for spatial augmented reality, projection mapping, and surface reflectance acquisition. Existing inverse-rendering methods for ProCams deliver high-fidelity results but rely on time-consuming per-scene optimization, while mainstream feed-forward 3D reconstruction models produce baked appearance that cannot adapt to spatially varying projector illumination.
  To resolve this accuracy-efficiency trade-off, we propose FF-ProCams, a Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian inverse-rendering framework for ProCams. A hybrid Mamba2-Transformer encoder aggregates cross-view geometric and photometric cues from sparse multi-view observations, and lightweight heads predict a relightable Gaussian representation in a single forward pass. We further design a projector-aware differentiable renderer to synthesize camera observations under arbitrary active illumination and ProCams poses. To enable feed-forward training, we construct a large-scale synthetic ProCams dataset covering diverse object geometries and surface materials. Experiments show FF-ProCams achieves high-fidelity projector-aware rendering, generalizes to unseen patterns, and supports novel projector-camera poses. Using only 8 input views, it outperforms optimization-based baselines with 297 views while reducing test-time reconstruction to 0.13 seconds (a three-to-five-order-of-magnitude speedup). The code and data are available at https://github.com/CPREgroup/FF-ProCams/.

AI.tldr: 提出FF-ProCams，一种面向投影-相机系统的前馈式3D高斯逆渲染框架。通过混合Mamba2-Transformer编码器从稀疏多视角观测中提取几何与光度线索，预测可重光照的高斯表示，并设计投影仪感知的可微渲染器。在合成数据集上训练后，仅用8视角即可在0.13秒内完成重建，效果优于使用297视角的优化基线方法。
AI.motivation: 现有ProCams逆渲染方法（基于逐场景优化）虽然保真度高但耗时长，而前馈式3D重建模型无法适应空间变化的投影仪光照。为了打破精度-效率之间的权衡，需要一种既能保持高保真度又能实现快速前馈推理的方案。
AI.method: 1) 混合Mamba2-Transformer编码器，聚合稀疏多视角的几何与光度线索；2) 轻量级预测头，单次前向传播输出可重光照3D高斯表示；3) 投影仪感知的可微渲染器，在任意主动光照和ProCams位姿下合成相机观测；4) 构建大规模合成ProCams数据集用于前馈训练。
AI.result: 仅用8输入视角，FF-ProCams即超越使用297视角的优化基线方法；测试时重建仅需0.13秒（实现三到五个数量级的加速）；支持未见过的投影图案和新的投影-相机位姿，实现高保真投影感知渲染。
AI.conclusion: FF-ProCams成功解决了ProCams系统中精度与效率的权衡问题，通过前馈式框架将逐场景优化从分钟/小时级降至亚秒级，同时保持高渲染保真度和对未知光照与位姿的泛化能力。

title: Adaptive Mamba Neural Operators
summary: Accurately solving partial differential equations (PDEs) on arbitrary geometries and a variety of meshes is an important task in science and engineering applications. In this paper, we propose Adaptive Mamba Neural Operators (AMO), which integrates reproducing kernels for state-space models (SSMs) rather than the kernel integral formulation of SSMs. This is achieved by constructing Takenaka-Malmquist systems for the PDEs. AMO offers new representations that align well with the adaptive Fourier decomposition (AFD) theory and can approximate the solution manifold of PDEs on a wide range of geometries and meshes. In several challenging benchmark PDE problems in the fields of fluid physics, solid physics, and finance on point clouds, structured meshes, regular grids, and irregular domains, AMO consistently outperforms state-of-the-art solvers in terms of relative $L^2$ error. Overall, this work presents a new paradigm for designing explainable neural operator frameworks.

AI.tldr: 提出自适应Mamba神经算子（AMO），通过将再生核与状态空间模型（SSM）集成，并构建Takenaka-Malmquist系统，在多种几何形状和网格上准确求解偏微分方程，优于现有最先进求解器。
AI.motivation: 在任意几何形状和各种网格上准确求解偏微分方程是科学与工程应用中的重要任务，现有方法在处理复杂几何和网格时性能有限。
AI.method: 提出AMO框架，通过构建Takenaka-Malmquist系统，将再生核与状态空间模型集成，替代传统的核积分公式；该方法与自适应傅里叶分解（AFD）理论一致。
AI.result: 在流体物理、固体物理和金融等领域的多个具有挑战性的基准PDE问题中，包括点云、结构化网格、规则网格和不规则域，AMO在相对L²误差上持续优于最先进的求解器。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为设计可解释的神经算子框架提供了新的范式。

title: Vis2Reg: Visibility-Aware Landmark-Free Geometric 3D--2D Registration for Liver Laparoscopy
summary: Accurate 3D--2D liver registration, which aligns preoperative 3D models to partial, view-dependent intraoperative surface observations, is critical for AR-guided laparoscopic surgery but remains challenging due to severe occlusion, limited visibility, and the lack of 3D ground-truth supervision. Existing landmark-free approaches perform partial-to-complete geometric alignment, yet robust self-supervision under extreme partial visibility remains difficult. We propose Vis2Reg, a visibility-aware registration framework that explicitly constrains deformation using mask-consistent visible regions. We introduce a visibility-aware self-supervision that derives a visible-domain 3D supervision signal from intraoperative masks, enabled by differentiable point rasterization and mask-guided back-projection. This formulation improves robustness under severe occlusion while maintaining fully self-supervised learning. Vis2Reg combines a robust geometric rigid initialization module with an implicit neural deformation field for stable alignment. Vis2Reg achieves a Dice score of 92.6\% and a Chamfer Distance of 1.43 mm on real intraoperative datasets, with 111 ms per-frame inference time, demonstrating both accuracy and practical efficiency.

AI.tldr: 提出Vis2Reg，一种面向AR引导腹腔镜手术的可见性感知3D-2D肝脏配准框架，通过掩膜引导的可见区域自监督和可微点光栅化，在严重遮挡条件下实现高精度、实时的部分到完整变形配准。
AI.motivation: AR引导腹腔镜手术需要将术前3D模型与术中部分、视角依赖的2D表面观测进行精确配准，但现有方法面临严重遮挡、有限可视性以及缺乏3D真值监督的挑战，现有无标记方法在极端部分可见性下难以实现鲁棒的自监督。
AI.method: 提出Vis2Reg框架，包含：1) 可见性感知自监督，通过可微点光栅化和掩膜引导的反向投影从术中掩膜推导可见域3D监督信号；2) 鲁棒的几何刚性初始化模块；3) 隐式神经变形场实现稳定对齐。
AI.result: 在真实术中数据集上Dice分数达92.6%，Chamfer距离为1.43 mm，每帧推理时间111 ms，同时实现了精度和实际效率。
AI.conclusion: Vis2Reg通过显式利用掩膜一致的可见区域约束变形，在严重遮挡下保持完全自监督学习，验证了可见性感知策略在部分到完整几何配准中的有效性。

title: SEE: Structure-aware Exploring \& Exploiting for Long-horizon GUI Agent Trajectory Synthesis
comment: Accepted by ACM International Conference on Multimedia 2026 (ACM MM 2026)
summary: Graphical User Interface (GUI) agents powered by vision-language models hold promise for automating real-world mobile tasks. However, progress is limited by the lack of high-coverage, long-horizon interaction trajectories collected from element-rich and rapidly evolving apps. Existing pipelines often rely on costly human demonstrations or on-policy framework, which tends to over-sample common flows while missing rare transitions and complex multi-step procedures. To address this problem, we propose SEE, a two-stage data synthesis framework consisting of (i) an efficient exploration stage that builds an explicit UI transition graph over screens and elements, and (ii) a graph-based synthesis stage that composes diverse multi-step trajectories via planning and controlled sampling. This design yields reproducible and explainable data generation, while explicitly preventing spurious cycles and enabling long-horizon composition. Across multiple real-world apps, SEE produces trajectories with an average length of 14.8 steps while avoiding spurious loops, and agents fine-tuned on SEE achieve improved task success and generalization to unseen screens. We will publicly release our synthesis code and dataset.

AI.tldr: 提出了SEE，一个两阶段数据合成框架，通过构建UI转换图并基于图进行轨迹采样，生成长跨度、高覆盖率的GUI交互数据，用于训练移动端GUI代理。
AI.motivation: 现有GUI代理训练数据依赖昂贵人工演示或在线策略框架，存在常见流程过采样、稀有转换和复杂多步程序缺失的问题，且缺乏高覆盖率、长跨度交互轨迹。
AI.method: 两阶段框架：(i) 高效探索阶段，构建屏幕和元素上的显式UI转换图；(ii) 基于图的合成阶段，通过规划和受控采样组合多样化的多步轨迹，防止虚假循环并实现长跨度组合。
AI.result: 在多个真实应用上，SEE生成的轨迹平均长度14.8步且避免虚假循环；基于SEE微调的代理在任务成功率和未见屏幕泛化上均有提升。
AI.conclusion: SEE框架能够生成可复现、可解释、高覆盖的长跨度GUI数据，有效提升了GUI代理的性能和泛化能力，代码和数据集将开源。

title: PRiSM: Prototype Regularization for Few-Shot VLMs
summary: Training-free few-shot adaptation methods have gained significant attention recently in the context of Vision-language Models (VLMs). Yet, current benchmarks rely on strong assumptions about the statistics of the adaptation data, e.g., class balance. We question these simplifying assumptions and introduce a more realistic benchmark that varies both the levels of class balance and the effective number of classes in few-shot tasks via Dirichlet sampling. Surprisingly, under our setting, we observe substantial drops in the performances of state-of-the-art methods, more so when the number of labeled samples increases. To mitigate this, we introduce PRiSM, a class-prototype regularization that can be deployed as a plug and play module on top of any existing baseline method, significantly improving performances. Our method optimizes a novel multi-term loss, which includes a regularizer maximizing inter-class pairwise distances, along with additional terms promoting support-feature alignment and fidelity to the baseline prototypes. Furthermore, we introduce an effective and computationally efficient block Majorize-Minimize optimizer for our objective. More specifically, we derive a valid blockwise Lipschitz constant (i.e., a bound on the Hessian's spectral norm), which can be computed efficiently via the Gershgorin circle theorem. Extensive experiments show that PRiSM improves several training-free baselines, with large gains when dealing with severe class imbalance and high numbers of classes.

AI.tldr: 本文针对视觉-语言模型（VLMs）中无训练小样本适应方法在现实场景（类别不平衡、类别数变化）下性能显著下降的问题，提出了PRiSM——一种即插即用的类原型正则化方法，通过优化包含类间距离最大化、支持特征对齐和原型保真度的多目标损失，并利用基于Gershgorin圆定理的高效块Majorize-Minimize优化器求解，显著提升了现有基线方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有无训练小样本适应方法的基准测试假设适应数据具有类别平衡等理想统计特性，这与现实场景不符。作者质疑这些简化假设，并引入基于Dirichlet采样的更现实基准，发现现有方法在类别不平衡和类别数变化时性能大幅下降，且标注样本越多下降越严重。
AI.method: 提出PRiSM方法：1）设计一个包含三项损失的多目标优化函数——最大化类间原型成对距离的正则项、支持特征对齐项、基线原型保真度项；2）引入基于块Majorize-Minimize的高效优化器，通过Gershgorin圆定理推导出可计算的块状Lipschitz常数（Hessian谱范数上界），保证优化效率。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，PRiSM显著提升了多种无训练基线方法的性能，尤其在严重类别不平衡和高类别数的场景下提升幅度最大。
AI.conclusion: PRiSM作为即插即用模块，能有效解决现实场景中类别不平衡和类别数变化带来的性能退化问题，为VLMs的无训练小样本适应提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

title: SGN: A Similarity-based Generative Network for Data Generation under Distribution Shift
summary: Generative models trained on a source domain often produce samples that are poorly aligned with shifted target domains, limiting their effectiveness for target-domain data augmentation. Although target-specific adaptation can reduce this mismatch, it typically requires additional optimization and domain-specific parameters. We propose a Similarity-based Generative Network (SGN), a reusable framework that is trained once on labeled source data and applied to new target domains without parameter updates. SGN learns a latent space structured by label-induced pairwise similarities while preserving reconstructive information through an encoder-decoder architecture. At generation time, a small labeled representative set from the target domain is encoded and combined in the learned latent space, allowing the generated samples to inherit target-specific characteristics while maintaining class consistency. We further analyze the realizability and dimensionality requirements of the proposed similarity structure. Experiments on image and tabular datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of SGN for target-guided data augmentation under source-to-target distribution shifts.

AI.tldr: 提出相似性生成网络(SGN)，在源域训练一次后无需参数更新即可泛化到目标域，利用标签诱导的相似性结构和少量目标域代表性样本实现目标引导的数据增强。
AI.motivation: 生成模型在源域训练后，面对目标域分布偏移时生成样本与目标域对齐不良，限制了作为目标域数据增强的有效性；而目标域特异性适应通常需要额外优化和领域专属参数，成本高昂。
AI.method: SGN通过编码器-解码器架构学习由标签诱导的成对相似性结构化的潜空间，同时保留重建信息。生成时，编码少量目标域代表性样本并在潜空间中组合，使生成样本继承目标域特性同时保持类别一致性。
AI.result: 在图像和表格数据集上的实验表明，SGN在源域到目标域分布偏移下，能有效进行目标引导的数据增强。
AI.conclusion: SGN是一种可复用框架，一次训练即可泛化到新目标域，无需参数更新，有效缓解了分布偏移下的数据增强问题。

title: Consistent Feature Transport for Image Relighting
summary: Image relighting modifies illumination while preserving non-lighting content such as identity and geometry. Existing diffusion-based methods often suffer from unstable illumination changes or inconsistent content preservation under complex lighting, as they lack an explicit mechanism to learn feature transformations between images. We reformulate relighting as an illumination feature transport problem and introduce Consistent Feature Transport (CFT), a training principle that explicitly enforces illumination-consistent transport between source and target image distributions. Built upon rectified flow, CFT jointly models noise-to-image generation and illumination-consistent source-to-target transport through trajectory-level supervision. This dual-transport formulation encourages isolation of illumination-specific variations while preserving content-aligned features. To support complex lighting scenarios, we construct a large-scale portrait relighting dataset with diverse relighting effects. Experiments show consistent improvements over existing state-of-the-art relighting approaches and demonstrate that CFT can generalize to other editing tasks, including style transfer. Code is available at https://github.com/Dixin-Lab/CFT.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于修正流的照明特征传输框架CFT，通过轨迹级联合建模噪声-图像生成与源-目标照明传输，在复杂光照条件下实现一致的内容保持与照明编辑，在大规模肖像重光照数据集上取得SOTA结果，并可泛化至风格迁移等任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于扩散的图像重光照方法在复杂光照下缺乏显式的特征变换学习机制，导致光照变化不稳定或内容保持不一致。
AI.method: 将重光照重新定义为照明特征传输问题，提出CFT训练原则。基于修正流，通过轨迹级监督联合建模噪声到图像的生成与照明一致的源到目标传输，实现双传输公式以分离照明变化并保持内容对齐特征。同时构建了大规模肖像重光照数据集。
AI.result: 在肖像重光照任务上一致优于现有SOTA方法，并能泛化至风格迁移等其他编辑任务。
AI.conclusion: CFT通过显式的照明特征传输机制有效解决了复杂光照下重光照的稳定性与内容一致性问题，且具有跨任务泛化能力。

title: Sobek: Streaming Equivariant Tensor Product Convolutions
summary:
Equivariant graph neural networks repeatedly apply edge-conditioned tensor-product convolutions over graph edges. Conventional implementations materialize edge-specific weights, messages, and adjoints, causing tensor-product workspace and memory traffic to grow rapidly with graph size and operator width. This limits feasible workloads and can prevent larger problems from fully utilizing the GPU.
  We show that these edge-sized intermediates are artifacts of the execution schedule, not requirements of the equivariant operator. By reassociating radial projection, spherical-harmonic coupling, and graph aggregation, edge-local products can be consumed directly into bounded receiver-side state. The resulting streaming formulation preserves fully connected multiplicity mixing and extends through forward, backward, and double backward.
  We implement this formulation in Sobek, a generated-CUDA backend, and evaluate it across edge-scaling regimes and varied feature structures. Across two operator families and all three differentiation orders, Sobek is faster in all 75 capacity-matched comparisons, with speedups ranging from $1.2\times$ to $49.7\times$, and reduces peak allocated memory by up to 99\%. It also executes workloads up to two orders of magnitude beyond OpenEquivariance's capacity while retaining near-peak throughput. These results show that edge-scaled tensor-product workspace is a property of the conventional schedule, not of equivariant convolution itself.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sobek，通过重新结合径向投影、球谐耦合和图聚合，将边缘局部乘积直接消耗到有界接收端状态，避免了传统等变图神经网络中边缘大小中间变量的物化，在75个容量匹配对比中全部更优，加速比1.2×至49.7×，峰值内存降低高达99%，并支持超出OpenEquivariance两个数量级的工作负载。
AI.motivation: 传统等变图神经网络在实现边缘条件化的张量积卷积时，会物化边缘特定的权重、消息和伴随量，导致张量积工作空间和内存流量随图大小和算子宽度快速增长，限制了可行工作负载，且无法充分利用GPU。
AI.method: 通过将径向投影、球谐耦合和图聚合重新关联（reassociating），使边缘局部乘积可以直接流入有界的接收端状态，形成流式（streaming）公式，保持全连接多重混合，并扩展到前向、反向和双反向传播。基于该公式实现了生成CUDA后端的Sobek系统。
AI.result: 在两种算子族和所有三个微分阶数上，Sobek在全部75个容量匹配对比中均更快，加速比1.2×至49.7×，峰值内存分配降低高达99%。能执行超出OpenEquivariance两个数量级的工作负载，同时保持近峰值吞吐量。
AI.conclusion: 边缘扩展的张量积工作空间是传统调度方案的产物，而非等变卷积本身的固有要求。

title: Measuring and Improving Complex-Atomic Answer Consistency in Endoscopic VQA
summary: Endoscopic visual question answering (VQA) increasingly asks complex questions that combine several endoscopic answer components rather than isolated factual queries. Such complex answers may be scored as correct even when the same model fails on associated atomic questions. We introduce EndoCA, a paired complex-atomic answer consistency benchmark for evaluating whether complex answers remain consistent with same-image atomic answers. EndoCA contains two suites: EndoCA-Core evaluates compact question-complexity patterns commonly seen in practical endoscopic VQA, and EndoCA-Diagnostic supports controlled analysis across increasing question complexity. We evaluate 11 VLMs spanning open, medical, endoscopy-adapted, and closed-source models on EndoCA. Some VLMs achieve high complex-answer accuracy, yet their atomic-answer accuracy and complex-atomic answer consistency remain substantially lower. To reduce this complex-atomic inconsistency, we introduce Atomic-Support Reconciliation (ASR), a training-free mechanism that uses model-generated atomic answers as contextual premises for answer revision and consistency-guided selective answering. On four selected publicly available models, ASR-Revise improves paired complex-atomic correctness with modest changes in complex-answer accuracy, while ASR-Selective improves accuracy on answered cases by allowing the model to abstain from less reliable cases. Together, EndoCA and ASR provide a consistency-aware benchmark and a training-free mechanism for answer reconciliation and selective answering in endoscopic VQA.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EndoCA基准，用于评估内窥镜VQA中复杂答案与原子答案的一致性，并引入训练无关的ASR机制来改善这种不一致性。
AI.motivation: 内窥镜VQA中的复杂问题常包含多个答案组件，现有评估仅关注复杂答案的正确性，忽略其与同一图像上原子问题答案的一致性，导致模型可能在复杂问题上正确而在原子问题上失败。
AI.method: 构建EndoCA基准（含Core和Diagnostic两个子集），评估11个VLM；提出Atomic-Support Reconciliation (ASR)，包括ASR-Revise（用模型生成的原子答案作为上下文前提进行答案修正）和ASR-Selective（一致性引导的选择性回答）。
AI.result: 部分VLM在复杂问题上准确率高，但原子问题准确率和复杂-原子一致性显著较低；ASR-Revise在适度改变复杂答案准确率的同时提升了复杂-原子一致性；ASR-Selective通过允许模型放弃低可靠性案例提高了已回答案例的准确率。
AI.conclusion: EndoCA和ASR分别提供了内窥镜VQA中一致性感知的基准评估和训练无关的答案修正与选择性回答机制。

title: Generalised Bellman recurrence and three dualities in sequential decision-making
summary: What gives the Bellman equation its form? We show that the recursive properties of optimal value functions follow from three conditions: that the dynamics decomposes through sufficient statistics, that the return decomposes recursively, and that the aggregation of uncertainty is compatible with both. When all three conditions hold on a common state, the Bellman equation arises from their mutual consistency; when one fails, tractability can often be recovered by augmenting the state or by deforming return or dynamics. The same conditions are shown to give rise to three dualities: one between probability and return, one between return and aggregation, and one between aggregation and probability. Our framework reveals these dualities as arising from a single construction, unifying methods developed separately across reinforcement learning, control, and decision theory.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了Bellman方程的形式源于三个条件：动态通过充分统计量分解、回报递归分解、不确定性聚合与两者兼容。当三者同时成立时，Bellman方程自然产生；否则可通过状态增广或变形回报/动态来恢复可解性。这三个条件还衍生出三重对偶性，统一了强化学习、控制和决策理论中的方法。
AI.motivation: 探究Bellman方程形式背后的深层原因，揭示其数学结构的基础条件，并统一强化学习、控制理论和决策理论中的相关方法。
AI.method: 提出了三个核心条件：（1）动态通过充分统计量分解；（2）回报递归分解；（3）不确定性聚合与两者兼容。通过分析这些条件的相互一致性推导Bellman方程，并展示条件缺失时的补救方法（状态增广或变形回报/动态）。
AI.result: 识别出三个条件及其产生的三重对偶性：概率与回报对偶、回报与聚合对偶、聚合与概率对偶。该框架统一了强化学习、控制和决策理论中各自独立发展的方法。
AI.conclusion: Bellman方程的形式源于三个条件的共同作用，其结构具有内在的对偶性，该分析框架为跨领域的方法统一提供了理论基础。

title: CaT-GS: Efficient 3DGS Rendering for Large Scale Scenes via Inter-frame Caching and Tile Scheduling
summary: Recent breakthroughs in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have advanced neural rendering with high fidelity and speed. However, its performance degrades significantly in large-scale scenes due to the computational burden of tile-based rasterization. Existing optimization efforts either require costly scene re-training or focus on narrow aspects of the pipeline, overlooking critical inefficiencies in real-world deployments. Through a comprehensive analysis, we identify three primary sources of redundancy and low GPU utilization: redundant inter-frame pre-processing, viewpoint-based occlusion redundancy, and severe tile-level load imbalance. To address these issues, we propose CaT-GS, a novel and efficient 3DGS rendering pipeline. CaT-GS introduces a speculative multi-frame preprocessing method to eliminate redundant computations across consecutive frames, and an inter-frame caching mechanism to eliminate viewpoint redundant rendering stages. Furthermore, it refactors rasterization tasks with a dedicated kernel to mitigate tile load imbalance, significantly boosting GPU utilization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that CaT-GS achieves a speedup of up to 10 times over the original 3DGS and up to 70% over previous state-of-the-art methods, establishing a new benchmark for high-fidelity, real-time rendering of large-scale scenes.

AI.tldr: CaT-GS通过投机性多帧预处理、帧间缓存机制和重构光栅化任务内核，在保持高保真度的同时，实现了最高10倍于原始3DGS、最高70%优于此前最优方法的加速效果，为大规模场景实时渲染设立了新基准。
AI.motivation: 3DGS在大规模场景中因基于瓦片的光栅化计算负担导致性能显著下降，现有优化要么需要昂贵的场景重训练，要么仅关注流水线的狭窄环节，忽略了实际部署中的关键低效问题。
AI.method: CaT-GS包含三大核心创新：(1) 投机性多帧预处理方法，消除连续帧间的冗余计算；(2) 帧间缓存机制，消除基于视点的冗余渲染阶段；(3) 专用内核重构光栅化任务，缓解瓦片级负载不平衡，显著提升GPU利用率。
AI.result: 在广泛实验中，CaT-GS相比原始3DGS实现最高10倍加速，相比此前最优方法实现最高70%加速，为大规模场景高保真实时渲染树立了新标杆。
AI.conclusion: CaT-GS通过系统性地识别并解决3DGS渲染流水线中的三大冗余与低效来源（帧间预处理冗余、视点遮挡冗余、瓦片级负载不平衡），在不依赖场景重训练的条件下大幅提升了大规模场景的渲染效率。

title: SelectInfer: Selective Neuron Loading and Computation for On-Device LLMs
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities across a range of Natural Language Processing (NLP) tasks, but their high computational and memory demands pose significant challenges for deployment on resource-constrained edge devices. Existing approaches to model compression and optimization often rely on coarse-grained pruning or quantization, which can compromise accuracy or require re-training and fine-tuning. In this work, we introduce SelectInfer, a neuron-level optimization framework that enables efficient LLM inference on edge devices through selective neuron loading and computation. By profiling and identifying both task-specific and general-purpose neurons using an offline LLM profiler, SelectInfer implements two key optimizations: selective loading, which reduces memory footprint by selectively loading a subset of neurons that were identified to be most important during the offline stage, and selective computation, which dynamically computes only the most relevant neurons at runtime. Evaluation across multiple datasets shows that SelectInfer achieves significant reductions in memory footprint and computation while preserving task performance, making it a practical step towards enabling LLM deployment on edge devices

AI.tldr: SelectInfer是面向边缘设备LLM部署的神经元级优化框架，通过离线识别重要神经元并实现选择性加载与动态计算，在显著减少内存占用和计算量的同时保持任务性能。
AI.motivation: LLM在资源受限的边缘设备上部署面临高计算和内存需求的挑战，现有粗粒度剪枝或量化方法可能损害准确性或需要重新训练。
AI.method: 提出SelectInfer框架：1）离线LLM分析器识别任务特定和通用神经元；2）选择性加载仅加载最重要的神经元子集以减少内存占用；3）运行时选择性计算仅计算最相关的神经元。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的评估表明，SelectInfer在显著降低内存占用和计算量的同时保持了任务性能。
AI.conclusion: SelectInfer是实现LLM在边缘设备上部署的实用方案，通过神经元级选择性优化在效率与性能之间取得了有效平衡。

title: Leveraging Dissimilarity Invariance as a Robust Anchor for Learning with Noisy Labels
summary: Deep learning models excel in visual recognition but suffer severe performance drops when training labels are corrupted by noise. Under label noise prior work cannot learn accurate similarities and thus misguide the learning process. In this paper, we uncover a complementary and novel phenomenon, Dissimilarity Invariance, whereby semantic dissimilarity between unrelated samples remains stable despite label noise. Leveraging this insight, we propose NegScale, a plug-and-play framework that shifts focus from fragile similarity to robust dissimilarity. NegScale integrates: (1) Structured Negative Orthogonality Penalty (SNOP), enforcing subspace orthogonality for unrelated samples; and (2) Dissimilarity-Calibrated Similarity Adjustment (DCSA), suppressing spurious similarity using dissimilarity anchors. We also give theoretical analysis that proves Dissimilarity Invariance and the effectiveness of NegScale. Empirical results demonstrate that NegScale consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, establishing new benchmarks on CIFAR with synthetic noise and real-world datasets.

AI.tldr: 提出NegScale框架，利用标签噪声下语义不相似性保持稳定的现象（不相似性不变性），通过结构化负正交惩罚和不相似性校准相似性调整，提升含噪标签下的视觉识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在标签噪声下难以学习准确相似性，导致学习过程被误导。作者发现互补的新现象——不相似性在噪声下保持稳定，从而希望利用鲁棒的不相似性来修正脆弱的相似性学习。
AI.method: 提出NegScale框架，包含两个核心模块：(1) 结构化负正交惩罚（SNOP），强制不相关样本的子空间正交；(2) 不相似性校准相似性调整（DCSA），利用不相似性锚点抑制虚假相似性。同时提供理论分析证明不相似性不变性及NegScale有效性。
AI.result: 在CIFAR合成噪声数据集和真实噪声数据集上，NegScale一致优于现有最先进方法，建立新的基准。
AI.conclusion: 不相似性不变性为标签噪声下的鲁棒学习提供了新视角，NegScale通过利用鲁棒的不相似性有效缓解了噪声标签对相似性学习的负面影响。

title: Enhancing Rubric-based RL via Self-Distillation
summary: Rubric-based RL has recently shown promise in improving LLMs on open-ended tasks. A widely recognized limitation of rubric-based RL is limited exploration: criteria that no rollout manages to satisfy (Unexplored Criteria, UC) receive no optimization signal. Recent methods address this by incorporating rubric information as external guidance during rollout, yet they introduce a train-inference mismatch: the policy is optimized on rollouts produced under external guidance while this guidance is absent at inference time, causing error accumulation through autoregressive decoding. Moreover, these exploration-focused approaches overlook a fundamentally different failure mode that we term Suppressed Criteria (SC) -- criteria that are satisfied by some rollouts yet whose learning signals are lost during optimization because scalar reward aggregation assigns them non-positive aggregate advantages. Our analysis reveals that SC are remarkably prevalent: over 57% of samples exhibit this failure mode throughout training, with an average of 1.8 SC per sample. To simultaneously address both UC and SC without introducing training-inference mismatch, we propose Criterion-Distilled Policy Optimization (CriPO), which enhances rubric-based RL via on-policy self-distillation. For UC, CriPO constructs a criterion-injection self-teacher and computes a localized forward-KL loss to inject missing behaviors into the policy. For SC, CriPO employs a counterfactual self-teacher to locate criterion-relevant tokens in negative-advantage rollouts and flips their token-level advantages to positive values, preserving useful patterns that would otherwise be suppressed. Experiments on medicine and science benchmarks demonstrate that CriPO consistently outperforms rubric-based RL, achieving stronger final performance with approximately $2\times$ fewer optimization steps.

AI.tldr: 本文提出CriPO方法，通过自蒸馏同时解决基于评分标准的强化学习中的未探索标准（UC）和被抑制标准（SC）问题，无需引入训练-推理不匹配，在医学和科学基准上以约2倍的优化步骤实现更优性能。
AI.motivation: 基于评分标准的强化学习在开放任务中表现良好，但存在两个关键失效模式：一是未探索标准（UC），即没有探索样本能满足的标准无法获得优化信号；二是被抑制标准（SC），即虽被满足但因标量奖励聚合导致非正优势而丢失学习信号。现有方法通过引入外部引导解决UC，却带来了训练-推理不匹配问题，且忽视了SC这一更隐蔽的失败模式。统计数据表明SC普遍存在（超57%样本、平均每个样本1.8个SC），亟需同时解决两种问题且不引入新缺陷的方法。
AI.method: 提出CriPO（Criterion-Distilled Policy Optimization），通过在线策略自蒸馏增强基于评分标准的强化学习。针对UC：构建标准注入自教师，计算局部前向KL散度损失，将缺失行为注入策略。针对SC：使用反事实自教师定位负优势轨迹中与标准相关的token，将其token级优势翻转为正，保留本会被抑制的有用模式。该方法完全在线执行，不引入训练-推理不匹配。
AI.result: 在医学和科学基准上的实验表明，CriPO一致优于标准基于评分标准的强化学习方法，以约2倍更少的优化步骤达到更强的最终性能。
AI.conclusion: CriPO通过自蒸馏机制同时解决了未探索标准（UC）和被抑制标准（SC）两个问题，无需外部引导，避免了训练-推理不匹配，显著提升了基于评分标准强化学习的样本效率和最终性能。

title: Locality-Aware Density Control for Efficient Gaussian-based Image Representation
summary: 2D Gaussian Splatting is an attractive direction for image representation due to its explicit formulation, fast rasterization, and favorable decoding efficiency. The representation quality of this paradigm depends on the proper allocation of Gaussian capacity to the demanding regions. However, existing methods fail to allocate Gaussian capacity efficiently during optimization: under-reconstructed content is often refined in a fragmented pixel-wise manner, while neighboring optimized Gaussians with similar attributes are redundantly retained. This inefficiency motivates the need for a density control framework that jointly addresses insufficient allocation in under-reconstructed regions and redundant allocation in over-reconstructed regions. Our key insight is that this framework should exploit two complementary forms of locality: the local continuity of reconstruction errors in image space for improved Gaussian allocation, and the local similarity of neighboring Gaussians in Gaussian space for redundant elimination. Based on this insight, we propose Locality-Aware Density Control (LocoADC), a plug-and-play framework that improves Gaussian capacity utilization through Region-wise Gaussian Densification (RGD) and Similarity-Driven Gaussian Merging (SDGM) strategies, together with a local color consistency constraint for more reliable merging. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets show that LocoADC consistently improves multiple baselines by enabling more effective local Gaussian allocation, including a 2.93 dB PSNR gain over GI on the CLIC dataset under the same 30k Gaussian budget. Code is available at: \textit{https://github.com/ChenJiaCong-1005/LocoADC}.

AI.tldr: 提出LocoADC框架，通过区域高斯稠密化和相似性驱动高斯合并，解决2D高斯泼溅中高斯容量分配不均的问题，在CLIC数据集上比GI提升2.93 dB PSNR。
AI.motivation: 现有2D高斯泼溅方法在高斯容量分配上存在效率低下问题：欠重建区域以碎片化逐像素方式细化，而过重建区域中属性相似的相邻高斯被冗余保留，缺乏统一的密度控制框架。
AI.method: 提出Locality-Aware Density Control (LocoADC)框架，包含三个关键策略：1）Region-wise Gaussian Densification (RGD)利用图像空间重建误差的局部连续性进行区域级高斯分配；2）Similarity-Driven Gaussian Merging (SDGM)利用高斯空间的局部相似性消除冗余；3）局部颜色一致性约束增强合并可靠性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，LocoADC一致提升了多种基线方法的性能，在CLIC数据集上以相同3万高斯预算相比GI获得2.93 dB PSNR增益。
AI.conclusion: LocoADC作为即插即用框架，通过利用两种互补的局部性（图像空间重建误差连续性和高斯空间相邻相似性），有效改善了高斯容量利用率。

title: The Label Complexity of Class-Conditional Coverage under Distribution Shift
summary:
Standard evaluation of many recognition systems contains distribution shift by construction, since benchmarks place disjoint conditions in the training and test splits. Under such a shift, split conformal prediction keeps marginal coverage near the nominal level while per-class coverage fails silently: on a real cross-subject skeleton benchmark, marginal coverage stays near ninety percent, the worst action class is covered about seventy percent of the time, and ten of the sixty classes fall below eighty percent coverage.
  We characterize the cost of restoring per-class validity. First, an impossibility: once the shift acts jointly on the covariates and the labels, the target class-conditional score law is unidentified from source labels and an unlabeled target sample, so no label-free method attains per-class coverage that is at once valid and efficient. Second, we make the cost precise: per-class validity alone needs only a handful of target labels per class, while the label count necessary and sufficient for validity together with per-class efficiency grows as the inverse square of the efficiency tolerance and the logarithm of the number of classes, with matching upper and lower bounds. Third, within the evaluated prediction-powered inference family, even the most favorable use of the classifier's own pseudo-labels on an unbounded unlabeled target pool improves efficiency by at most a small constant factor where coverage collapses.
  Skeleton action recognition is our real-data case study. A per-class calibration using source labels alone recovers a substantial share of the per-class gap while the shift preserves marginal coverage, and stops helping exactly when marginal coverage itself breaks. Three real shifts of increasing severity trace this boundary, and the same collapse and recovery appears on a natural-image corruption benchmark, beyond any single modality.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了识别系统中分布偏移下分层保形预测的类别级覆盖失效问题，证明了无标签方法无法同时实现有效且高效的类别级覆盖，量化了实现类别级有效性所需的标签数量，并通过骨架动作识别和自然图像损坏基准实验验证了理论结果。
AI.motivation: 标准识别系统的评估通常存在分布偏移（训练集和测试集分布不同），导致保形预测的边际覆盖率虽接近标称水平，但逐类覆盖率（per-class coverage）严重不平衡。作者旨在揭示这一问题的严重性、分析恢复逐类覆盖有效性的代价，并探索实际可行的解决方案。
AI.method: 理论分析：证明当分布偏移同时作用于协变量和标签时，目标类别条件得分分布无法从源标签和无标签目标样本中识别，因此无标签方法无法同时实现有效且高效的逐类覆盖；量化实现逐类有效性所需标签数的下界和上界（与效率容忍度的平方成反比，与类别数的对数成正比）；在预测驱动推理框架内分析伪标签对效率的有限提升。实验验证：在真实跨主体骨架动作识别基准和自然图像损坏基准上进行案例研究。
AI.result: 跨主体骨架数据集上，边际覆盖率接近90%，但最差动作类别覆盖率仅约70%，60个类别中有10个低于80%。仅使用源标签进行逐类校准可显著缩小逐类覆盖缺口，但当边际覆盖率本身崩溃时该方法失效。三种不同严重程度的真实偏移展示了这一边界。自然图像损坏基准上观察到相同的崩溃与恢复模式。
AI.conclusion: 恢复逐类覆盖有效性需要目标标签，仅靠无标签目标样本和伪标签无法同时实现有效且高效的逐类覆盖；但仅需每类少量目标标签即可实现逐类有效性；伪标签对效率的提升有限（至多常数因子）。

title: MuViSeg: Multi-View Segment Correspondences from Dense Geometry Priors
summary: Classical image correspondence is solved at the level of sparse keypoints or dense pixels, but the systems that consume these matches - object-level mapping, topological navigation, scene-graph maintenance - reason about whole objects. Recent work narrows this gap by matchng directly at the level of instance segments: a class-agnostic segmenter partitions each image, and per-segment descriptors are obtained by pooling features from large 3D foundation models over the masks. We build on this segment-level matching paradigm and propose three learned matching heads: a LightGlue-style attention head with DoubleSoftmax scoring on frozen MASt3R descriptors; a DPT-style multi-scale fusion module that exposes layered spatial detail from the VGGT foundation model before pooling; and - as our main contribution - a multi-view extension that performs joint self-attention over segments drawn from several views at once, recovering transitive correspondences that strictly pairwise matchers cannot reach. Under a stratified zero-shot protocol on Replica and Virtual KITTI 2 with controlled viewpoint baselines from 0 deg to 180 deg, the LightGlue-style head improves over a parameter-free Sinkhorn matcher on the same MASt3R backbone by +4.85 AUPRC on Replica and +25.9 AUPRC on Virtual KITTI 2. Dropped into the RoboHop topological navigation pipeline on the Habitat-Matterport 3D (HM3D) Instance Image Navigation benchmark without retraining, our multi-view variant raises success rate from 50% to 70%, and our LightGlue-style head raises SPL from 45.7 to 59.1.

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种学习型匹配头用于段级图像对应：LightGlue风格注意力头、DPT风格多尺度融合模块，以及核心贡献——多视图扩展。后者通过联合自注意力处理多视图段，恢复成对匹配无法获得的传递对应。在零样本协议下，LightGlue风格头在Replica和Virtual KITTI 2上分别提升+4.85和+25.9 AUPRC。多视图变体在HM3D导航基准上将成功率从50%提升至70%，SPL从45.7提升至59.1。
AI.motivation: 经典图像对应在稀疏关键点或密集像素层面解决，但下游系统（如对象级建图、拓扑导航、场景图维护）在整体对象层面推理。现有工作通过实例分割直接在分割段级别进行匹配来缩小这一差距，但仍存在改进空间。
AI.method: 提出三种学习型匹配头：1) LightGlue风格注意力头，在冻结的MASt3R描述符上使用DoubleSoftmax评分；2) DPT风格多尺度融合模块，在VGGT基础模型池化前暴露分层空间细节；3) 核心贡献——多视图扩展，对来自多个视图的段执行联合自注意力，恢复成对匹配器无法获得的传递对应。
AI.result: 在Replica和Virtual KITTI 2上，LightGlue头比无参数Sinkhorn匹配器分别提升+4.85和+25.9 AUPRC。在HM3D导航基准上，多视图变体将成功率从50%提升至70%，LightGlue头将SPL从45.7提升至59.1。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的段级匹配头，特别是多视图扩展，显著优于基线方法，并能直接提升下游拓扑导航任务的性能，验证了从对象级对应到机器人导航等应用的有效性。

title: Empowering On-Device Model Adaptation with an Edge AI Inference Accelerator
comment: Accepted at the ITEM Workshop, held in conjunction with ECML-PKDD 2026. To appear in the ECML-PKDD joint post-workshop proceedings
summary: On-device model adaptation is essential to enable lifelong personalization on resource-constrained hardware, but compute, power, and memory limitations of such devices make end-to-end backpropagation impractical for modern deep neural networks. This work proposes a heterogeneous adaptation pipeline that repurposes a commercial edge AI inference accelerator, Hailo-8L, for frozen-backbone feature extraction during on-device training. The computational graph is partitioned so that the pre-trained backbone is quantized to INT8 and run on the accelerator, while only a lightweight FP32 classification head is fine-tuned on the host CPU, enabling frequent, energy-efficient in-field updates with most weights remaining fixed. Across multiple architectures and datasets, this pipeline achieves up to 15.4x faster wall-clock training time compared to a Raspberry Pi 5 CPU baseline, offers competitive throughput in favorable settings, and consistently reduces energy per sample. Post-training quantization restoration is shown to be crucial for preserving the quality of accelerator-generated features and mitigating accuracy loss in quantization-sensitive architectures. Overall, the results demonstrate a practical approach to efficient on-device adaptation using inference-oriented edge accelerators. The implementation is available at https://github.com/MatPiech/accelerator-training.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种异构适配流水线，利用商用边缘AI推理加速器（Hailo-8L）进行冻结骨干网络的特征提取，仅在CPU上微调轻量分类头，实现资源受限设备上的高效模型适配，相比树莓派5基线实现最高15.4倍训练加速，并降低能耗。
AI.motivation: 端侧模型适配对于实现资源受限硬件上的终身个性化至关重要，但计算、功耗和内存限制使得现代深度神经网络的端到端反向传播不切实际。
AI.method: 将计算图划分为两个部分：预训练骨干网络量化为INT8并在推理加速器（Hailo-8L）上运行以提取特征，仅将轻量FP32分类头在主机CPU上进行微调。同时引入训练后量化恢复技术来保证加速器生成特征的质量。
AI.result: 在多种架构和数据集上，相比树莓派5 CPU基线实现了最高15.4倍的训练加速，在有利设定下具有竞争力的吞吐量，并且一致降低了每样本能耗。
AI.conclusion: 该工作展示了一种利用面向推理的边缘加速器实现高效端侧适配的实用方案。训练后量化恢复对于保持特征质量、减轻量化敏感架构的精度损失至关重要。

title: Exploration Matters for Escaping the Blur Trap in 3D Gaussian Splatting
summary: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) employs Gaussian primitives for explicit scene representation, facilitating real-time, high-fidelity reconstruction and novel view synthesis of complex scenes. However, the explicit modeling inherent in 3DGS introduces a gradient bias during optimization, rendering its non-convex optimization process highly susceptible to convergence toward local suboptimal solutions. This constitutes a fundamental limitation in 3DGS optimization, which we term the Blur Trap. To address this limitation, we integrate simple explicit exploration into the 3DGS optimization framework. First, through rigorous mathematical analysis of the 3DGS optimization formulation, we identify the underlying optimization bias responsible for the Blur Trap and categorize it into two distinct subtypes: the Far-Side Blur Trap and the Near-Side Blur Trap. Subsequently, we propose two highly straightforward exploration strategies (Random Seeding and Random Splitting) to mitigate the far-side and near-side blur traps, respectively. Experimental validation demonstrates that the incorporation of these exploration operators effectively and complementarily overcome the Blur Trap, achieving high-quality rendering performance across multiple datasets. Project page: https://chengbo-wang.github.io/ExploreGS/

AI.tldr: 本文发现3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）优化中存在的梯度偏差会导致收敛到局部次优解（称为“模糊陷阱”），并分为远侧和近侧两种类型。通过引入两种简单的探索策略（随机播种和随机分裂），有效解决了该问题，在多个数据集上实现了高质量渲染。
AI.motivation: 3DGS的显式建模在优化过程中引入梯度偏差，导致非凸优化易陷入局部次优解，这是3DGS优化的一个根本性局限，即“模糊陷阱”。
AI.method: 首先对3DGS优化公式进行严格数学分析，识别出导致模糊陷阱的优化偏差，并将其分为远侧模糊陷阱和近侧模糊陷阱两类。随后提出两种简单的探索策略：随机播种（Random Seeding）用于缓解远侧模糊陷阱，随机分裂（Random Splitting）用于缓解近侧模糊陷阱。
AI.result: 实验验证表明，这两种探索操作能够有效且互补地克服模糊陷阱，在多个数据集上实现高质量的渲染性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过简单的显式探索策略即可有效解决3DGS优化中的模糊陷阱问题，提升渲染质量。

title: LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks
summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出体验式学习（EL），将基于评分规则的强化学习中的标量奖励替换为来自裁判模型的高带宽文本反馈，通过上下文蒸馏将经验知识内化到策略中，在开放任务上显著优于传统RL，且具有更好的泛化性和抗奖励破解能力。
AI.motivation: 传统RL将基于评分规则的评估压缩为标量奖励，丢弃了丰富的文本反馈，并将具有不同质量特征的响应混为一谈，导致学习信号贫乏。
AI.method: 将LLM-as-a-Judge的反馈模型改造为LLM-as-a-Coach，教练模型将对每个在线策略响应的评估提炼为可迁移的体验知识，以此条件化教师模型，并通过在线策略上下文蒸馏将体验内化到策略中。
AI.result: 在两种策略家族上，使用策略自身或专有模型的反馈，EL在保留和未见开放任务上均优于基于评分规则的RL，且泛化能力更强，缓解了奖励破解问题。
AI.conclusion: 体验知识是一种比标量奖励更丰富、泛化性更强的学习信号，适用于非可验证任务的后训练。

title: Fine-Detail Monocular Geometry Estimation with Self-Guided Sparse Volumetric Refinement
summary: Monocular geometry estimation has recently achieved impressive performance across diverse scenes. However, state-of-the-art models still face notable distortion in local 3D structure, especially in fine details, like thin structures and small objects. We attribute this limitation to an architectural mismatch: most current models decode 3D geometry within a 2D parameterization, where feature interactions are governed by image-plane proximity rather than true 3D spatial relationships. This inadvertently mixes features from geometrically distant surfaces, resulting in over-smoothed geometry particularly around thin or elongated structure. In this paper, we propose a fine-detail monocular geometry estimation with Self-Guided Sparse 3D Refinement (SSR) that lifts monocular geometry modeling from 2D image space to 3D space for high-fidelity metric-scale point maps. Our model lifts the coarse point map from a foundation base model onto a sparse voxel shell and refines it via SSR. The SSR employs sparse convolutions that aggregate features based on 3D spatial locality, avoiding feature mixing across depth discontinuities. Extensive experiments on diverse datasets demonstrate that our method significantly outperforms existing approaches in recovering fine detailed 3D geometry across both quantitative metrics and qualitative visualizations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出自引导稀疏3D细化（SSR）方法，将单目几何估计从2D图像空间提升到3D空间，通过在稀疏体素壳上利用3D空间局部性的稀疏卷积进行特征聚合，有效解决了现有模型在薄结构和细小物体上因2D参数化导致的局部3D结构畸变和过度平滑问题，在多个数据集上取得了优于现有方法的精细几何恢复效果。
AI.motivation: 现有最先进的单目几何估计模型在局部3D结构，尤其是薄结构和细小物体等精细细节上存在显著畸变。作者将这一局限归因于架构不匹配：当前模型在2D参数化内解码3D几何，其特征交互由图像平面邻近性而非真实3D空间关系决定，这无意中混合了几何距离较远的表面特征，导致特别是薄或细长结构周围的几何过度平滑。
AI.method: 提出SSR（Self-Guided Sparse 3D Refinement）方法，将粗粒度点云从基础模型提升到稀疏体素壳上，然后通过SSR进行细化。SSR采用基于3D空间局部性的稀疏卷积进行特征聚合，避免跨深度不连续区域的特征混合，从而将单目几何建模从2D图像空间提升到3D空间，生成高保真的度量尺度点图。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在定量指标和定性可视化两方面均显著优于现有方法，特别是在恢复精细细节的3D几何方面表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过将单目几何估计提升到3D空间并使用基于3D空间局部性的稀疏卷积进行细化，可以有效解决2D参数化带来的特征混合问题，显著改善薄结构和细小物体的几何恢复质量。

title: Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections for Parameter-Efficient Finetuning
summary: Most parameter-efficient finetuning (PEFT) methods adapt weights or activations, thus leaving one of the key Transformer components unchanged: residual connections. This paper investigates Manifold-Constrained Hyper-Connections (mHC), a generalisation of residual connections, as a novel PEFT approach, wrapping frozen OLMo-2 backbones with learned residual routing modules. We find that mHC can finetune frozen Transformers, but that its role differs fundamentally from the original pre-training setting: in finetuning, fixing the residual mixing matrix to identity often improves performance. As a standalone PEFT method, mHC does not consistently outperform LoRA. However, at matched trainable parameter budgets, mHC+LoRA combinations improve language-modelling loss and show task-dependent benchmark gains at both 1B and 7B scale. Overall, our results identify residual routing as a distinct and promising novel PEFT axis.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了流形约束超连接（mHC），将残差连接泛化为一种新的参数高效微调方法。研究发现mHC可以微调冻结Transformer，但在微调中固定残差混合矩阵为单位矩阵通常能提升性能。单独作为PEFT方法时，mHC未持续优于LoRA，但在匹配可训练参数预算下，mHC+LoRA组合能改善语言建模损失并在1B和7B规模上显示任务相关的基准提升。
AI.motivation: 现有PEFT方法通常调整权重或激活值，但忽略了Transformer的关键组件——残差连接。本文旨在探索将残差连接泛化作为一种新的PEFT维度。
AI.method: 提出流形约束超连接（mHC），作为残差连接的泛化形式，将冻结的OLMo-2骨干网络包裹可学习的残差路由模块。在微调设置中比较了mHC与LoRA以及二者的组合效果。
AI.result: mHC可微调冻结Transformer；微调中固定残差混合矩阵为单位矩阵更好；单独mHC未持续优于LoRA；mHC+LoRA组合在匹配参数量下改善语言建模损失，并在1B和7B规模上显示任务相关基准提升。
AI.conclusion: 残差路由是一种独特且有前景的新型PEFT方向，值得进一步探索。

title: Keyframe-Anchored Identity Preservation for Sequential-Action Video Generation
summary: Identity-preserving text-to-video generation aims to synthesize a video that accurately follows a textual description while maintaining the recognizability of a user-specified subject throughout. The IPVG26 challenge extends this framework from a single holistic prompt to a temporally structured specification. The model additionally receives a sequence of timestamped action captions and must render the subject performing these actions in the specified order. This temporal structure presents a challenge not encountered in previous identity-preserving generation tasks, as the subject must continuously perform a scripted sequence of distinct actions while maintaining a consistent identity. However, end-to-end video generators are prone to appearance drift as motion accumulates and the depicted actions change. We address this challenge with a training-free, three-stage pipeline framework. An action-aware prompt polishment stage first rewrites the inputs into image-generation prompts that specify the terminal state of each action. An identity-preserving generation stage then produces the keyframe sequence by conditioning each frame jointly on the reference identity and its predecessor, thereby decoupling time-invariant appearance from time-varying pose. Finally, an identity-aware inference enhancement stage synthesizes the intermediate segments using multi-reference guidance and identity-driven noise searching, both of which reinforce identity fidelity during sampling. Our method ranked third on the official Track 2 leaderboard, demonstrating competitive performance and strong generality.

AI.tldr: 本文针对身份保持文本到视频生成中的时间结构化挑战（即主体需按顺序执行一系列带时间戳的动作），提出了一种无需训练的三阶段流水线框架，包括动作感知提示润色、身份保持关键帧生成和身份感知推理增强，在IPVG26挑战赛Track 2中获得第三名。
AI.motivation: 现有身份保持视频生成任务仅处理单一整体提示，而IPVG26挑战引入了时间结构化的规范（带时间戳的动作序列），导致主体在连续执行不同动作时容易出现外观漂移问题。
AI.method: 提出无训练的三阶段流水线：1) 动作感知提示润色阶段，将输入重写为指定各动作终止状态的图像生成提示；2) 身份保持生成阶段，通过联合条件化参考身份和前驱帧来生成关键帧序列，解耦时不变外观与时变姿态；3) 身份感知推理增强阶段，利用多参考引导和身份驱动噪声搜索合成中间片段。
AI.result: 在IPVG26官方Track 2排行榜上排名第三，展示了具有竞争力的性能和强泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需额外训练即可有效解决时间结构化身份保持视频生成中的外观漂移问题，具有良好的泛化性。

title: Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints
summary: Structure-based drug design (SBDD) leverages the 3D structure of protein targets, often complemented by other spatial constraints, to generate candidate binding molecules. While diffusion models have dominated as a leading paradigm for high-quality 3D molecule generation, LLM-based methods are rapidly emerging in molecular design and have shown competitive performance in pocket-conditioned molecular generation. However, their ability to reason about physics and 3D spatial environments is largely underexplored. In this work, we systematically analyze whether current general-purpose LLMs are capable of navigating complex 3D constraints compared to established baselines such as specialized diffusion models. We consider 3D ligand generation conditioned on protein pockets together with ligand- and interaction-derived spatial constraints, including anchor fragments, pharmacophore points, and mandatory pocket-ligand interactions. To enable this evaluation, we introduce 3D-Fit - a token-efficient benchmarking strategy for assessing LLM performance on multi-conditioned spatial molecule generation. Our findings reveal a clear pattern in LLM spatial capabilities: while they still lag behind state-of-the-art approaches, they are promising and can handle multiple spatial constraints simultaneously, enabling scaling to heterogeneous setups.

AI.tldr: 本文系统评估了通用大语言模型（LLM）在三维空间约束下的分子生成能力，并与扩散模型等基线方法对比。为此提出了3D-Fit基准测试策略，发现LLM虽落后于最先进方法，但在处理多重空间约束方面展现出潜力。
AI.motivation: 基于结构的药物设计（SBDD）利用蛋白质靶点3D结构生成候选分子，但现有LLM在物理和3D空间推理方面的能力尚未被充分探索。本文旨在系统评估LLM在复杂3D约束下的表现。
AI.method: 设计了3D-Fit基准测试策略，用于评估LLM在多条件约束下的三维分子生成性能。条件包括蛋白质口袋、锚定片段、药效团点和口袋-配体强制相互作用。对比对象为扩散模型等专业基线方法。
AI.result: LLM在处理多重空间约束方面具有潜力，能够同时处理多种空间约束并扩展到异构设置，但整体性能仍落后于最先进的专业方法。
AI.conclusion: 通用LLM在约束下的3D分子生成能力有前景但尚不成熟，需进一步改进才能匹敌扩散模型等专业方法。

title: HAS: Highlight-guided Attention Steering for Multimodal LLM Video Summarization
summary: Video understanding has become more and more important with the growth of Artificial Intelligence (AI) for video generation. Recently, Multimodal Large Language Model(M-LLM) has shown its capability in video understanding. Video summarization, a specific domain of video understanding, has proven its importance for efficient navigation and retrieval. Both video understanding and video summarization require a good selection of key frames in a video. Current video summarization methods heavily focus on the selected key frames and correlated segment captions. However, existing approaches overlook the perspective of treating the importance of the frames globally. We argue that using discrete selected frames for summarization will not only reduce the understanding coherence, but also lost important information in the video, as well as wasting the original capacity of the MLLMs. In this paper, we propose HAS, a Highlight-guided Attention Steering method for video summarization. We consider a challenging but practical setting where the video given to MLLMs for summarize should be continuous but with highlight guidance. HAS mainly consists of two parts: The first part is to find a continuous frame-level highlight distribution for the video globally. The second part is to apply the highlight distribution as an attention steering vector for the MLLM, targeting a better understanding of the video, and thus during the model inference time, putting more attention on the highlighted frames, while avoiding lost entire information on less highlighted frames through putting less attention instead of forgetting them. We evaluated HAS on a variety of benchmarks, and it has shown convincing performance in video summarization.

AI.tldr: HAS是一种基于高亮引导注意力转向的视频摘要方法，通过全局帧级高亮分布作为注意力引导向量，使MLLM在连续视频中关注重点帧的同时不丢失完整信息，在多个基准测试中表现优异。
AI.motivation: 现有视频摘要方法依赖离散关键帧选择，导致理解连贯性降低、重要信息丢失，且未能充分利用MLLM的原始能力。作者认为需要从全局视角对待帧的重要性。
AI.method: HAS包含两部分：1) 为整个视频找到连续的帧级高亮分布（全局重要性度量）；2) 将该高亮分布作为注意力转向向量注入MLLM，使模型在推理时对高亮帧投入更多注意力，对非高亮帧减少注意力而非完全遗忘。
AI.result: 在多个视频摘要基准测试上取得了令人信服的表现。
AI.conclusion: 全局连续的注意力引导优于离散帧选择策略，既能保持理解连贯性又能保留完整视频信息。

title: Totally Positive Matrices and the Highest-Order Coefficients of the Characteristic Polynomial
comment: 26 pages, 12 figures, 3 tables. Published open access in Linear Algebra and its Applications
summary: We investigate the extent to which totally positive matrices can be distinguished through the highest-order coefficients of their characteristic polynomials. To identify the most informative coefficients, we also employed neural-network classifiers together with feature-attribution methods.
